author: David
title: Séjour à Banyuwangi
text:
Le petit déjeuner était immense avec énormément de choix pour un petit déjeuner asiatique.
A l’accueil, le personnel était efficace et serviable, ils ont pu nous réserver un tour pour le mont Ijen pour le lendemain et nous préparer un bon petit déjeuner hors des heures. Franchement, il n’y a rien à dire là dessus, c’était parfait ! 
Le chambre était bien équipée et propre. Le lit était très grand et confortable.
La chambre était très très mal insonorisée, du coup on entend la route, les voisins et la mosquée qui se trouve juste à côté. Même avec des boules quies qu’ils nous nous sommes fait réveiller…
Au restaurant, le personnel était très lent, nous avons dû attendre longtemps alors qu’il n’y avait que nous !

title: Comforting experience for family stay in Banyuwangi
text: Kami menginap di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi selama 3 hari 2 malam untuk liburan sekolah. First impression saya ketika memasuki lobby, dengan ceiling yang tinggi, terkesan adem, simple namun tetap elegan. Lokasi hotel dekat dengan kuliner legendaris dan cafe kekinian, sehingga tidak jauh untuk menikmati pusat kota Banyuwangi. Kebersihan kamar hotel keramahan dan staff yang helpfull membuat kita lebih nyaman. Akan lebih baik lagi apabila sarapan pagi lebih bervariasi. Mungkin krn space yg kurang membuat variasi makanan dan tatanan peletakan cuttleries menjadi terbatas. Terima kasih Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi 🫰🏼

Fun fact, karna perjalanan menuju ke BW dari luar kota itu jauuuh, jadi ketika disambut lebih hangat itu jauh lebih berkesan.

author: Agus Budy Wuysang
text: The hotel is great, and the family room is spacious enough for four people. Room service was excellent and prompt. Both the room and the toilet were spotlessly clean. However, dining at the 3rd-floor Ijen Restaurant was a letdown; we only ordered HK fried rice and rawon, but it took an hour to be served. Worse, the rawon broth wasn't hot enough, and the salted egg was served straight from the fridge. While the rawon itself was mediocre, the HK fried rice was quite tasty. Overall, it was a good stay, but stay away from the restaurant. Modern fitness center. Modern fitness center.

text: Tempat strategis,makanan ok..pelayanan ramah

author: Doddy Kurniawan
text: I recently stayed at Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi and overall had a good experience. What I liked: • The hotel is relatively clean and well maintained. • The room was clean, comfortable, the balcony is clean and well maintained • Breakfast offered a decent variety of choices. • Check-in and check-out processes were efficient and fast. • The parking area was spacious, well-lit, and convenient. What could be improved: • When I came for breakfast around 9:00 AM, many food items had already run out. • Refill requests were not handled promptly; some items took more than 15 minutes to be replenished. • In several situations, the service felt overly focused on SOPs rather than guest experience and flexibility. Examples include the one-plate borrowing policy, child policy implementation, and all drinking water being chargeable. Overall, this is a good hotel with solid facilities. However, at a room rate exceeding IDR 1 million per night, I would expect a higher level of service, responsiveness, and hospitality.

title: RECOMMENDED

1. all staffs are very helpful

3. suggestion:
a. variant of bf menu: seems menu is changed every 2 days, but almost similar.  If you stayed for more than 2 days then it would be not convenient
b. roof top lounge is very nice, good food, but service takes time.  If you are not in the hurry & want to enjoy sunset, it would be perfect

title: An unforgettable experience
text: Hotelnya bagus, kamarnya bersih dan breakfast-nya mantab. Design hotel cantik karya arsitek ternama. Very recommended.

author: Darla
title: Excellent
text:
Had a good stay in Kokoon. All staff are very helpful and welcoming.
Room is very comfortable and clean.
The only remark is for the hair salon cause its a bit hard to get the appointment and it doesn’t seem to open on the weekend, which obliges us to look for another salon outside the hotel.

author: Ibranim F
text: Best hotel in all of East Java, exceptional hospitality cleanliness and services

author: yohanes haryadi
text: Kita memilih tipe kamar family, ranjangnya besar (king), cukup untuk 2-3 orang dewasa Kamarnya luas, kasurnya empuk, sudah smart tv, ada cooler bukan kulkas dan di berikan free snack di kamar, pencetan sabun dan shampoo nya agak susah di pencst..selebihnya mantapppzzz Parkiran basement nya luas dan tidak membuat sopir deg²an, disediakan charging station di basement Makanan paginya enak..banyak pilihan makanan dan rasa makanannya pun msh bisa diterima Di lobby ada gerai starbuck satu2nya di banyuwangi

author: epul Ynx

author: Andreas N.
text: Akses mudah dan dekat dengan banyak tempat wisata.

author: Ahmad L
title: Banyuwangi Top Tier Hotel
text:
All I just can say that this hotel meets our expectations.
Kokoon is like our second home in Banyuwangi
Luxury meets elegance.. 
Their staffs were very friendly and helpful during our stay. 
The breakfast was served in so many variance and so tasty, they have a salad bar with six choices of dressing. 
The room was so comfortable and clean. 
If you stay in Kokoon, do not forget to spend your time at their rooftop.
The food was great, we ordered chicken drum, beef burger, and truffle fries 🍟 Luv it 💛

Thank you Kokoon, we’ll be back to you soon💛

title: Hotel Premium Banget
text:
Lokasinya ditengah-tengah area wisata : hutan d’Jawatan, pantai Mustika, gunung ijen dan 1 jam ke pantai Watu dodol - menjangan. Pas banget kalau mau kelilingi tempat wisata Banyuwangi.
Hotelnya premium bersih dan harum sereh, kamarnya juga berisi furnitur yang premium, design elegan.. dapat kamar dengan pemandangan sawah dan gunung raung. Indah banget. Pokoknya liburan 4 hari 3 malam sangat menyenangkan! Pasti rekomendasi ke teman-teman hotel Kokoon🫶🏻

text: Menginap di sini bareng keluarga sangat memuaskan. Hotelnya modern dan estetik. Kamarnya nyaman banget, dan serunya bisa lihat view laut dari jendela. Nilai plus banget buat kolam renang indoor-nya dan ada permainan seru seperti mesin arkade di dekat restoran. Menu sarapannya juara, variasinya banyak dan ada jamu tradisionalnya juga. Definately will come back

author: Rizka
title: Enjoyable
text:
First time stayed at Kokoon Bwi. Had a great stay. Very fast & smooth ci and co process. 
Sure will be back next time!

author: Sony Mayuvi
title: Its feels home, good view, relaxing breakfast and nice staff
text:
Checked in and the TV already said "Welcome Home, Mr. Sony" — signed personally by GM Weni Kristanti. That personal touch alone already made us smile.

Brought the whole family here and the rooftop became our favorite spot. Sunrise magic — the Bali Strait glowing in gold and orange, with Bali's silhouette emerging on the horizon.
The kids were so excited capturing every angle, snapping photos non-stop, and just soaking in the moment. Seeing them that happy made the whole trip worthwhile.

Breakfast with that mountain panorama as the backdrop, savoring a rich spread of Indonesian cuisine — it was the perfect way to start the morning. Cheerful, warm, and deeply satisfying.

Staff throughout — warm, attentive, personal.

author: A***s
text: Exhaust fan kamar mandi wc mati

author: Wabas A
title: 100% satisfied staying at this hotel
text: Location is about half an hour from the ferry crossing to Bali so it offered beautiful views of the sunrise over Bali to the east from our room as well as breathtaking views of the rise paddies and mountains to the west as we enjoyed breakfast. The staff were extremely helpful with storing some of our frozen food, getting us a bucket of ice. The receptionist was very helpful in showing us the room before deciding to check in and was very friendly and polite. Room was very clean with fresh bedding and white fluffy towels. Water pressure very, very good...everything working. Price was very reasonable considering the very long holidays. Overall the hotel was very nice, clean, comfortable..

author: SonyMayuvi
title: Feels Like Home, Views Like a Postcard
text:
Checked in and the TV already said "Welcome Home, Mr. Sony" — signed personally by GM Weni Kristanti. That personal touch alone already made us smile.

Brought the whole family here and the rooftop became our favorite spot. Sunrise magic — the Bali Strait glowing in gold and orange, with Bali's silhouette emerging on the horizon. The kids were so excited capturing every angle, snapping photos non-stop, and just soaking in the moment. Seeing them that happy made the whole trip worthwhile.

Breakfast with that mountain panorama as the backdrop, savoring a rich spread of Indonesian cuisine — it was the perfect way to start the morning. Cheerful, warm, and deeply satisfying.

Staff throughout — warm, attentive, personal. Never intrusive.

author: Lim
title: Lovely ambience
text:
My recent stay at the Kokoon Hotel in Banyuwangi was nothing short of exceptional. The property boasts a striking and sophisticated design, seamlessly blending modern elegance with absolute comfort. Staying on a higher floor provided a breathtaking, panoramic view that served as the perfect backdrop to a relaxing getaway.

The morning breakfast was a wonderfully comforting affair, made even more memorable by the delightful addition of a dedicated Indomie stand—a charming and uniquely Indonesian touch that brought a sense of familiar warmth to the excellent morning spread. I highly recommend this beautiful hotel to anyone seeking a refined and thoroughly enjoyable stay in Banyuwangi.

title: Hotel elit ramah kantong
text: Ga bosen sebenranya tinggal disini. Anak hepi, ortu juga hepi. Kamar luas dg desain kamar mandi yg out of the box. Apalagi dpt balkon yg city view. Amazing.

author: Devi Virnayanti Latif
text: Facilities are kept clean. Varied a la carte options. Cheerful atmosphere. Expert and timely receptionist.

author: Kartika R
title: Friendly Staff and Great Hospitality
text:
This hotel has excellent service, with friendly staff, and it is clean and comfortable. What makes it special is that there is a Starbucks in the lobby—not a regular outlet, but they serve selected Starbucks menu items, with baristas who are directly trained by Starbucks. One staff member and barista named Dimas was very informative and humble in introducing tourist attractions in Banyuwangi.

Highly recommended to stay at this hotel.

author: Explore06324771348
title: Bisnis Trip
text: kamar n kasur nyaman pas hbs perjalanan dr sby..bangun d sambut breakfast yg enk n view yg keren

author: ravy el
text: resepsionisnya tidak ramah pelayanan buruk banget, masa ada resepsionis ngatain konsumen tidak ada etika

author: bisma arta
text: pelayanan buruk resepsionis tidak ramah

Tempatnya nyaman dan tenang

author: Ewald R
title: Amazing experience
text: It was an amazing room with a great view. The staff was super nice and the breakfast was delicious. I came here before and will always come back when going to Banyuwangi.

title: Naik ke rooftop lantai 16 keren
text: Pelayanannya sangatmemuaskan hotelnya bersih.

title: Dari hotel kokoon xplore Banyuwangi asyik banget
text: Lokasi strategis, suasana nyaman, kamar bersih dan sangat bagus fasilitas lengkap..recommended banget..

author: aisyah el-fasya
text: pernah meeting di sana, ruangan nya bagus, style nya gak norakk buat yang punya acara tapi males ribet bisa banget, kesini mulai dari A sampai z bisa di atur Terima beres.. Makanannya juga enak enak Apalagi viewnya beuhhhh cakeupp Rasanya kayak bukan di banyuwangi Hahaha Puas banget pokok Foto real ya

author: Rill
text: Comfortable place and very friendly service :)

author: Didik Y

text:
Alhamdulillah senang baru pertama kali bersama keluarga chek in hotel n pelayanan nya sangat ramah sekali
Senang bisa berkunjung di hotel kokoon

author: Jacklyn D
title: an excellent hotel in banyuwangi
text: the hotel ambience and atmosphere is excellent, the rooms are always clean, and the hotel staff are nice and helpful. the hotel is located not far from the city. this is my family’s second time going here and we will absolutely be back again next time.

author: Ivan Irvian
text: Makasih pelayanannya kokoon. tanggal 23 april saya lunch dikokoon. bertemu dengan tetangga saya agung di restoran. Makasih mas agung pelayanannya dan menu nasi tempong ayamnya mantap. Rekomendasi

author: Jessica Aprilli... R
title: Hotel
text: Menginap di hotel 3 malam.. ternyata masih nyaman banget jadi kita extend lagi 2 malam total 5 malam. Selalu happy nginep di Kokoon kayanya ini udah ketiga kali 🥰 Mama saya asli banyuwangi tp karena sudah tidak ada orang tua jd ngga ada rumah lagi disini. Tadi malam di tawarin menu tambahan biar ngga bosan selama breakfast disini, pelayanannya best banget 👍🏻👍🏻 recommend untuk yg mau liburan di banyuwangi bisa menginap disini 🫶🏻🫶🏻 terus karena bawa mobil listrik jd butuh chargernya dan disini sudah ada wall charging yg berbayar atau bisa juga pakai charger bawaan free. Kamar juga nyaman dan modern lokasi strategis

author: Margareth Angelica
text: maaf banget, waktu nikahan saudara disini makanannya kurang layak jujur karna dikasih 1 sendok gitu … saran aja mungkun isa taruh di tengah makanannya biar gk disendokin kesannya kapanan kek makanan kucing jujur 😀, maaf banget ya cm mau bilang ini tapi buat kamar service lainnya sudah baik puas

author: Feny
title: Comfortable Hotel
text: Kamar luas, bersih, nyaman

author: Budi Tanadi
text: Tgl 18 04 26 malam sy diundang kel.besar menje lang resepsi pernikahan 19 aprul nya di lantai 3.Pesan makanan hampir 45 menit baru keluar.Tidak ada minum air .harus bayar tambahan.Pagi hari ada Pemberkatan di lt.I ruangan *panas* matahari tembus ruangan.Malam resepsi waitres bagi makanan satu piring hny diberi 1 sendok potongan makanan.Kurang profesional.Gedung boleh bagus bukan mewah.biasa2 .Sayang pelayanan dan masakan F n B nya tidak bagus.Dekorasi Band EO oke krn yg sediakan penyewa sayang makanan sajinya NOT OKE.

author: Salim H
title: Exceptional stay—spotless rooms, attentive staff, and seamless check-in. Breakfast selection was excellent. Minor room noise at night, but overall a highly satisfying experience.
text: Outstanding stay with clean, well-maintained rooms and very professional staff. Check-in was smooth, amenities complete, and breakfast excellent. Slight nighttime noise, but overall experience exceeded expectations.

author: Brigitta Priscilla
text: sungguh memalukan dan mengecwakan not recommend untuk wedding apalagi yg family style jangan rusak moment sekali seumur hidup kalian malunya seumur hidup sama para tamu undangan gak cocok buat hotel bintang 4 apalagi ke 5 kamar juga ada serangga tempat tissue putih putih spt berjamur wastafel junior suite bumpet h-1 acara saya juga mengadakan makan makan di resto nya pelayanan sangat lama makanan keluar sangat lama kata waitress nya karena tidak pesan daritadi ??? bro kamu gabisa nebak orang itu mau apa sblm dia duduk datang dan pesan kan? harusnya kamu sebagai resto sudah harus siap menerima pesanan on the spot kalau gak siap tidak usah buka resto! intinya banyak omong diawal action 0 besar mana h-1 acara ditinggal lagi sama marketingnya, berasa terlantar marketingnya cuman mikirin uang uang dan uang begitu uang masuk semua ditinggal pergi ada kontrol di hari H? tentu tidak selesai acara (H+1)cuman bisa minta maaf lah sudah salah kedaden mau apa? mau 1000 maaf pun gak akan bisa mengobati hari H yg kacau ada saudara dari salah 1 meja yg berani complain ke waitress nya dan di bawakan lagi dari dalam dapur, seharusnya apa yang saya pesan harus di sajikan semua di hadapan tamu kenapa tunggu tamu complain? kamu mau makan semua makanan yg kamu sembunyikan di dapur??? itu baru 1 meja gak semua tamu berani complain di tempat adanya ya setelah acara ada juga meja yang masi ada sisanya di kasih ke meja lain? waitress kalian yg kurang pelatihan / gimana sih? atau dapur yg tidak bisa membagi sama rata? sudah tau 1 meja isi 12 ya sajikan 12 porsi!! setiap meja beda complain an nilai yang kamu sajikan tidak ada 1/4 dari yang saya bayarkan lalu apa gunanya test food test food doang bagus hari H buruk pada saat test food bilang “siap siap siap” mana siap mu? hilang kemana? di makan udangnya? bayangkan kamu makan di undangan orang cuman di sajikan 1 udang 1 brokoli 1 slice ikan, air sirup???? mau? sok monggo cobain di resto kalian sendiri lalu nanti pasti cuman akan di balas “ Salam Hangat dari Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi Mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan yang Bapak/Ibu rasakan dan alami. Adapun kritik yang diberikan akan menjadi perhatian kami kedepannya. Fasilitas dan pelayanan tamu menjadi bagian fokus utama yang terus kami tingkatkan untuk memberikan kepuasan yang maksimal bagi semua tamu. “ ah basiii mau di kritik 1000x pun kalian tetep begitu pasti yang penting uang masuk kan? urusan jelek bodo amat 200++ tamu sudah kamu kecewakan dalam 1 malam even minta maaf ke tamu pun tidak ada pada saat tamu checkout pun complain ke reception jg gaada laporan ke saya dan tidak ada tindak lanjutnya sampai saya yg harus mendengar sendiri dari keluarga besar percuma juga kamu minta review makan ke meja VIP (keluarga inti) kamu kasi kita udang nya 3 ya enak enak aja lah tamu kita? yang kamu gak kasi makan gak di mintain review di kertas? sama aja bohong masi banyak sekali unek unek saya yg belom keluar cmn bisa geleng geleng kepala elus dada nge batin saya dan ortu udah percaya ke kokoon tapi balasan kalian begitu tidak pantas sekali

author: wina tanadi
text: Beberapa hari lalu kami menginap di sini karena ada undangan resepsi pernikahan saudara di sini juga. Untuk sekedar menginap oke, namun tidak rekomen utk acara resepsi. Sangat disayangkan keindahan gedung hotel tercoreng oleh service banquet yg cukup fatal. Mungkin SDM kitchen/ resto termasuk waiter belum siap dengan konsep sitting dinner. Porsinya amat sangat sedikit (tidak wajar untuk restoran/ hotel manapun dengan konsep sitting dinner Chinese wedding style). Sebagai gambaran takaran perorang: nasi goreng = 1,5sdm diplating di piring besar, sup berisi setengah mangkuk kecil, udang goreng 1 potong, dsb. Sayang kami tidak memfoto porsiannya, namun setelah resepsi ternyata hampir semua saudara & rekan di meja lain mengalami hal yg sama. Bahkan tamu senior di meja lain yang bahkan biasanya makannya sedikit setelah resepsi masih merasa lapar. 2. Waiter tdk membagi dengan pas sehingga sering ada sisa setelah dia membagi ke masing2 plate, dan sisa makanan tidak dibagikan lagi melainkan ditaruh di nampan piring2 kotor dan tdk lama diangkut keluar. Kasihan kedua mempelai yang sudah mempercayakan hari bahagianya pada hotel ini utk menjamu para undangan dengan baik malah dikecewakan.

author: Herles Senduk
text: Seharusnya kokoon mintaa maaf kepada para tamu undangan saya. Bukan meminta maaf kepada saya, karena sudah tidak berguna meminta maaf kepada saya. Mengecewakan

author: Elisabet Meliana Devi
text: Kesan pertama WoW.. tapi ternyata ga se wow itu.. Yg pertama,saya datang diundang oleh saudara saya yg kebetulan menginap disana, dan kita duduk di restoran. Setelah order menunggu hampir 1jam baru dikabarin kalau makanan kosong.. setelah diganti pun tak kunjung datang dan akhirnya kita membatalkan orderan setelah kurang lebih 2 jam duduk manis tanpa keluar satupun makanan atau minuman.. Yang Kedua saat acara undangan saudara juga, saya sudah ber ekspektasi makanan akan wow karena harga juga tidak murah untuk di banyuwangi.. tapi ternyata sangat mengecewakan pulang dari pesta kami masi merasa lapar dan ternyata hampir sebagian tamu begitu.. tolong kalau tidak pernah menyajikan untuk pesta meja bisa terima dari vendor lain yg lebih berpengalaman, karena pesta pernikahan bukan hal yang main2 dan penyelenggara pasti ingin memberikan yang terbaik untuk tamu yg hadir jauh dan telah memberikan waktu untuk bisa datang.. sekian..

author: Sunny V Tanadi
text: Datang sebagai tamu undangan wedding di Kokoon Hotel, sebenarnya saya tidak mau komplain pada hari H krn tidak ingin mengecewakan pengantin, tetapi ternyata setelah acara banyak tamu lain yang merasakan hal yg sama.. Rasa makanan cukup OK tapi porsi dan pelayanan yg kurang layak. Makanan diserving di piring kita oleh waiter sehingga kita tidak bisa melihat porsi yang sebenarnya, tetapi bahkan setelah dibagi dalam porsi kecil, sisa makanan di nampan tidak dibagikan habis malah dibawa waiter ke meja serving. Hanya 1x dalam sekian course makanan yaitu udang goreng yg sisanya ditaruh di meja, tetapi menu lain tdk disajikan sisanya sama sekali.  Waktu menu sapo ayam brokoli yg disajikan di piring saya yg terakhir, hanya potongan sayurnya, padahal di nampan masih ada potongan ayam tetapi tidak disajikan di piring terakhir malah disisakan di nampan dan dibawa ke meja serving waiter lalu dicleanup.

author: Herman Atmaja
text: Tidak cocok untuk wedding party

author: Ai
text: Had an event here and it was chaos. We paid for the whole thing in full without any negotiations, but they still slacked. The food took so long to come out (about 1 hour ++) for an event where the food was already ordered/predetermined since more than 1 month ago. And when the food came out, it was already cold and in such small portions. Such small portions in fact that some guest of mine only got 1 shrimp per plate (they were supposed to get 2-3). Ridiculous. The price itself was not cheap. Their delivery was not as what was discussed beforehand in the technical meeting. When we brought it up with the server, their response was only "Please Wait" with an unapologetic look. Not to mention the room. When I had first came into the room, the tissue box looked like it had mold growing on it.

author: Dewi Chandra
text: Sangat mengecewakan dan memalukan keluarga Tidak layak

author: Ristria
title: Bgus
text: BGus mewah tempat gym lengkap besar sy suka kmr ny yg family bgus handuk keset berlimpah air panas berlimpah dpt snack di kmr .. mkn an juga lengkap byk varian nyaa .. enak2 jg untuk harga segitu Wort it banget sy sdh 2th menjadi pelanggan kokoon krn anak sy kuliah di bwi

author: Thomas Yonatan
text: saya selaku yang mengadakan acara pernikahan disana sangat malu dengan penyajian makanan saat dinner wedding. Mengecewakan para tamu sehingga memalukan saya selaku pengantin. Rasa maaf tidak bisa menggantikan momen bahagia yang sekali seumur hidup dilakukan. Hotel sekelas kokoon pelayanan buruk sekali!

author: ishak efendi
text: Menginap dapat undangan dari Kantor sambil berlibur, Hotel yang luar biasa megah dengan view yang menarik

author: 29G22_Daniel Bhernath Senduk
text: Sangat tidak layak

author: Felicia Sutanto
text: Sy selaku saudara dari pemilik acara) Kemarin ada acara pernikahan di Kokoon. Service makanan saat acara sangat buruk. Di perjanjian awal makanan yg disajikan untuk per table. 1 table isi 12 orang, tapi makanan hanya secuil. Makanan yg hanya untuk 7org, di served untuk 12org. Terlalu lama untuk serving makanannya. Bukan hanya 1 meja, tapi banyak. Yg makanannya berlimpah hanya meja VIP.  Salah satunya, saat food testing sudah di info untuk served udang 3 pcs, tapi di acara hanya dapat 1pcs. Nasi gorengnya malah keluar terakhir dan lama sekali. Pihak hotel di protes tidak ada tanggapan yang memuaskan. Sungguh buruk.

author: Ellen
text: pelayanan sangat buruk, kalo ada bintang 0 sy mau kasi 0 aja. perihal makanan tapi jadi mencoreng keseluruhan hotel. memalukan

author: stevanny kho
text: Klo utk sekedar nginep oklah ya, tp klo mau adain acara wedding, pikir 2x. And make sure klo makanan yg d test food dg yg akan d kluarin pas acara bnran memuaskan ya. Jgn cm pas test food / meja vip ok, meja tamu BigNo. Kasian malunya pengantinnya kyk apa, niat hati menjamu tamu2 dg bayar mahal + enak, malah zonk 😭

text: Location a little outside of Banyuwangi but there are small shops around anyway. Room was great and quiet, staff was very friendly and helpful. Whenever I will come to Banyuwangi again, this hotel would be my first choice!

author: Simon
title: First time Banyuwangi
text:
Gewoon alles helemaal goed.

author: Nomnom hungry
text: Aku kemarin menginap di Kokon Hotel Banyuwangi dan overall pengalamannya cukup menyenangkan. Begitu sampai, suasananya langsung terasa tenang dan modern, kamarnya juga bersih, rapi, dan nyaman buat istirahat. Stafnya ramah dan cepat bantu kalau ada kebutuhan, jadi bikin betah. Lokasinya menurutku cukup strategis untuk keliling Banyuwangi, walaupun nggak persis di tengah kota. Dengan harga yang ditawarkan, menurutku hotel ini worth it banget, apalagi kalau cari tempat menginap yang simpel tapi tetap nyaman.

title: Great Service

The weak point is the location that is pretty far from Banyuwangi proper, by pretty far, I mean you won't want to walk and explore by foot, so it's either private vehicle or online taxi. Other than that, it's a great place to stay at.

author: igor
title: The best Ijen stay
text:
We had an amazing stay at this hotel! The service was absolutely excellent - the staff were incredibly friendly, attentive, and made us feel very welcome.
It was the perfect place to relax after climbing Mount Ijen. Honestly, it was the best experience we could have asked for after such an intense trip. Everything was comfortable, clean, and thoughtfully arranged.
Highly recommend this hotel if you're visiting the area!

author: rey forger
text: Saya ingin menyampaikan komplain serius terkait pengalaman saya yang sangat mengecewakan selama menginap dan menggunakan layanan di restoran rooftop Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi. Saat makan malam di rooftop, saya memesan dua menu, namun yang datang hanya satu. Satu menu lainnya tidak kunjung datang dengan waktu tunggu yang sangat lama hingga akhirnya saya memutuskan untuk membatalkannya. Hal ini tentu sangat mengganggu pengalaman makan malam saya. Tidak hanya itu, pada malam harinya saya memesan room service, namun pesanan baru datang setelah kurang lebih satu jam. Ketika saya melakukan follow up, staf hanya memberikan alasan bahwa kondisi sedang ramai dan pesanan diproses sesuai antrean. Sebagai tamu, saya memahami jika kondisi sedang ramai. Namun yang sangat disayangkan adalah tidak adanya komunikasi yang jelas dari pihak staf. Seharusnya pihak hotel dapat memberikan estimasi waktu tunggu sejak awal, serta melakukan konfirmasi kepada tamu apakah bersedia menunggu atau tidak. Kurangnya inisiatif untuk menghubungi dan memberikan update kepada tamu menunjukkan standar pelayanan yang tidak profesional, terutama untuk sekelas hotel. Saya merasa sangat kecewa karena pelayanan yang saya terima tidak sebanding dengan biaya yang saya keluarkan, termasuk pajak dan service charge yang seharusnya mencerminkan kualitas layanan yang baik. Saya berharap pihak manajemen dapat mengevaluasi dan memperbaiki kualitas pelayanan agar kejadian seperti ini tidak terulang kembali kepada tamu lainnya.

author: Pramaisella Putri Agung
title: Mixed experience while staying
text:
We recently stayed at this hotel as a family of 2 adults and 2 kids (5 and 3 years old). Overall, we had a mixed experience.
We arrived at 14.00, but unfortunately our room was not ready yet and we had to wait about 15–20 minutes before we could check in. It wasn’t a long wait, but after traveling with kids, it would have been nicer if the room had been ready on time.
The room itself was spacious and comfortable, and the bathroom water pressure worked well. We also ordered pizza from room service and it was delicious. Dinner was supposed to be ready at 19.00, but it was only ready around 19.30. However, the food was top notch and the lounge staff were very helpful and friendly.
We booked the room with an extra bed including breakfast, and we had already reconfirmed that breakfast was included for all of us. However, at the breakfast restaurant, the hostess initially told us we needed to pay extra. After we went to the cashier, another staff member confirmed that it was already settled. This kind of miscommunication was a bit disappointing.
Another issue happened during breakfast. We ordered 2 iced Americanos. The menu stated IDR 25,000 per glass (with additional tax & service), which we understood. However, when the bill came, the total was IDR 90,000. When we asked why, we were told that one iced Americano was IDR 45,000 including tax & service, and that there was an additional charge for the ice. Charging IDR 20,000 for ice felt unreasonable. Although we paid the full amount, this situation affected our mood and we decided to leave right after breakfast.
Additionally, the air conditioning in the hallway near the kids’ playroom was not working in the afternoon, making it quite hot while the kids were playing.
On a positive note, the check-out process was fast and efficient. The room and facilities are actually very good, but the restaurant staff—especially at breakfast—may need better communication and training. It’s unfortunate because small miscommunications can significantly affect guests’ overall experience.
With some improvements in service consistency, this hotel could offer a much better overall stay.

text: Hotel nyaman yang kami tempati di Banyuwangi, Aromanya begitu masuk, ihhhhh wanginya itu menenangkan. Seperti bau jahe, sere, tapi wangi. Welcome drinknya starbucks😍 utk 2 orang. Kamar tidurnya luas Sarapannya enak dan bervariasi Tapi yg paling enak onde² pandannya Menyesal banget krn udah kenyang, cm bsa makan onde² sedikit. Jangan lewatkan onde² ketika sarapan. Ada kids activity room Ada kolam renang dan spa juga Ada view deck yang bisa lihat kota Banyuwangi dari atas. Lokasinya 5-10 menit dr pusat kota. 45 menit ke djawatan. Terimakasih utk pelayanannya Kokoon We'll be back soon.

title: Hits or exceeds the mark every time
text:
I stay here for a few days every month. Each time it’s a seamless experience. Fast check in, nice modern spacious room, great gym, awesome breakfast. All staff are friendly, customer service oriented. Adam, a manager in the breakfast/dining area is always particularly attentive and kind. 

For my work travels this place hits or exceeds the mark every time.

author: Teguh
title: Liburan Keluarga Nyaman di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi dengan View Selat Bali dan Gunung Ijen
text:
Menginap di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi bersama keluarga menjadi pengalaman yang sangat menyenangkan. Sejak tiba, kami langsung merasakan suasana hotel yang bersih, modern, dan tertata rapi. Proses check-in berlangsung cepat dengan pelayanan staf yang ramah, membuat kami merasa disambut dengan baik.

Kamar yang kami tempati cukup luas dan cocok untuk keluarga. Dari kamar, kami dapat menikmati pemandangan Selat Bali di satu sisi dan Gunung Ijen di sisi lainnya, menghadirkan suasana khas Banyuwangi yang menenangkan.

Tempat tidurnya pun empuk, ruangan bersih, dan suasananya tenang sehingga cocok untuk beristirahat setelah seharian beraktivitas. Anak-anak terlihat senang karena kamar terasa lega dan nyaman untuk bergerak.

Salah satu fasilitas favorit kami adalah kolam renang indoor. Area kolamnya bersih dan nyaman, sehingga anak-anak bisa berenang dengan aman tanpa terganggu panas atau hujan. Sementara mereka bermain air, kami bisa bersantai di sekitar kolam atau menikmati waktu relaksasi di spa hotel. Fasilitas gym yang lengkap dan area yoga juga memberi kesempatan bagi kami untuk tetap berolahraga dan menyegarkan tubuh selama liburan.

Di pagi hari, sarapan menjadi momen kebersamaan yang menyenangkan. Pilihan menu cukup beragam, mulai dari hidangan khas Indonesia hingga menu favorit anak-anak, dengan rasa yang lezat dan penyajian yang rapi.

Secara keseluruhan, Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi memberikan pengalaman menginap yang nyaman, aman, dan ramah keluarga, menjadikannya pilihan yang tepat untuk liburan keluarga di Banyuwangi.

author: Agus S
title: Pengalaman menyenangkan menginap di Banyuwangi
text:
Review untuk Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi
Pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat memuaskan. Kamarnya luas dan bersih, dengan kamar mandi yang juga luas serta dilengkapi handuk kecil tambahan, yang cukup jarang ditemukan dan sangat membantu. Fasilitas hotel tergolong lengkap, termasuk swimming pool indoor yang nyaman dan observatory dock dengan pemandangan yang sangat bagus. Area parkir luas, sehingga tidak menyulitkan tamu yang membawa kendaraan.
Untuk makanan, kualitasnya enak dengan pilihan menu yang bervariasi. Pelayanan juga menjadi nilai tambah, karena seluruh pegawai ramah dan membantu.
Untuk kekurangan, sebenarnya tidak ada hal yang signifikan. Semuanya sudah baik, hanya kopinya saja yang menurut saya masih bisa ditingkatkan 😊.
Secara keseluruhan, hotel ini sangat layak direkomendasikan untuk perjalanan bisnis maupun liburan.

author: Wander21924712588
title: Pengalaman pertama menginap di hotel Kokoon
text:
Pengalaman kami menginap disini untuk pertama kalinya di hotel ini, setelah menempuh perjalanan jauh sangat berkesan, kami late check in di hotel jam 21.30 WIB, dari awal ketibaan di hotel disambut dengan sekurity  yg ramah, quick check in, hotelnya masih terbilang baru, bersih, kamarnya pun bersih, showernya pun ok, toiletnya pun ok, kamar mandi ok saluran airnya berfungsi dgn baik, Ac kamarnya pun dingin, kamarnya luas, pelayanan hotelnya pun ramah dari segi makanan bervariasi banyak pilihan, ada menu ramah anak juga, rasanya pun ok, oh iya untuk sarapan itu berbayar kebetulan anak saya umur 9 tahun jadi dikenakan charger Rp 100.000, 00, (ada batasan umur). Overall menginap disini Ok, mdh2an ketika ke Banyuwangi lg, kami akan balik lg menginap disini 🤭
Semoga hotel kokoon bisa mempertahankan apa yg baik dan bagus baik dari segi pelayanan, keramahan, kebersihan, dan kualitas rasa makanan .. 
sukses selalu hotel kokoon ..

text: Klo kata org jawa onok rego onok rupo artinya ada harga ada barang. Harga mahal tp tempatnya istimewa saya stay d kamar deluxe balconi view laut. Mantapp👍

author: Epritamala Prad... P
title: Holiday
text: Untuk suasananya nyaman bgt kemudian ruangan kamarnya juga lumayan besar, bersih dan nyaman. Kita kmren dapet ocean view. fasilitasnya sudah oke bgt dan pegawainya ramah ramah dan senyum pas anak aku jatuhin makanan di resto mereka gercep untuk beresin dan dengan wajah yg menyenangkan serta untuk makan sarapannya juga banyak pilihannya dan enak enak.

author: Maimun M
title: Hotel dengan taman asri dan view bagus
text: Hotel tidak begitu jauh dari lokasi wisata, lingkungan hotel bersih dan asri. Kamar dan kamar mandi bersih dan nyaman dengan pemandangan ke arah laut. Tempat makan dengan pemandangan gunung sangat menyenangkan.

author: Jay G
text: Oke ini Kamarnya nyaman, makannya lumayan enak

author: DF
text:
Pengalaman pertama menginap di Kokoon. Disambut dengan sangat ramah oleh concierge dan receiption, pdhl waktu itu kami datang dalam rombongan. Begitu sampai kamar, tnyt suasana dan kamarnya telah dipersiapkan dengan sangat baik (oleh Mas Zacky), sehingga sy merasa sangat nyaman. Bener2 feels like home. Pilihan breakfast nya juga cukup variatif, dan rasanya enak, terutama onde-ondenya (THE BEST!!!). 
Perbaikan yg masih bs dilakukan mgkn keramahan dari kasir resto, krn sy merasa kmrn mas kasir restonya ramah siy... tapi agak kurang helpful. 
Tp overall sy senang dan puas menginap dsana, walaupun cuma 1 malam.

author: betonabadi prima
text: Nice Place for better sleep

author: Yonas H
title: So far... the best hotel in banyuwangi
text: Ini kedua kali saya dan keluarga menginap di sini... servis sangat baik... fasilitas mantap... kamar nyaman... pemandangan alam dari kamar luar biasa... gak bisa ditemukan di hotel lain...

author: meiske m
title: Experience in Kokoon hotel Banyuwangi
text: Very nice hotel. The room is very comfortable with warm ambience & the food taste good. The staff are very friendly and helpful

author: Luqman
title: Incredible Stays
text:
This is the best hotel in town for family of 4 or 5. Large room, spacious bathroom, 2 king beds, and still have a sofa, wide window with mountains view, that is more than of what you will be expected.
For breakfast, the variety of foods and taste are sufficient for me. Suggestion maybe better if you can place sausages into the main tables together with main menu of rices, instead of in the omelet counter.
I love the traditional cakes so much.
The indoor pool is excellent for me since you wouldnt need to worry about weather, and also open until late night.

author: Ronny Wicaksono
text: Hotel sangat bersih dan nyaman. Pelayanan sangat ramah dan memberikan informasi yang lengkap. Terima kasih atas pelayanannya Kokoon Hotel. Saya akan menginap kembali nanti...

author: muhammad a
title: Liburan d Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi
text:
Ke 3 kalinya menginap d Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi
Ramah2 utk staf2nya
Lokasi strategis.. 
Suasana nyaman 
Kamar bersih 
Makanannya jg enak2
Keseluruhan siiip

author: Aleksandr
text: Прекрасное расположение, вид, номер, кровать, шведский стол, персонал и сервис

author: Verified Traveler
text: Kamar bagus, sarapan banyak pilihan menu… Fasilitas mantaap

author: Widi Ananda
title: Sangat bagus
text: Hotelnya bagus banget, kamarnya juga sangat bagus, wangi, dan bersih. Dan suasana hotel sangat tenang. Apalagi breakfastnya sangatt amat lengkap mulai dari indonesian food, western , hingga japanese food. Tidak lupa juga dengan jajanan khas Indonesianya!! Sangat sangat rekomended apabila ingin berlibur ke Banyuwangi. Lokasinya juga sangat strategis.

author: Hendrik Gunawan
text: sataf semua ramah.  menu restoran juga banyak. . reconended buat istirahat dlm perjalanan ke bali. kain kali kita akan mampir lagi. godjob👍🏼

author: Widi Ananda
text: Hotelnya bagus banget, kamarnya juga sangat bagus, wangi, dan bersih. Dan suasana hotel sangat tenang. Apalagi breakfastnya sangatt amat lengkap mulai dari indonesian food, western , hingga japanese food. Tidak lupa juga dengan jajanan khas Indonesianya!! Sangat sangat rekomended apabila ingin berlibur ke Banyuwangi. Lokasinya juga sangat strategis.

author: Yenny Okta
text: hotel nya cukup nyaman,desain ruangan dan interior kamar bersih dan modern, smart TV, minum di sediakan 2 botol vair mineral.merk vit 600 ml x 2 botol.. sayang nya tidak di sediakan laundry bag spt hotel pada umumnya..handuk badan 2 pcs,handuk kecil 2 pcs..penataan rapi. saat cek in agak.kurang suka dengan petugas di pelayanan resepsionis perempuan putih cantik kurang ramah dan kurang senyum dalam melayani tamu, terkesan sombong ..namun saat cek out petugas reseptionis laki-laki nya cukup ramah sangat berbanding terbalik dengan petugas perempuan saat cek in..( hotel bintang 4 ,seharusnya pelayanan super ramah,🙏) sarapan nya variatif buanyak banget menu nya,kue nya juga banyak ragam nya dan enak-enak.. kolam renang nya indoor nyaman, ada sauna nya juga.. sayang play ground anak super kecil... tempat gym.nyaman luas, ada studio yoga nya juga.

author: Cathy R
title: Comfy and homey
text: The room was spacious, comfy and homey.. breakfast was nice with so many varieties, there also indomie stall which everybody loves.. hospitality was great, got a birthday cake from the hotel.. best hotel in town.. will come back if i got a chance to get here someday ♡

author: Sightseer27735845268
title: Kamarnya luas dan hotelnya bagusss banget amenities cukup lengkap
text: Ini hotel bagus dan cocok sekali untuk keluarga, anak saya suka pool nya yg dingin katanya sejuk sekali mom, dan suka musicnya dan suka kamar mandinya, kamarnya luas pula dan view nya bagus saya dikamar 1130

author: Made Risana
text: Hotel yg sangat bersih, penataan bangunannya bagus, meskipun di pinggir kota, tetap ramai, sarapan juga enak

author: Curiosity62961178143
title: No mero Uno....
text:
Ini kunjungan kami kesekian kali dan akan selalu menjadi tujuan kami menginap selanjutnya.  
Jangan lupa menikmati dinner dan bersantai di lantai 16, melihat Banyuwangi dr sisi gunung dan lautan. 
Berenang dan sauna adalah kegiatan favorite kami. 
Di Lobby ada pojok kopi kesukaan saya dan suami, tentu Cheesecake Opera nya yg terbaik. Starbucks best ever.
Si kecil menikmati waktunya di playkids.
Dan ada SPKLU di basement utk kendaraan EV kami. 
Super Combo staycation ini sihhh.....

author: Sigit T.
text:
Hotelnya masih baru
Bed nya king koil
After nyetir jkt bwi 16 jam sih nyaman maksimal.

author: Quest61914957298
title: Kokoon Hotel : Where a place of vacation feeds you like a caterpillar and give the warmth of pupae
text: It's good for value, we got sightseeing and free breakfast- albeit we're still confused about the room water bottles being priced- it doesn't deduct the value at all

author: Wander14964327435
title: Hotel langganan setiap trip ke banyuwangi
text: Setiap ke banyuwangi pasti stay di hotel kokoon secara dr fasilitas nya, makanan nya, service nya semuanya no 1 siih, staff nya super helpfull dan lokasi hotelnya strategis banget🥰

author: Shelvy C. S.
text: Kamar dengan tempat tidur ternyaman di antara hotel lainnya di Banyuwangi.

author: Diana
title: Excellent hotel to stay
text:
Hotel yg nyaman, modern simple very neat, bahkan tangga exit nya pun sangat bersih.
Saya membiasakan diri menggunakan tangga utk naik turun di gedung bertingkat. Hotel Kokoon memperhatikan kebersihan bahkan pd lokasi yg hampir tidak tersentuh pengunjung. Salut.
Tersedia rooftop dg pemandangan laut dan gunung yg menyegarkan. Tampaknya tangga kayu perlu renovasi segera.
Pelayanan prima, ramah dan helpfull.
Menu sarapan bervariasi dan enak shg tdk bosan meski menginap berhari2...

Sukses terus Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi, terus berikan yg terbaik bagi konsumen :)

author: Dini
title: very nice ^^
text: very well ^^

author: Yahya Ade Wahyu Prasetya
title: Nyaman
text: Kualitas pelayanannya top! Semua staf sangat ramah dan membantu. Proses check-in cepat, kamar nyaman, suasana hotel bersih dan rapi. Recommended untuk liburan maupun perjalanan kerja ataupun nongkrong

author: jo
title: very nice
text: very nice, nothing to complain

author: FA
text: Hotelnya bagus, kamar besar, bersih, makanannya lumayan, welcome drinknya kurang enak.. harganya sebaiknya diturunkan lg

author: Dreamer36654336262
title: Sangat memuaskan
text: Hotelnya mewah, Bersih, pelayanannya sangat baik, next trip banyuwangi pasti ke hotel ini lagii ... Buruan Cobain dehhh

author: Romi Bagus S
text: Merupakan momen paling indah dalam hal menginap

author: Sisca
title: Double king size bed for family room
text: Back for the third time here, and still very happy. The family room is super big with literally 2 king size bed, well maintained, and comfortable to stay

author: Keluarga Azami
text: Setiap sudutnya cantik banget, suka juga dengan roma sereh di lobby yang  memberikan rasa hangat dan nyaman. Stafnya ramah. Kamar bersih dan terawat. Mohon diperhatikan untuk lantai kamar mandi terlalu licin saat terkena air, kemungkinan penggunaan pembersih lantainya yg terlalu banyak.

author: mita EW
text: I would like to sincerely thank the Kokoon Hotel team for their care and professionalism. As a wellness member, Kokoon Hotel has always felt like a second home for me. My mother and my friend also love stayed here. (Also, thanks to Mas Fahmi for helping my mom some time ago). Today, I had a small accident in the changing room and cut my finger while cleaning up. When I reported it, Mbak Aini at the reception showed genuine concern, immediately checking on my condition and offering help. She then coordinated with Mas Emmo, who kindly cleaned my wound and provided first aid. I truly appreciate the calm, attentive, and caring response from the Kokoon team. I will definitely continue recommending Kokoon Hotel to my friends and my colleagues who visiting Banyuwangi. Warm regards, MT

author: I***a
text: It was a wonderful place to stay

author: Soegiarto J.
text: Hotel langganan setiap trip ke Banyuwangi

title: Menginap semalam
text:
No coment, pokoknya ini hotel ter the best di Banyuwangi. 
Semua ekspektasi dapat. Thanks kokoon hotel.. recommended 👍

author: CP
text: Affordable price. Bright and well-lit room.

author: Caleb
title: Perfect for a staycation
text:
Great place to rest and recover from the Denpasar - Banyuwangi ferry before venturing further via train. 
Great breakfast, beautiful view of the mountains.

author: Robert Milbourne
text: While the hotel is fine.. I asked for a driver to airport in Bali. It didn’t come and when I asked again it was late and I was also told wrong information .. and missed my international flight. I was told it would take 6 hours. Maybe less. It took 8 hrs and that didn’t include time change. Very disappointed with hotel in this regard.

author: juli

author: N V
text: Best hotel we went to in Java. Very kind and helpful staff and the rooms are great. No issues during our 4 day stay there.

text: Overall is good, semoga nanti bisa kesini lagi dengan experience yang berbeda dan event kokoon yang lebih menarik lagi

author: Companion27379159318
title: Staycation hotel
text: Hotelnya sangat memuasakan, pelayananya bagusss, nyamaannn, kamar mandinya bersih berfungsi semua.. mbak mbak nya cantik-cantik dan mas mas nya ramah ramah.. makananya enak bangett lengkapp.. pokoknya bikin nagihh dehh bermalam di disini.

author: Fatkhur Rohman
text: Pernah mengalami hal tidak mengenakkan karena hampir salah ambil rute pintu keluar parkir, lalu di teriaki, dibentak dan dipelototi oleh petugas keamanan atau apalah yang ada di bawah, menurut saya itu hal yang fatal untuk pelayanan hotel sekelas kokoon. Dia menunjukkan kemarahan dan sangat tidak ramah, ketika saya minta maaf pun dia tidak merespon, dan tetap dengan ekspresi marah dan melotot. Pengalaman pertama kesana dan langsung sakit hati, dan tidak akan kesana lagi dalam urusan apapun.

author: faizal
title: Room with fantastic view
text: This our 2nd trip and never a doubt this feels my 2nd home the staff here are non exceptions fantastic and they still remember ..thank you team Kokoon!!

author: Guntur A
title: family trip
text:
nice hotel
close to airport
delicious food
family weekend spent well

this hotel suit for your family/group trip to explore Banyuwangi

author: W. Schaffer
title: Top Hotel with international flair and products.
text: The hotel is highly recommended, especially because of the friendly staff and cleanliness. Unfortunately, the hotel is very noisy, but this is a common issue in Indonesia. Other highlights include the beautiful spa area with pool and the rooftop bar.

author: Irsya Y
title: Pengalaman menginap di kokoon hotel banyuwangi
text: Pelayanan sangat memuaskan...kamar bagus dan nyaman...breakfast beragam makanan Indonesia dan western food rasanya enak enak...next time pengen kembali di hotel kokoon ini

author: faisal afif w
title: Good experience
text: Hotel yang estetik dan menarik, Tempat tidur yang nyaman dan semua pegawainya ramah ramah semua dan helpfull. the best hotel you must try

author: Christopher
text:
Comfortable. Good value. Good Staff.
Nothing.

author: Rifki H
title: Pengalaman yang mengesankan
text: Saya merasakan Pengalaman yang luar biasa menginap di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi, kami disambut dengan keramahan yang hangat, kamar yang bagus dengan pemandangan pulau bali yang dapat dilihat dari dalam kamar, menu sarapan yang beragam serta enak. Itulah yang saya rasakan selama menginap 2 malam di Hotel ini

author: Sri Mustika Haryati

author: Wie
title: Recomended
text: Nice place to stay

author: Sightsee24456106086
title: Saya dan istri sangat puas. Pelayanan ramah, fasilitas berjalan baik, dan pengalaman menginap sangat nyaman.
text: Saya dan istri sangat puas menginap di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi. Pelayanannya ramah, proses check-in dan check-out lancar, fasilitas lengkap dan berfungsi dengan baik. Pengalaman menginap yang nyaman dan menyenangkan. Terima kasih

author: Thomas
title: wir waren zum dritten Mal in diesem Hotel und es ist jedes Mal wie ein nach Hause kommen
text:
wir waren schon öfters in diesem Hotel und waren jedes Mal sehr zufrieden. Das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis ist erstklassig und die Leute sind freundlich und der Service ist sehr gut. Das gilt sowohl für die Massage, den Swimmingpool, die Laundry und auch für den Zimmerservice.
Es gibt nicht viel zu bemängeln. Vielleicht, dass die Schränke etwas klein sind. Außerdem hatte ich bei dem Zimmerservice mal eine Pizza bestellt, die nicht wirklich wie eine Pizza vergleichbar ist, wie man sie allgemein kennt. Abgesehen davon gibt es nichts zu meckern.

author: idabagus idabagus
text: pelayanan sangat baik dan staf ramah

author: wenny adnanti
text: Kami pilih reservasi lewat website resmi Kokoon Hotel,,soalnya: harga lbh murah, dapet kupon welcome drink yg bisa ditukar di rooftop, dapet kupon F&B dan juga kupon undian!! Kamarnya bersih&rapihh,, kamar mandinya lengkapp,, sarapan di restonya cukup variatif yaa

author: Fitdhia R
title: Menginap nyaman di Banyuwangi
text:
Sukaaa banget sama Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi, tiap ke Banyuwangi nginepnya selalu disini
Tempatnya nyaman pelayanan okee bangettt, makananannya juga enak-enak, luvvv Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi

author: Fearless31055467763
title: Nyaman untuk menginap dalam jangka waktu cukup lama
text: Menginap disini cukup lama, nyaman banget. Fasilitas lengkap, makanan bervariasi, enak, semua pegawai ramah dan membantu

author: Dewa Putra
text: KOKOON Hotel Banyuwangi – Totally Worth the Stop I was supposed to head straight to Alas Purwo Temple, but since I reached Banyuwangi too late, I decided to crash at KOKOON Hotel. Turned out to be a great choice. The room was comfy, but what really surprised me was the spa super relaxing and the price was honestly really good for the quality. Exactly what you need after a long trip. And I have to mention RIFA, the barista. She’s incredibly friendly and genuinely hospitable. The kind of service that instantly puts you in a good mood. She made me feel so welcome that I almost wanted to extend my stay 😁 If you’re passing through Banyuwangi, this place is definitely worth considering my unplanned stop ended up feeling like a mini getaway.

author: Pendik
title: Room with a cool balcony view
text: Sangat sangat direkomendasikan teruntuk yang mau healing tempat sangat cocok dengan pemandangan, fasilitas, dan pelayanan terbaik.

author: Reignbali
title: Love the experience of this place
text:
KOKOON Hotel Banyuwangi – Totally Worth the Stop

I was supposed to head straight to Alas Purwo Temple, but since I reached Banyuwangi too late, I decided to crash at KOKOON Hotel. Turned out to be a great choice.

The room was comfy, but what really surprised me was the spa super relaxing and the price was honestly really good for the quality. Exactly what you need after a long trip.

And I have to mention RIFA, the barista. She’s incredibly friendly and genuinely hospitable. The kind of service that instantly puts you in a good mood. She made me feel so welcome that I almost wanted to extend my stay 😁

If you’re passing through Banyuwangi, this place is definitely worth considering  my unplanned stop ended up feeling like a mini getaway.

author: Meita
text: I really enjoyed this hotel. The staff were very polite, the facilities were very good, and the location is close to the airport.

author: Meita W
text: I really enjoyed this hotel. The staff were very polite, the facilities were very good, and the location is close to the airport.

author: fahri A
title: Pengalaman pertama menginap di Kokon Hotel mengesankan
text: Pelayanan memuaskan, fasilitas lengkap dan bagus, kolam berenang indor sangat private kamarnyapun bersih dan rapih

author: VASILIOS
title: Exceptional
text: Greeted by friendly staff upon arrival. Room was spacious and clean. Breakfast was very good also. Highly recommend this hotel

author: Marco
title: Schön aber laut
text:
Zimmer sind schön und sauber, Personal sehr nett. Frühstück landestypisch.und umfangreich.
Aber: Omelette war kalt und es fehlt europäisches Essen- für deutsche ehr schwierig. Haben Früchte gegessen. Man findet etwas.

Die rooftopbar ist zu laut - Musik schallt durch das ganze Hotel bis ins Zimmer. Konnten dort nicht länger sitzen ohne Gehörschaden

author: Bery
title: An enjoyable spontaneous stay.
text: Kemarin kami sekeluarga kecil mendadak pesan kamar di Kokoon, kamarnya bagus, bersih.. Inshaa Allah menambah ide nanti kl buat kamar seperti di sini😍🙏🏻

author: Widyawati
text:
Nice big room, new and clean.
Room sound proofing is not good at all.
The cleaning service make so much noise when clean next room. Guests talk very loud in the hall at 5am!!! 4-5 guests even sit on the floor, in front of the elevator and non stop talking. I report to the hotel staff but they do nothing to warn the noisy guests.

author: Abi Arga H
title: Very recommended
text: Tempat nyaman bersih, nostalgia venue pernikahan jaman covid, staff sangat friendly, kamar nyaman, dekat dengan pusat oleh2 dan pom bensin

author: IU
text: Mantap pelayanannya

author: Corry Nurmala
text: Menginap disini ketika dinas ke banyuwangi, hotelnya mewah weh pertama kali sampe, pelayanannya ramah, bisa pinjem setrika (ini penting sih), plus dapat harga include diner, makanannya enak2... Rekomendasi bgt kl ke banyuwangi inep disini

author: Ilona
title: Nice before getting for Volcano
text: Responsive staff, clean, they have sauna and swimming pool, nice breakfast. Food more Indonesian.

author: Indira
text: Love it🫰🏻

author: Coastal23476382674
title: Staycation yg menyenangkan
text:
Kami menginap 3 malam d junior suit, kamarnya sangat nyaman dan pelayanan yg memuaskan, smua staff cukup ramah dan helpfull. 
Menu sarapan pun beragam dan enak.
Fasilitas kolam renang, sauna, lengkap dan bersih.

author: MONIKA
title: Good hotel for vacation
text: Yang kurang hanya tempatnya saja yang agak jauh dari pelabuhan Ketapang.. tapi lainnya luar biasa.. kamar dan kasur serta fasilitas semua top

author: Fitri S.
text: Pengalaman menginap di sini nyaman, makanannya variatif dan enak, lokasi strategis

author: Jojo
title: Great Hotel
text: No doubt, this is the best city hotel in Banyuwangi. The room is super nice, with a big bed and everything well maintained. It’s really a nice hotel overall. That said, I did notice that the staff could improve their service to match the quality of the hotel itself.

author: Yunn
title: Feeling at home.
text: I love this hotel with the warm hospitality from the reception and the comfortable design . Will definitely come back again.

author: Ayu
title: Excellent
text:

author: Daniele
text:
- way above my expectations, a really beautiful hotel 
- smells soooo nice in the lobby, they must spray lemongrass from the ceiling or something, you kinda want to sit there and chilll
- beautiful rooms, spacious, comfortable, Netflix on tv, great WiFi
- modern toilet and showers
- professional and welcoming staff
- there are two restaurants, including a steak one, a bar in the rooftop, and a Starbucks in ground floor
- beautiful views of the coconut trees jungle and the sea from the top.
- location is a bit far from the ferry and the town centre
- they wouldn’t deliver gofood to the room, and you must go down and pick it up yourself. In some ways I understand it, but idk, other hotels just deliver to the room

author: Cruiser05978056717
title: Experience Menginap di Kokoon Hotel, hotel baru dan segala kenyamanannya
text:
Menginap di Kokoon Hotel merupakan salah satu pilihan terbaik.

Kamarnya bersih banget, rapi, Interiornya oke, tempat tidurnya empuk, AC dingin, dan pencahayaannya pas banget cocok buat istirahat. Kamar mandinya juga bersih dan lengkap, ada air panas yang lancar dan amenitiesnya komplit.

Special thanks untuk Mas David dan tim, super ramah dan helpful dari awal check-in sampai check-out. Mereka bener-bener sigap bantuin kalau kita butuh sesuatu, dan selalu senyum.

Untuk breakfast, Variannya banyak dan enak-enak. Ada makanan lokal juga yang rasanya mantap teritama Bakmi Gorengnya, plus beberapa pilihan western food. Tempat makannya juga nyaman banget.

Pokoknya puas banget nginep di sini, dan pastinya bakal balik lagi kalau ke kota Banyuwangi lagi. Highly recommended buat yang cari penginapan nyaman dengan pelayanan top!

Overall Ok😊

Het ontbijt buffet was geen 5* hotel kwaliteit.
De ene dag waren bijna alle gerechten te zout de andere dag was het niet zo vers.

author: Brandner S
title: Wundervolles Hotel! Weiterempfehlung 150%
text:
Wir waren 6 Wochen geschäftlich in Bangywangi und hatten in diesem Hotel gewohnt! 
Unser Fazit wir hätten nicht besser wählen

 können 
Der komplette Staff beginnend mit den Rezepionsangestellten, bis zu den fleißigen Männern die für die Sauberkeit zuständig sind  alle freundlich, höflich und sehr hilfsbereit, das haben wir noch nie in diesem Ausmaß erlebt. Auf diesem Weg nochmals ein großes Dankeschön!
Die Küche ausgezeichnet auch da noch Mal ein großes Dankeschön für die Erfüllung meiner kleinen Wünsche beim Frühstück. Wir haben uns unglaublich wohl gefühlt und haben heute mit schwerem Herzen By,by gesagt!
Vielleicht sehen wir uns einmal wieder, wenn Bangywangi dann nur Kokoon!!!

author: Hery
title: Nice, clean, neat & well design hotel
text: Its our 2nd time staying in the hotel. Good vibes, well design and overall were satisfying from arrival, check in, room condition, set up and lay out, lounge to breakfast was well lid.

text: Staf hotel sangat ramah dan profesional.

author: HK
title: Comfortable Stay, Great Breakfast & Relaxing Atmosphere
text:
Neat, Clean & Pleasant Stay
This hotel is neat, clean, pleasant, and convenient to stay in. It was our second time here, and this time we had the chance to enjoy the bar next to the pool, which was very enjoyable. Unfortunately, we didn’t get to experience the pool itself as it was already late at night and we were a bit tired after a long drive.

Breakfast is always a highlight, with plenty of variety, and the outdoor terrace setup facing the mountain views is simply wonderful.

author: Linda
title: Breakfast
text:
Terlalu banyak macam,tapi gak ada yg special…kalo boleh,makanan daerahnya lebih ditonjolkan.
Saya suka nasi cawuk nya👍

author: ilham n
title: Best value for money place to stay in banyuwangi
text: Always my place to stay when in Banyuwangi. Kokoon never failed to impress me. The staff, the cleanliness,  the room, everything always up for the high standard. A little room for improvement perhaps is on the number of variety of breakfast. Would love to see traditional banyuwangi snack or breakfast, like kue kucur or nasi tempong as part of daily menu

author: Adrian S
text: Menurut saya, the best hotel di Banyuwangi..  Sudah beberapa kali nginep disini (mungkin sudah 10x an). Dan sudah bandingin juga dengan hotel2 yang lainnya. Kokoon punya jg bagus & bersih, lokasi gampang, fasilitas OK (pool, fitness, spa), makanan cukup enak, dan yg terpenting bagi saya, parkiran basement jadi adem, mobil tidak kejemur... Saya ada beberapa foto-fotonya.. Follow IG: foodtory untuk review lainnya

author: 张勍博pro
text: The hotel offers great value for money and is probably one of the best in Banyuwangi. The staff are friendly, and the rooms are clean and tidy.

Très bon hôtel, bien situé pour excursion au Kawah Ijen. Chambre propre et spacieuse. Très bon petit déjeuner et restaurant. Très beau roof top également.
Rien mais piscine un peu fraîche

author: Made Darma
text: We visited this spa hoping for a relaxing experience, as we truly love everything about the hotel. Unfortunately, our interaction at the reception was not as warm as we had hoped. When we inquired about evening availability for four people, we were told it was fully booked and advised to check with the evening shift staff instead. It would have been more helpful if there had been some initiative to assist us with a booking. This left us feeling a little disappointed, and in the end, we chose to cancel our plans. We share this feedback in the hope that the spa can improve its customer service to provide a more welcoming and seamless experience for future guests.

author: Henda Firmansyah
text: Mewah nyaman

author: Rose Hill
text: Hotel ga jelas. Pas check in, di family room cuma dikasih 4 handuk mandi Dan 2 hand towels. Saya pikir memang seperti itu standard mereka. Eh, pas check out. Baru mau keluar parkiran, ditanya soal hand towels ada dimana? Saya pikir mereka bertanya tentang hand towels yang dua itu. Ternyata mereka tanya hand towels yang tidak pernah mereka kasih..Kata front office officer, harusnya mereka menata 4 handuk Dan 4 hand towels . Lah? Mana saya tahu? Pas check in cuma ada 2. Ya, 2 itu yang kami tinggalkan. Belum lagi saat sarapan, makanan pada kosong . Mereka lambat me refill. Untuk potato gratin,pas di refill, sisa dari wadah yang lama ditaruh asal di atas membuat tampilan yang menjijikan. Berulang kali saya sarapan di hotel, baru kali ini menemukan cara refill yang amburadul gini..

author: ZulfiAn Ainur Rofiq
title: Amazing experience
text: A hotel with a nice facade, modern but not leaving behind the local cultural characteristics, good service, complete and comfortable facilities.

title: Best Hotel Kokoon
text: Hotel Kokoon emang hotel ter the best sih yang pernah saya singgahi. Hotelnya bagus, bersih, fasilitas lengkap, pelayanan ramah dan makanannya enak-enak. Kalian harus cobain staycation di Kokoon Hotel😍

author: Manda F

title: Pelayanan dan fasilitas yang mengesankan
text: Jadi tujuan utama saat kembali ke Banyuwangi, hotel dengan fasad yang bagus, taman dan fasilitas yang terawat, fasilitas lengkap (kolam renang, sauna, playground, resto cafe, gym dan lain-lain terdapat roof top tertinggi di Banyuwangi, bisa melihat sudut 360 kota Banyuwangi. Service Excellence

author: Pierre-françois
text:
Hôtel type international tout confort.
Énorme choix pour les petits déjeuners mais le petit déjeuner pourrait encore être mieux s’il y avait de vrais viennoiseries et pancakes ainsi que des jus frais (mais si vous aimez les petits déjeuners salés indonésiens, vous serez très contents)

author: Paola
title: Hotel bello posizione buona per tour vulcano ljen e proseguimento verso Bali
text: Posizione , bar ultimo piano, servizio reception,( preso treno da bangil scesi a rogodjampi 5 ore ) poi taxi 15 minuti . Ci hanno prenotato tour vulcano ljen la notte stessa . Bello ! Ci hanno prenotato traghetto da katapang a gilimanu ( a piedi preso taxi prima e dopo ) attenzione a gilimanu le app taxi non funzionano mettetevi d’accordo con taxisti .

author: WENBIN
title: 超出预期
text: 从到酒店服务人员帮忙拿取行李到酒店用餐，整个过程无论是环境还是服务都超出了预期，房间也超大。一个房间住四个人完全没问题，早餐选择也很丰富！泳池水也很干净，真的很超乎预期，强烈推荐

title: Comfort
text: I recently stayed at this hotel for a weekend getaway and was very impressed. The room was clean, spacious, and had a comfortable bed. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful, especially the front desk staff who were always smiling and willing to assist with any questions. I would definitely recommend this hotel to anyone looking for a comfortable and enjoyable stay.

author: Pramono Ludiro
text: Hotel yang sangat direkomendasikan di Banyuwangi. Family room isi 4 orang sangat nyaman dan luas. Walaupun hanya transit sehabis dari Bali tapi serasa perpanjangan liburan.

author: Rizki
title: Exceptional Stay Experience
text:
This property offers outstanding value with a prime location that makes exploring easy. The cleanliness is top-notch, and the staff are incredibly friendly and helpful, enhancing the overall experience. Facilities like the inviting pool and well-kept garden add to the charm, while housekeeping keeps everything spotless.
However, there could be improvements in amenities, but the positives definitely outweigh this minor drawback.

author: LW
text: Relaxed atmosphere. Exceptional flavors. Maximum cleanliness. Traditional-modern atmosphere.

author: Meilany A Runtuwene
text: thank you for making our stay memorable 🌼 just a small note of typo on the word healthy, you might want to check 😊🫶🏽

title: Exceptional

Great place.

Super breakfast.

author: Silvy Agustina
text: Menginap disini untuk urusan kantor. Lokasinya strategis, di tengah kota. Hotelnya super bersih, begitu masuk disambut dengan taman sebelum masuk ke lobby, dan langsung denger suara gamelan khas jawa. Vibesnya langsung liburan dan rileks walaupun kerja… Staffnya ramah, urusan check in cepat. Bagus, karena memang udah capek banget seharian. Masuk kamar, kamarnya super bersih, fresh dan nyaman. Nuansa rotan-rotannya aku suka.  Amenities pasti lengkap ya. Sandalnya batik. Kamar mandi terbuka, menyatu dengan tempat tidur, walaupun bisa ditutup, ya lebih suka dibuka aja. Pilihan sarapan bervariasi dan pas sarapannya juga gak ramai dan penuh, jadi bisa menikmati sarapan dengan tenang. So far, sangat enjoy stay di Kokoon hotel. Pengen balik kesini pagi bukan urusan kerja ya…

author: Akmal Syahilma
text: Makanan dan kasur enak

title: Very pleasant hotel
text:
We were in this hotel because we had the Ijen trip and the personal were very welcoming and helpful.
The hotel is large, the pool is very quiet and clean and very pleasant to swim in.
The family room was perfect and the size very nice.

author: Windy Adelia Manullang
text: Me and my boyfriend really like this hotel

author: Nicholas Haryo Bisma
text: Tempatnya sangat bagus dan nyaman

author: Andika Fahmi
title: The best hotel di Banyuwangi
text:
liburan kmaren menginap disini pelayanannya super ramah dan terbaikkk,  dari security, disambut bellboy dengan dibawakan barang tanpa diminta, sampe lobby staff receptionist/guest services yg super rama, proses check in - check out cepat, jelas tutur bahasa dan gerak tubuh yg sangat menyenangkan apalagi sampai di kasih 2 kunci tanpa deposit dan diantar smpai ke lift luar biasa bonusnya dikasih free pilih lantai dan view kamar, kamar bersih wangi, semua area bersih terawat, pelayanan bar dan resto cepat order sesuatu juga tidak menunggu lama dan rasanya cocok dilidah bahkan staff bar dan resto mengedukasi tentang minuman dan makanan, pas di lantai 2 ketemu engineering yg mengarahkan cara penggunaan fasilitas sauna dan pool dengan baik dan ramah,
terimakasih untuk semua staff karyawan kokoon hotel banyuwangi terbaik

author: Stuart
text: Only stayed one night but everything was fine

author: fiona t
title: Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi Memang Juara!!!
text:
Pengalaman menginap di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi sangat luar biasa! Semua aspek pelayanan benar-benar memuaskan.

Staf hotel sangat ramah dan profesional, terutama Mbak Cynthia yang melayani kami dengan penuh keramahan sejak awal. Pelayanan yang diberikan benar-benar membuat kami merasa disambut dan dihargai sebagai tamu.

Kamar hotel sangat bersih, nyaman, dan tertata rapi. Terima kasih khusus untuk Shobirin yang merapikan kamar kami dengan sangat baik!

Fasilitas hotel juga sangat mendukung kenyamanan, dan yang paling kami suka adalah sarapannya! Menu breakfast-nya enak dan variatif, membuat pagi hari kami jadi lebih menyenangkan.

Secara keseluruhan, Hotel Kokoon adalah pilihan terbaik untuk menginap di Banyuwangi. Kami sangat merekomendasikannya dan pasti akan kembali lagi jika ada kesempatan.

author: Justin
title: Heavenly pillows
text:
This was a very comfortable place to overnight in Bayuwangi. 
Although the food was slightly higher priced than expected, the rooms were great value for money. 
If anything you must stay here for the pillows. I regret I didn’t check the brand but they were the best pillows I have ever felt in my life. The best bit was there was one slightly firmer and the other one felt like a marshmallow.

author: Stuart
text: Only stayed one night but everything was fine

text: Hotel yang nyaman, harga terjangkau, fasilitas yang lengkap. Saya paling suka bagian depan saat masuk dan menuju lobby, saya tidak langsung disambut pintu tapi taman dan tempat duduk yang luas. Lobby dengan pegawai yang ramah. 🥰. Wish to come back here

Semoga ada kesempatan bawa orangtua kesana.. thank you kookon

title: Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi
text: Seluruh fasilitas dan pelayanan sangat baik,  makanan enak-enak, hotel bersih, cocok untuk perjalanan dinas, trip keluarga, atau sekedar staycation

author: Lia
title: The best place to staycation
text: Sangat menyenangkan, tempatnya bersih, pelayanan bagus, sangat nyaman menginap disini

author: Salome
title: Aufenthalt für Ijen
text: Das Hotel ist perfekt, um eine Tour auf den Ijen zu machen. Die Unterkunft liegt in der Pick Up Zone für die Touren und das Hotel ist super, um am nächsten Tag zu entspannen. Es bietet Massagen an, hat ein super Frühstück und einen tollen Swimmingpool. Das Wlan funktioniert super schnell.

author: GermanyThompson
title: One of the best hotels ever
text: This is an outstanding hotel!!! It is, in fact, 5 star level, and should be rated accordingly. The rooms are modern, generous and clean. The entire design of the hotel is elegant. The staff is extremely kind. My friend accidently left more than 1.500 EURs in the vault, and retrieved the full amount. When I had a health issue, they tirelessly looked to help me out. Everyone, literally everyone, is always very kind and welcoming. The spa is great, a large swimming pool and sauna. Breakfast is really good, one can choose from an endless number of different foods. I have been to 69 countries, and mostly stay at 4 or 5 star hotels, and I can honestly say that this is one of the best hotels I ever stayed in!

author: zul
title: My experience.
text: sangat bagus dan bersih.lokasi hotelnya di pinggiran kota dan sangat tenang,cocok buat kalian yang mencari hotel tanpa akses ke pantai yang banyak nyamuknya.

author: Shalkie Yadav
title: Amazing room, ok restaurant, spa not so great
text:
The room was really great, clean, comfortable and with an amazing view 
Pour first order at rooftop was great. Second time they got our order wrong (Margherita instead of Pepperoni) and the cheese isn’t good so I wouldn’t recommend pizzas here
Our experience at Ijen restaurant on 3rd floor wasn’t great either. They sent the order with half of the protein missing, we then had to wait 10-15 minutes more

I wouldn’t recommend the spa. The massage wasn’t worth it. Either too hard or too soft, my leg hurts from the massage 2 days later. No music either.

author: Novy
title: Exceptional
text: Kamarnya nyaman

author: Shalkie Yadav
text: The room was really great, clean, comfortable and with an amazing view. Service at the lobby is great For first order at rooftop was great. Second time they got our order wrong (Margherita instead of Pepperoni) and the cheese isn’t good so I wouldn’t recommend pizzas here Our experience at Ijen restaurant on 3rd floor wasn’t great either. They sent the order with half of the protein missing, we then had to wait 10-15 minutes more I wouldn’t recommend the spa. The massage wasn’t worth it. Either too hard or too soft, my leg hurts from the massage 2 days later. No music either. Overall good stay

text: Toppppppppppppppppppp

author: Meander50838378543
title: i highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting the area. I’d definitely come back!
text:
Hotel!
I had such a great experience staying at Kokoon Hotel  everything was just perfect. The room was clean, cozy, and beautifully designed. The location is strategic yet peaceful, making it easy to relax.🤍😍

What made it extra special was that I happened to be celebrating my birthday during the stay. I was so touched when the frontliner staff (I wish I remembered his name!) greeted me with a warm “Happy Birthday” and even surprised me with a little cake. It was such a thoughtful gesture and really made my day!🥰🥰🤍🤍

author: Emilie
title: Très bien comme base pour Mont Ijen
text:
Chambre grande, fonctionnelle et propre.
Lit super confortable 
Personnel aux petits soins comme partout en Indonésie.
La vue sur la mer depuis la chambre.
Emplacement pratique pour un départ matinal au mont Ijen ainsi qu’au port pour rejoindre Bali.
Petit déjeuner disponible si vous partez très tôt en excursion.
Mal insonorisé (prévoyez les boules quies si vous avez le sommeil léger): on entend les voisins mais aussi le bruit de la route.
Le petit déjeuner est moyen sauf si vous aimez manger asiatique dès le matin. Il y a tout de même la possibilité de manger des œufs (omelettes…) mais pas de yaourts par exemple

author: Chepy Mohamad
text: Nyaman dan bagus

title: Amazing room, ok restaurant, not so great spa
text:
The room was really great, clean, comfortable and with an amazing view 
Pour first order at rooftop was great. Second time they got our order wrong (Margherita instead of Pepperoni) and the cheese isn’t good so I wouldn’t recommend pizzas here
Our experience at Ijen restaurant on 3rd floor wasn’t great either. They sent the order with half of the protein missing, we then had to wait 10-15 minutes more

I wouldn’t recommend the spa. The massage wasn’t worth it. Either too hard or too soft, my leg hurts from the massage 2 days later. No music either.

author: Ravita Dwi Yana
text: Makanan enak enak semua, tempatnya oke juga Pokonya best hotel menurutku sih di banyuwangi Ada playground dan kolam renangnya cocok buat para parents

author: Claudia Silalahi
text: Akuuuu suka banget di hotel ini. Kamar nya Bersih, bagus dan aesthetic. Ada rooftop nya juga, dan tiap kamar dapat free welcoming drink di rooftop cafe nya. Keren. Hotel bintang4 tapi service nya rasa bintang5. Kalo ke Banyuwangi pasti nginep disini lagi 😍😍

author: Maya D
text: Hotel nyaman 💓👍

author: Rineka Dewi
title: best hotel in Banyuwangi
text: very good experience stayed in Kokoon hotel,good service and we allowed to checked in early,friendly staffs,good vibes and environment,various breakfast will stay here again when come to Banyuwangi.

author: Febby Himawan
text: Untuk long trip ke bali dari jakarta, cocok untuk istirahat disini, bersih, bagus kamarnya, ada starbuck di lobby bawahnya

author: Shalkie
title: Amazing room, ok spa, ok restaurant
text:
Room was great with an amazing view. The staff was helpful and friendly. 
The spa was okay-ish . Have had much better massages in Indonesia.
Restaurant ok. They got our order wrong once and another time they presented with only half of the dish ordered (had ordered Nasi goreng tek-tek which was supposed to have 4 kinds of protein, got only 1)

author: yoga perdana
text: Pengalaman menginap yang sangat berkesan dimulai dari sambutan yang hangat saat Check In, lokasi hotel yang strategis, pelayanan, fasilitas , kebersihan dan kenyamanan hotel yang sangat lengkap dan baik, menu makanan yang lengkap dan cita rasa yang enak.

author: Laila
title: Exceptional
text: Sangat mengesankan , dari kamar, pelayanan, kebersihan, makanan sangat baik, kapan2 kalo ke Banyuwangi mau nginep di sini lagi

author: Yanthi
title: Perfect choice
text: We thought it’ll be just a rest before crossing to bali, but it turns the hotel is very cozy and super clean with big beds. Breakfast is served professionally. We’ll be choosing you again !

author: Shalkie
text:
Room was great with an amazing view. The staff was helpful and friendly. 
The spa was okay-ish . Have had much better massages in Indonesia.
Restaurant ok. They got our order wrong once and another time they presented with only half of the dish ordered (had ordered Nasi goreng tek-tek which was supposed to have 4 kinds of protein, got only 1)

author: Angelika Apple
text: Pertama kali nginep disinii, pelayanan oke bangett. Soon pulang ke Banyuwangi bakalan nginep sini lagii, thankyou kak Methaaa sangat sangat membantu di proses aku reschedule tanggal check in 💖

author: Agus Wijaya
text: recommended utk yg mau istirahat sebelum nyebrang ke gilimanuk-bali, hotel sangat bagus, masih baru, bersih, nyaman, ada starbucks di lobby, tersedia ev charging di basement

author: Titien Sukmadewi Budiman
title: Amazing
text:
We were welcomed with nice and cool lobby amidst the warm weather of Banyuwangi. This is our second stay at Kokoon. Kokoon has proven that it can maintain its excellence from last year.
Friendly staff, spacious and clean room, clean linen. Generous compliment (school holiday).
Just one small piece of feedback: the room is not soundproof. We could still hear furniture being dragged around.
Other than that, everything was excellent. Keep up the good work. Kudos for all staff and management.

author: Choirur Rozikin
text: Bagus dan bersih, mudah ditemukan. Ramah dg mobil listrik

author: IH
text: Low prices, super service.

author: Anna
text:
Nice facilities, swimming pool, sauna, gym etc... 
Beautiful hotel, nice rooftop and clean rooms. Very good homebase for ijen or any other activities around banyuwangi.

author: 鈴木大拙
text: 新しく清潔で快適なホテルです。

author: Wiryo
title: a gem in Banyuwangi
text:
Chose this Hotel for transit to Bali.
Location is a bit far from the Ketapang Port but it was worth the journey.
The Hotel is Grand and Luxurious.
It felt like a truly hidden gem in the middle of the jungle of coconut trees.

author: Dwi A. N.
text: Hotel yang nyaman buat keluarga, parkir luas, keamanan terjaga, one gate sistem, area hotel hijau, banyak spot dan taman serta jogging track. Akses private beach untuk lihat sunrise. Next ke sini lagi.

author: Lisa
title: kamar nyaman
text:
kamar bersih, nyaman, tenang
bs pinjam crib untuk bayi

author: desi
title: Pilihan dadakan
text: Harga sebanding dengan fasilitas yg ada. Mini bar baik snack atau minuman diberikan gratisssss. Kemudian welcome drink jg diberikan fas berbeda dgn fas welcome drink yg biasa. Untuk menu breakfastnya kurang krn ada beberapa item yg berkurang dr sy menginap awal2 kokoon ada. Semoga kembali seperti awal. Fasilitas tdk diragukan bagus banget dan worthed.

author: Darman
title: Great hotel with superb breakfast
text: Various breakfast and super clean rooms. Amazing!

author: hencejt
title: Very good hotel to stay in Banyuwangi
text: Very nice hotel to stay in Banyuwangi. Good hotel staff handling during stay in this hotel, hopefully will stay again in another days.

author: Djoko Setijono
text: Luxurious and modernly designed yet felt natural. The guest drop off, which is a bit separated from the hotel's main lobby, conveniently accomodates guests & personnel trafic and minimize the risk of being crowded and chaotic. The lobby is spacious yet its design is "warm" and inviting. Natural light penetrates easily. There is a hint of local (Javanese) culture in the interior. Guest room is cozy and uniquely designed. Basic free beverages are provided. Lighting and natural lighting are superb. Cleanliness is notable. Customer centricity and convenience are at optimum. Diversity of breakfast menu is quite good, from local/tradisional to western. Taste is perhaps something that can be improved. Overall, it was a nice experience.

author: MOHAMMAD
title: Exceptional
text: Ok

author: Febriyan
title: Very recommended hotel
text:
A great hotel—friendly staff, delicious food, and spacious family rooms. Overall, very satisfied with our 2-night stay here.
Thank you, Kokoon Hotel!

author: Rommy Perdana Putra
text: Walau menginap hanya satu malam tapi semuanya berkesan. Mulai dari check in, fasilitasnya, pelayanannya, sarapan, hingga check out semuanya baik. Untuk kamarnya bersih dan bagus serta dapet pemandangan gunung. Aku coba fasilitas gym, kolam renang, dan sauna. Parkiran luas dan semua staf ramah. Overall recomended kalau mau bermalam di Banyuwangi.

author: anak kedua
text: Service mantab. Ramah. Helpfull. Menyediakan listrik gratis bawa charger mobil sendiri.  Lumayan bangun2 penuh. Batre EV

text: Budget accommodation, expensive sensation.

text: Good

author: ES
