author: Wiryo Hartoyo
text: Really feels like an upper class hotel in big cities. Amazing view to the forest behind. Service was great. The room was very clean and proper.

author: ayu file
text: Bagus, nyaman dan ramah pelayanannya.

author: Dani Setiawan
text: Security ramah, sigap membantu menyeberangkan yang mau keluar dan masuk hotel kokoon

author: M***a
text: Sudah dua kali saya minap disini untuk urusan bisnis dan liburan keluarga.

author: Muhamad
title: Top 3 hotels at Banyuwangi
text:
Nice and clean hotel — definitely one of the top 3 hotels in Banyuwangi.
Located on the main street in the southern part of the city.
Friendly staff and a wide variety of breakfast options, including local dishes.
There’s a nice café on the 16th floor with a rooftop deck offering great views.
Facilities are good — not too close to busy areas, yet still convenient to reach the city center.
A great place to stay if you’re looking to explore the southern part of Banyuwangi.

author: smita
title: Value for Money, Good Facilities and Service
text: The hotel was very nice, value for money, and the service was top notch. The only downside is we requested non smoking room, but unfortunately since the hotel is full booked they turned the smoking room into non smoking for us. They tried to clean and give room spray but the smoke smells stays and got really uncomfortable.  Unfortunately we cannot change room due to fully booked, we have booked our room month in advance would appreciate if they have allocate a room as our request

author: Julia D
title: Bagus utk family
text: BF nya enak, kamar bersih, ac dingin, staff ramah. Pool bersih. Di rooftop viewnya bagus dan makanannya juga ok. Over all ok.

author: Herlinda D
title: Hotel yg menyenangkan
text: Hotel yang sangat bersih, lux, ramah dan menu sarapan yg nyammi.. lokasi yg strategis.. puas dgn pelayanannya.. terimakasih kokoon Banyuwangi

author: elvin g
title: Family road trip 2025
text:
Sangat merekomendasikan Kokoon Hotel sebagai pilihan akomodasi yang nyaman, strategis. saya mendapatkan pengalaman luar biasa berkat staf yang sangat ramah, sigap, dan helpful. Mereka tidak hanya melayani dengan cepat, tetapi juga benar-benar peduli terhadap kenyamanan tamu.

Nilai tambah yang sangat signifikan adalah adanya Starbucks di lokasi hotel. Ini sangat memudahkan untuk memulai hari dengan kopi favorit tanpa harus keluar area hotel—benar-benar solusi praktis bagi tamu bisnis maupun leisure.

Sangat direkomendasikan !

author: Laurencia Levina
title: cozy
text: bangunan bagus, kamar bersih dan nyaman sekali, fasilitas lengkap

author: Laurencia L
title: cozy
text: hotel nyaman bersih lengkap bagus, kasur nyaman sekali, interior juga modern, kamar mandi bersih, mantap pokoknya, wajib nginep sini deh

author: Melly Sumpena
text: Best hotel in banyuwangi Good ambience, best service, good hospitality, best room.love it!!!

author: Ihsan
title: Viuw bagus
text: Nyaman buat keluarga

author: Dwi
title: Lama menunggu
text: Check in masuk kamar lama menunggu hampir 30 menit badan ini SDH capek mau segera istirahat eee kamar blum ready pdhal kita dtang jam 3 sore...agar diperhatikan lgi layanan check in nya

author: edo neverson
text: Menginap di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi adalah pengalaman yang sangat menyenangkan dan tak terlupakan! Hotel ini benar-benar memadukan kenyamanan modern dengan sentuhan budaya lokal yang kental, membuat setiap tamu merasa betah sejak pertama kali datang. 🛏️ Kamar Bersih & Nyaman Kamar-kamar di Kokoon sangat luas, bersih, dan dilengkapi dengan fasilitas modern seperti smart TV, AC dingin, kasur empuk, dan kamar mandi yang elegan. Beberapa kamar bahkan menawarkan pemandangan langsung ke Gunung Ijen atau area hijau yang menyegarkan mata. 🏊‍♀️ Fasilitas Lengkap & Instagramable Hotel ini punya kolam renang outdoor yang luas dengan pemandangan alam yang memanjakan. Area lobi dan taman juga sangat estetik, cocok banget buat kamu yang hobi foto-foto. Ada juga gym, spa, dan restoran yang nyaman untuk bersantai. 🍽️ Sarapan Lezat & Variatif Menu sarapannya luar biasa! Mulai dari makanan khas Indonesia seperti nasi goreng dan rawon, sampai pilihan western seperti roti panggang dan omelet. Semua dihidangkan dengan rasa yang nikmat dan pelayanan yang ramah. 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Pelayanan Ramah & Profesional Staf hotel sangat membantu, ramah, dan responsif. Mereka memberikan pelayanan terbaik dengan senyum yang tulus, menjadikan suasana terasa hangat seperti di rumah sendiri. 📍 Lokasi Strategis Berada di jalur utama menuju Kawah Ijen, hotel ini cocok banget jadi basecamp sebelum pendakian. Dekat juga dengan pusat kota Banyuwangi dan tempat-tempat wisata seperti Taman Blambangan, Pantai Boom, dan Stasiun Banyuwangi Kota. ✨ Kesimpulan Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi adalah pilihan sempurna untuk liburan, bisnis, maupun transit. Suasana yang tenang, fasilitas lengkap, dan layanan kelas atas membuat hotel ini sangat layak direkomendasikan. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ (5/5)

author: Frendy
title: Luxurious and cozy rooms
text: Great experiences staying at the hotel and the room are very clean. The most recommended hotel in banyuwangi.

author: Eri
title: Kerens
text: Kerenss

author: Frendy S
title: Luxurious hotel with the affordable price
text: Great experiences staying at the hotel and the room are very clean. The most recommended hotel in banyuwangi. The staff are very attentive

author: Hanny M
title: Bathroom Review
text: It would be better if there a lock in the door of the bathroom. I have an autism child. If he want to take a pee, he doesn’t care if there’s a person or not using bathroom. He just open the door regardless.

author: Erick K
title: Staycation
text:
Good Service n good experience.
Liburan terasa lebih mengesankan menginap di hotel ini. Pelayanan yang profesional dan sudah berpengalaman.

author: Dewi Ayu Astari
text: Tujuan kesini cuma pengen nyobain pizza nya aja di rooftop. Pizzanya enak, tipe yang agak tebel gitu rotinya. Suasana nyaman karena kebetulan ngga banyak orang saat itu. Staff resto nya ramah & sigap melayani.

author: Supriyanto Supriyanto
text: Antar food

author: Susanti N Aldila
text: Everything was extraordinary. Clean room, tasty breakfast, lunch, and snack. Well function air conditioner and hot water. Service was friendly and helpful. It took 1-2 hours away to Mount Ijen’s foot.

author: karina
title: Comfortable hotel
text: Kokoon hotel is a nice and comfortable hotel. Strategic location. The staff is also friendly. The facilities are well maintained. The breakfast is varied. Keep it up. One of the recommended hotels when coming to Banyuwangi. We will come back again.

author: Qurrota Nastiti
text: Kamarnya bersih dan besar, AC nya dingin TV tersedia channel lokal, netflix , youtube dll ... Pelayanan sangat ramah dan sigap, saat saya minta tukar kamar dari pojokan ke  yang didekat lift dibantu staff dengan cepat dan baik 😊 Breakfast enak2 dan sangat banyak pilihannya 😊 Hanya saja  kolam renang indoor jadi tidak terlalu luas areanya Terimakasih Kokoon 🙏

author: 09. EKA PUTRI
text: Best

author: Mona
title: Bagus sekali
text: Kamar 2 king bed untuk family sempurna, breakfast enak dan variasi , staff ramah

author: Rama
title: Very luxurious
text: Nice hotel

author: Familie Löw
title: Das höchste Gebäude weit und breit, sehr modern und luxuriös dazu!
text: Das Hotel hat nicht nur unseren Fahrer beeindruckt, der noch nie ein solche hohes Gebäude gesehen hatte. Wirklich ein tolles Hotel, sehr modern und luxuriös. Offenes Badezimmer im Zimmer mit verschiebbaren Holzwänden, tolle Aussicht in die Umgebung und Richtung Bali. Sehr schöner Poolbereich, sogar mit Sauna (getrennt nach Geschlecht), im Gebäude integriert und dennoch offen, ebenfalls tolle Aussicht auf die Berge. Internationales Frühstück mit sehr großer Auswahl und nette Bar auf dem Dach. Personal extrem freundlich und hilfsbereit. Unbedingt empfehlenswert: Wanderung auf den Vulkan Mount Jien, am Besten zum Sonnenaufgang und inkl. Bluefire Naturschauspiel!

author: Hirto Waluyo
text: Rekomended banget, kamar luas, bersih Wortid deh.

author: Angel
text: Masukan saja untuk breakfastnya lebih di variasi lagi pilihannya dan cota rasa ditingkatkan

author: Alexis M
title: The comfiest beds
text:
Omg the mattress were sooo comfortable i had such a long sleep! 

The breakfast was huge, the staff was friendly. There is a massive free underground parking, everything was smooth and i will definitely go back!
Till next time :)

author: Singgih
title: Hospitality kokoon hotel
text: Kamar bersih, luas, staff ramah, breakfast enak smua & bervariasi....sukaa

author: Syarif Maulana
text: Mulai dari pertama masuk lobi sampai terakhir keluar lobi, semuanya sangat baik (keramahan, kebersihan maupun fasilitas) dan mantap.

author: Aswar
title: Exceptional
text: Mantap semua sesuai expectasi

author: Yohanes
title: Wonderful trip
text: Sungguh sebuah hotel yang sangat menarik. Fasilitas kamar yang oke. View hotel yang wow. Fasilitas hotel juga oke. Sayangnya untuk bagian Rooftop agak kurang terawat. Mungkin bisa diperbaiki kedepannya

author: Steve Wijaya
text: This is not worth a four star hotel, IT SHOULD DESERVED A 5 STAR HOTEL!!! In the lobby they served a coffee shop and also serve coffee beans from starbucks which is cool, you could grab a welcome drink from the rooftop at the rooftop floor, the rooms are quite spacious. The staffs were very friendly which it makes this rating higher, and there is other facilities like swimming pool,kids club, and etc, the breakfast has a lot of indonesian foods but less international foods but i still liked it! We got a view from mountains and many crops which i liked it. Amazing Kokoon hotel, 5/5 overall rating

author: Indra S.
text:
Secara umum sangat menyenangkan karena :
1. Proses check in dan check out cepat
2. Seluruh staf hotel ramah dan helpfull
3. Kebersihan seluruh area sangat terjaga
4. Kekedapan di kamar baik
5. Lokasi strategis karena tidak terlalu jauh untuk ke tengah kota

author: brilliant johan Anugerah
text: Salah satu pilihan untuk disinggahi

author: NATASHA SABRINA
text: Very great service! Udah beberapa kali stay at this hotel, very clean & cozy place to relax. I left my cardigan inside the wardrobe, and they gladfuly helped to arrange the delivery for me. Bahkan dilipet & di packed dgn rapih. 5star for the service!

author: Arief
title: Cocoon Banyuwangi
text: Wow! I can't believe there is a hotel as good as this in Banyuwangi. It's amazing in terms of its building, quality, and food. All the services were also satisfying. I was also impressed with the service from Kak Shellen. Friendly, beautiful, and communicative!

author: Arief
title: Cocoon Banyuwangi
text:
Wow!
Ga sangka di banyuwangi ada hotel sebaik ini. Keren dari segi bangunannya, mutunya, dan makanannya. Seluruh pelayanannya jg memuaskan. Waktu itu jg terkesan dengan pelayanan kak shellen. Ramah, cantik dan komunikatif!

author: rizal
title: Nice place
text: Everything is nice recommended place to stay in Banyuwangi

author: diana key
text: Mudah ditemukan karena terletak di jalan utama kota. Pelayanan ramah, pilihan kamar beragam. Aku pilih kamar family dengan dua bed besar. Suasana nyaman dan tenang. Kolam renang, loker, dan tempat ganti sangat nyaman karena hanya bisa diakses oleh penghuni kamar menggunakan kunci kamar. Handuk bersih pun disediakan tersendiri di area kolam renang. Masakan yang disajikan di restoran enak-enak dan bervariasi. Makan untuk anak-anakku diberikan dalam wadah (take away) karena nggak mau ikut ke restoran. Area parkir luas, selain mobil pribadi juga bisa untuk beberapa bus pariwisata.

author: Gartika Nur Agustyana
title: Good
text: Nice hotel

author: Nada Hadi
text: Abundant food choices. Modern interiors. Serenity by the pool. Instagrammable interior. Friendly and helpful staff.

author: Fkho
title: Pleasant Hotel in Banyuwangi
text: Always leaving this hotel with pleasant feeling.. very comfortable, staff are friendly. We had great time staying in this hotel while visiting Banyuwangi.

author: Felina
title: never failed to get best price & best staycation by Agoda
text:
the location is strategic.
the facilities, the lounge, the food is great & vary.. unfortunately, the spa service isn't as expected. the massage is fine, but the spa environment doesn't support us to have a relax moment. overall is good to stay, and worth it to repeat.

author: Global66136224211
title: Representation of Banyuwangi
text: View sangat OK, desain hotel sangat OK. Vibe Indonesia yg mewah. Bersih, menu sarapan yg bru kali ini didaerah ada hotel sediakan menu steam ikan (sayang tidak ada kuah hongkongnya) . Semuanya OK pokoknya. Utk bisa tetap bertahan, coba berganti2 desain interior dan landscape, tak perlu mengubah total, hanya menambahkan beberapa elemen selendang motif banyuwangi yg besar di interior entrance, atau di gazebo masuk, tambah beberapa elemen seni , dri entrance serta landscape ditambahkan tanaman air seperti teratai pada kolam di entrance depan gedung.

author: agustinusfk2001
text: Staff hotel de best (helpfull, ramah, murah senyum, responsif) badabest deh, saya datang check-in tengah malam tapi staff senyum(security, concierge ,FO seperti duty di pagi hari) . Ruangan FO dan kamar harum,pemandangan ke hamparan kelapa dan laut,bersih banget. Makanan bervariasi (sedikit saran jika ada piring habis mkn segera angkat,ada condiment habis segera isi),handuk lengkap, sebaiknya di kolam renang disediakan lebih banyak handuk (saat sy ingin berenang hanya tersedia sedikit handuk, akhirnya sharing 1 handuk dengan anak), kekedapan kamar juara.. Menurut saya ini hotel bintang 4 yg terbaik hospitalitynya

author: Nenny
text: always happy stay in the property

title: Exceptional

author: Saleha
title: "Most beautiful and friendly hotel I've ever stayed at – loved it!"
text: "This hotel truly feels like a home away from home. From the moment you step in, the soothing scent of lemongrass sets the tone for a relaxing stay. The check-in and check-out process is seamless, and the hotel's cleanliness and comfortable beds ensure a restful experience. The staff, from front desk to cafe and housekeeping, are friendly and accommodating. Plus, the breakfast and lunch menu is delicious – a great touch to an already wonderful stay."

author: David
title: Hotel Review 07 June 2025
text: The Hotel is spacious and has a good vibe. The Staff are pleasant and understand customer service.  The Roof Top is a must on the 16th floor. The views are fantastic. The breakfast buffet is okay, but a bit boring.  Overall a relaxing stay, bed was comfortable. The room decor and design modern.

author: Dwita R
title: Memuaskan sangat menginap disini
text:
Pengalaman pertama menginap di hotel ini, awalnya hanya book 1 malam saja, ternyata nyaman sekali dan memutuskan utk extend 1 malam lagi, semua karyawan mulai dr security yg sigap saat menyebrangkan mobil utk masuk ke area hotel krn jalanan di depan sangat ramai dan sulit kalau tidak dibantu bagi yg memakai kendaraan utk menyebrang.
Sampai lobby jg langsung ada yg bantuin bawain semua barang, receptionist jg ramah.
Untuk pak bagus yang 2 hari ini sudah membantu mempersiapkan ruangan kamar sangat bersih dan rapi, terimakasih banyak ya
Untuk sarapan banyak pilihan makanannya dan enak2.
Oh iya parkirannya luas sangat penting bgt ini dan aman krn parkir basement.
Area di dlm hotel
Keseluruhan sangat bersih
Terimakasih kokoon, kalau ke banyuwangi pasti akan menginap disini lagi

author: Bodhiya
title: Hotel terbaik di Banyuwangi
text:
Hotel terbaik di Banyuwangi!
Lokasi hotel strategis dekat dengan pusat Kota Banyuwangi namun dekat dengan akses jalan menuju ke pantai pantai di selatan Banyuwangi. Kamarnya besar dan bagus, selain itu sarapannya juga enak banget.
Fasilitas yang menurut saya wajib dicoba adalah sauna yang tersedia di lantai 2.
Apresiasi khusus saya berikan kepada Mbak Cynthia di Front Office yang sangat ramah dan helpful, di mana Mbak Cynthia bisa merekomendasikan tempat-tempat makan yang enak di Banyuwangi. Bahkan ketika saya lupa dengan barang titipan saya di freezer, Mbak Cynthia mengingatkan kepada saya.
Saya merekomendasikan turis yang ingin ke Banyuwangi untuk menginap di hotel ini

author: Indra
title: Great experience with Kokoon Hotel
text:
Basically we got great experiences when we stayed at Kokoon Hotel for 4D 3N.
Their atmosphere and service are very good including Cleanliness of their room. 
We can buy some Starbuck'a products too beside taste of their meals very nice. 
This Hotel really very recommended if I and/or my colleagues will be stay at Banyuwangi again. 
Thanks and regards, 
Indra and family

author: Veny
text: Untuk keseluruhan sudah bagus dari awal kami tiba sdh ada security standby utk handle jalan raya saat kami akan menyebrang,, petugas di lobi maupun reseptionis juga sigap membantu dan pemberian informasi sangat jelas... Hanya saat kami sarapan dari segi rasa makanan sudah enak,, namun makanannya tidak segera di refill jadi minus nya disitu yaa apalagi kami datang saat long weekend jdi tamu yg menginap sangat banyak tetapi ketersediaan makanan tidak mengcover ,, entah memang sudah habis atau kekurangan staff utk merefill kembali... Posisi kami sarapan di jam 08.30... Sekian dan semoga ada perbaikan utk restonya terutama saat libur panjang.... Terimakasih...

title: Hotel dengan view yg luar biasa, bangunan sangat megah, bersih, dan tertata, fasilitas baik, staff ramah
text:
Fasilitas hotel sangat baik dan lengkap, pelayanan baik, staff ramah, dapat kamar dengan mountain view

Breakfast sangat variatif, ada fasilitas gym, area yoga, pool, locker dan sauna yg bisa diakses gratis jika menginap

Jika berkunjung di high season pastikan konfirmasi request ke WA officialnya, seperti terkait jenis bed, lokasi kamar, karena walau sudah memilik tipe bed saat booking di website ternyata tetap harus disampaikan di request khususnya supaya terdata, apalagi saat high season dan hotel penuh sehingga kesempatan untuk menyesuaikan jenis bed juga terbatas

author: Hartati
text:
Kami wisatawan lokal merasakan sambutan hangat sejak check in - check out, karena ada kalanya di hotel lain karyawan lebih ramah dan hangat terhadap segmen tertentu atau kepada wisman dibanding kepada wisatawan lokal.

Fasilitas kamar lengkap memenuhi kebutuhan traveller dan appreciate manajemen hotel sangat mengerti  kenyamanan di area shower khususnya bagi orang Indonesia. Ada jet shower di toilet, rain shower juga flexible shower.  

Hotel juga menyediakan peralatan fitnes yang cukup lengkap meskipun ruang gym kurang luas.

Menikmati suasana malam hari dari deck di lt 16 sangat indah dan syahdu.
 
Satu hal yang perlu ditingkatkan adalah area restaurant di lt3.  Kurang nuansa alam seperti tanaman hijau, air terjun/mancur, kolam ikan dan juga saat kami breakfast tidak ada musik.

Overall, hotel Kokoon recommended place to stay untuk para traveller yang berkunjung ke Banyuwangi.

Terima kasih

title: BEST HOTEL IN BANYUWANGI
text:
Saya menginap di hotel ini selama 12 malam
Service yang diberikan receptionist hotel sangat ramah, hanya lewat receptionist saja saya disapa dengan baik

Selain itu hotel memberikan complimentary service untuk saya seperti buah atau breakfast spesial, ini luar biasa

Kemudian ruangan saya selalu dibersihkan dengan baik, selalu rapih dan bersih

Selain itu saat saya tertinggal barang, pihak hotel membantu mengecek dan barang tersebut diinfokan masih ada dalam kondisi baik

Selain itu, sarapan di hotel ini punya menu yang beragam, dan saya suka Stall Indomienya ! 

Terima kasih Kokoon Hotel sudah memberikan service yang terbaik

author: Indah Dewie
text: Stay in here for 2 nights, they provide king size bed as requested. The frontier was really helpful during stay. I love the minimalist interior and they provide excellent amenities. The concierge also very helpful when I have to cross the road to try local food. Tried the bbq all you can eat, the price quite affordable. But the meats they served no longer warm. The ambience during dinner buffet was good, there’s live music also shisha with affordable price too. The hotel located in the city, near to park also if you wanna go south it only took 1 hour. I would love to back here again.

title: Hotel Kokoon, Banyuwangi 6 April 2025
text: Pilihan utama kami bila sedang berkunjung ke banyuwangi, staf ramah dan informatif, siap melayani dengan optimal. author: Iqbal
text: Awalnya tidak terlalu berharap banyak dari Hotel ini karena mungkin baru dengar nama Hotel Kokoon. Tapi pada saat mulai masuk di halaman depan Hotel mulai merasakan customer experience journey yg memuaskan dimulai dari ramahnya tim Security dan roomboy. Proses Cek In mudah, cepat dan ramah. Saat itu juga ditawarkan welcome drink & snack yg enak. Kami jg dikasi voucher free Cappucino, Latte atau Americano di stall Starbucks yg ada di area Lobby hotel, sungguh baru kali ini dpt free voucher sbux pd saat menginap di hotel. Kamar juga spacious, bersih dan sangat nyaman sekali dan dapat free snack sebagai bentuk dukungan manajemen hotel untuk UMKM, salut. Menu sarapan pagi enak dan variatif dengan berbagai menu local food. Kalau misal ke Banyuwangi lagi bakal bermalam di hotel Kokoon lagi. Sukses selalu untuk tim & manajemen Hotel Kokoon.

title: Menginap pertama kali di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi
text:
Senang sekali bisa menginap dengan kokoon hotel banyuwangi🫶🏻🫶🏻
pemandangan dari kamar saya sangat indah! 
sangat ingin menginap kembali di kesempatan berikutnya.
proses check in cepat dihandle dengan receptionist yang ramah, bellboy juga menawarkan bantuannya untuk membawakan barang kami. 
Fasilitas kolam renang, saya berenang di malam hari, cukup luas! saya puas bisa berenang di indoor swimming poolnya. 
makan malam kami lezat! saya makan malam dengan nasi bakar iga. staff restou juga sangat ramah ketika menanyakan pesanan menu makan malam kami. 
proses check out juga cepat ^_^ 
Terima kasih kokoon for all the good service keep up!!🫶🏻🫶🏻❤️‍🔥

author: Nanda krisbianto
title: The best hotel Banyuwangi
text:
Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi is undoubtedly the best place to stay in Banyuwangi, offering breathtaking views of both the mountains and the sea. The hotel's strategic location allows guests to wake up to the stunning sunrise over the ocean and enjoy the serene atmosphere of the surrounding mountains.

The rooms are tastefully designed, providing a comfortable and relaxing stay. The staff are friendly and attentive, ensuring that all guests' needs are met.

What sets Kokoon Hotel apart is its exceptional view. Imagine sipping your morning coffee while gazing out at the endless blue sea, or watching the sunset behind the majestic mountains. It's a truly unforgettable experience.

Overall, Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi is a must-visit destination for anyone looking for a relaxing and scenic getaway. Its unique blend of natural beauty, comfort, and hospitality makes it the perfect choice for travelers seeking an unforgettable experience.

author: arda
title: Experience menginap yang next level
text:
hotelnya okee bangetttt dengan harga yang masih bersaing dengan hotel lain dibanyuwangi, bahkan lebih murah jika dilihat dari segi kualitas dan pelayanan. dan juga satpamnya ramah dan bisa dibilang sangat membantu, guest servicenya juga oke bangettt proses check in maupun check out sangat cepat, lalu ,kamar bersih, nyaman, wangi bikin betah pokonya. dan kemarin aku dapet dinner iftar juga enak dan sangat beragam pilihan menu mulai dari masakan indonesia sampai timur tengah, tahun ini kokoon hotel menyelenggarakan buffet iftar yang bertajuk (sajadah vol.2) yang berhadiahkan UMROHH, *bagi yang beruntung . makanan yang aku pesen ala carte pun juga enak banget nget nget. oiya dihotel ini juga ada gym, sauna, sama kolam renang. jadi kalau emang mau stay aja dihotel dan ga keluar kemana mana, ini cocok banget. hotel ini beneran rekomen deh buat kalian yang lagi mau liburan ke banyuwangi, karena akses ke kota deket bangett, kurang lebih 5 menit.
Overall nilai untuk kenyamanan, kebersihan, serta pelayanan yang diberikan 10/10

author: Robert N Smith
text: Gag santika, El royal, kokoon, astoon, ilira, luminor duhh sama ajeee!! KALIAN OVER PRICE!!! Bukannya apa nih . Harganya sudah terlalu over pricing!! Fasilitas gitu doang! Kamar ukurannya segitu, bednya juga ukuran pelit banget,!! Harga segitu dah mahal ga dapet breakfast!! Rugi dong!!!! Dah tau daerah 3T!! MANAJEMENNY th llll Saya ga bandingin tapi Jelas fakta mending nginep di hotel daerah Jember saja dah!! 200~300 an ribu, kamar ukuran 30 m2  sudah ada bathub, kolam renang, breakfast, amenitis lengkap, dan di tengah pusat kota pula!!... Duhhh ga tau lah akomodasi hospitality di Banyuwangi kayak ampas!!! Kalian manajemen hotel sudah tau wisata di seni sepi!! Kalo mau rame, hospitality ya turunin harga!! Turunin... Harga seginii astaga... Gak bakalan sih balik ke sini

title: Almost perfect
text:
Everything in this hotel is good & almost perfect. Comfortable bed, Gym, sauna, swimming pool, rooftop bar & spa.
But for me who bring 2 toddlers, this hotel just almost perfect.
To make it perfect, we need bigger kids club there. Yes, the kids club is quite tiny. Even my kids don't want to go inside because the room is quite small.  
But overall is good. Staffs also friendly.

title: Best Indoor Pool at Banyuwangi
text: I have been here 2 times with almost 4 years apart, and this hotel remains amazing. I love the room design, both bathroom and bedrooms are spotless. They provide complimentary local snack which was tasty! Moreover, best part of it was the indoor pool!  The pool and gym is accessible since 6 am to 9 pm! Maybe the only degradation is on the breakfast menu, seems less variance compared to 4 years ago, other than that is amazing! They gave free welcome drinks as well on their rooftop bar

author: wahyuningsih
title: Staff kurang, hotel bagus, jauh dari pelabuhan ketapang, kota banyuwangi agak jauh
text: 15 km dari pelabuhan ketapang, agak jauh dari kota banyuwangi. Hotel baik, kebersihan baik. Staff kurang membantu. Tiba disana jam 12 malam hotel gelap, sepu di depan, tidak ada petugas yang membantu angkat turun barang. Sampai lobby receptionist laki hotel ramah dan baik. Breakfast kurang variasi. Jam 11.30 minta perpanjangan 30 menit, check out 12.30 (harusnya jam 12), receptionist cewek bilang tidak bisa. Saya jelaskan (by phone) kita datang jam 12 malam, tetap tidak boleh! Harus segera keluar jam 12.00. Turun ke lobby utk check out jam 12.00, receptionist cewek (trainee, penerima telpon yang sama tadi) bilang boleh late check out, barang dan kita sdh buru2 keluar kamar, sampai lobby receptionist check out dibilang boleh late chrck out, ya percuma udah keluar. Gofood juga harus ambil diluar, jalan ke depan, bertanya beberapa kali tidak ada inisiatif staff nya untuk bantu ambil. Sampai 3x nanya baru ada receptionist lain berbisik, lalu bertanya apk mau dibantu ambil. Keluar hotel juga tidak ada yang membantu, angkat barang ke mobil di depan hotel juga tidak ada staff yg membantu. Pelayanan kurang!

author: EA
title: DEC and JAN 25
text: We have stayed at this hotel several times and book 2 rooms (king and twins). But  usually we stay at this hotel when we go to Bali or on the way back home. But that holiday we stayed at this hotel 2 times, when we went to Bali and on the way back home (december and january). When we stayed at this hotel in 31 December 2024, they have event for new year, one room get one voucher for one person to attend the buffet and the event. If one room have two person, the one person can pay to attend the event, buffet, or both. Because i didn't attend the buffet dinner, i can't comment about that. But we order room service, we order nasi tempong and rawon fried rice, it was delicious (forgot to take a pict). I attend the event in the ballroom, the event was fun with great singers and exciting performance. For the room always clean, the breakfast has many choices.

author: Debby Widayanti
title: Service beyond expectation
text:
Sebelum menginap, saya sempat browsing ttg review tamu. Beberapa meninggalkan kesan positif pada layanan hotel. Penasaran seperti apa sih excellent service yang banyak di review orang"? Ternyata, servicenya bener" beyond our expectation.. dari mulai security, bellboy, FO, selalu menyapa&menawarkan bantuan.
Lobbynya ga begitu besar, tapi bersih, wangi sereh. Proses check in/checkoutnya cepat. Kamar bersih, ac dingin, shower air panas stabil. Pak Shobirin terimakasih yaaa sdh buat kamar kami nyaman...
Restonya byk variasi menu dan semuanya enak", ga nunggu kosong jg langsung di refill. Gercep padahal saat itu ada rombongan ...
Ada indomie stall jg, dimsum, coffee machine, milo, kunyit asam, lengkap..
Yg bikin keren sih mba" egg station, sendirian tp bisa lho nginget siapa aja yg pesen ... Kl kondisi sepi sih biasa ya . Tp qt kmrn kondisi resto full. Tp tetep servicenya luar biasa...
Mba Shellen&Pak Martin terimakasih banyak kmrn surprise nya untuk suami saya... Saya aja kaget 😂 terimakasih untuk service yang luar biasa dari Kokoon... Kami pasti balik lagi ..

author: Shenin
title: Not worth the money to be honest
text:
The rooms were spacious and clean. The view from the room was nice.
Despite informing the staff we would be checking out 16 hours early, we were charged an early check in fee, initially of 475,000 rupiah, then reduced to 375,000 only for them to attempt to charge 475,000 again. 
The cleaning staff rung the bell twice at 9am to try and clean the room. Granted we forgot to put the do not disturb sign on, but never have I been somewhere where they loudly rang the bell so early.
21% service charge on top of everything seemed excessive.
The food was not very good. Especially the Western dishes, the local dishes were better. Granted this may be personal taste. Local restaurants were quite limited given the hotel is out of Banyuwangi centre.
There was often a  communication issue which meant food such as fruit platter that was ordered, were not delivered. This is on top of menu options advertised not being available.
I can see they’re trying to target the high end market, but a lot felt lacking. I personally wouldn’t recommend the hotel. Far too expensive compared to other options.

author: Fitria Astika
text: Pengalaman menginap di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi benar-benar luar biasa! Hotel ini menawarkan suasana yang nyaman dan pelayanan yang ramah dari stafnya. Kamar yang bersih dan fasilitas modern membuat saya betah selama menginap. Sarapan yang disediakan sangat variatif dan lezat, ditambah dengan pemandangan yang indah dari area hotel. Lokasinya juga strategis, dekat dengan berbagai tempat wisata di Banyuwangi. Sangat direkomendasikan untuk siapa saja yang ingin menginap dengan kenyamanan maksimal!"

text: Kamar bersih, nyaman, petugas cepat mencari kamar, namun krn hujan petugas di depan ga ada yang berjaga padahal sedang ada event

author: Andreas Mauer
text: The saying, „Never change the running system" is true if you've had good experiences with a hotel. I should have known. Why did I choose the Kokoon Hotel this year?! Disaster. I had previously spent a week in Bangkok and of course only had positive things to say about it. I was very disappointed when I saw the breakfast buffet. Uninspiring. The cake was too dry. The bowls with the hot food were mostly empty and the staff were only trainees. The boss wants to cut costs on service. I also realized this when a trainee asked me whether I wanted my espresso served hot or cold. As always, the used plates sat on the table for ages. Nobody was interested. In Thailand the dishes weren't even cleared away after a minute. But this is not the highlight. I took my clothes to be washed. I would like to point out that I took them to the hotel laundry and not outside. I turned the clothes inside out because I always wash black clothes like this and the employee can READ the care instructions. The emphasis is on “READ”. If anyone is interested, of course. What happened? Two high-quality pairs of trousers and a high-quality polo came back from the laundry two sizes smaller. Of course, no one is aware of any wrongdoing. That’s obvious, it was my fault. Why do I take my laundry to a hotel laundry where the staff are incompetent?! Discussions about compensation were unsuccessful. It was my fault. Sorry, I don’t need that on vacation. And, there  were a total of five employees in the room, to whom I had to explain that clothes worth a total of €300 had now been "washed small". 🤦‍♂️ Then there was the problem with communication. Some employees do not understand English, or cannot speak English either. Added to this is the arrogance of not being aware of any guilt. After the fourth visit to me, they finally took the clothes away again. It was exhausting for me to check out because of stupid narrow-mindedness. But typical of Indonesia. Calling hotel prices like in Europe, and paying the staff a pittance, who then have no desire to provide a service that is worthy of a 4-star rating. Never ever this hotel.

author: Abdul Rokip
text: BAD HOTEL EVER!! I am a person who never does a bad review of a hotel. but this time it has gone too far. 1. When we arrived, the reception staff couldn't use English, making my colleague (foreign people) confused about making payments and the information was very unclear. 2. The laundry at this hotel destroyed all our new clothes. even though I have told the staff that the clothes and trousers are written on how to wash them. but they wash as they want so that all the threads of our clothes and trousers are damaged, all the sizes of our shirts and trousers are also shrinking and they are no longer comfortable. this may look strange but this happened in this hotel. when we ask for responsibility they just say double check. 3. The breakfast menu is very poor. all the workers at this hotel are mostly trainees, which means they are not  fluent in guest service yet. Dirty plates and glasses were also not removed so they piled up on the table. and again they can't use English. 4. When we request something it also takes a long time to handle it, it is not recommended for those of you who want to go on holiday looking for comfort 5. Now I just know why this hotel is very quiet and there are no guests staying. this is because service 0, Product 0 . 6. And you should know that from 6 days we checked out on the 3rd day because it was very uncomfortable here. This is the bad hotel ever. Please stay away otherwise you Will be dissapointed like us !

author: Abdul R
title: BAD HOTEL EVER!
text:
BAD HOTEL EVER!!
I am a person who never does a bad review of a hotel. but this time it has gone too far. 1. When we arrived, the reception staff couldn't use English, making my colleague (foreign people) confused about making payments and the information was very unclear. 2. The laundry at this hotel destroyed all our new clothes. even though I have told the staff that the clothes and trousers are written on how to wash them. but they wash as they want so that all the threads of our clothes and trousers are damaged, all the sizes of our shirts and trousers are also shrinking and they are no longer comfortable. this may look strange but this happened in this hotel. when we ask for responsibility they just say double check. 3. The breakfast menu is very poor. all the workers at this hotel are mostly trainees, which means they are not  fluent in guest service yet. Dirty plates and glasses were also not removed so they piled up on the table. and again they can't use English. 4. When we request something it also takes a long time to handle it, it is not recommended for those of you who want to go on holiday looking for comfort 5. Now I just know why this hotel is very quiet and there are no guests staying. this is because service 0, Product 0 . 6. And you should know that from 6 days we checked out on the 3rd day because it was very uncomfortable here. This is the bad hotel ever. Please stay away otherwise you Will be dissapointed like us !

author: 양명석
text: 최악의 호텔입니다. 위치도 항구와 너무 멀고, 방 두개를 가운데 문으로 나눠놓고 옆에 손님을 함께 받아 생활하는데 당연히 소음이 없을 수 없죠. 너무 시끄럽습니다.. 3성급 호텔에서도 이런 적은 없었는데 처음이네요.  인근에 끄따빵 인다, 일리라 모두 이용해봤는데 코쿤이 제일 비싼데 제일 최악입니다.  Ketapang Indah, Illira 이용하세요. 가격도 더 저렴한데 퀄리티가 훨씬 좋습니다. 여긴 절대 비추입니다. Jangan menginap disini… tidak cocok dengan harga. Lebih baik ke Ketapang Indah atau Ilira Hotel.  Suara kencang dengan kamar sebelah😵‍💫  banyak noise….

author: 리리양
text: 바뉴왕이에서 다섯 번 째 여행하는 한국인입니다. 전체적인 시설은 고급스러워 보이나, 객실에 옆 방과 통하는 문이 있고 그 문을 통해 옆 방 샤워소리와 말소리, 손닦는소리, 웃음소리, 심지어 변기 물내리는 소리까지 들려요. 방음이 전혀 안되어있어요. 별 4성으로는 보기 힘들만큼 어이가 없어요. 2-3만원 하는 호텔보다도 소음문제가 심각하네요. 로비에 너무 시끄럽다고 했더니 옆방 분들한테 전화해서 조용히 해달라고 한 것 같아요. 옆방 사람들이 무슨 잘못이죠? 그들도 엄연히 돈을 내고 편안히 숙소를 이용하러 오신건데. 이 건축물 자체가 잘못 지어졌습니다. 차라리 가성비 훨씬 좋은 ILLIRA 혹은 ketapang indah로 가세요^^ Di sini kelihatan hotenya bagus dan bersi. Tapi kamar ini ada pintu untuk kamar samping. Tapi bisa dengar suara bicara, suara mandi, suara tawar semua termasuk di kamar kami jadi kami gak bisa tidur. Lebih baik ke hotel lain. Di banyuwangi ada hotel yang lebih murah dan lebih baik. Kami sangat kecewa hotel ini. Gak bisa percaya ini benar benar 4 bintang. Gak bisa tidur karna suara hair drier. Saya tdk pernah pikir ini masalah orang yang penginap samping kamar kami. Ini masalah gedung ini. Hotel ini tdk ada pikiran untuk tamu.

author: M***a
text:
Pas hari H check-in, dan saya sudah hampir deket hotel, saya chat dulu ke admin yang di WA, sudah boleh Check-in atau blm.. itu mgkin sekitar 10.30. di jawabnya cepett. boleh katanya kamar udah ready. hepi bangettz. 
Overall stay nya OK. Breakfast juga cukup enak. Tersedia fresh juice dan rotasi makanannya selama 2 hari saya di sana, cukup variatif. Oya, homemade dragonfruit jam nya jangan kelewatan cobain! Cheese cake mini nya juga enak. Ayam madu enak, ayam gobyos enak , masakan2 ayam harian yg di deket noodle station itu enak2.. ada weci juga enak. Oya untuk yg vegan, ada menu khusus juga

Untuk fasilitasnya disini ada tempat Gym, sauna, kolam renang, sepak bola meja, dan arcade game ada di depan resto, serta ada tempat main buat anak2 juga gitu di dalam 1 ruangan kecil. Beberapa fasilitasnya sudah saya coba. Kolamnya aja yang kurang memuaskan, visibility di dalam kolam kurang. Tp mungkin karena poolnya indoor? Atau ga rutin dibersihin? Hehe kurang tau. Ngarep lbh nyaman aja kolamnya.
Di sebelah kolam ada tempat bilas atau mandi yang hanya bisa di akses dengan kartu, gymnya juga hanya bs di akses dengan kartu, jadi privacy tamu hotel cukup terjamin. Oya, kamarnya juga kok.

Di lantai paling atas hotel ada deck buat liat sunset dan sunrise gitu.  

Nah untuk kamarnya sendiri , nyaman , cuma tata letak tv yg junior suite aja yg gk nyaman.. hehe ga bs liat tv sambil tdr.. ya ada plus minusnya sih. Cuma kalo lg staycay kayaknya lbh pgn males2an di ranjang sambil nonton. Amenities nya cukup lengkap. Dikasi welcome snack + drink juga. untuk yg di kamar mandinya juga cukup lengkap amenitiesnya. Seandainya ada bath bomb, tp udah ada bubble bath sih. Wangiii juga. Saya cukup suka wangi nya. Ada bath salt nya juga. Dilengkapi lotion dll. Hehe bikin pengalaman mandi memuaskan.
View luar kamarnya : sawah + pegunungan. Bikin mata jadi lbh sehat tuh.

Overall stay rate ; 4.69/5

Review yang saya tulis , hanya sekedar opini pribadi, tidak ada maksud negatif apapu

author: eko e
title: enjoy n relax
text:
Need to relieve fatigue?
Kokoon Hotel is one of the answers.
Best hotel near Banyuwangi Airport (less than 10km). Although there is no direct view of the sea, you can still enjoy the atmosphere of Banyuwangi city.
All staff are very friendly, the rooms are very clean, and free traditional snacks (support UMKM ). Best hotel with best price

author: Laurent
title: Exceptional
text:
Nous avons eu un accident avec notre fils qui a dû être hospitalisé et opéré.
C'est dans ce type de situation que nous apprécions particulièrement l'attention et le dévouement du personnel de l'hôtel.
Ils nous ont directement pris en charge pour mettre Martin à  l'abri dans le lobby, trouver le meilleur hôpital, attendre aux urgences et nous réserver une chambre pour une nuit supplémentaire à prix d'ami.
Dès le retour de l'hôpital, l'ensemble du personnel venait aux nouvelles.
Nous avons même eu l'opportunité de laisser nos deux autres enfants à l'hôtel afin d'être au côté de Martin à l'hôpital pendant une journée.
Le confort et l'ensemble des facilités (restaurant, piscine, spa, massage, petit déjeuner, calme, espace ....)étaient tout simplement extraordinaires.
Encore mille mercis pour votre accueil et votre dévouement envers  Martin !
Famille Coppens.
Rien !

author: Febriyanny C

author: Fenti

text: Very recommended

author: Victoria
title: Lovely Stay!
text:
We have a lovely 2 night on this hotel..
Cynthia on the concierge is super helpful and friendly (and pretty too!)
Cynthia and all the staff gave us some wonderful recommendation to the great restaurant on the Banyuwangi..
Our bedroom with family type (double queen-room number 1005) is comfortable too, the bathroom door design is different and unique..
Turns out kokoon hotel was designed by one of the best indonesian architect (studio air putih), totally glad with my choice of hotel!
The breakfast was good with many choices of food and glad they have Jamu kunyit asam everyday 😄
They have a machine arcade street fighter & mini soccer table (i dont know what it’s name) near the restaurant, it’s fun and nostalgic !!
Overall we had a superb experience, surely gonna recommend it to my friends if they have a chance to visit Banyuwangi!

The hotel location is lil bit out of the center of the town, maybe you need to rent some car

author: Dian
title: good experience
text: I stayed for one night at Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi as a transit stop before crossing to Bali. The hotel is a bit far from Ketapang Port, taking about 25 minutes to reach. The facilities provided by the hotel are quite comprehensive. The breakfast menu is also varied and complete, though the taste of the food is subjective; in my opinion, it was just average. The staff were quite friendly. The most impressive aspects were the super spacious bed and the unique design of the bathroom door. However, in my room, the glass bathroom door couldn’t close tightly, causing water to splash out when using the shower. The room facilities were quite complete, and there were complimentary snacks available in the room. The swimming pool was quite large, but unfortunately, there was no attendant present at the time. Overall, my experience at this hotel was good. Thank you.

author: victoria cuaca
text: We have a lovely 2 night on this hotel.. Cynthia on the concierge is super helpful and friendly.. Cynthia and all the staff gave us some wonderful recommendation to the great restaurant on the Banyuwangi.. Our bedroom with family type (double queen-room number 1005) is comfortable too, the bathroom door design is different and unique.. Turns out kokoon hotel was designed by one of the best indonesian architect (studio air putih), totally glad with my choice of hotel! The breakfast was good with many choices of food and glad they have Jamu kunyit asam everyday 😄 They have a machine arcade street fighter & mini soccer table (i dont know what it’s name) near the restaurant, it’s fun and nostalgic !! Overall we had a superb experience, surely gonna recommend it to my friends if they have a chance to visit Banyuwangi!

text:
Excellent like the first 
The plus : the welcoming drink and the complimentary coffee 
The minus : the breakfast buffet was slightly better in july coz sausage and bacon as much as we would like . Now it s only 2 piece on demand in the eggs station and also miss some more western food like the gratin dauphinois . Please check also the bake beans coz it was not cooked enough 
Expect that the room the service and the whole experience was great as usual

author: Aleksei Bakulin (Surf Adventure)
text: Hotel yang sangat buruk. Saya tinggal di lantai 12 dan setengah malam saya mendengar banyak suara dari bar di lantai 15. Anda benar-benar dapat mendengar suara tetangga dari ruangan lain, Anda dapat mendengar mereka berbicara dan pergi ke toilet. Mereka menawarkan untuk memasukkan makan malam ke dalam harga, tetapi pada akhirnya makanan disajikan dingin dan tidak segar, minuman (bahkan teh murah) tidak dihargai dengan baik dan dibayar terpisah. Saya mengalami luka kecil di kaki saya dan sprei saya sedikit ternoda darah, bercak itu diameternya 2 cm. Ini terhapus begitu saja. Mereka menagih 1 juta untuk ini. Kamarnya sendiri sama sekali tidak nyaman, dan seperti yang sudah saya tulis, audibilitasnya sangat jelas, Anda dapat mendengar semuanya, bahkan di lantai lain.

Our bedroom with family type (double queen-room number 1005) is comfortable too, the bathroom door design is different and unique..
Turns out kokoon hotel was designed by one of the best indonesian architect (studio air putih), totally glad with my choice of hotel!

The breakfast was good with many choices of food and glad they have Jamu kunyit asam everyday 😄

They have a machine arcade street fighter & mini soccer table (i dont know what it’s name) near the restaurant, it’s fun and nostalgic !!

Overall we had a superb experience, surely gonna recommend it to my friends if they have a chance to visit Banyuwangi!

author: Fainada
text: Mulai dari masuk hotel hingga ke kamar, sangat nyaman baik secara design, aroma, suasana, dan pelayanan. Saya stay disini selama 1 minggu. Setiap hari kamar dibersihkan secara lengkap seperti awal checkin (bersih dan aminitesnya lengkap). Sarapan nikmat setiap hari tidak bosan mulai dari indonesian food hingga western. Lokasi sangat strategis diantara gunung dan laut. Sehingga pemandangannya baik dari kamar maupun balkon hotel sangat indah karena dapat melihat gunung hingga laut. Fasilitas lengkap mulai dari kolam renang, fitness center yang memiliki ruang ganti yang baik, kemudian ada minimarket juga jika ada keperluan mendesak. Selain itu sepertinya juga ada ruang anak. Menurut saya baik untuk liburan keluarga, maupun perjalanan bisnis hotel ini tetap nyaman dan proper.

author: Наталья Г
title: Неожиданно приятно
text:
Останавливаться на ночлег на Яве не входило в планы, жильё пришлось искать спонтанно, на одну ночь. Тем и приятнее, что выбор был таким удачным. Заселение прошло очень быстро. Хорошее состояние номеров (брали два разных номера), очень удобные кровати. Сантехника и кондиционер работали без замечаний, все исправно.
Брали с завтраком и не пожалели, такого разнообразия и вкусно приготовленной еды на шведском столе давно не видели. Можно кушать на террасе с красивым видом.

Zimmer und Bad sehr sauber und gepflegt. 
Für indonesische Verhältnis absolut top.
Lage direkt an der Hauptstraße und nur mit Auto sinnvoll, aber das gilt für alle Locations in Banyuwangi.

Nous y avons séjourné durant 3 nuits et cet hôtel est vraiment parfait. Le personnel est d’une exceptionnelle gentillesse, ils sont aux petits soins et répondent toujours à vos questions. Les chambres sont supers propres, très belles et très bien équipées. La nourriture des deux restaurants est excellente, bon rapport qualité/prix. La piscine est super aussi. 
Très bien situé également ! 
Je recommande vivement +++

title: 인도네시아 여행은 여기로..
text:
바뉴왕이라는 곳이 좀 외진 곳이라
여행 목적으로 찾는 분들 보다는 출장 때문에 방문을 하실 겁니다.
여행 목적으로 와도 전혀 손색이 없을 정도로 
인천 쉐라톤 등과 비교해도 어디 하나 꿀리지 않는 더군다나 
이 가격으로 이 정도 퀄리티를 즐길 수 있는 게 정말 놀라울 따름입니다.
근처 식당도 가격도 싸고 음식 퀄도 전문 음식점 답게 호텔 음식 보다 나으며
(호텔 자체도 음식 퀄 미쳤습니다.)
여행 목적으로 오신 분들은
발리로 바로 가지 않고 경유를 하시거나 할 때 들러 보시기를 추천합니다.

author: Travelonistic
text: Lokasi dari kota jauh, dekat dengan bayuwangi park, kamar cukup luas dan type tertentu ada balkon dengan pilihan pemandangan laut dan gunung, hanya saja karena hotel ini lokasinya persis di pinggir jalan raya suara kendaraan dari jalan raya masih terdengar ke dalam hotel. Untuk breakfast standar hotel bintang 4, varian cake cukup banyak, ada noodle stationnya juga, jus strawberrynya saya suka.

author: Mutono01
title: Hotel recommended jika berkunjung di banyuwangi
text: Pertama kali menginap di hotel kokoon,hotel paling tinggi di banyuwangi dekat dengan pusat kota,waktu check in di sambut oleh staff yang ramah,dan juga proses check in yang mudah dan cepat.pada saat di lobby bangunan sangat bersih dan wangi,kita juga di berikan welcome drink,pada saat di kamar area kamar sangat bersih dan rapi dan juga bisa melihat pemandangan selat Bali yang indah dan juga bisa melihat pegunungan yang sangat indah untuk di pandang.hotel kokoon ini juga memiliki fasilitas yang banyak seperti,gym,yoga,pool,spa and sauna,selain itu hotel kokoon ini juga memiliki Bar di ROOFTOOP yang bisa melihat 360°,selain itu juga memiliki restaurant,pada saat breakfast semua makanan sangat banyak dan juga bervariasi mulai dari makanan western dan tradisional juga banyak,serta staff yng melayani sangat ramah-ramah dan sangat membantu pada saat breakfast.hotel ini memiliki pelayanan serasa di hotel bintang 5.

author: Y***n
text: Selalu happy menginap di kokoon, apalagi dibantuin early check in, pokoknya top mantap is the best.

author: Eleni
title: Excellent hotel with kind and personal staff
text: The Kokoon Hotel provides top-notch facilities, featuring spacious, comfortable rooms with high-quality beds and amenities. The staff is exceptionally kind, attentive, and personable, ensuring a pleasant and enjoyable stay. The food is excellent, with a diverse menu and an extensive breakfast selection. Additionally, there are multiple dining options, and the hotel is conveniently located just 15-20 minutes from Banyuwangi city center and from Banyuwangi airport.

author: AS
text: Nice, clean, good service

author: Ivan
title: Very good
text: Staff hospitality need more improvement (bartender, security,  front desk, restaurant staff).  Almost all staff needs to be train about hospitality

author: Aaron P
title: Kokoon hotel is the best!
text: The atmosphere is amazing and the rooms are very nice! The food is absolutely amazing, especially for breakfast and the staff was SUPER helpful! They go out of their way to assist you with your luggage and Aini was super helpful during checkout!

author: Raka A Wibisono
title: Really good
text: A good vibes hotel around the town

author: Yoga

author: Sylvain

Chambre très mal insonorisé que ce soit entre les chambres mais aussi sur rue

author: Sisca

author: Dewa Tejasemara

author: Chloé Bardet
text: De passage dans la région pour visiter le Ijen malheureusement fermé, nous avons donc pu profiter pleinement de tous les services de ce magnifique hôtel. Tout était parfait, l'hôtel est très luxueux, les chambres sont belles, très bien décorées et offrent une vue imprenable sur la nature environnante. La piscine et le spa sont très agréables, avec une offre variée de massages. Le buffet du petit-déjeuner est exceptionnel, délicieux avec une diversité de mets incroyables. Le personnel est adorable, souriant et aux petits soins. Je recommande à 100% !

author: Malik Affrizal
title: Hotel Ternyaman
text:
Hotel terbaik sih ini di banyuwangi , udah masuk kategori 5 star harusnya 

Dari segi pelayanan yang oke , sangat helpfull untuk staffnya  dari awal datang, proses check in yang cepat dan staff sangat informatif 

Kebetulan juga ada event BBQ di lantai 16 dengan harga 158 sudah sangat worth menurut saya, krena varian makanan banyak dan sudah ada live musiknya juga 

Untuk menu breakfast yang sangat variasi , dan paling berkesan ada menu INDOMIE baru kali ini sih ada hotel menyajikan menu mi instan makanan stallnya juga banyak pilihan, 

Pertahankan kualitas dan pelayanannya , Good Job Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi

author: Shahrani
title: New Hotel and one of the better ones in Banyuwangi
text: Love the hotel as it is relatively new. Great main entrance, lobby, room & breakfast. Price is at Jakarta standard for such hotel. Friendly and helpful staff with good proficiency in English. Location is slightly away from the city center but alongside the main road. Easy access to everywhere. Good breakfast spread with local and continental selections. Taste wise for local is ok but for continental need improvement in presentation, temperature and taste. Egg station must not prepare too many at a time and let is get cold.

author: Krisna A
title: BEST HOTEL
text: Ini adalah pertama kalinya saya menginap di hotel kokoon Banyuwangi. Saat masuk ke lobby sudah dapat sambutan hangat dari resepsionisnya. Kemudian proses check in cepat. Sampai di kamar ruangannya sangat nyaman, viewnya juga bagus. Next naik ke atas yang katanya bisa lihat banyuwangi 360° ternyata bener bisa dan itu juga pas banget untuk ngechill sambil nonton sunset yang bagus banget.  Makan malam di area resto waiternya ramah² makanannya enak. Paginya saya mencoba untuk sarapan pagi di area resto. Kalo pagi bener sih enak banget dari suasana - makanan pun enak dan pelayanan ramah. Gakalah juga buat fasilitas hotel mulai dari gym sauna bahkan pool yang ada di indoor ga takut kalau berenang pas hujan. Ini jadi pengalaman terbaik saat saya menginap di kokoon hotel Banyuwangi🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟.

The room is so clean, room service was done really well, location is great and the breakfast buffet was pretty good too! Would definitely recommend!

text: Kamar bersih banget. Suasana santai.

author: Aimi
title: Exceed my expectation
text: The hotel feels new & the view from the room is breathtaking whether facing the sea or the mountain. It's strategically located and easily accessible from the main road.

author: AA
title: Pengalaman Menginap yang Mengesankan
text: Lokasi, kebersihan, serta koordinasi antar staff yang clear. Check-in dini hari tetap bisa, cepat, dan responsif (namun bellboy sudah tidak standby di area lobby, ya mungkin karena sudah terlalu larut, it's okay karena barang tidak terlalu banyak). Setelah check-in dibantu dan diantar staff untuk ke kamar. Resto standby 24 jam (walaupun tidak semua menu ready, tetapi ini sangat membantu). Fasilitas kamar dan hotel serta amenities yang lengkap. Seluruh catatan dan request dinotice dengan baik dan terealisasi. Termasuk dapat view kamar yang pas (1 malam di ocean view dan 1 malam mountain view). Mungkin kedepannya bisa ditingkatkan terkait cahaya lampu di beberapa lorong yang kurang terang (ini hanya pendapat pribadi, namun dari segi lighting desain sebenarnya sudah baik), TV yang belum smart TV (semoga kedepannya bisa ditambhkan platform seperti netflix/youtube dsbnya agar tamu yang staycation memiliki opsi aktivitas di dalam kamar) dan alangkah lebih baik jika di dalam kamar disediakan aromateraphy spt diffuser dsbnya agar keharuman ruangan terjaga lebih lama. Jika ada kesempatan lain waktu ke Banyuwangi, tentu saya ingin kembali menginap di sini karena pelayanan yang memuaskan, fasilitas lengkap, kebersihan, lokasi yang cukup strategis, serta harga worth it (baik kamar maupun additional cost).

author: Revina Hikmaty Fadilla
text: Hotelnya bagus, suasananya kaya di Bali, viewnya okey, dekat dr bandara dan stasiun, kamar oke, bersih nyaman, pelayanan semuanya ramah, makanan lumayan bervariasi

title: Perfect stay
text: A very nice and clean hotel, with a very nice roof terasse, very friendly personal and good food and good breakfast. The rooms are very nice furnished and very clean, the internet is fast. The parking garage is also very spacy. It can be fully recommended.

Kamarnya bagus  fasitasnya memuaskan

Kolam renang bersih dan bagus nyaman

The best hotel in banyuwangi

author: Umi120300
title: Mrs
text: Hotel yang mewah, disambut dengan area lobby yang harum aroma lemon grass, proses check-in cepat dan staff nya juga ramah, welcome drinknya seger banget dengan pemandangan rooftop saat malam hari it’s wonderful, dikamar juga ada small free snack traditional, bagus sekali untuk mempromosikan makanan khas daerah, sarapanmenunya banyak staffnya juga sangat membantu, untuk swimming pool indoor jadi gaperlu takut kepanasan, enjoy banget si stay dihotel ini, semoga jaya terus kokoon 😇

author: Claire
title: Hôtel de très haut niveau de confort à prix raisonnable
text:
D’une allure extérieure plutôt austère, l’hôtel Kokoon est un magnifique hôtel, l'accueil agréable, sympathique et souriant, les chambres sont très grandes, modernes, les salles de bains avec parois amovibles en bois sont très bien aménagées!! La propreté dans tout l'hôtel est impeccable, une piscine semi ouverte (un peu fraîche !!!) un centre SPA avec des super massages d'une heure pour l'équivalent de 14 euros !! Le Grill snack au dernier étage propose des plats internationaux à toute heure, le bar du 16eme avec vue spectaculaire sur la ville et la baie. lis servent de l'alcool, tous les cocktails possibles.
Enfin le restaurant propose de la cuisine asiatique à un prix très raisonnable et le petit déjeuner du matin est très international, on trouve des pan cake, des croissants, pains au chocolat, pain perdu, des œufs...
Bref très bel hôtel avec un haut niveau de confort pour un prix très raisonnable.
Piscine en semi extérieur donc pas de soleil autour de la piscine et l'eau est un peu fraîche

author: Sugianto Effendy
text: Kali kedua nginap di sini.. tidak mengulang kesalahan dengan mengupgrade kamar yang ada balkon.. kebisingan suara dari jalan raya jauh berkurang.. overall ini hotel bagus dan rekomended..

author: Gerard
title: Hôtel moderne avec les prestations attendues
text:
Très bon buffet de petit-déjeuner. Piscine agréable mais un peu fraîche car en intérieur. 
Dîners de cuisine locale bons et copieux.
De jolies ballades à faire dans la campagne environnante.
Location de mini van chère

author: Joel
title: Good
text:
L’accueil du personnel et sa gentillesse et le petit déjeuner.
L’emplacement

author: Sandrine Bugnon
title: It's a very nice hotel wih comfortable rooms, good restaurants and nice pool
text:
We enjoyed our stay and stayed 3 nights at the hotel. The both restaurants propose a large choice of foods and drinks. The food is very tasty and the cocktails too. The breakfast buffet is wonderful. There is a nice swimmimg pool with longchairs and the towels are provived. The room is big with a lot of place and the bed is very confortable.

If you are sensitive to noise, bring earplugs as the soundproofing is not very good (you almost have to slam the door to close it) and the sound from the loudspeakers during prayers is very loud, even at night and in the early hours of the morning.
The personal is very friendly but there is a lack of knowledge of the services offered by the hotel (opening hours, food). It's not a 4 stars service.

author: Claire D
title: Hôtel de très haut niveau de confort à prix raisonnable
text:
D’une allure extérieure plutôt austère, hôtel Kokoon est un magnifique hôtel, l’accueil agréable, sympathique et souriant, les chambres sont très grandes, modernes, les salles de bains avec parois amovibles en bois sont très bien aménagées !! La propreté dans tout l’hôtel est impeccable, une piscine semi ouverte (un peu fraîche !!!) un centre SPA avec des super massages d’une heure pour l’équivalent de 14 euros !! Le Grill snack au dernier étage propose des plats internationaux à toute heure, le bar du 16eme avec vue spectaculaire sur la ville et la baie. Ils servent de l’alcool, tous les cocktails possibles.
Enfin le restaurant propose de la cuisine asiatique à un prix très raisonnable et le petit déjeuner du matin est très international, on trouve des pan cake, des croissants, pains au chocolat, pain perdu, des œufs…

text: Alles Perfekt. Super Unterkunft. Jederzeit wieder!

author: Sander J
title: Upperclass hotel to relax from a travelling journey
text:
Perfect upperclass  hotel with sauna, swimming pool rooftop bar, really relaxing. The hotel is brand new, with new rooms, great showers, 
The hotel could be anywhere in the world, but it is in banyuwangi.
Great service, you feel professionally welcome as a guest.

author: Candida S
title: Cool location for a cocktail and bite to eat.
text:
Great location, fabulous views but rather empty when we were there, so lacking in atmosphere/vibe.

Service friendly and attentive, tho’ quite slow. Our dishes were all brought out at different times, with at least 5 minutes between first and last person being served. Food tasty and well-presented - a mainly Western menu, Pleasant place to hang out.

author: Hesty
title: full facility
text: nice hotel but far from the city, but full facility and nice staff also

author: Yudi
title: Good & Great
text: Overall Kokoon Hotel is excellent for holiday

author: Celina
title: Exceptional
text: Alles top. Super tolles, sauberes Hotel.

author: Ahmad Fatihin
text: Nice~

author: Dhony
title: Modern, clean and Fascinating place.
text: Love the surrounding view, the pool also the detail of the building. Giving a modern feels also a quality service from the staff.

author: Frista
title: Lovely stay in Banyuwangi
text:
The Kokoon hotel is a great choice to be when you are in Banyuwangi. 

The room are big, clean, ans comfortable. The bathroom is great with hot showers. Enough lighting and high speed internet.  Full set amenities. Love every piece of the room.

Receptionist team is also excellent. Fast check in process, very friendly and helpful.

View from the roof top is amazing! 
Even the view from your room is already special! 

The only minus thing is the location. Not really in the center. It takes 40-50mins to the port and around 1.5hour to Baluran.

They have Starbucks in their lobby👍🙌

Perhaps there is a small shop / convinent store and atm there, would be perfect! 

Breakfast : plenty of options. Good taste! Amazing!

author: Eric M
title: Nice
text:
Très bel hôtel, service au top, surtout Awan, qui nous a aider à organiser la suite de notre voyage.
Je recommande cet hôtel 
La piscine est très belle même si un peu froide 
Très bon restaurant également et le petit déjeuner très riche avec spécialités locales et internationales 
Vraiment très bon

author: OA
text: Well-maintained cleanliness.

Kamar bersih,design modern,fasilitas sangat lengkap mulai Resto,Bar,Kolam renang,Gym,Spa bahkan ada Sauna juga.Untuk pelayanan Staff juga friendly dan helpful.Pilihan makanan di resto juga cukup beragam,can’t wait to stay again at Kokoon Hotel

title: Top
text: Du luxe à porter de bourse

author: Frista Frista
text: Great hotel, very comfortable bed, clean and nice environment. Price is also good. Breakfast was excellent. Too bad we only stayed 1 night. Definitely will go back again. Akses parkir mudah. Tepi kolam bikin ingin bersantai. Fasilitas premium. Pelayan yang responsif dan sangat membantu.

author: Naya
title: Staycation
text:

Nice lobby and great rooftop cafe. Receptionist team was very friendly and helpful. Very recommended hotel. Too bad we only stay here for 1 night. Really wish to come back there soon!

author: Yudy
title: Great Choice of Stay in Banyuwangi

It add the sense of bright and green from lawn outside lobby. Feel airy, secure and comfort. There is Starbucks corner at lobby for guest to enjoy.
Reception is friendly. Breakfast is great.

author: Indra Sanjaya
text: Kokoon hotel Banyuwangi, desain hotel yang sangat modern , konsepnya etnic Banyuwangi ,ada motif gajah oling nya juga , fasilitas ada gym, yoga ,room sauna, kolam renang indoor sangat besih dan air nya jernih , dan ada loker nya untuk naruh barang2 kita di saat berenang, pelayanan nya ramah,  cekatan , kamar nya bersih harum ,kasur nya nyaman , ada tradisional snack dan coffee asli Banyuwangi nya di kamar ,di lantai 16 ada lounge cocok buat nongki2 sama teman (koleksi wine dan spirit nya lengkap) dan cocok ngedate sama pasangan dg view gunung dan selat bali, ketika mau breakfast greater nya ramah ,menu breakfast nya sangat banyak dan variatif, jamu dan onde2 nya enak saya suka sekali, , di lobby juga ada Starbucks dan itu satu2nya di Banyuwangi,terimakasih kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi ,, ,kami akan kembali lagi untuk stay di kokoon hotel Banyuwangi (29 Juli 2024)

author: Nova Eka Candra S
text: Best hotels ever in Banyuwangi, the room are so clean & comfort with King coil brand. All staff really helpfully. I stayed one night with best mountain view. The breakfast was so tasty. Blue fire lounge are so comfy to chill with friends, i really love the welcome drink that serve for me , the name is Ginger lemon hmm so tasty. Comfortable & spacious pool, clean, and i love the body soap are so fragrant, one of the best hotel with indoor swimming pool in banguwangi. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️Goodjob Kokoon

Breakfast was large & great choices. kue bom is the best & will miss the fluffy little cake. Great location & easy reach to your destination in Bayuwangi. Highly recommended.

Padahal waktu makan siang saya pesan rawon dan SOP buntut itu beneran enak bangett.

author: cici f
title: Best hotel di banyuwangi
text:
Hotel terbaik di banyuwangi,

Untuk pertama kali datang ke banyuwangi langsung suka dengan look hotel dari depan, 

Area lobby yang cukup luas dan nyaman, karyawan helpfull dibantu dengan mas Nova pada saat kedatangan

Untuk kamar juga bagus, kebersihan kamar juga ok , pertahankan

But special thanks untuk mas malik yang udah bantu arrange wisata di banyuwangi selama saya dibanyuwangi

Next ke banyuwangi akan mampir lagi

God job kokoon hotel banyuwangi

author: tony (Bali explorer)
text: English Having lived for many years in Bali, a major international tourist destination, and spent a good part of that time rubbing shoulders with the hotel industry, I thought I had a fairly fair opinion of the service and number of stars ratio of a hotel, and unfortunately not very favorable to Indonesian standards. My unexpected arrival at this hotel was therefore more linked to an urgent need for rest than to a quest for quality. Without great expectations as I said, but as soon as I arrived, a surprising doubt invaded me and this as soon as I entered the parking lot. Welcome from the valet, help with parking with my motorbike, accompaniment to the reception. Did I get the wrong address?? No matter my physical condition did not allow me to analyze the place and finally I found myself in a room with the luggage delivered and what a room!! Worthy of a Sheraton or a Hilton. Then after a few hours of rest, the restaurant or should i say the restaurants were superb. Cozy with a simple but yet very well cooked menu, all this at a very reasonable price! Finally before my departure the next morning, the cherry on the cake with the buffet breakfast…. and not only Indonesian but Western, varied and delicious!! Finally my fatigue was beneficial because without it I would certainly never have discovered this jewel in the south of Banyuwangi and the most surprising thing in this whole story is that I had the number of stars of this hotel confirmed which is indeed 4 but which in my opinion is worth many 5 stars in Bali. Yes the view is not that of some places in Bali but I can assure you that the standards are largely there français Ayant vécu de nombreuses années à Bali, grande destination touristique internationale, et passé une bonne partie de ce temps dans le domaine de l’hôtellerie, je pensais avoir une opinion assez juste du rapport service et nombre d’étoiles d’un hôtel, et malheureusement peu favorable aux standards indonésiens. Mon arrivée inopinée dans cet hôtel était donc plus liée à un besoin urgent de repos qu’à une quête de qualité. Sans grandes attentes comme je l’ai dit, mais dès mon arrivée, un doute surprenant m’envahit et ce dès mon entrée dans le parking. Accueil du voiturier, aide au stationnement avec ma moto, accompagnement à la réception. Me suis-je trompe d’adresse ?? Peu importe ma condition physique ne me permettait pas d’analyser les lieux et finalement je me retrouvais dans une chambre avec les bagages rapidement livrés par un groom, et quelle chambre !! Digne d’un Sheraton ou d’un Hilton. Ensuite après quelques heures de repos, le restaurant ou devrais-je dire les restaurants cosy pour une carte simple mais très bien cuisinée, tout cela à un prix extrêmement raisonnable ! Enfin avant mon départ le lendemain matin, la cerise sur le gâteau avec le petit déjeuner buffet…. et pas seulement indonésien mais occidental, varié et délicieux !! Finalement un coup de fatigue sur la route qui s’est vu  bénéfique car sans cela je n'aurais certainement jamais découvert ce joyau du sud de Banyuwangi et le plus surprenant dans toute cette histoire c'est que j'ai du me faire confirmer dans le doute le nombre d'étoiles de cet hôtel qui est effectivement de 4 mais qui vaut à mon avis bien des 5 étoiles à Bali. Oui la vue n'est pas celle de certains endroits à Bali mais je peux vous assurer que les standards sont largement là

title: 非常好
text: 外置，清洁，服务，早餐都非常好。👍👍👍

author: hiraganaguy
text: Great hotel, had an awesome stay for 5 days 6 nights. Got a welcome drink voucher too (juice or tea). Stayed for business. Deluxe Room was comfortable, got the view to the sea. Lighting in general was great. Adequate lighting for bathroom (i'd like it slightly brighter though). Great running hot water and JET SHOWER for the toilet, thank you so much. Service was great and hospitable, always greeted with smiles and the staff are awesome to chat with and exchange info. Breakfast buffet had an assortment of Western and Indonesian menus, including traditional food such as bubur kacang ijo, bubur sum sum, jenang, klepon, even herbal drinks like bandrek, bajigur, kunyit asem, and kencur. Of course, there is a la carte but didn't try during this stay, maybe next. Great top floor lounge with view of coconut trees and the sea, haven't tried the menu but looks delicious. Can get your coffee fix here too. There is a rooftop lookout, best during a clear day especially during sunrise and sunset. Meeting room we had was adequate for 12-15 persons, coffee breaks are good selection of sweet and savory snacks. Wish the coffee was better though. Didn't get a chance to try the gym or pool this time, sorry! Location wise it is south of the city center and in between popular tourist destinations to the north and south of Banyuwangi.

author: Ongky Abdulrachman
text: Highly recommended since value is worth it. Very clean and staffs are friendly and helpful if any guests would like to book additional excursions. Great for short stays with family or even a business trip. Note that the hotel is close to the airport but in the city and won't hear any traffic or airplane noise..

pertama kali menginap di hotel tertinggi di banyuwangi,, hotel bintang **** serasa bintang *****,, semua staff nya rama rama,, dr di sambut oleh mbk2 yg di reseption sangat ramah dan membantu saya saat cek in, proses cek in juga tidak lama,, kita juga di kasih vocer welcome drink yg di tukar di rooftopnya di lantai 16,, view nya sangat bagus sangat cozy, ada game nya juga,, benar2 terkesan menginap di hotel kokoon,

semoga hotel kokoon semakin sukses

author: Josi Rahadi
title: Lost & Found
text:
Sempet kehilangan sajadah dan sarung milik pimpinan saya, karena harus pindah kamar dan minta tolong pihak hotel untuk memindahkan semua barang ke kamar baru
Sarung dan sajadah personal dibawa oleh house keeping (dikira property hotel)
Untung sarung dan sajadh tersebut tidak dipinjamkan ke tamu hotel lainnya, dan setelah saya minta semua sarung dan sajadah diambil foto untuk ditunjukan di saya akhirnya ketauan barang tersebut masuh ada
Terima kasih untuk Yudi yang sudah membantu tracing atas barang tersebut
Saran :
Supaya diberikan tanda pengenal pada sarung/sajadah/mukena property hotel untuk memudahkan house keeping mengenalinya

author: Darwin Halim
title: Breakfast and minuman refill
text:
Untuk breakfast hari ke 2 saya menginap variasinya kebykan karbo semua dan kurang dagingnya.
Beda dng hari pertama saya menginap. Dan untuk sekelas hotel kokoon hrs minuman auto refill bukan hanya diksh 2 btl aj. 
Dan untuk kamar mandi sudah utk pintu shower sudah di tutup. Jadi air muncrat kedaerah wastafel

author: Wendrari Adventurous
text: Sudah 2x ke banyuwangi. Nginap di kamar 1228. Kamar bersih, ada balkonnya pemandangan menghadap ke laut. Dapat air mineral 2 botol, free snack, Bathroom Amenities standart saja karena tidak ada sisir, tidak ada pisau cukur, tidak ada jarumbenang jahit. Biasanya klo hotel bintang 4 amenitiesnya lengkap ini tidak lengkap. Menu makanan beragam jenisnya. Ada burger juga, anak-anak suka. Sayangnya tidak ada menu beef. Hanya ikan & ayam saja. Ada kolam renang & tempat fines. Ada bar di lantai 16. Pemandangan nampak  bagus dari lantai 16. Tolong ditingkatkan lagi yg kurang dan dipertahankan terus yang sudah baik agar kokoon the best hotel👍 Insya  Allah kalau ke Banyuwangi kami akan menginap kembali di sini karena pelayanannya ramah & baik.👍 Trimakasih🙏

title: The excellent Junior Suite
text:
The room was excellent, spacious, has a bathtub, living room, and pantry.
Oh ya they also provide minibars. 
There is more room for improvement, like the tv mounting is blocked by cupboard, so we can’t watch the tv from the bed.

author: Yan
title: 完美的外南梦住宿
text:
完美的住宿！设施新，服务好，性价比高！！地理位置优越！去伊真也很近。酒店一边看海（巴厘岛），一边看火山，夕阳时分美爆了。
厨房的出品都太咸了是唯一弱点，早餐可能不合国人口味（尽管很丰盛）

author: destia cardinalia
text: Jauh dr pelabuhan ketapang wkwk tp dekat banyuwangi park kalo mau main , kamar luas dgn designnya unik slide door bathroom nd city view ,kmar kurg kedap suara smpe shower kmar sbelah kdngeran . Fasilitas hotel lengkap , kolam renangnya indoor tapi air kolam keruh . Menu srapan bervariasi tp rsanya biasaaa ajaa hnya tampilan bagus wkwk utk sekelas bintang 4 kurg tasty yaa. Pelayanan baik , ramah nd tanggap, Lantai atas rooftop cafe nd bar. Overall good nd nice ,Untk family staycation ato honeymoon ccok bgt tp kalo buat singgah transit trlalu jauh 30menitan dr ketapang.

author: Azkia Melisa Fitriana
text: had bad experience on checkin procedure. Datang jam 13.30 menunggu sampai jam 14.00 (waktu check in) kamar jg blm siap. Jam segitu receptionist cuma ada 1, saran saya disaat waktu checkin agar receptionist standby. Kita udh antri lama-lama, ketika ada receptionist baru malah pelanggan yg baru datang malah diduluin. Seharusnya melihat situasi dan menanyakan siapa yg datang duluan. Kamar oke, bersih dan design modern. Will update about the food.

text: This hotel is perfect for a transit stop when traveling between Bali and Java, especially if it's late afternoon or night and you need a place to rest. While the location is a bit far, it's my preferred hotel for a comfortable and restful transit stay.

Untuk nextnya pasti akan lebih lama lagi stay di Hotel Kokoon.

author: JULI
title: Five stars quality
text: Beautifully designed, this new hotel is very clean, with large double beds, premium furnitures, nice indoor swimming pools. Bed is very comfy, ac is very cold. I would suggest fluffier pillows.  There is a small play area on the third floor which we enjoyed our family time playing soccer table. The food selections are sufficient with good taste. It has indomie station too.  The only feedback I have was the quality of food at the 16th floor. I order a chicken leg meal. The waiter told me it is half chicken. It came out very tiny fillet chicken. We choose side dishes french fries and butter rice. The portion of the main dish is much smaller than the side dish. The price is Rp.148K for this 1 meal only. We had to argue the size of the chicken until they gave us one more small piece. The taste does not worth the price. My suggestion please improve quality of food suitable with the dining place and cost.  The cakes on the Lobby floor is very nice and worth the price. Thanks for the nice experience. We will come back!

author: Dwiky Adi Patria
text: Kebersihan sangat terjamin. Suasana kolam yang menyegarkan.

author: QUY TRAN
text: Ok ok

author: Joko Susanto
text: Taksi Banyuwangi

author: Josephine H.
text: Sudah kedua kali menginap di Kokoon Banyuwangi karena selalu menjadi tempat persinggahan dari Bali ke Surabaya supaya tidak terlalu capai. Kami selalu pilih tipe kamar Junior Suite, besar, harga juga bersahabat. Bersih. Junior Suite ini ada di Lantai 15, ada sebagian kamar with balcony/without balcony. Pemandangan dari kamar juga indah. Untuk breakfast juga termasuk lumayan lengkap. Ada Indomie Stall yang menjadi favorit untuk sarapan pagi. Di Bagian Lobby juga ada stall starbucks, jadi bisa ngopi dulu sebelum setir kembali ke Surabaya.

author: gregorius g
title: Pengalaman Memuaskan di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi!
text:
Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi adalah pilihan yang sangat baik untuk menginap di Banyuwangi. Lokasinya sangat strategis, berdekatan dengan Pantai Boom yang terkenal dan juga tidak jauh dari Kawah Ijen yang menakjubkan. Saat menginap di sini, saya terkesan dengan keramahan dan profesionalisme staf hotel. Mereka selalu siap membantu dengan segala kebutuhan saya dan memberikan rekomendasi yang berguna tentang tempat-tempat wisata di sekitar.

Kamar-kamar di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi sangat bersih dan nyaman. Masing-masing dilengkapi dengan fasilitas modern seperti AC, TV layar datar, dan kamar mandi pribadi yang lengkap. Desain interior kamar juga menarik dan menciptakan suasana yang menyenangkan untuk beristirahat setelah seharian berkeliling.

Saya juga senang dengan sarapan yang disajikan di hotel ini. Menu sarapan beragam dengan pilihan makanan lokal yang lezat. Kualitas makanannya baik dan pelayanan dari para staf restoran juga sangat baik.

Secara keseluruhan, saya memiliki pengalaman menginap yang sangat memuaskan di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi. Saya akan merekomendasikan hotel ini kepada siapa pun yang sedang merencanakan perjalanan ke Banyuwangi dan mencari akomodasi yang nyaman, bersih, dan dengan pelayanan yang ramah dan tidak lupa salam saya untuk Gek Ketut:)

author: Go62635558928
title: Staycation at Kokoon Hotel BWI
text: First time experience stay di hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi. Suka banget sama bangunan hotelnya. Masuk kawasan hotel lgsg adem dan sejuk. Pelayanannya ramah, fasilitas lengkap. Rawon n nasi tempongnya juara. Bakal balik lagi utk staycation bareng keluarga.

title: Prima hotel
text:
Prachtige entree met lobby, in de lobby bevindt zich een Starbucks.
Mooi, grote en schone kamer met ruime badkamer die goed voorzien is van douchebenodigheden.
Uitgebreid ontbijtbuffet, met wat westerse dingen. Gezellige roofbar, wel raar dat er veel uitverkocht was, zowel qua drank als eten dat is echt not done. Zwembad is prima, wel binnen. Hotel ligt niet op loopafstand van het centrum, in de omgeving is niets te doen.
Vriendelijk personeel!!
Loop achter het hotel naar de kampong en rijstvelden, mensen zijn er super vriendelijk en mooie wandeling. Wel een slang en gevaarlijke aap tegen gekomen.

Yang paling berkesan bagi saya adlh peminjaman mukenah yg cepat ketika waktu ashar sudah mepet mau habis hihihi dan ketika ada barang berharga tertinggal pihak resepsionis segera mengkonfirmasi dan mengembalikan dgn sangat ramah💗
