author: hasan catur
title: Hotel dengan kenyamanan, keramahan dan pelayanan prima.
text: Hotel dengan keramahan dan pelayanan prima. Staf yang ramah, amnenities yang cukup lengkap, kamar dan peralatan tidur yang bersih dan baru.. varian makanan yang cukup banyak, terdapat cafe di roof top untuk bincang santai di malam hari dengan view suasana kota banyuwangi..recomended untuk menginap disini kembali...

author: Syafira
title: Stay at Luxurious Hotel in Banyuwangi
text:
Pengalaman yang sangat menyenangkan. Mulai masuk hotel sudah disambut dengan baik oleh tim security. Proses check in sangat cepat, semua tim reception humble. 
Satu2 nya hotel yang punya outlet Sturbucks di Banyuwangi 😍 
Kamarnya juga sangat luas daripada hotel lain di Banyuwangi, rapih dan nyaman sekali. Bisa memilih kamar dengan view laut atau gunung 🥰
Fasilitas wellnes center cozy sekali di lantai 2, dilengkapi sauna dan loker yang sangat luas. Ruang gym nya udah dilengkapi ruang yoga dong sisst 🤗
Breakfast di lantai 3 sudah bisa dari jam 6 pagi. Varian makannya lengkap pol, stall ada 4. Staff waiter juga sangat membantu sekali kepada tamu. Pelayanan room servicenya juga cepat
Ada rooftop lounge di lantai 16, lebih ke western food. Ada game zone juga di area indoor. Cocok untuk remaja kaya aku buat santai sambil gaming. View di M55 juga cantik 😍
Lalu ketika check out, kamar di check dengan teliti. Jadi barang kita tidak ada yang tertinggal, terlebih barang yang berharga 
Thanks kepada semua staff yang tidak dapat disebut namanya satu persatu
Pasti stay di sini kalo lagi main ke Banyuwangi 🌈

author: Diakhaby
title: Verry good
text: I loved my stay with you, it's a shame that for the massage you had to register in advance and since I was only staying for one evening.

author: Cendrawati
title: Transit trip
text: Over all is good

author: Peter T
title: Great stay
text:
It is a very nice hotel in Banyuwangi. Property is well kept, staff is friendly and helpful. Breakfast has enough choice and menu changes daily. Cleanliness is meeting expectations. Overall it is one of great hotel
Choice in Banyuwangi.

author: Paulina
title: Exceeding my expectation on the price I paid for the room. A true hidden gem in Banyuwangi.
text:
Overall detail of the ambiance. Love the smell of the lobby, the small attention to detail of the decor, the room ambiance and the food also very nice.
The noise outside the road is very loud from the room even though we were at 10th floor. If the room is more sound-proof perhaps it can solve the issue.

author: Jimmy
title: Hotel modern di Banyuwangi
text: Bisa jadi Salah satu alternatif di kota Banyuwangi. Modern Dan Masih relatif baru. Bersih Dan nyaman.

Pelayanan yang saya dapat cepat & ramah  dari segi check in - check out, order makan dll ., Dan kita juga mendapat kan Pemandangan yang Indah seperti Gunung ,Lautan & kota Banyuwangi dari atas. Thankyou Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi semakin berkembang & menjadi hotel terbaik dimanapun berada ❤👍💯

Lobby is very nice, and has a very soothing lemongrass scent. Staffs are very warm and helpful. Love the overall experience!

text: Tempatnya bagus bersih pelayanan ramah dan makanan enak

author: Rhosad Holiyan
text: Saya pertama kali menginap di Kokoon Hotel dan benar-benar menikmati pengalaman saya. Hotel ini punya suasana yang nyaman dengan interior modern dan hangat, stafnya sangat ramah dan selalu siap membantu. Salah satu hal yang paling berkesan buat saya adalah sarapannya. Variasinya lumayan dan semuanya terlihat enak, termasuk pilihan mie instan yang jarang ditemui untuk ukuran hotel. Sayangnya, saya tidak sempat mencoba semuanya. Hotel ini juga terawat dengan baik dan terlihat jelas bahwa mereka benar-benar menjaga semua fasilitasnya. Secara keseluruhan, saya sangat menikmati menginap di Hotel Kokoon dan ingin kembali lagi bersama keluarga.

author: Riga P
title: Recommended banget
text:
Saya menginap di family room dengan 2 king bed. 

Pro:
- bersih, amenities lengkap, cukup wangi
- moderen dan desainnya bagus, melebihi ekspektasi
- seneng banget ada kamar yang bisa muat 4 orang dewasa dengan 2 king bed
- staf ramah dan helpful
- musholla bagus, luas dan bersih
- masjid ada di seberang jalan 
- sarapan cukup oke menunya
- harga kamar reasonable

Cons:
- tidak ada

Saran:
- musholla mohon dibuat wangi seperti kamar

title: Pengalaman yang tidak terlupakan
text:
Saya pertama kali menginap di Kokoon Hotel dan benar-benar menikmati pengalaman saya. Hotel ini punya suasana yang nyaman dengan interior modern dan hangat, stafnya sangat ramah dan selalu siap membantu.
Salah satu hal yang paling berkesan buat saya adalah sarapannya. Variasinya lumayan dan semuanya terlihat enak, termasuk pilihan mie instan yang jarang ditemui untuk ukuran hotel. Sayangnya, saya tidak sempat coba semuanya.

Hotel ini juga terawat dengan baik dan terlihat jelas bahwa mereka benar-benar menjaga semua fasilitasnya.

Secara keseluruhan, saya sangat menikmati menginap di Hotel Kokoon dan ingin kembali lagi bersama keluarga.

Sngat recomended .. Cocok untuk stay dngan keluarga atau teman.. Dengan pelayanan super ramah dari staff.nya.. Proses check in dan check out cepat..  Kamar bersih .. Variari menu bfast lengkap dan delicious polll....
Juga fasilitas gym yg luar biasa.. Juga ada tempat untuk sauna...
Excellent buat Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi..

author: Regina
title: Value for Money
text:
Hotel nya bagus. Lokasi di pinggir jalan besar dan dekat dari airport. Ukuran kamar pas, ga sempit.  Sprei bersih. AC dingin. Water pressure oke. Breakfast nya juga lumayan lengkap. Ada kue2 jajanan pasar, indomie station, bubur, bakso, buah, dan buffet main course. Worth it banget sih ini!
Ada pool, gym, dan restoran di rooftop.
Dengan semua fasilitas itu harganya setengah dari Hotel Dialoog yang terkenal itu. Sangat worth it!

author: nika
title: Excellent
text:
Sesuai dg harganya. Anak2 senang. Kamar cukup luas. 
Yg perlu diperbaiki taste makanan breakfast (nasi keras). Room service perlu perbaikan, handuk di sofa tidak dilipat, handuk2 di kamar mandi tidak dilipat dan ditaruh di rak. Barang2 masih tersebar dimana2. Tempat sabun cair lepas besi nya dan isinya tidak direfill.  
Selain itu hotel is ok

author: Sami Jaya Elektronik Gadget Furniture Driyorejo
text: Rooms : Bagus, interior modern, tapi kurang kedap, suara sebelah saat mandi sambil bernyanyi terdengar jelas Lokasi : Persis pinggir jalan, gampang ditemukan, tapi jauh dari pelabuhan Yg mau check in, sebelum beli voucher di aplikasi travel, coba check harga di Website nya. Bisa dapat free breakfast dan voucher Starbucks

author: Elisabeth
title: Love the smell of the lemon grass and the breakfast!
text:
Stayed here for 3 nights, everytime we enter the lobby, we can smell the lemongrass, so refreshing.
Breakfast with many choices but too small dining room to accommodate the guests. The food staff also scattered due to the layout of the room; you can improve this one.
But thank you for making my group stay awesome.

What an amazing stay!

title: Nice hotel to stay at Banyuwangi
text: Letak hotel strategis berada di jalur utama Banyuwangi - Jember dan dekat dengan Bandar Udara Blimbingsari. Hotel bersih, nyaman , pelayanan ramah, menu breakfast bervariasi dari tradisional sampai western. Fasilitas hotel cukup lengkap ada gym, indoor kolam renang, spa, kamar besar, bersih dan nyaman, internet kenceng Diatas hotel ada rooftop dimana kita bisa melihat view kota banyuwangi sampai selat Bali dari atas hotel apalagi kl malam hari.. text: Beautiful new hotel. Kind of built off by itself. Not much shopping or dining close by. It’s cheap to travel by grab ( Indonesian Uber). Hotel restaurant is good but limited menu if you are staying more than a couple of days

title: Hotel terbaik di banyuwangi
text: Hotelnya dekat dengan kota,kamarnya sangat bersih dan nyaman, pelayanannya juga sangat memuaskan.di lantai atas ada restoran yang cocok banget buat nyantai, fasilitasnya sangat lengkap ada pool,gym, sauna dan spa. Bener bener hotel terbaik di banyuwangi. Saya pasti kembali lagi di hotel ini

author: Martin B
title: Stay experience
text: Pertama kali di hotel kokoon, sebuah pengalaman menginap yg tak terlupakan, selain hotelnya bagus, pemandangan juga bagus bgt apalagi dari lantai 16 . Surprise bgt, pelayan sangat ramah(warm service )variasi makanan sarapan  banyak pilihan dan enak2 ,thank you all staff see you next nime.pertahankan.

author: Boneng Kiyosaki
text: I stayed at Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi for one day, and it was an amazing experience! The most impressive aspects of my stay were the beautiful building and the breathtaking views. The facilities are very complete, making it a perfect choice for families. There's a Kids Zone near the restaurant where your children can play. The swimming pool is lovely, and guests have free access to the gym room as well. You can use your wheelchair here♿. The staff at Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi were friendly and helpful, adding to the overall pleasant experience. The food was also very nice and added to the enjoyment of my stay. I highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Banyuwangi!

author: Madeza
title: Nothing can go wrong with this hotel
text:
This is my second time here. I would say this is the perfect hotel for business purpose. They have a very appropriate ambience for formal and informal meeting.
For vacation is also fine. They are the most complete hotel in Banyuwangi. The service is ok, the room is very good , the staff is helpfull. 
But, the food is the best of the best. The variety, the taste.. everything about the food is simply the best.

author: Dragon Fire
text: Kamar bagus, hanya saja pelayanan yang kurang baik, tidak ramah dan kurang cekatan. Lokasi untuk menuju ke penyeberangan ketapang cukup jauh membutuhkan waktu setengah jam lebih apabila lancar.

author: Endang  Ernawati
text: Lounge nyaman banget. Makanan lezat dan sangat beragam. Nuansa hangat. Relaksasi di tepi kolam yang modis. Resepsionis yang profesional dan santun.

author: Surya
title: Excellent services
text: We stayed for 4 days & 3 nights. The stays were excellent. All the staffs were polite & friendly. The room facilities & cleanliness were all superb. Will definitely stay back here if we want to go to Banyuwangi again.

author: CC
text: Kamar besar dan luas.

author: Iffatun Niswah
text: hotel bagus banget, rapih sekali, fasilitas lengkap, pelayanannya juga okee

author: Mei
title: Great place to stay
text: Homey, clean and the smell makes you calm and peaceful

author: zenny rahma

author: Nisatrans Banyuwangi
text: Pelayanan yang ramah, satpamnya baik baik. Peduli akan keselamatan tamu

author: Paul
title: Wonderful!
text:
Mr Koko on the front desk reception and his staff were exceptional.
Nothing, all was perfect.

author: Dimas
title: Wonderful
text:
It's wonderful to stay at kokoon, from the staff to the facility, everyone and everything was wonderful.
They didn't change the towel once I requested to clean up my room for a 2-night stay.

author: zenny
title: Amazing
text: Area hotel bersih dan wangi semua, bahkan dari masuk halaman depan udah nyaman sekali. Fasilitas sangat lengkap dan bagus. Staff ramah semua. Makanan sangat beragam dan enak semua. Rooftop lounge is the best place to relax.

author: Ghina Ts
text: pelayanannya ramah banget. senang bisa nginap di hotel ini. dan ini hotelnya rameeee, seruu sih. pas sarapan tadi pagi (11 Mei 2024) ada tamu yang disurprisein ama suaminya buat staffnya nyanyian ultah wkwkwk. so switt deh. big thanks to all staff!!! 🫶🫶🫶

author: Fahmi

text: Ga expect akan sebagus ini. Padahal ngincer yg ada view pantai2 nya tapi ga kalah bagus di kokoon ada view dari rooftop nya

author: DENDY
title: Trip Banyuwangi
text: Nice and clean hotel, helpful staff since front gate, slightly outside from city center

author: Hari Setiyono
text: Layanan secara umum bagus, tapi perlu lebih detail lagi

author: Suhailah Zanal
text: We stayed from 23-26 Apr at a Junior Suite. It was our first time to Banyuwangi for work and leisure. The staff (from Security to the Front Desk) were professional and kind. The room itself was clean, nicely furnished and well maintained. The breakfast buffet had a good selection and daily specials. Overall we hope to come back end of the year! Thanks for making our stay memorable. PS: the Starbucks within the lobby was a god sent!

author: Simon
title: Great hotel in Banyuwangi
text: Really friendly and helpful staff. Very good breakfast spread. Can cater for vegetarians. This is our go to hotel in the city.

author: Tresnaning

title: Pengalaman terbaik menginap di Kokoom Hotel Banyuwangi
text: Hotel dengan pelayanan terbaik. Mulai dari pelayanan karyawan, pelayanan keperluan di kamar, restaurant dengan cita rasa makanan terbaik, suasana dan kebersihan hotel yg luar biasa. Pastinya akan kembali menginap ke Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi

author: Paradise46874281778
title: Awesome place for stay
text: Very beautiful hotel, very clean rooms and very good breakfast with lots of choice. i think just need improve option menu for Room Service

author: Ronald
title: Kokoon Banyuwangi
text: Tempat, kebersihan dan staff ok2, namun utk breakfast sudah cukup ok dengan varian menu nya, namun untuk rasa bisa ditingkatkan lagi.

author: Hafiz F
text: Iftar cukup baik

author: alisia
title: Good place
text: The location its very close to the ferry station that off to Bali, the hotel it self is clean and comfortable for kids, the swimming pool is indoor so dont be afraid of a rain, its a great palce to stay, surely will come back next time.

author: Ni luh putu A
title: Clean, modern & comfortable.
text:
We booked 4 rooms, 3 deluxe & 1 family room, Everything its perfect, lovely staff, perfect facilities, comfortable, super clean, delicious food, buffet breakfast good quality & delicious. 
We are happy to recommend this hotel 1000%.
Thank to all staff & managements

title: good hotel
text: Veryveryverycomfortablecozyhotelwhichcanseeagreatviewoutside.hotWater,welcomedrink,veryThoughtful.lovefromhangzhou,china.很舒服的酒店，窗外有很好的景色。有欢迎饮料，吹风机，热水，服务人员态度很好，早餐炒鸡好吃，门口也很好打车，尊的很棒哦👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾👍🏾

author: Matthias
title: Ausgezeichnetes Hotel
text:
Wir als Familie mit 2 kleinen Kindern (3 Jahre und 6 Monate) hatten einen sehr gute Aufenthalt.
Alles ist sehr sauber, die Angestellten immer nett und hilfbreit, es gibt einen Pool und ein kleines Zimmer mit Spielsachen (Kids Club).
Das Frühstück bot eine große Auswahl an lokalen Sprisen, aber auch westliche Optionen (z. B. Toast, Pancake).
Wir können das Hotel nur empfehlen!!

author: Tri Yuliana
text: Makanan sangat enak.

author: Dwi Permitasari
text: dan ketika ada embun terjatuh di tepian jendela, kemudian luruh bersama hangatnya mentari pagi.. ah.. betapa sederhana pagi mengajarkan bahagia.. dan aku.. bahagia ku adalah ketika staycation di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi. Sungguh pengalaman berbeda dengan unik nya kamar mandi tersembunyi, dan ada Starbucks Home, aahh.. rasanya nggak mau pulang. Disambut oleh Ni Ketut yg profesional, salam, sapa, senyum juga welcome drink yg bisa kita ambil di resto lantai 16 yg ternyata tersedia game juga.. makin seru. Kolam renang indoor dan ruang ganti yg eksklusif, tersedia ruang sauna dan spa, juga gym dan play ground.. sangat cocok kl mengajak keluarga liburan. Menu sarapan pun tidak kalah istimewa yg langka dan jarang kita temukan di hotel lain yaitu ada pilihan mie instant indomie ..dan variasi menu yang sangat beragam, terbaik. Semoga jika suatu hari nanti kami kembali ke Banyuwangi pasti Kokoon Hotel akan menjadi pilihan pertama. Terima kasih tulus dari hati, terima kasih bahagia, salam all the best. Oh iya saat order di Starbucks pun ada mbk Adel yg sangat ramah, juga ada kak Wiwit di house keeping nya, maaf jika tidak semua nama bisa saya hafal tapi teruntuk keluarga besar Kokoon semoga bisa mempertahankan atau bahkan meningkatkan prestasinya ..terus bertumbuh dan sukses ya.

author: Grigorii
text: Everything you will encounter at this hotel is excellent. I received much more than I expected. I will recommend this place all the time and to everyone. Great room, clean, soft, beautiful view.could not hear prayers, slept peacefully. Roof top terrace view, gym, indoor pool, and even sauna, good enough. Will stay for one more day here.

author: Dovikagung Prasetyo
text: Sungguh bener2 menjadi pengalaman yang sangat berkesan saat Staycation disini. Pelayanannya sangat Ramah dan memuaskan. Kamar nya sangat Nyaman,Bersih dan Mewah apalagi desain kamar mandi yang unik sekali tersembunyi menurutku beda dari hotel lain. Menu makanannya sangat banyak pilihannya. Kemaren yang jadi favorite aneka bubur manisnya kacang ijo dll,bubur ayam ,dan empal gentong. Bener2 bikin betah. Semoga bisa kembali Staycation kesini lagi.

author: Faizal suherman
title: Mr faizal suherman
text: Rare and outstanding view and hotel staff are superb service

author: Mita Tanti
text: Hotel bersih, nyaman. Ada 2 view bisa laut atau gunung. Semuanya ok. Tempat makan nyaman. Bisa sarapan sambil lihat pemandangan gunung Makanan beragam dan gak ngebosenin meski nginap beberapa hari Di roof top pemandangan indah dah ada cafenya jga

author: Culture62259894677
title: Experience staying at Kookon Banyuwangi
text: The room was clean, I happened to get one with a balcony which was good enough to see the sunrise when the weather was clear. aesthetic bathroom design. Hotel employees are ready to serve you at the restaurant. Ourdoe hotel is like a minimalist refreshing mind. It's a shame I haven't tried the swimming pool and fitness center yet. good luck for the Banyuwangi kokoon.

title: Exceptional
text: Nice hotel and have a good view

author: My 15t4nt1
text: Hotel bersih, nyaman. Ada 2 view bisa laut atau gunung. Semuanya ok. Tempat makan nyaman. Bisa sarapan sambil lihat pemandangan gunung Makanan beragam dan gak ngebosenin meski nginap beberapa hari Di roof top pemandangan indah dah ada cafenya jga

text: Dari luar hotel, lobby hotel, fasilitas hotel dan kamar hotel semua luar biasa, sarapan enak

author: Hani C.
text: it was my second time stayed in kokoon hotel banyuwangi, I like the cleanliness and their hospitality. I used the free sauna facility (located at locker room beside the pool), but they need to maintain the locker room dry regularly. honestly i dont really like the breakfast, it was not suit my taste but tasty is about people's preference. if you use online food delivery, it will be hard to get a driver because the location is not near at city center(I stayed when the holiday season). as long as i know kokoon hotel banyuwangi is the biggest hotel at banyuwangi. i hope that they can maintain even improve their services and facilities.

author: Dr B. B. S. S.
text: Very impressive, especially when we had breakfast, looking at the beautiful view of the mountains 🥰.

author: Eleni Iacovidou
title: Grateful for the care and love Kokoon staff give
text: I am deeply grateful for the good care and love Kokoon staff provide to me and the team in every stay. I rest assured every time I stay there that I can address any issue that occurs respectfully and sensitively. I thank you for that. The staff is always friendly and ready to provide any assistance needed. You are all very charismatic - thank you for making my stay less stressful!

author: Ardian
title: Suka aja..
text:
Staff ramah ramah.. breakfast banyak pilihan yang enak-enak .. kanar nyaman, kamar mandi dan toilet bersih 
Lobby dingin... seger..
View gunung di belakang bagus.. juga ada rooftop bar yang nyaman..
Bantal (mungkin hanya di kamar yg saya tempati) kaya agak bau lembab, 
kebetulan 1 dari 2 kanar yg saya,sewa gorden tipisnya ada yg robek.
Lantai kamar agak licin kalau basah, seperti berminyak.

Lobby hotelnya jg nyaman, luas, disamping ada yg di dlm jg ada yg diluar. Kamarnya juga bersih
Recepsionisnya jg ramah2

Semoga kedepannya ada promo/discount2, krn keluarga sy banyak yg di Banyuwangi dan sering ke Babyuwangi

author: ThomAP
title: Great Hotel!!!
text: Great Hotel with Fantastic View, Friendly Service, Clean Room, and Complete Facility...Great Breakfast with Delicious Taste, complete from indonesian, asian and western Food & Beverages, definately will be back again to Stay at This Hotel

author: ghea m
title: Resto
text: For the restaurant, there happened to be an event with other visitors who had a photo agenda near the spot I was sitting in, there was no permission or anything so the flash was very annoying. Food orders take more than 30 minutes.

author: Trail25884189800
title: Comfortable and quiet to rest
text:
The rooms are clean, the AC is cool and steady
Friendly service too
If you want to find something close to town. The room is quiet, no sound from outside can be heard.
There is also new coffee in the lower lobby...
Friendly culture like East Javanese people who are full of smiles.

author: Devi R
title: Breakfast n best view
text: Very comfortable transit going to Bali in the morning, the breakfast is really delicious, lots of variety... the rooftop view is beautiful, the room is quite spacious, the mattress and pillows are also quite comfortable, the indoor swimming pool, gym and spa are all complete... it's a shame you can't stay long because of transit , next time I will come back because everyone is recommended

text: Ruangan bersih dan nyaman banget. Desain kamar modern.

author: YM

author: Mohamad Muhaimin
title: love it to stay there!
text: Kokoon has unique value and hospitality make you wish to stay for another day. kokoon has become our secret nd home in banyuwangi

author: N***l
text:
The rooms were good; however, we had a bad experience with the restaurant. After a 7-hour road trip, at dinner, we had to wait almost 60 minutes. The reason was because they had so many orders, which was not supposed to be our problem. And the breakfast was awful; there was chicken porridge without chicken, a fruit counter without fruits, and tasteless foods. 

Later, on the 2nd night, I tried the hotel’s spa when the therapist received a phone call on her mobile in the middle of the massage. And I am not sure if it is normal practice; I was asked to transfer the payment directly to the therapist’s account.

author: ALDI ERZANUARI
text: Bagus hotelnya terbaik deh

author: Wayan Suryanegara
text: Keren

author: MD
text: pelayanan ramah, makanan oke, Thank you kokoon :)

author: Zulia Fitriani
text: Tadinya hanya booking 3 malam akhirnya nambah semalam, booking jauh2 hari takut g kebagian kamar ternyata klo booking di hari h-nya malah dpt diskon lagi, karena hotel baru jadi semuanya masih nyaman stafnya juga ramah2. Enaknya di sini itu untuk kasur family room nya bisa buat keluarga yg anak2nya ud remaja jadi bisa untuk 4 dewasa, belum sempat main k roof top saat sore sepertinya bagus, mudah2n bisa segera main k sini lagi dgn pelayanan lebih baik lagi.

author: Theia
title: comfortable room
text:
The room has great view and very spacious. Water pressure in the shower was great, everything was clean, amenities complete. Breakfast was tasty too. 

The only minor complaint I have is the many separate light switches (left, right, each table lamp, by the tv, by the bath, foyer, above fridge area, etc). I needed to hunt for switches to turn off all lights instead of having a master light switch by the bed. It missed 1 positioned just behind the big bottles. Everything else was perfect.

title: Amazing
text: Hotel yg luar biasa. Next akan bermalam lagi..

author: Johan K
title: Best service hotel at Banyuwangi
text: I stayed here last Eid al-Fitr and I really enjoyed staying at this hotel. Excellent service, friendly staff, spacious and clean rooms. Best view from 16th floor where the rooftop lounge is placed. In my opinion, this is the hotel with the best service in the city of Banyuwangi.

author: Tutut Hidayati Munawaroh
text: Sangat ramah, tempat juga bersih

author: T3JO Laros
text: Pelayanan seluruh staf hotel sangat istimewa, mulai dari reservasi hingga check in sangat ramah. Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi juga memiliki fasilitas yang lengkap mulai kolam renang, spa, gym, roof top dan lain sebagainya membuat hotel ini layak disandingkan dengan hotel bintang lima. Terlebih lagi, Kokoon Hotel memiliki bangunan gedung tertinggi di Banyuwangi, memungkinkan saya dan keluarga menikmati keindahan sunset berlatar belakang pegunungan Ijen serta melihat sunrise berlandscape Selat Bali hanya dari kamar.

author: Yoni Budi Satriyo
text: Pengalaman di kokoon hari ini 13 April 2024 Awal masuk hotel oke dan bagus, dan saya sama keluarga ingin makan malam di resto.. pesan makan malam jam 18.35 dan makanan baru di sajikan jam 19.45 dan makanan yang saya pesan nasi goreng babat pete .. ehh awalnya yang dtg nasi goreng babat tanpa pete dan pete nya menyusul .. buat manajemen di Kokoon terutama di bagian resto, diperhatikan mengenai hal ini dan saya sebagai customer kecewa banget dengan pelayanan resto

author: Fanny

I really enjoy my stay. The service was excellence, bed and pillow are so comfortable. Spacious and clean room. Breakfast is great, they even have instant noodle corner 😆
Totally good for family or couple trip

author: Sandy Adisutiyono
title: Deligthted experience at kokoon hotel banyuwangi
text: I have stayed at the Kokoon Hotel twice with my family, since I got down to the lobby I was greeted warmly and friendly by the staff, the check in and out process was very easy and fast.  The breakfast menu is varied and delicious.  Now the cafe serves Starbucks coffee.

author: Fanny F

Totally good for family or couple trip, or trip with friends

author: Seungyeob L
title: A Solo Traveler’s sanctuary
text: Staying at this hotel was an incredible experience from start to finish. As a solo traveler, the staff made me feel welcomed and valued, offering personalized service that made my stay unforgettable. The room was a cozy retreat, combining comfort with luxury, and it became my own private sanctuary after days spent exploring.

author: PT BandarTrisula
text: Kebersihan sangat terjaga dan rapi. Kuliner luar biasa. Pemandangan alam yang damai. Harga sesuai fasilitas.

author: Michael Djojopranoto
title: Very delightful stay
text: The hotel was so great, helpful staffs and great breakfast

author: ERWINA
title: Our pleasant stay 4D3N at Kokoon
text: I am travelling with my two boys, 1 adult and 1 teens, for highlighted tour of Ijen-Djawatan-Baluran in Banyuwangi.  We were staying during Ramadhan and the sahur provided by the hotel is excellent. Many tasty choices ! Kokoon has very nice and comfy pool area and musholla. We spent some hours bfr our train departure to Surabaya. The clear view from the rooftop deck of mountains range - Raung-Ranti-Ijen as well as the sunrise on the opposite side are also offering the morning booze to start the day.

author: Christiany
title: Above average
text: Just ok. Food need to be improved

author: Meisya Putri
text: Stayed here for 3D2N, and it was a pleasant experience. All the staff are helpful, kind, and informative. They also provided a leisure package to explore Banyuwangi. Their hotel staff would help you gladly to arrange the trip upon your arrival. This hotel served many variants for breakfast and dinner. A small note for the breakfast menu - there were several dishes that were quite tasteless and too dry (exp. hashbrown, fish fillet). Please do consider to improve it :) Overall, it was a nice experience staying at Kokoon Hotel. Would love to come back on my next trip to Banyuwangi. Rooms: Spacious, clean, and neat. Lighting also ok.

author: Ayu K.
title: Cukup memuaskan
text:
Secara keseluruhan hotel bagus, kamar bagus, bersih, tidak ada keluhan. Fasilitas bagus.

Saran: 
1. mungkin kedepannya untuk kolam renang bisa dibuat sedikit hangat. Karena mungkin di area yang tertutup dari matahari, air kolam jadi terasa sangat dingin bahkan saat kami berenang di siang hari. Untuk anak anak jadi tidak bisa berenang lama karena baru masuk sudah menggigil kedinginan.
2. Kami mencoba dinner bbq all u can eat di lt 16. Menurut kami, rasa masakan semua enak, tetapi variasi menu untuk bbq perlu ditingkatkan. Seperti variasi daging mungkin bisa ditambah. Kemarin hanya ada 1 jenis daging saja, dan itupun daging terbilang sulit untuk dikunyah. Lalu untuk minuman hanya dapat 1 gelas sparkling water saja. Tidak ada minuman lain, bahkan air mineral sekalipun. Menurut kami perlu ada tambahan minuman lain selain sparkling water.

author: ayukezia
title: Hotel yg bagus
text:
Hotel sangat bagus, kamar bagus, nyaman dan bersih, fasilitas bagus.
Tapi air kolam renang sangat dingin, terlebih untuk anak kecil. Semoga kedepannya bisa lebih hangat, jadi lebih nyaman untuk berenang.
Untuk rasa makanan breakfast ada yang enak dan ada beberapa yang hambar. Variasi lauk buffet agak kurang. Tapi untuk kue dan dessert semua enak. Pilihan minuman jg banyak.

author: Yusuf Arsali
text: I stayed at Kakoom Hotel from Jan 26 to 28, 2024, and I can’t express how great my experience was. I’m giving it a solid 5 out of 5 and highly recommend it! The staff here is super friendly and welcoming, making the hospitality outstanding. The hotel is pretty new, and you can tell they used top-notch materials for the building, making it comfortable and luxurious. The rooms are spotlessly clean, and I really appreciated that. The lobby is a nice spot to relax and catch some fresh air from Banyuwangi. Oh, and the top floor ambiance is amazing – it’s got a stunning view that adds a special touch to your stay. In a nutshell, Kakoom Hotel is fantastic. If you’re looking for a great stay in Banyuwangi, this is the place! Cheers, Yusuf

text: Hotelnya mewah, staffnya ramah mulai receptionis sampai cs ramah semua..deket sama Banyuwangi park, mantabb

text: Noteworthy details: Hotel ini mempunyai pelayanan terbaik dari mulai depan sampe belakangnya dengan berbagai keramahan dan kesopanannya

author: Asterina Evina Andini
text: Stay di kokoon hotel banyuwangi semalem aja tp berkesan bgt Utk room aku ambil yg tipe deluxe balcony di lantai 12. Viewnya cakeeep Tipe kamar yg modern klasik dgn bathroom yg unik sih karena dia hidden gitu Kamarnya bersih, wangi dan dingiinn Kemarin karena terlalu cepet sampek hotel akhirnya request early check in dan boleh doongg Konon katanya kokoon hotel ini hotel tertinggi di banyuwangi Rooftop loungenya oke bangeet, viewnya MasyaAllah Breakfast jg oke, varian macamnya banyak dan nyaman tempatnyaa Staff ramah dan tanggap. Sukaa!!! Oyaaa, hal lain yg aku suka adalah parkirannya. Parkirnya di basement yaa jdi aman dari panas dan hujaan 😍 Lokasi hotel ke kota banyuwangi agak lumayan yaa sekitar 20 menitan dan lokasi hotel ini ada di jalan besar luar kota gituu antara banyuwangi-jember

author: Dita Ariski
title: Staycation Ternyaman!
text: Terimakasiiiihh Kokoon Hotel, ini pertama kalinya staycation diBanyuwangi bareng ibuk, Alhamdulillaah dapet hotelnya nyaman, dapet cuaca cerah, viewnya 360 derajat bagus poll dan sarapannya juga enak enakk❤️❤️ best momen pokoknya

author: Rey
title: Overall sangat memuaskan....
text: Pertama kali ke BWI pertama kali nginep d hotel ini... Pegawai semua ramah banget, nyenengin, enak d ajak ngomong... Kebersihan oke...tempat oke... Semua oke lah.. Next ini jadi salah satu hotel favorit sayaaa...

author: Ecka
title: Over all very good
text: Pertama masuk lobby langsung disambut wangi aromatheraphy yg wangi dan menenangkan, staff yang ramah dan welcome drink yang menyegarkan. Kamarnya bersih, rapi dan view dari balkonnya sgt indah. Menu breakfast sangat bervariasi dan enak2 tentunya. Banyak makanan khas jawa timur dan rasanya bikin kangen. Servive untuk sarapan antar ke kamar juga sangat ramah dan detail, penataannya cantik dan ful set menu. Over all sangat memuaskan.

author: Putu B. H. P.

author: denny rulianto

author: Titien Sukmadewi Budiman
title: Menyenangkan
text:
+ Di tengah panasnya udara luar, masuk hotel, disambut udara sejuk Lobby...adeemm... 
+ Lobby, kebun, fasilitas oke.
+ Kamar nyaman, spacious dan view nya cantik.
- Ke depannya, berharap variasi makanan lebih banyak, buah potong lebih segar (tempo hari beberapa potong buah nenas sudah coklat2, masih disajikan)
- Masuk kamar hotel, melihat TV berisi daftar harga properties dan amenities hotel, rasanya seperti berkunjung ke Singapura yang terkenal dengan "fine city" nya hehe
- Handuk sepertinya perlu peremajaan, dan aromanya kurang segar, sempat minta ganti tapi aromanya sama.
- Waktu Check In, di kulkas masih ada sisa makanan dari tamu sebelumnya. Semoga hanya bagian itu saja yang terlewat dan seluruh kamar dibersihkan sebelum tamu selanjutnya check in.
Overall, oke banget...semoga selalu ada improvement dan untuk yang bagus2 semoga bisa dipertahankan sampai seterusnya, karena dari beberapa pengalaman menginap di hotel, kunjungan pertama, kedua bagus, kunjungan berikutnya sudah mulai menurun. Terima kasih Kokoon Hotel

title: Review
text: Beautiful hotel, fried rice can add more seasoning

author: Maya Ice
text: Saya suka menginap di sini semuanya baik

author: Ade R.
text: Luxurious hotel with comfortable facilities. Very friendly customer service, we were very impressed.

author: hendra septiana
text: Pengalaman kurang baik menginap Di hotel ini 1. Tidak ada security yang standby di depan, sehingga tidak ada yang mengarahkan saat akan masuk ke hotel dan saat parkir 2. Tidak ada staf yang standby di loby depan, jadi harus membawa barang2 yang cukup banyak sendiri. 3. Kamar tidak kedap sehingga suara suara dari luar sangat mengganggu saat malam hari 4. Rasa makanan saat sarapan bisa saja, meja tidak ditata, kurang pas dengan standar kelas hotelnya.

author: Anang D Ardi

title: Ulasan hotel
text:
Rata² bagus
Kekurangan,
Pegawai (receptionist) kurang ramah (tidak bisaa senyum)
Tidak boleh bw durian, denda Rp2.000.000
Pintu kamar mandi tidak bisa di tutup rapat, jadi bisaa terlihat dr luar KM

author: Amira Rahmatika
title: Very satisfied, great experience
text: Pertama kali tiba di hotel disambut dengan lingkungan hotel yang teduh dan asri. Cuaca di Banyuwangi sedang panas saat kami tiba, namun kami merasa sejuk saat tiba di halaman depan hotel. Pelayanan saat reservasi, check in, selama menginap, maupun saat check out sangat baik. Lokasi hotel di depan Banyuwangi Park dan dekat tempat oleh2, cukup strategies. Kami membawa bayi dan diperbolehkan menitipkan makanan bayi ke freezer hotel karena di kamar hanya ada minibar yg suhunya kurang sesuai utk menyimpan makanan. Kolam renang hotel indoor dan ada pool utk anak2 shg cukup nyaman. Menü sarapan cukup bervariasi dan enak. Kamar deluxe maupun family cukup luas dengan aminities yg lengkap, disertai arah kiblat bagi muslim dan view yang baik dari kamar hotel. Hanya ada sedikit masalah tdk berarti yaitu wadah sabun yg lepas pengaitnya shg khawatir ada sekrup yang terlepas. Overall pengalaman 2 malam 3 hari menginap bersama keluarga di 3 kamar Kokoon Hotel sangat memuaskan. Thankyouu

author: Ligyul
text: Everything great. Staff so friendly. The food is great.

Saya sangat dibantu oleh resepsionis Aini, semoga karirnya sukses terus ya. Definitely will come back kalo ke banyuwangi

Pas kmi bermalam anak sy ulang tahun, dikasih surprise taart ultah dr bbrp stafnya dtg gitu ke kamar. Wah luar biasa y perhatian banget. Puas n mau balik lagi klo pas k banyuwangi

It's always a good experience staying at this hotel
1. Good and affordable food
2. Clean and affordable room
3. Great services from the staff
 Things need to be improved:
1. Please provide a lounge area or dedicated area for guest staying at suite room to have breakfast, afternoon tea, etc. Or you can also provide breakfast in the room for those staying at suite.

I booked family room and junior suite, and it was suited our preference. The room is super spacious, the amenities is complete. Definitely back if we're in this town again 💖

Fasilitas lengkap, kolam renang, gym, lounge juga ada. Pelayanan ramah, breakfast variatif, tiap hari ganti2 menu. Kamar luas dan aku upgrade ke kamar yang ada balkonnya. Ternyata kalo pagi bisa terlihat laut dari kamar. Overall harga sama yang kita dapatkan puass bangeet Food & drinks: Coba duduk2 nyantai di rooftop lounge nya, nyaman banget.

Thank you so much for everything. I hope i can stay again in kokoon suite. 




Best regard



Fachrel parisandy

author: Yan Purwadi Kurniawan
text: Butuh hotel yang agak jauh dari keramaian kota? Hotel Kokoon bisa dijadikan alternatif. Hotel ini punya 2 sisi pemandangan yang berbeda yang bisa dijadikan solusi healing, kamar yang menghadap ke timur disuguhkan pemandangan pesisir dengan Selat Bali di kejauhan, sedangkan sisi barat ada pemandangan persawahan, kebun, perbukitan, dan pegunungan di kejauhan. Kamarnya bersih, rapi, dan ditata dengan baik. Penerangan kamar sangat banyak, jadi gak perlu khawatir gelap atau terlalu terang. Free Wifi yang relatif kencang untuk streaming video. Room service dan keramahan petugas sangat bagus. Menu breakfast cukup variatif dan tematik, baik tradisional maupun internasional, sehingga gak akan bikin bosan.

author: Julius
title: A Pleasurable Retreat
text: My stay at Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi, spanning from yesterday to today, was a delight. The generously sized and pristine room, coupled with the modern architecture and interior design, created a comfortable ambiance. The staff's exceptional hospitality enhanced the experience. Although the F&B quality, particularly room service and breakfast, left room for improvement, I plan on returning, confident that the overall experience will only get better.

text: One of our best hotel finds! Beautiful with a traditional touch, clean, lovely staff, well furnished, good service. Best price via Agoda 😉 Super comfortable and would love to stay here again.

author: Zeynep Elif
text: We had an amazing stay here. Luxurious, well luminated and clean rooms, coming with an amazing view. The hotel lies a bit out of the centre (about 5 kms), i would say that is the only negative aspect. There is not much around the hotel to do, so as a tourist you should either go to the centre or arrange a tour the day before. There are few small shops around, where you can buy small snacks, water etc. Rooms are equipped with TV, hair dryer, a case, a kettle and mugs, tea and coffee, a luxurious shower and A/C. There was no balcony in the room we stayed. Rooms are cleaned daily, and we had no major issue with noise from the surrounding rooms. The breakfast offers several types of food, majorly Indonesian options, a salad and noodle/egg bar, and there is a good bakery section, which i loved. Ginger/Jasmin tea and coffee, several juice types are offered as well.  The swimming pool is usually calm, and a bit cold (open hours: 6 am-21 pm) . A spa is available. We dined on Ijen restaurant and rooftop bar, although quite overpriced, the meals were very elegant and tasty. Restaurants offer both Indonesian and western food. Room service is also available. Overall, loved my stay in Kokoon Hotel, totally recommended!

author: G L
text: Just had 2 nights here and used it as a base to visit Mt Ijen. Loved it ❤️!! Rooms are comfortable and our view was amazing. Breakfast was an extensive buffet, and staff super helpful. We both had 90 min massages after some long treks which was great. They operated until 11 pm which really suited us. We had cocktails & snacks in the rooftop lounge one evening. Our lunch before departing was just us in the restaurant. International visitors will already be aware that wine is expensive here but we enjoyed what we had with lunch. If any guests are looking to get their nails done I would highly recommend a lady 14 mins walk away at Byek Henna & Nail Artist ❤️

text: Salah pilihan hotel dengan fasilitas lengkap di Banyuwangi. Bersih dan pelayanannya yg ramah. Terima kasih Kokoon Hotel.

author: Margherita Rossana Nerini
text: Siamo stati 3 notti in questo hotel, che definirei molto carino. Lo abbiamo scelto per fare l'escursione notturna allo Jien, al Baluran National Park e alla spiaggia delle tartarughe. Camere spaziose, pulite e confortevoli con una bella vista. Piscina carina. Personale gentile, buona la colazione, anche se da un 4 stelle mi sarei aspettata che le bevande calde fossero espresse e non fatte dalle macchinette. Ho dato solo 3 stelle per due motivi: 1) il costante chiasso nei corridoi delle camere, il rumore dei vicini e il dlin dlon continuo dell'ascensore a tutte le ore del giorno e della notte. Capisco che esistano persone poco educate, ma sarebbe opportuno che qualcuno dello staff girasse per i piani dell'hotel per controllare. 2) ho prenotato un massaggio da 90 minuti per me e 45 per il mio compagno, quando siamo arrivati li ci hanno detto che non potevano fare il massaggio al mio compagno e per me avevano solo 60 minuti a disposizione. Non si fa! Nel complesso non so se ci tornerei, anche se mi pare di aver capito che nella zona questo è l'hotel migliore che ci sia. Un'ultima cosa: anche se ci sono ristoranti, warun e negozietti nelle vicinanze, l'hotel è lontano circa 7/8 km dal centro di Banyuwangi. Rooms: Spaziose e confortevoli, ma veramente troppo rumorose.

author: Fajar Adriyanto
text: Hotel mewah terjangkau, terletak antara kota Banyuwangi dan Bandara, di tepi jalan Raya Banyuwangi-Jember. Desain hotel ini sangat menawan, dengan interior memadukan unsur budaya kerajaan Blambangan dan modern artistik. Kamar luas dan nyaman, terdapat 2 view ke arah Gunung atau ke arah laut. Pilihan saya ke arah Laut agar bisa melihat Sunrise. Lantai 16 paling atas atau Rooftop terdapat cafe buat ngopi dan minum wine. Ada live music.

Cuma g enaknya klo mau masuk toilet di pool hrs pakai card room, jd agak ribet ya. Yg paling top sih gym nya, dg pemandangan kaca yg lebar, jd bs ngelihat ke outdoor, suka bgt. Ada kids club tapi agak kecil, Mungkin bisa di tambah fasilitas atau permainan buat anak2nya biar anak2 g bosan. Tapi overall mantap deh nginep di kokoon, recomended.

title: Carino, ma troppo rumoroso
text: Hotel carino, camere spaziose e pulite, area piscina non male, colazione buona, anche se le bevande calde vengono fatte dalle macchinette. Lontano dal centro di Banyuwangi 7/8km, ma nelle vicinanze ci sono ristoranti, warun e negozietti. Personale gentile. Area massaggi bocciata, perché nonostante la prenotazione non hanno effettuato il massaggio al mio compagno e a me solo di 60 minuti anziché 90. Ho dato 3 pallini soprattutto per il continuo rumore nei corridoi e nelle camere vicine. Non si riesce a riposare bene, vieni continuamente svegliato dal dlin dlon dell'ascensore. Peccato, potrebbero fare di più, perché l'hotel è molto carino.

author: Amandine
title: Merveilleux séjour dans la région de Banyuwangi
text:
Nous avons passé un excellent séjour dans cet hôtel grâce à toute l’équipe qui est très accueillante. Ils ont fait en sorte de s’adapter à nos demandes pour les excursions que nous avons demandé. Nous avons particulièrement apprécié la compagnie de Nova notre chauffeur avec qui nous avons partagé de très bons moments ! 
La chambre est confortable, agréablement décorée, propre et soignée.
La piscine et la salle de sport sont agréables et très bien entretenues, cela permet de passer un moment dans un cadre paisible. 
Les restaurants, le rooftop bar et le room service 24/24 sont un gros + sur place ! 
Les paysages sont magnifiques depuis n’importe quel point de vue de l’hôtel. 
Merci à toute l’équipe du Kokoon hôtel pour cet accueil !
Pour les points d’amélioration : Nous aurions adoré faire le traditionnel cream bath au spa mais malheureusement lorsque nous avons appelé, dans les horaires d’ouverture, le personnel dédié à ce soin avait déjà terminé sa journée de travail. Le personnel nous a gentiment proposé de le faire le lendemain mais nous ne pouvions pas. Dommage ! 
Concernant la carte pour la chambre, il serait peut être bien de prévoir 2 cartes pour un couple étant donné qu’il est nécessaire d’avoir sa carte pour accéder à la piscine et la salle de sport, notamment pour qu’il y ait encore l’électricité dans la chambre si l’autre souhaite y rester. Je pense que c’est quelque chose que nous pouvons demander à la réception car ils sont toujours disposer à nous aider !

author: Carla

author: Giovanni
title: rumori continui, impossibile dormire
text:
La camera è carina, l'hotel è pulito e la posizione non è malaccio per fare le escursioni.
La vista è obiettivamente splendida.
Prima di prenotare in questo hotel bisogna sapere che l'insonorizzazione è del tutto assente. E' l'hotel più rumoroso in cui io sia mai stato. In assoluto. Si sente tutto, continuamente, e non è possibile dormire né di giorno né di notte. I campanelli degli ascensori, le persone che camminano, gli scarichi del water, le persone che trascinano sedie e parlano, vanno avanti per tutto il giorno dalle 4 di mattina.

author: Simon Becker
text: Tolles Hotel besonders im direkten Vergleich mit anderen asiatischen Hotels aus der selben Preisklasse. (Wir sind inzwischen gut 7 Wochen auf Südostasien Reise und haben in anderen Hotels schon so einiges ertragen müssen.) Im Kokoon ist insbesondere das Frühstück sehr gut. Neben asiatischen Speisen wird auch für die westliche Zunge einiges geboten. Wir blieben 3 Nächte zwecks Ijen Ausflug. Jeden Morgen gab es abwechseln frische Waffeln oder Pancakes von guter Qualität. Kaffeemaschine und frisches Obst ist ebenfalls vorhanden. Das Zimmer selbst ist modern eingerichtet und auch das Bad lässt keine Wünsche offen. Da das Hotel etwas außerhalb liegt, hat man auch eine schöne Aussicht in alle Richtungen. Einziges kleines Minus, die Bettlaken hatten wie eigentlich immer in Südostasien zunächst einige Flecken. Auf Nachfrage wurde das aber behoben.

author: Yun
title: 超級棒的飯店，一定要住這間
text: 第二次住了，飯店有吸煙房跟非吸煙房，有冰箱，房間很大，東西也很好吃，床超大超級好睡，冷氣也冷，房間超級乾淨，洗澡水很大大，非常好洗，有熱水，而且洗髮精跟沐浴乳都是用非常好聞舒服的，不像印尼其他飯店一樣，洗髮精跟沐浴乳味道都很不好或很甜很難洗，最重要的事情是，飯店員工超級熱情，服務超級周到，態度好，有禮貌，當你有問題，會非常積極的幫你解決跟處理，也不會一直跟你要小費（印尼幾乎都是會狂跟你要小費的），也不會因為你沒給就對你不好，我都很自動給，而且給的很開心，因為真的超值得，尤其是他們有一個員工，我這趟去本來就是想給朋友一個驚喜，但我完全忘記路怎麼走，只大概記得，那裡的員工知道，很熱心的跟我說，他晚上下班11點在大廳等我，還特別回家跟他家人借車載我，而且10:30就在樓下等我了，然後載著我跑了超遠的地方狂繞，因為我也沒手機（在雅加達旅行的時候被搶劫了），他還特別繞去找地方儲值電話，讓我能夠打回臺灣，然後最後安全的把我送到印尼的朋友家，最後還等我，載回飯店，然後到飯店後，也都沒有要收錢的意思，我很自動的給了他很高的小費跟車錢，服務真的太好太熱心了，大家有來這裡旅行，這裡絕對是首選，超級推薦這間飯店，真的太棒了

text: Pertama kali nyoba saat roadtrip bersama keluarga, pesan connecting room dan dihandle dari telpon sampai c/i dengan mas David. Good staff! ambience nyaman, room oke, bedding oke, breakfast komplit dan tasty. Improvement: spare toilet paper supaya tidak bolak balik nelpon housekeeping.

author: Mr Namara
text: Kamar bersih & ga suram. Ruang gymnya luas dan alat baru, ada ruang aerobik. Makan malam tinggal nyebrang ke kanan dikit ada resto bagus. Sop ayamnya kalau pas enak ya enak.

author: MAria Goi
text: I love how small but very grande the design even the room is nice and complete amenities. 👌 The breakfast was amazing! They have laksa noodle, tom yum soup noodle, indonesian style porridge, pasta and others. It is like a restaurant food.

author: Ocha Parana
text: Pesan kamar yang ada balkonnya. Keren sih kamarnya. Bagus! Kamar mandinya juga keren. Breakfast juga luar biasa! Enak dan banyak varian. Apa lagi soto bogornya, hmmm enak banget. Cuma agak mahal dari pada hotel yang lain. Coba harganya di turunin lagi, mungkin orang lokal banyuwangi seperti saya bakalan kesana terus. Good job! Ooh iya satu lagi, kolam renangnya dari awal masuk sampai duduk itu bau. Kayak bau kamar mandi. Tolong di cek.

author: Ara
text: Highly recommend.  Staff are exceptional, especially the female staff.  The room service food was the best Indonesian food we've had all across 5 islands we visited.  Room was clean, could do some light maintenance, but nothing was dirty.  We loved all the amenities and the any time we needed anything staff was quick and very helpful.  If your in the neighborhood to visit Ijen we highly recommend staying at this location.  You'll be taken care of so professionally. We are planning to come back to the area and booking again.  If only all the (8) hotels we stayed at on different islands of Indonesia were like this.  It would've made our time here much more pleasant. Thank you Kokoon staff, you guys are awesome!

author: Asri Maharani
text: Housekeepingnya detail bgt⭐️ breakfast enak banyak pilihan, ruangan luas, pemandangan cakep. Minor minusnya temperature sauna kurang panas. Tapi overall worth it bgt

author: Erick P. H
text: Hotel dengan pelayanan top di Banyuwangi. Semua staff mulai satpam, reception, hingga housekeeping ramah semua. Parkiran besar ada di basement, kamar sangat nyaman dan kamar mandi sangat bersih. Proses check in dan check out mudah dan cepat, breakfast sangat enak. 👍🏻

text: Bagus

author: Febby Surianto Kusuma
text: Saya menginap disini saat transit sebelum ke Bali keesokan harinya. Hotelnya bagus. Mewah. Kamar juga mewah dengan aminities komplit. TV ada youtubenya juga (anak-anak senang sekali). U/ sarapan termasuk enak-enak. Hanya saja ketat sekali. Anak-anak di charge disini. Biasa kebanyakan hotel, anak dibawah 12 tahun masih free. Kemudian u/ lokasi, dia berada di kota Banyuwangi. Jadi u/ sampai pelabuhan ketapang membutuhkan waktu sekitar 35-45 menit. Tapi point plusnya karna ditengah kota, gampang untuk mencari makan. Room service buka 24 jam. Kemarin sempat pesan rujak sotonya. Enakkk. Must try. Overall oke dan cukup puas. Sukses selalu ya.

Kesana juga pas puasa jd tdk sempet ikut breakfast yg jm 3 pagi karna tour kita jam 1 pagi, jd begitu balik dri kawah ijen makanan sudah siap di antarkan ke kamar 😸Karna kita naik kereta ke bwi jd kita dari hotel di anter juga ke stasiun dan sempat mampir ke oleh” Banyuwangi juga ♥️😻

We stay at both deluxe and junior suite, both have great amenities and the room design makes the room feels more spacious

author: Martini Arthaguna
text: The room is dirty. They put a dirty bedsheet and they didnt clean the floor everyday Rooms: The room is dirty

author: Yoesoef Hasyim
text: Karena saya prakitisi MEP, saya coba review beberapa terkait MEP : - Saving energi, ketika kamar unocoupied belum teraplikasi, tapi hawa kamar cukup oke sepertinya ada fresh air yang di inject ke room. Sayang tadi tidak bawa alat cek RH. - Air panas tekanan oke, dan tidak nge-dance tetapi ketika mode hand shower panasnya sudah pas tapi setelahnya dipindah mode ke rain shower suhu air berubah (jadi lebih dingin) dan sebaliknya jika kita pakai rain shower setelah setting suhu air sudah disesuaikan kehangatannya kemudian kita rubah mode ke hand shower maka suhu air berubah jadi lebih panas. - Floor drain juga oke lancar banget, flow bagus. - Untuk exhaust kamar mandi, oke hisapannya. - Nomor Channel TV tidak sama dengan informasi pada channel panduan - Di room sauna belum terdapat emergency switch. - Peredam suara anatar room masih kurang oke karena suara dari room sebelah masih cukup terdengar - Untuk makanan banyak pilihan di restonya, termasuk ada menu hemat kopi tiam. - Anak mulai usia 6tahun harus tambah biaya 100rb untuk breakfast di resto yg sudah masuk paket menginap. - Menu makanan breakfast juga banyak pilihannya.

author: Sondang Simanjuntak
text: Nice place for stay...

author: Arief Alvianto

author: Cecil Cecil
text: Lokasi dekat banget dengan Banyuwangi Park (tinggal nyebrang), posisinya ada di jalan utama. Eksterior dan interior lobi hotel luar biasa, breakfast lumayan enak, kamar cukup luas utk tambahan extra bed. Koridor menuju kamar terkesan kurang bersih karena tetesan cat. Arena playground utk anak juga kecil banget, dan mainannya kurang. Staff ramah2.

author: vonny sulaimin
text: Proses check in dan check out sangat2 efisien. Luar biasa. Kamar bersih, ranjang nyaman, breakfast banyak pilihannya, lokasi ok walau bukan depan pantai.

author: Srihadi utomo
text: Kamar bagus view sky bagus pelayanan ramah

author: Peter Sebastian
text: One of the Best Hotel In Banyuwangi so far

author: Dhila Wirawandi
text: Spacious ,neat and clean room. The staff are very pleasant. Services are good. Food variety nice. But the location is quite far from destination that we're went through

author: agus dk21
text: The best View dari atas bagus banget

author: erwin
text: Kamar 1111 kasurnya lumayan keras

author: Rovi A.
text: Hotelnya bagus, bersih, pelayanan super ramah dan sigap, makanannya juga enak enak, kalau ke Banyuwangi lagi pasti menginap di sini lagi. Terima kasih Kokoon Hotel.

author: Irawan
title: Great Hotel in Banyuwangi
text: Thank you Pak Yudi at reception and Pak Nanang the concierge

author: Eviek
title: Exceptional
text: Best hotel....everything is good

author: Siti Mutiah Setiawati
title: Nice, Warm and Safe Hotel
text: We enjoyed staying in the full facilities hotel, swimming pool,  sauna and roof top Cafe...I'll come back one day.

author: Mykhailo
title: Exceptional
text: New modern hotel, large underground parking, great buffet breakfast. Staff speaks good English. It's around 1 hour ride to Ijen.

author: Yanizar
title: The best shower and comfy hotel in town
text: The hotel itself not far from the city only 5-6 KM, and the best thing of this hotel got wonderful rain shower, if you had a long day and you back for relax and having a nice hot shower it was amazing. The staffs also taking care of you very well too, thank you Kokoon , we definitely will be back ❤️

author: Lenice Fulvua
title: excellent
text: Overall cleanliness and services are excellent

author: Diah
title: View yang bagus dan kamar luas
text:
Kamar luas dengan pemandangan yang luar biasa.
Tidak ada

author: Desy A.
text: Setiap ke Bayuwangi selalu nginap di sini, karena kamar dan hotelnya sangat di jaga kebersihannya. Pelayanan juga sangat ramah🤗 love this hotel💓. Semoga selalu seperti ini.

author: Aria
title: Top notch hotel in Banyuwangi
text:
Modern design and cleanliness.
The coffee machine was broken, taste terrible

author: Stefani Suryani
text: good

author: Graciotto V. H.
text: This place doesn't deserve 4 stars. Room is OK. Bedding comfortable, worktable is fine. Bathroom is a mess, horizontal hanger, shampoo and body wash pump barely works. Breakfast is pathetic, food is oily, flavorless, and absolutely unappetizing. Which 4 star hotel doesn't have provide fresh coffee and demand additional fee? Dinner is pathetic for the price. Restaurant and bar is disconnected. Service for both breakfast and dinner is horrible, as if you have high schooler (probably true) serving.

author: Ana
title: The Room spacious, clean unfortunately not all room having balcony
text: The room is spacious, clean and smart design. Unfortunately not all room having balcony room. Staff will charge if you want balcony. and from coridor can be heard noise. For breakfast the taste yummy just need more variant

author: Sandy A.
text: Kokoon hotel baguss banget dan pelayanan yang sangat bagus … bakal kembali ksini lagi kl ke banyuwangi.

author: Anna-Marie D.
title: Just fabulous!
text: Great hôtel, lovely staff. Great food.

author: Anni Mai
title: Excellent !
text: Excellent  stay on our family holiday, lovely staff, great food. The hotel is beautiful, the rooms very tastefully designed. The pool was great. We had dinner at the Rooftop and lunch in the restaurant.  Delicious food!

author: Benito
title: stay
text: very good

author: Wida
title: Baru dan bersih
text:
+ Harga 
+ Pelayanan

author: JM
text: Hotelnya baru, nyaman banget, bersih banget, pelayanan yg sangat ramah, breakfast nya banyak pilihan sangat enaaak. Recomend deh. Terima kasih Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi.

author: IWAN
title: HOTEL BERSIH & NYAMAN
text: INI ADALAH TINGGAL YANG KESEKIAN KALINYA, KE 10 KALINYA TINGGAL DI KOKOON.  HOTEL NYAMAN, BREAKFAST YANG BERAGAM, SALAD BAR JAUH LEBIH LENGKAP DIBANDINGKAN AWAL PERTAMA KALI TINGGAL DISANA TAHUN 2021 YANG LALU. DINNER PERNAH COBA ALA PUJASERA ENAK, TERAKHIR ALA KOPI TIAM RASA NIKMAT & HARGA TERJANGKAU. KOLAM RENANGNYA BERSIH & DINGIN. LOKASI AGAK JAUH DARI   PELABUHAN, 20-25 MENIT. KEKURANGAN SAUNA TIDAK PERNAH PANAS KARENA THERMOSTATNYA DISET HANYA 70 DERAJAT. BEBERAPA KALI SAUNA AKHIRNYA KESAL KARENA TIDAK BERASA APA2. SELEBIHNYA KOKOON ADALAH HOTEL YANG BERKUALITAS, AMAZE DENGAN LOBBYNYA SEDANG TAPI NYAMAN, TOILET DI LOBBY & RUANG MAKAN UNIK DENGAN BATU ANDESITNYA. BRAVO KOKOON

author: endra ratna
text: ruangan sangat bersih dan nyaman

author: Arifin
title: Bagus
text: Rekomended, nyaman, sarapan memuaskan

author: Dian
title: Asyiknya Menginap di Kokoon
text: Hotel bersih harum dan staf yang ramah. Breakfast enak. View laut yang keren. Bersih . Fasilitas lengkap. Harga jg sesuai budget

author: Hani
title: Nymana bgt
text: Agak jauh dr pelabuhan ketapang

author: Agung P.
text: Overall terbaik hotelnya, wes pokok e menginap di sini nyaman banget.

author: Surya A.
text: Oke dan mantap untuk transit sebelum menyeberang ke Bali.

author: Yuli Tjahyadi
title: Satisfy
text: Good experience

author: Al
title: Sangat recommended
text: Booking 9 kamar untuk satu malam lalu ada beberapa rombongan yg ga jadi ikut akhirnya harus reschedule dan ternyata BISA meskipun di webnya agoda dibilang tdk bisa refund. Keren Agoda

author: Stefanie
title: really convenient
text: staying here is very comfortable, the rooms are quite spacious, clean and quiet. I will stay here again if I go to Banyuwangi

author: Rintahi S. R.
text: Liburan Banyuwangi berkesan karena hotel oke secara pelayanan dan tanggap.

author: ira
title: Bagus
text: Kamar nyaman staf ramah

author: Peter
text:
The location is good and easy to access, food for breakfast is changing on a daily basis, so hotel guests can enjoy a variety of foods and not get bored with the same food if staying for multiple days.
The thing we didn't like was the room was not soundproof. you can hear guest traffic and noise from  mosque from inside the room.

author: AGUS TRIYANTO
text: Luar Biasa

author: riesca
title: Sukaaaa
text:
Jujurly suka dengan hotel nya.
tengah kota . Hotel bangunan baru . Staff ramah . Makan an enak enak . Pelayanan juga top .
kira kira jarak dari pelabuhan ketapang 20 mnt. Kapan2 mau balik lagi ke kokon untuk nyobain fasilitas nya . Dan belum sempet foto2 jg pdhal bangunan estetik.
untuk spa nya agak mahal . Dan wktu gada 60 mnt pdhal di tulis 60mmnt

author: Koean
title: Exceptional
text: nice hotel. it s clean and has a nice design

author: Nuha H
title: Super Clean!
text: Spacious rooms, super clean room, amazing design, super clean bedsheets, many options for tv channel, good taste in drink water, helpful staff, the best option for staying at Banyuwangi. Near from airport

author: Aisa
title: Mantap
text: Terbaik deh untuk di Banyuwangi

author: Alesha
title: Very good n nice hotel
text:
Tempatnya oke bgt. Fasilitasnya jg lengkap. Ada kids poolnya jg, gym, n sauna juga. 
Menu breakfastnya jg bervariasi. Overall rasanya semua enak² . Pas di lidah kita. 
Pelayanannya jg bagus bgt n ramah.

author: Pingkan kereh
title: Surprise me
text:
This is first time we stayed in hotel in Banyuwangi. We came very late in mid night due to traffic in Ketapang Harbour (we were stucked for 6 hrs). We were surprise that the hotel was very big which we didn't expect that, and until we came to the lobby. Its the best htl in town I can say. 
We checked in, assisted by Front Desk, David. He was very helpfull and make the check in process flawless and quick so that we can rest quickly as it was 02:30 WIB.

author: Surya A.
text: Bagus dan nyaman, kebersihan juga 👍.

author: Yuli
title: Exceptional
text: Hotel dengan pelayanan yang ok,fasilitas lengkap,dapat view ok nextvkalau liburan bakal  kesini lagi

author: Anita
title: Very good
text: Hotel nya Bagus. Membuat capa perjalanan setelah menyebrang dr ketapang jd terbayar. Kamarnya nyaman dan lega. Ac dingin. Toiletnya lengkap ada selang shower juga. Nice place. Over all 9/10

author: Herbert
title: Exceptional
text: Hotrl baru, bersih..staff ramah.

author: BOY
title: Best yet Hotel In Banyuwangi
text: Everything is excellent, no need words to describe. This is best yet hotel in banyuwangi, thank you Kokoon.

author: Yun
title: 員工非常非常讚
text: 一定要特別說一下這間飯店的員工，超級棒，服務熱情，態度超好，從下車到房間，完全都沒動手拿到行李或做任何事，員工看到你會給你非常棒的微笑，而且看到你有需要幫忙的狀況，會立刻放下手上的事情，用跑的過來幫你，有任何需要跟問題，也都立刻會幫你解決，做事積極又熱情熱心，飯店非常乾淨，房間每天都會整理換新的衛生用品，而且都會整理的很乾淨，洗澡有熱水，水流也強，冷氣也很冷，附近也有一些餐廳可以吃飯，飯店泳池很乾淨安全，餐廳的食物也很好吃，完全沒有任何缺點，真要說的話，就是只有飯店位子不理想而已

author: Jeffrie
title: Exceptional
text: Ini hotel rekomen banget lokasinya gampang pilih kamar yang ada balkonnya sehingga bisa lihat pemandangan laut dan gunung bila cuaca lagi bagus stress bisa hilang mantapp kokoon hotel Banyuwangi

author: rinta
title: semua oke
text: hotel yang sangat recomend datang tengah malam mereka standby

author: Kristina U.
text: The hotel is hidden gem, I was not expecting that the hotel will be big enough for my children says wow. I enjoy my stay here.

author: Wellibordus N. R.
text: Hotel baru dan sangat worth to pay, kami sangat menikmati tidur di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi.

author: FLORENCE
title: Excellent
text: Love everything in this hotel, will come back for sure

author: Arif
title: Hotelnya masih baru
text:
Utk kebersihan kamar dijamin bersih deh soalnya masih baru juga hotelnya.
Puas deh hotelnya mantaap. Interior kamar yg modern serba coklat.

author: Merian
text: Beautiful hotel, very enjoy to stay , comfortable,clean, all staff very friendly, service very good, very recommended👍🏻👍🏻, About food , I wish can be better about  the taste & item of food.. ..more success, more Blessing, GOD Bless 🙏🙏

author: Sri B. A.
text: Akses gampang dipinggir jalan utama, satpam selalu standby dipinggir jalan untuk membantu mengarahkan mobil yang akan masuk atau keluar hotel. Bangunan yang kokoh dan tinggi menjulang. Masuk basement parkiran luas. Masuk lobby disambut dengan ramah oleh resepsionis. Masuk kamar terasa kenyamanan hotel ini. Bersih, wangi, luas, nyaman. Kamar mandi dan perlengkapannya lengkap. Sarapan sangat menyenangkan. Variatif dan enak rasanya. Ada menu tradisionalnya juga. Pagi hari sempatkan mampir ke rooftop untuk melihat matahari terbit dan melihat selat bali. Kolam renangnya cukuplah untuk anak anak berenang. Usul saran ditambahkan pelampung untuk anak anak serta yang jaga harus standby terus di lokasi ya. Sangat menyenangkan tinggal di hotel ini. Kalau ke banyuwangi tentunya nginep di Kokoon Hotel.

author: Sylvia S.
text: Hotelnya bagus, kamarnya luas dan bersih, breakfast nya juga enak dan bervariasi, kolam renangnya bagus, staff nya membantu dan ramah sekali, makasih.

author: addy
title: Exceptional
text: Semuanya ok...staff dan facility kamar nya...please keep your service dan juga kebersihannya

author: Sarah
title: Amazing hotel!!!
text: Must stay here if you are in Banyuwangi, especially if visiting the Kawah Ijen area.  Staff a so helpful and pleasant especially the female staff moreso.  Delicious breakfast buffet and nice facilities.  We enjoyed our stay here so much so that we booked the Kokoon for our Surubaya stay!

author: Mariyani M.
text: Mantap sekali hotelnya sangat bagus.

author: Wan L.
text: The room is clean aand spacious.

author: Ashofa
title: Rekomended
text: Nice place n recomended

author: Chulhyun
title: 아주 훌륭
text: 위치 위생상태 조식 부대시설 등 모든게 만족스러움

author: Sandra
title: Big room
text: Big room with sufficient space for 4. Good base for Mount Ijen. Nice modern hotel with quick check in and out. Restaurant is great too.

author: Veronica
title: Very nice hotel for family
text: This is my first time staying at Kokoon hotel and i'm very satisfied. I stay at family room with mountain view, it has 2 king bed, and a sofa. The room is very spacious and comfortable. The food taste is good and they have rooftop lounge with a very nice view. We can see 360 around banyuwangi from this rooftop. The location is strategic. I would recommend this hotel for staying in banyuwangi.

author: Sesilia Candinegara
title: Beautiful hotel, good breakfast, near Banyuwangi Park
text: The architecture and interior are beautiful, the staffs is friendly, breakfast taste good and have a lot of options. The hallway to the room though didn't feel clean because there's a lot of white paint stain on the floor.. the playground is not suitable for kids above 7 years old.. It's located near Banyuwangi Park, and there's a lot of good restaurant near the hotel (in range 7kms)

author: Caecilia
title: Nice Hotel
text:
Pelayanan baik
Menu makanan lebih variasi lagi

author: Hengky
text: Good place & excelent hotel

author: Merian
title: Exceptional
text: Hotel yg sgt bgs, nyaman, bersih,pelayanan cpt, staff smua ramah

author: Yeni
title: Exceptional
text: Hote

author: Peter
text: Property located at one of main transportation street in the city make it easy to move around. Staff is friendly and helpful. Food variety is good at the restaurant. They are changing the menu daily so if you stay multiple days, you can enjoy different food everyday which make your culinary adventure more interesting. However room is not sound proof. We were staying at 10th floor and still able to hear the street noise. The noise in the hotel corridor is also loud and kind of disturbing,  Especially when traffic is heavy at breakfast time in the morning and early evening when most people starting to go in to the room and people going out for evening activity. Overall this hotel is consider one of a good hotel in the area in my opinion. There are many hotels not as good as this one and there are few hotels only that can exceeds this hotel in banyuwangi.

author: Thomas Anders
title: Sehr guter Service, sehr gute Ausstattung der Zimmer, gutes Preis-Leistungsverhältnis
text: Sehr guter und sehr freundlicher Service, gute und sehr saubere Zimmerausstattung.

author: Martini A
title: Bad experience
text:
Kita booking 6 kamar untuk liburan keluarga.
Saat masuk ke kamar, ternyata spreinya KOTOR banyak nota. Kenapa hotel sebesar ini tidak melakukan cek saat pemasangan?
Mama saya sedang tidak bisa berjalan, breakfast bisa minta d antar ke kamar.
Air kolam renang sangat dingin. Keponakan saya terjatuh di dekat kolam. Lantainya tidak di pakai yang ramah untuk kolam

author: Fenfen2016
title: Kotor
text:
Kami berlibur ke banyuwangi dan memutuskan untuk menginap disini dengan memesan 6 kamar. Kamarnya kotor. Ada banyak noda di sprei tempat tidur.
Kamar tidak pernah di sapu hanya bed saja di rapihkan.
Menu sarapan beragam

author: Amalia N.
text: Overall tempatnya bagus banget, bangunan baru, cukup mewah, bersih dan proses check in cepat. Cuma makanan nya menurut ku gak worth it, sarapannya basic banget rasanya juga ga seberapa enak. Nyoba makanan di lounge rooftop, lama banget pelayanannya, salmon steaknya keasinan.

author: Andi Perkasa
text: Nyaman

author: Agus R Hermanto
text: Breakfast menu variatif. Keramahan staf baik, terutama staf fitness dan kolam renang sangat ramah dan helpful. Handuk bau, terutama handuk fitness bau amis. Kolam renang sempit hanya cukup untuk 3 - 4 orang dengan jalur memanjang. Botol sabun dan shampo dijepit logam supaya tidak dicuri orang, tapi akibatnya sabun atau shampo susah keluar. Overall harga dibandingkan fasilitas agak kemahalan.

author: Setyo Nugroho
text: Hotel nyaman, pelayanan ramah

author: AWS Surabaya
text: Nyaman Dan bersih

author: unun fitry
text: Kolam renang indoornya oke. Sikat giginya lembut (ini penting)

author: Rima Awaliyati
text: Hotel kokooan salah satu hotel mewah di Banyuwangi wajib dijadikan salah satu destinasi penginapan sangat recommended sekali

author: Ajeng Hapsari
text: Saya sangat terkesan dengan Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi. Suasana nyaman, pelayanan luar biasa, kamar yang bersih dan modern, fasilitas lengkap, lokasi strategis dekat dengan tempat wisata terkenal, serta makanan lezat di restoran hotel.

author: Eating Time
text: Good

author: Senior Stevent
text: untuk resto, pelayanan nya ramah banget..makanan nya jg 👍👍

author: Zulva Kestin
text: Best service, crew hotel yang sangat ramah. Kamar bersih, kamar mandi bersih, amenity lengkap, Makanan yg enak rasanya menu breakfast sangat lengkap dg harga yg terjangkau, parkiran luas, kamar bersih interior yg estetik dan modern.

author: Ardie Ahmad Fahrezy
text: Hotel dengan kamar ternyaman & makanan ter enak

author: mirza achma
text: Best service, best food, recommended

author: Wahyu Aji Wibowo
text: Ke BWI...pasti nginep sini lagi, tapi mayan mahal sih... Rooms: Maknyus

author: Ruhul Latif ardian
text: Hotel nya bagus semoga semakin berkembang lagi

author: Sirus Halomoan Simanjuntak
text: Hotel KOKOON Banyuwangi, Jawa Timur Hotel ini mempunyai suasana yang sangat nyaman dan asri dan dekat dengan tempat-tempt wisata yang terkenal, pelayanannya sangat luar biasa dan cepat serta memuaskan dan memiliki Kamar yang bersih dan modern serta dilengkapi fasilitas lainnya yang sangat lengkao

author: Nur Hayati
text: Hotelnya nyaman cocok buat saya

author: Roro Fany
text: Tempatnya sejuk, front office dan seluruh pegawainya ramah banget, kamarnya juga bersih, sarapannya bervariasi, hanya saja waktu itu saya dapat kamar yang kulkasnya kurang dingin tp seandainya ada yang butuh mungkin bisa di sampaikan ke FO, saya request dan dipenuhi

author: reza ihsan
text: Salah satu hotel bintang 4 yang punya karakter di Bamyuwangi. Letaknya strategis cukup dekat dengan beberapa objek wisata yang menarik di Banyuwangi. Overall para staff sangat baik dan sangat membantu, selalu tidak lupa untuk tersenyum dan ramah. Kamar family suitenya cukup luas dan view dr kamar cukup bagus, rooftop nya menyediakan 360 derajat view Banyuwangi karena gedung hotel ini yg paling tinggi di bandingkan dengan bangunan lain disekitarnya. Yang paling saya sukai adalah aula di depan lobby yang terbuat dari kayu.

author: Kevin Dharma
text: Nginep disini tenang banget buat istirahat. Kebetulan udh 3 hari 2 malem gak tidur karena long trip dari Malang - Bromo, Lumajang - Tumpak Sewu lanjut ke Banyuwangi - Kawah Ijen. Begitu sampe langsung hibernasi di hotel ini 5 jam tidur.. Hotel bersih pokoknya nyaman lah disini. Next bakal nginep disini lagi kl nginep di BWI... Pertahankan ya kualitasnya . Kekurangan cuma 1 ga bisa nyetel disney hotstar. Cuma oke banget kl buat istirahat..

author: Isabel Diez-Sevilla
text: Amazing hotel! Loved our stay here! The room was really comfortable and super clean. Breakfast is great- lots of variety of Indonesian and Western food and it all tasted very good! The facilities - gym and pool - are very nice as well. Highly recommend staying here if visiting Mount Ijen. The price is very affordable for everything you get at such good quality.

author: Fakhruzi Efransyah
text: Best hotel on banyuwangi i guess, there’s roof top area that you could visit!

author: Donna Liem
text: Kamar enak, bersih, lokasi nyaman. Breakfast enak.

author: Yahya Ade
text: Hotel bintang 4 dengan Lokasi, pemandangan, layanan, keramahan dan fasilitas yang luar biasa. Mantap ☺

author: fendik
title: Exceptional
text: Staff2nya ramah semua, kamar nyaman tp sayang pas cuaca tidak mendukung jadi view mountain jadi view gerimis dan kabut but hotelnya sangat nyaman untuk staycation

author: Arif
title: Hotel Nyaman
text: TOP banget 👍🏻

author: Emi
title: Liburan family
text: Senang bangat nginap disini...kamar bersih,staf ramah next time menginap lagi

Hotel and the facilities are good. Staffs are friendly and helpful. The down side was we had to wait for almost an hour for our sushi roll to come at the Rooftop Lounge. Staff was apologetic and gave us a cake for an apology. Gesture was good but we lost time that could be use for spa treatment. By the time we finished our dinner it was too late for a spa treatment.

author: Risqi A.
text: Kokoon itu tempat buat staycationq paling nyaman di Banyuwangi. Alasannya bersih, staff ramah-ramah, cepet tanggap, makanan enak, paling worth it harga nya dari sekian hotel.

author: Ho
title: Good
text:
The location, beautiful architecture, spacious room, great design of the bathroom.
The only downside is when checking out the FO miscommunicated with housekeeping who checked my room and didn't find 1 tumbler lid and accused me of taking it. When the FO realized his mistake he didn't even apologize and his gesture was still arrogant.

author: Ricky
title: An impressive hotel!
text: One of the best hotels in Banyuwangi!

author: Syarief Indriawan
title: Marvelous hotel and great room
text: Only one complain, it was a leak on the hose of jet washer next to the toilet

author: Lid
title: Almost ok
text: It will be perfect if u have noise blocker, so that the sound of the traffic won’t be heard from the room

author: Imelda Akmal
title: Very nice design hotel and need develop the F&B services
text: Desain hotel yang dirancang oleh arsitek Denny Gondojatmiko Studio Air Putih di Jakarta ini memiliki arsitektur yang bagus sekali untuk kota Banyuwangi. Modern dengan sentuhan lokal. Bangunan bertingkat tinggi dengan interior bernuansa modern etnik yang bagus, menenangkan dan sangat nyaman. Perlu ditingkatkan kualitas F&B terutama di roof top. Pengalaman menunggu lebih dari satu jam untuk satu piring makanan dan coctail terlalu banyak es. Wine tidak tersedia dalam gelas, dan harga overprice. Overall, hotelnya bagus ditunjang desain arsitektur yang keren. Makan pagi menu banyak, rasa sangat biasa, dan personel kurang cekatan. Saya paham hotel ini menarik untuk keluarga. Tetapi akan lebih baik untuk membuat peraturan untuk tidak menggunakan piyama dan sendal jepit ke restauran agar sesuai dengan level hotel yang sangat baik ini.

author: Javaindo Ecotourism
title: Best staycation in Banyuwangi
text: This modern hotel comfortable rooms with modern amenities, a sauna, fitness center, indoor pol and rooftop bar

author: Yuliana Y.
text: Pelayanan yang sangat bagus sekali dan saya merasa sangat nyaman sekali berada di hotel kokoon. Kamarnya bagus, bersih dan nyaman sekali. Top banget deh pokoknya!

author: Yan
title: One of the best hotel I've stayed in
text:
this is new hotel with excellent facilities and cleanliness.
+The bed and linen is great.
+AC is so cold
+water is hot and the pressure is great
+they have rooftop lounge, observation deck, 
+pool and sauna too!
+you will agree with me that the vibe feels like 5 stars hotel vibe
Some details to consider;
-location is a bit far.
-pool is semi outdoor
- staff friendliness can be improved
- meal is expensive

author: Bhimo
text: Id love the hotel ambience, the staff, and also for the room. But for the room is not too soundproof, i still can heard sometime vehicles from outside, and if there is any event in the ballroom even i still can heard the crowd down there clearly from my room ( 7th floor )

author: Ferri
title: Tempat yg sangat baik utk Istirahat
text: Hotel sangat nyaman Dan bersih. Family room sangat ok. Fasilitas sangat lengkap

author: Happy
title: Best hotel
text:
We travel for our honeymoon and stay few different hotels, this is the best hotel we stayed so far. I would like to recommended choose Kokoon everytime you visit Banyuwangi!!! You never disappointed!
Every little details we seen it is take care very well.
Love from Adelaide ❤️

author: Mr.
title: Stunning view hotel only
text: For the price, we were expecting kind of the best hotel in 2nd tier city of Banyuwangi. first impression all were stunning from entrance and lobby all the way to in front of the room. Entering the room, sorry to say it is far below standard for the price, more to 3 star plus hotel  ambient. Luckily the balcony is decent with another stunning view. Swimming pool is the best view facing Bali island with mountains.  Sleeping experience was the worst as there were long praying from midnite till 4 am. Morning vibe very good, Breakfast very good variety with pleasant atmosphere.

All the staff are super kind, they are super helpful, we can borrow an iron for the clothes.
Super recommended for a business trip or vacation.

author: liana
title: Honest review
text: the hotel is comfortable, clean, the rooms are also spacious. the convierge is very nimble. even though I checked in at 9 pm the concierge was still on standby to help bring things to the room. hotel facilities are also very complete. the indoor swimming pool only smells a bit of chlorine which is quite sharp. the gym room is quite complete and there is a room for yoga too. There is also a kids club in this hotel. on the 16th floor there is also a rooftop and a very comfortable bar to relax. if there is a trip to Banyuwangi again, I will definitely stay here

Menu buffet breakfast cukup lengkap,dengan rasa yg sangat baik.
Paling spesial dari kokoon adalah restaurant waitress , mereka sangat ramah,sangat cekatan, helpfull, 👍👍

title: Menikmati suasana senja ketika matahari tenggelam
text: Hotel tertinggi di Banyuwangi, dengan roof top di ketinggian 161 meter di atas permukaan laut. Di sini saya bisa menikmati suasana senja ketika matahari tenggelam, sambil menikmati sajian all-you-can-eat bersama keluarga dan para sahabat di area Rooftop Lounge di harga 75k. Kamar hotelnya tersedia dalam tipe deluxe room, family room dan junior suite dengan harga mulai 700k hingga 1900k, dan 1 kamar spesial dan satu-satunya di hotel ini, yaitu Kokoon Suite di harga 5000k. Sepertinya saya harus kembali menginap di sini untuk berburu matahari terbit juga.

Fasilitas hotel yang lengkap, kolam renang indoor yang di buka hingga jam 10 malam.
Roof top Cafe sambil menikmati pemandangan kota Banyuwangi dan Selat Bali.
Bersebrangan langsung dengan Banyuwangi, Park, dekat dengan kota dan pusat keramaian.

author: Jean
title: Great hotel
text:
We arrived in Kokoon after a trekking tour and were exhausted (and in need of a good clean functioning shower). We got a lovely room at Kokoon on a high floor and it was such a happy moment!. The rooms are modern and has proper flooring (not carpet which i personally dislike)  and great beds. 
The only thing to note is that the toilets do not lock. (sliding door, open concept style). FYI for those for whom this is a dealbreaker. Another thing to note is that the ala carte food here is EXPENSIVE. We had one dinner here and the food was not great. But the bill was a lot. 
Breakfast is FANTASTIC - we stayed at a 5 star hotel in Jogja later on in our trip and Kokoon's breakfast was leaps ahead in quality and variety., 100 % recommend for breakfast!! 
They have an amazing viewing deck on the top floor. Would stay here again for sure, we had a good time.

The indoor pool is cold as ice, the breakfast is kinda expensive for taste and range compared to similar priced hotels $15 for a 12y old is silly. Don't get a small female accident in bed cuz they ll charge you a new sheet. However this place is nice.

Ada kulkas kecil di kamar, tapi tidak dingin. Naruh minuman disitu semalaman, tidak menjadi dingin. Kulkas jadi aeperti lemari kecil biasa.
