author: Nanang Widyanarko
text: Update 03 Mar 23: Thanks to Kokoon for responding my feedback promptly. The porridge bowl has been upgraded to the more convenient size. And during my morning gym activity, within an hour the staff frequently checks the towel and water. Nice work. Newest four-star hotel in Banyuwangi.  It offers a warm ambience with a combination of wooden and rattan furnitures. Nice rice field and mountain view lays behind the hotel, within short walking distance to get into the field. They have nice and spacious outdoor and indoor seating areas. The Fitness Centre has three treadmills an a class area completed with yoga mat. There’s also small indoor swimming pool. Overall you’ll get what you can expect from a four-star hotel. And like other newly built hotels, you’ll find tons of power outlets in the room. What needs to improve (that’s why it lacks one star from me): Response. On my first day using the gym, the water dispenser was empty, while the gym was fully occupied. It takes nearly one hour to get the water refilled. Soup bowl. As you can see in the pic, the soup and porridge bowl is too small! You’ll have to be careful when pouring the soup or porridge,  otherwise it will spill onto your hand. One scoop of if and the bowl is already full, leaving no room for the condiments. Towel: Below average, relatively small, thin, and doesn’t absorb moist well. A bit more effort to get the wet out of your body.

author: krisno
title: Best hotel in `banyuwangi
text: clean, friendly staff good location and amazing nature view

author: Rudhi
title: Hotel mewah tapi jauh dari pelabuhan
text:
Hotel ini bisa dipilih jika ingin ke banyuwangi melalui rute jalur selatan. Tapi kalau melalui rute jalur utara, malah jadi lebih jauh. Dari hotel ke pelabuhan bisa menempuh waktu paling cepat 30 menit. 
Hotelnya terlihat mewah dan bersih, walaupun menu sarapannya biasa saja.

author: rahmadimd
title: Excellent
text: You win what you paid. You get what you need. This is a feeling when we stayed in this 4 star hotel for one day in a family room yesterday. This is a modern and new hotel in Banyuwangi I think and located in a main road. Staffs were super friendly and accommodated. Check in check out was fast. Room was big and spacious, modern, clean and tidy with super comfy of bed and linen. Bathroom was modern with good water pressure and very clean and good smelling towel. Breakfast was superb and tasted good  with many variety of indonesian cuisine and bakery. For the price given we gave 2 thumbs up and enjoyed our stay in this hotel.

author: Hana
title: Rekomended banyuwangi hotel untuk santai
text: Hotelnya bagus dan bersih.Begitu masuk hotel wangi serehnya bikin rilex setelah cape di perjalanan.Kamarnya bersih dan homey.Suasana hotel enak dan nyaman banget.Fasilitas bagus banget, kolam renangnya indoor,suka banget sama cafenya tmptnya cozy and chill banget.Kita family dan anak2 enjoy dan hepi selama staycation disana.Hanya lokasinya agak jauh saja dari tengah kota dan harga makanan cukup pricey.But overall suka semua dan makanan pun enak.

Staff were very friendly and helpful. Stayed for 2 nights and I have enjoyed it.

Highly recommend for anyone who comes by Banyuwangi.

Great hotel choice in Banyuwangi

author: kak made
text: Superb-class hotel in Banyuwangi. Spent one night with family in January 2023 and definitely would love to come back. Thanks to their warm-hearted reception staff that asked and gave us connecting room at 6th floor directly (forgot his name, my bad). Everything went perfect and beyond our expectation. Helpful security, smiley receptionists, well-trained staffs, best chefs, extraordinary garden crews, and top-notch interior design! They serve incredible breakfast selection, taste like no others! Mie Aceh was my favorite dish, salad and its condiments were great tho. Love their lemongrass scent on the elevator (and the cultural illustration image). It's spotlessly clean; from the basement to the rooftop bar. Kokoon Hotel deserves a place in our heart. Thank you for all efforts. Salam dari Bali.

Service très professionnel et au top, nourriture variée et excellente au dîner comme au petit déjeuner, grande chambre très bien équipée, un hôtel de très bon standing.

author: Mikhael
title: Not so good this time
text:
We stayed for 2 nights at separate date during our trip to Bali. During pandemic we always trabel to Bali by car and always book Kokoon when transitting in Banyuwangi.

We love the property, its grand, homey, clean, comfortable and has great view (choose mountain view room). 
But this time we are dissaponted with these o  our way back from Bali :
1. Check in. We arrived at 3 pm, we book 6 rooms and only 2 rooms avail. They’re able to put at the same floor but it takes another hour until room are ready.
2. Charge for pillow. I ask for extra pillow in my room, i travel with 3 kids and just need 1 extra pillow. They charge 30.000 for this pillow. From 6 room i only ask for 1 pillow and they charge the money. 
During check out i mention to reception officer about this, as loyal visitor i feel dissapointed with this strict and rigid policy. 
3. During afternoon swimming there are no officer present, they event doesn provide towel.

Always give 4-5 review on my previous review but this time i dissapointed with their service.

author: Oemar Ahmad
text: The hotel is amazing, located a little further south of the city (about 7 km) it escapes the hustle and bustle of Ketapang ferry crossing. It has a stunning front garden and a beautiful grand lobby. If you stay here, make sure you get a room with breakfast. The food is wonderful, and you have a decent large of choice of mostly asian and local cuisine. The bread station has lots of choices (try bread with Sarikaya spread) and to top it off, there is plenty of cakes and sweet options. Choice of indoor or terrace seats, I would personally recommend the terrace seating where you will be entertained by the grand view of the mountains.

author: BillyGabriel
title: modern and clean, perfect for business or leisure
text:
we stayed one night here before continuing our trip to Surabaya.
we drove from Bali for 5 hours and then took the ferry to cross the Bali strait, so this hotel was our transit hotel.
we booked the junior suite room, located on the 15th floor, just below the roof top restaurant. the room has spacious living room, however it only have 1 TV. the bathroom is spacious however the hotel management may perhaps consider putting blur stickers on the toilet and shower glass windows not only doors.
since we were too tired, we decided to dine in for the dinner. fortunately they offered BBQ buffet on the roof top bar with very reasonable price. the meats and seafood were juicy and tasted good.
Breakfast was served on the 3rd floor and has many options from western to local delicacies.
The Junior Suite has a small balcony,  however for safety reason they locked it. Key to the balcony is available upon request and guests would be asked to sign a safety consent.

author: Elrika
title: Exceeded our expectation!
text: We knew the hotel is fairly new, but a lot of new hotels are already run down by year 2. This one is an exception. It is exceptionally clean and still maintain its built quality. You can see that they do not use cheap materials to build the hotel. The rooms are large with amazing mountains and paddies view. The bathroom is uniquely designed with rolling doors.  Check-in and check-out was smooth and fast. The staff are all very well-trained and friendly. Breakfast has a lot of variation and all tasted very nice. I dont have anything bad to say about them, except maybe for a very minor thing: their towels smelled weird... probably from their drier.  But other than that, two thumbs up for Kokoon!! Will definitely stay here again when we're in Banyuwangi.

author: Rob T
title: an oasis of serenity
text:
I always choose to stay at the Kokoon Hotel when I am in Banyuwangi. From the moment you enter the airconditioned entrance foyer with the calming lemongrass scent, you experience complete serenity. 
After settling into my room, I usually head to the rooftop bar for a refreshing cool drink and catch up with the excellent staff, then later retreat for a relaxing massage to remove any residual travel stress. The food is excellent, the beers are cold, and the staff are fantastic.

This is not my first visit to banyuwangi, and lately i prefer Kokoon Hotel for a place to stay.
The first reason is because of the amazing view from the 10th floor and the rooftop.
The second reason, is that the breakfast menu is very diverse, and always presents a wide selection of traditional menus. Being here makes you feel homesick for childhood cooking.
Third, friendly and fast service, as well as professionalism from the hotel staff.
Fourth, large rooms and Fifth, close proximity to the airport.

title: Exceptional
text: Nous avons séjourné au Kokoon Hôtel pendant 4 jours. Après avoir traversé Java d’Est en Ouest, nous avions besoin de nous poser avant de rejoindre Bali. Le Kokoon Hôtel était le lieu idéal pour cela. Des chambres magnifiques, très propres, très bien équipées avec une très belle vue. Des repas variés et délicieux. Une superbe piscine, un spa, une salle de sport et un agréable rooftop…bref un petit paradis de détente. Et surtout un personnel très attentionné avec toujours le sourire ! Merci à l’ensemble de l’équipe.

author: Joseph Liem
text: It's a rather new Hotel and well maintained one despite covid-19. Service was friendly and steadfast. Breakfast is decent, better than most 3/4🌟 Room was clean and comfortable . However, maybe sound Proofing may be improved for the room with the main road view. Facilities, okay and complete, however the pool was too cold, it's uncomfortable to swim in, I quickly dried myself only after several laps.

author: br14n 1m4g3s
text: Hotel tertinggi di Banyuwangi, dengan roof top di ketinggian 161 meter di atas permukaan laut. Di sini saya bisa menikmati suasana senja ketika matahari tenggelam, sambil menikmati sajian all-you-can-eat bersama keluarga dan para sahabat di area Rooftop Lounge di harga 75k. Kamar hotelnya tersedia dalam tipe deluxe room, family room dan junior suite dengan harga mulai 700k hingga 1900k, dan 1 kamar spesial dan satu-satunya di hotel ini, yaitu Kokoon Suite di harga 5000k. Sepertinya saya harus kembali menginap di sini untuk berburu matahari terbit juga.

Ada live music di weekend . Sajian buffet nya beragam dan menurut lidah saya semuanya enak . Dengan rate mulai kisaran 700 rb sampe 5 jt .

Tukang parkirnya kurang komunikatif, mobilku pas masuk sampe harus muter-muter karna tukang parkirnya ngga kasih info masuk ke sebelah mana. author: Bambang Soetanto
text: Salah satu hotel berkualitas di Banyuwangi Hari ini sempat ada pemadaman listrik beberapa menit. Ukuran kamar standard TV menggunakan ukuran besar sekitar 40" Pelayanan ramah Untuk makanan pembelian ojol bisa dititipkan di resepsionis. Cafe di lantai 3 dan 16 TIPS : Untuk cafe lantai 3 rasa makanan kurang enak harga agak mahal sekitar 400rb untuk 3 porsi dan ayamnya agak alot. Coba sendiri deh. bumbunya hambar, AYAMnya ALOT...untuk yang transit di Banyuwangi mungkin Bisa dibarengi GoFood karena masih buka sampai jam 11, tidak seperti di Bali yang tutup sekitar jam 7/8 malam. Cafe lantai 16 tersedia PS3 dan set driving lengkap Untuk sabtu minggu ada BBQ sampai jam 10 malam saja. Gym dan lift bisa diakses menggunakan room card. Ada swimming pool, untuk ruangan kids corner sangat kecil.muat sekitar 1 keluarga saja Summary : Nice hotel, arsitektur modern. Fasilitas lengkap, tapi masih bisa ditingkatkan.

About the food.. its quite expensive and it took quite a long time for the food&drinks to come(30 minutes just for ice tea🙂). The price are expensive and the taste are so-so. The staff are nice tho.

author: Stef Andre
text: Kami stayed di Family Room & very impressed dengan luas kamar & 2 king beds. View juga sangat indah. Kami dinner di hotel & sangat puas dengan rasa, harga, & service. Breakfast juga cukup enjoyable tapi masih bisa di improve, terutama untuk kopi yang menggunakan dispenser Nescafe. Sayangnya lokasi cukup jauh dari pelabuhan Ketapang & juga ke arah Probolinggo untuk road trip. Opsi makanan di luar hotel juga terbatas dibandingkan hotel sekelas di Banyuwangi. We enjoyed our stay & will return whenever we transit in Banyuwangi again.

author: Lenny Wen
text: Place: dekat jalan raya, mudah dicapai. Hotelnya nyaman, model industrial minimalis mixed with a little bit of ecletic 👍👍👍👍  Ambience: Kami mendapatkan kamar dengan view sawah, gunung Ijen dan rumah penduduk. Nyaman dan segar banget pagi2 melihat kehidupan sekitar 😍😍😍 F&B: Masih perlu ditingkatkan lagi. Untuk menu in room dining, sambal nasi tempongnya kurang sedap, sayur lalapnya masih keras (bayamnya). Makanan untuk breakfast all you can eat, beberapa menu masih belum stabil rasanya, kadang terlalu asin, kadang kurang bumbu. Yang enak: sup pho vietnam, soto ayam, cookiesnya. Facility: Bagus 👍👍👍👍👍 Lengkap ada pool, sauna, gym, deck 360° tempat melihat pemandangan kota Kebersihan: Sedikit perlu lebih ditingkatkan lagi 👍👍👍👍👍 Staff: ramah, sopan dan menyenangkan. Memperhatikan protokol kesehatan, tidak boleh melepas masker di area breakfast, kecuali saat makan. Customer diberikan sarung tangan untuk mengambil makanan. Keep up the good work yaaa 👍👍👍👍👍👍

author: Timm Junoesky
text: This property will surely gain some excellent reputation over the next few years. Even the baseline deluxe room is surprisingly very spacious, built with nice materials. Really loved the wellness (gym, swimming pool) floor that somehow feels straight out of a 5-star hotel (gives you that tranquil vibe). One could only wish that the building would blend a little more with the river next to it and make use of the nice leafy atmosphere on that side.

text: Hotel baru 2 tahun, interiornya bagus, proses cek in cukup cepat, kamar luas, kamar mandi bersih dan nyaman. Semua serba modern. Di rooftop ada cafe dan tempat bermain. Anak2 sangat senang bermain disana. Ada kolam renang semi indoor, kamar mandi nya juga ada sauna.. makanan cukup enak

author: afandi ahmad
text: This hotel is Clean and comfort place for enjoy the holiday or staycation. They have Delicious and many variant of food for breakfast. We got nice and beautiful view of Ijen Mountain and paddy field at the reastaurant. From th rooftop (open 24 hours), We could see Banyuwangi City as well as  the "sunrise of Java" 🌅. When we checked in, we could choose the room wheter we want to have mountain or Bali Strait. This hotel also near from main city of Banyuwangi. Score for the hotel is 10/10 Enjoy Banyuwangi

title: Fantastic and relaxing stay.
text: I throughly enjoyed staying at Dialoog, this is my second time staying at the hotel. The hotel facility is great, very well maintained and the staff are super friendly.  I stayed in the Sea view suit which has amazing view.

author: Ossa Anna
text: Nice hotel.. Kamar bersih dengan fasilitas lengkap dan dari balkon bisa liat view kota Banyuwangi, tapi di balkon gak ada kursi buat duduk santai. Breakfast delicious apalagi sosisnya wuih sedap..

author: NINA KORDA
text: Hotel ini ok banget lho walau kena badai covid tp masih terpelihara dengan baik. Kebersihan keramahan stafnya perhatian, baik deh pokoknya. Profesional jg pelayanannya. Rekomen y…. Pas kmi bermalam anak sy ulang tahun, dikasih surprise taart ultah dr bbrp stafnya dtg gitu ke kamar. Wah luar biasa y perhatian banget. Puas n mau balik lagi klo pas k banyuwangi

author: Puji Retno Hardiningtyas
text: Nyaman, bersih, kamar luas, harga terjangkau, dan ada kopi satu hati yang dibuat langsung, lobi luas, depan lobi juga nyaman, dan pelayanan sangat baik. Di depan hotel Kokoon ada restoran Balesaji yang enak, mewah, dan harga terjangkau. Di samping kanan hotel, ada Kemunir menyediakan aneka kopi yang digiling setelah pemesanan.

author: j rosana
text: sudah pernah menginap di beberapa hotel di banyuwangi dalam rangka hari raya nyepi. kali ini saya menginap di kokoon hotel dari tanggal 1 sampai 5 maret 2022. kokoon hotel menurut saya lebih unggul di fasilitas selain harga yang mungkin lebih tinggi dibanding hotel lain di bwi.  swimming pool, gym, tempat yoga, dan locker apik tertata. rooftop bar meskipun mungil namun asyik untuk menghabiskan senja. breakfast lumayan bervariasi. housekeeping oke kerjanya 👍🏻

author: Diah Zeamaesa
text: Kamarnya bagus, bersih, lengkap untuk hotel seharga kokoon. Anw saya akan mampir lagi ke kokoon kalau ke banyuwangi, karena makanan disana enak banget. Harus banget pesen kamar with breakfast, karena gak akan nyesel. Semua menu yang disiapkan enak banget :"). Semua staff ramah dan makanannya sering direfill jadi fresh. Thankyou kokoon

author: Heru purwantoro
text: Nice...

author: Sugeng Khoirul Arifin
text: Nice place

author: David Samuel
text: Their indonesian foods are superbs! The best among hotels I've been so far. Rich in spices, and tasty, which rarely found at other international chain hotels that consider westerner's palate. A bit far from ketapang compared to other alternatives, but worth the visit

Ruang ganti juga digunakan sekeluarga rombongan tanpa melihat gender. Sangat disayangkan tamu tidak peduli kenyamanan tamu lain.

author: Kar Tika
text: Kali ini Mengunjungi Kota Transit Banyuwangi..😍😍 dan menginap di Hotel Fav. KOKOON HOTEL.. Begitu Masuk ke Hotel kita akan disambit dg Ramah oleh staff Hotel,  dan diantar ke Kamar yg sangat bersih dan rapi..semua kamar sangat Steril..bersih dan keren..😍😍 karena View Hotelnya begitu kita buka jendela adalah Gunung-gunung yang cantik..klau menginap di hotel ini, kita tidak perlu bawa Sandal buat santai..sandalnya lucu dan nyaman dipakai..untuk keperluan mandinya..juga tidak perlu bawa-bawa shampho, sabun dan sikat gigi dan sabu..semuanya lengkap..I love it..❤❤ Paginya kita disiapkan Break Fast di lantai 3.. Semua Menunya Enak..hanya sayangnya..Pas di Roti Bakar..saya tidak menemukan Selai Strowberry..krn itu Selai Fav..saya..😅😅 klau begini..next time bawa selai sendiri dech..😁😁 selesai sarapan..mumpung masih pagi Naik ke lt 16 untuk melihat Banyuwangi dari lt 16..seruuuu banget..Terimakasih sudah membuat merinding..di lt 16, tapi saya harus ambil photo-photo dulu..biar ada bukti sudah menikmati Hotel terbaik yang ada di Banyuwangi..😅😅🙏🙏.

Padahal anak saya gak makan krn harus ikut turun ke resto karna saya dan suami mau sahur dan di kamar gak ada org... Bner2 gak nyaman dengan terlalu bnyak perhitungan bgitu...

author: Frank Schellbach
text: Hotel is alright cause it’s still new BUT - beware of multiple mosques around it so it gets very noisy - their restaurant charges 75k++ for a small bintang, soups start from 70k++. Their restaurant is more expensive than any other place in the city (including the more fancy Dialoog hotel!) UPDATE: went for our first breakfast at Kokoon, doing my round at the buffet and most things to my likings were not even bothered about being refilled: Jambu juice, infused water, orange juice, fruit bowls and salad bar were all empty. Coffee machine was broken too so I had to chase them getting me a coffee arranged from wherever.

author: Dewi Poltekpel Sby
text: Kliatan mewah dr luar tp kmrnya sdkit 'B' saja mnrt saya tp fasiltasny cukup lengkap

author: yani arifin
text: Hotelnya bagus, kamar bersih nyaman.. viewnya juga bagus.. sayang aja pelayanan kurang. Mungkin karena lebaran yaa karyawan banyak yg libur.. jd pelayan terlambat banget. Harusnya check in jam 14.00 tapi kita baru bisa masuk kamar jam 16.00. Alasan pertama karena banyak pengunjung yg telat check out.. dan akhirnya mereka beralasan karena linen yg kurang masih di londry.. entahlaah apalaah.. harusnya hotel sekelas ini sistem bisa lbh bagus yaa... dihari2 libur besae gini pastinya banyak org berlibur apalagi udah pesen kamar jauh2 hari.. kan bisa prediksi kebutuha  apa saja yg diperlukan.. jd pelanggan ga sampe kecewa harus menunggu lama 2 jam.. kasian juga karyawan yg di FO harus diomel2in org banyak.. pdhal kesalahan di sistem.

author: Young Jang (Serendipity)
text: Clean and kindly staff

author: Muhamad Rizki Purnomo
text: Tempatnya srategis dan bangunannya bagus banget banyak spot fotonya

author: Ari Wibowo
text: Pelayanan perlu ditingkatkan, karena kamar baru siap jam 4 sore. Kondisi kamar bagus, bersih, dingin

author: Yehezkiel Pratama
text: Lokasi agak jauh dari tengah kota

author: Darsono Tan
text: We stayed here 2 times, and the services are good!  We order two rooms and get a connected room, wifi also fast and stable.  When our trip need a PCR test, the hotel also can arrange for a room test, so we dont need to go out. Convience parking in the basement for car. They also have a bar on the rooftop that open till late midnight and have a view to the city. The hotel has a restaurant which let you order local banyuwangi food, i.e Nasi Tempong. If you get bore, in front of the hotel there is big Indonesia restaurant, i.e. BALISAJI.

author: Mugi Sembada
text: Love this place. Everything is perfect.

author: nathania devina Godjali
text: I booked the family room, for four people. It is spacious and really clean. Love it

author: Santos Frrl
text: Hotelnya keren, semua masih kelihatan bagus karena tergolong hotel baru. Kamarnya lumayan gede. Kebetulan saya stay di deluxe room. Paling gede diantara pesaing sejenis di Banyuwangi. Makanan enak, breakfast oke. View mantab. Cuma ad kelemahan sdikit waktu sy datang. Hotel segede itu tidak ada Doorman atau penyambut tamu di depan. Baru masuk para wanita front office kurang welcome, tidak ad greeting semenjak mereka melihat kita datang. Gesture, dan mimik wajah yang kurang friendly. Semoga bisa ditingkatkan lagi front liner nya. Eman property, fasilitas bagus kalau ada keek disitu. Karena itu kesan pertama tamu. Kebetulan kami baru nginep di seberang jalanya. Jadi bisa bikin perbandingan. Sukses kokoon Hotel BWI

author: mar'ie Muhamad
text: Best hotel at banyuwangi... clean room, good staff services, love the breakfast, and nice building concept. for sure will come back again every visit banyuwangi... best !

author: Suka Jalan
text: Kamar baik. View bagus walau tanpa balkon. Kolam renang pengap dan agak kotor. Pelayanan baik, hanya saja waktu breakfast ada tamu (yg tanpa masker) mengoles roti di depan tempat roti dan butter (cukup lama hampir 5 menitan) dan tidak ada satupun staff yg menegur tamu tanpa masker ini, yang ada malah di ajak ngobrol   jadi bisa dibayangkan dropletnya kemana2 padahal di depannya itu ada roti dan butter yang terbuka tanpa tutup sama sekali.  Aneh juga di suruh pakai sarung tangan untuk mengambil makanan, tapi tanpa masker. Pihak hotel harus lebih tegas soal prokes supaya sama-sama saling menjaga selama pandemi ini.

author: David Ariyanto
text: Muantappp

author: Fathur Rochim

author: Its Me
text: Haloo Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi. Saya begitu tertarik membaca ulasan tentang hotel Anda yang katanya service memuaskan, TAPI sayang sekali ketika saya menelpon untuk bertanya "apakah ada mobil dari hotel yang bisa menjemput tamu ke stasiun ?" (karena saya berencana datang naik kereta) jawabannya muter2 tidak jelas 🙃 . Dari saya ditanya tanggal, sudah kasi, masih disuruh menghubungi nomer WA lain. Resepsionis Anda / siapapun yang menjawab di telpon tinggal mengatakan : ada / tidak. Se simple itu 🙂 . Jika memang ADA dan saya diminta menghubungi nomer WA lainnya entah siapa, saya bersedia. Karena sudah jelas jawabannya. Anda harus memperbaiki lagi pelayanannya. Supaya tidak percuma review baik yang diberikan customer kepada hotel Anda.

author: RUMAH BATIK
text: Ok banget

author: Nurilmi Auliya
text: Sukaa bget nginap d sini, orangnya ramah, tempatnya luas, pemandangannya bagus bgt, nginap disini dpt pemandangan sawah, breakfastnya banyak menu dan enak. Untuk kamarnya luas banget dan lengkap ada hairdryer.

author: Echi Mitasari
text: Buat orang yg suka gemerlap lampu malam hari, bermalam disini sangat pas karena view malam hari kota Banyuwangi bisa dilihat dr rooftop lantai 16, nice banget. View dari dalam kamar bisa pilih view gunung ijen, sawah dan rumah penduduk (bisa juga lihat kereta api lewat dari sisi ini) atau bisa juga request view selat Bali (bisa lihat sunrise). Makanan enak, kl lagi puasa bisa request breakfast nya diantar saat waktu sahur, asal konfirmasi dulu ya. Kl sedang tdk puasa, makanan utk breakfast bervariasi dan di refill setiap saat, resto bisa indoor dan out door dg view gunung ijen dan sawah. Gym, kolam renang dan sauna free masuk ke fasilitas kamar yg bisa digunakan mulai jam 6 pagi sampai 9 malam. Kolam renang nya semi indoor jd meski hujan tetep bisa renang donk. Kamar dan semua fasilitas bersih, modern, mewah dan bikin nyaman. Kl ke banyuwangi wajib coba bermalam disini

author: Novi Ayu P

author: isna hanifah
text: Saya booking via telpon. Respon nya cepat dan pelayanan nya ramah. Hotel nya best laaah. Resepsionis pakai pakaian daerah banyuwangi. Dari mau masuk lobby udah keren. Suasana kamar ini kayak bintang 5. Kamar saya menghadap pulau bali. Ada rooftop nya, saya ga berani foto foto karena tegang,tinggi sekali. Padahal bisa jadi spot bagus untuk berburu sunrise. Saya ga sempat breakfast, karena subuh langsung ke bali, nyebrang dengan kapal. Nah lokasi hotel dengan pelabuhan itu 30 menit, dekat. Jadi aman, tidak rusuh atau khawatir telat. Next kalau saya ke banyuwangi, untuk ke ijen atau ke bali, saya pasti ke hotel ini lagi. Dan menikmati sunrise dari rooftop .

Saya akan mikir 2x mau kesini. Karena ini pertama kalinya saya coba kokoon. Sangat jauh dr baik,dibanding hotel yang lain.

text: Hotel dengan lokasi strategis di kota Banyuwangi. Hotelnya mewah, kamar luas, bersih dan estetik. Layanan bagus. Recommended

author: Tanto Wijaya
text: Pengalaman menginap dengan Kepuasan luar biasa.Kamar ,layanan dan Breakfast yg luar biasa.Bintang 5++ untuk Hotel Kokoon.

author: paffieshop grosir
text: Untuk proses check in sedikit agak lama Tidak ada welcome drink juga untuk turis yang jauh2 ke banyuwangi 5 6 jam d perjalanan Kamarnya bersih Ranjangnya enak sesuai harga Untuk breakfastnya kurang variasi makanannya Kita 3 hari 2 malam nginap di sini Juga cobain nasi tempong di rooftop barnya enak sekali sama hot ginger nya sambil liat pemandangan malam kota banyuwangi dari atas Overal recommended Bakal balik lagi kalau ke banyuwangi

author: Intan Setya
text: Good hotel

author: wahyu hidayat
text: bagus...senang sekali menginap.disini

author: ndez only
text: Gak nginep sih, hanya ketemu tamu di lobi dekat receptionist... Sekilas hotelnya sih bagus, parkir di bawah cukup luas, lokasi strategis

author: Firmansyah Adhitya
text: Kamarnya luas dan nyaman sekali untuk bermalam. Selain itu untuk breakfast hotel menyajikan banyak sekali pilihan makanan dan minuman. Buat yg ingin berkunjung ke Banyuwangi tapi bingung mencari tempat bermalam, Hotel Kokoon boleh masuk dalam list pertimbangannya anda hehe 😁😁 Food & drinks: Pilihan makanan dan minuman untuk breakfast nya banyak mulai dari citarasa lokal sampai internasional.

author: Anis Kusuma040
text: Pertama x kesini, pelayanannya ok, staf2 nya ramah2, kamarnya juga brsih, view jga bagus(tergantung pesanan kamar nya ). Saya dapat dilantai 10 yg ada balkon nya(sesuai pilihan saya), view laut.. Free sarapan, menunya banyak pilihan. Dan tentunya citarasa lumayan ok, area parkir  lumayan(g luas sekali /kecil sekali). Salut dg pelayanan nya❤bikin g mau pulang😄😁 Semoga kedepannya mnjadi lebih baik lagi

author: SATU SHINE OM
text: 좋은 .친절한 . 깨끗한 호텔

author: FLAFLO TV
text: Mantab

author: Ida Bagus Wyasa Putra
text: Comfortable, clean, modern architecture and furniture, excellent food for breakfast, genuine services hospitality for the restaurant, but poor for the front office.

author: Arief Rizki Ramadhan, S.H.
text: Tidak pernah menginap, cuma mampir sebentar, ruang tunggu bagus

author: Risqi Nurwahyudi
text: One of the best hotel at Banyuwangi. Bagi yang suka suasana hotel yang unik tapi tetap modern, hotel ini bisa menjadi salah satu pilihan. Desain interior dan exterior nya adalah salah satu yang terbaik. Saya cukup terkesan dengan hotel ini. Kamarnya sangat bersih nyaman. Desain kamar mandinya saya sangat suka. Dinding pemisah nya bisa di buka dan di geser2 sehingga menciptakan kesan lapang di dalam kamar. Fasilitas yang disediakan juga cukup lengkap. Cocok bagi yang mau staycation. Menu breakfast banyak pilihan dan enak2. Lokasi hotel juga sangat mudah dijangkau karena ada di jalan poros Banyuwangi.

author: Dedy Pratama
text: Lingkungannya nyaman

author: Ibnu Kuswantoro
text: Baguusss

author: Ruby Sparks
text: Very worth the price! Clean, spacious and everything seems to be new and well maintained. Staffs are friendly. Delicious breakfast. I dont have any complain about this place!

author: 420 id
text: Actually its a great hotel,  but i dont like the bathroom setup if you stay there with colleagues or friend.  The wooden partition feels too 'thin'.  😊.  Should be no problem if you stay alone.  The gym can be improved,  the pool is great and also sauna. 👍 The breakfast is good too. The best location if you need to catch an early flight from banyuwangi Airport.  It tooks only 15-20 minutes from hotel to airport,  you can use hotel tranport for the best experience.

author: Andryas
text: Hotel Modern di tengah2 perkampungan, bisa liat pemandangan indah dari atas,.

author: raden R
text: kesan hotel bersih dan semoga bisa dipertahankan. Tersedia VIT sebagai air minum - free tersedia di setiap room.

author: ANDI YNCI (BONCEL)
text: Good👍👍👍👍👍 masehhh

author: apri.sedyo purnomo
text: Hotel yg bagus dengan pelayanan yg bagus

author: imam septana Aryanto
text: Cozy.. mantap lah

author: Fitriawati
text: Staycation di sini pekan lalu. Dapat room di lt 10 dg view gunung (plus sawah dan permukiman). Proses check in cepat dan tanpa deposit. Kamarnya nyaman bersih, interior designnya juga bagus. Amenities cukup lengkap, tp ga sampai ada setrika, sajadah dan alat jahit ya hehe. Menu breakfast variatif dan enak! Kalo malem tinggal nyebrang ke balesaji wkwk. Pagi sore nongkrong di rooftop mumpung sepi krn weekday. Pool nya aja yg agak pengap. Thankyou kokoon!

author: Rizky Bowo
text: Di luar expetasi, ga berap lebih dengan hotel kokoon ini setelah liat rivew-rivew nya ternyata sesampainya luar biasa Saran saya ambil yg ada balcon bagus banget view nya & request view pulau Bali/jalan raya Ga sempet foto foto saking nyaman nya enak di mata jadi lupa 🤣 hotel terbaik se Jawa timur versi saya! Saya tidak menemukan kekurangan yg berarti di hotel ini Minus nya hanya saya menjumpai kecoa di balkon🤣 tapi untung ga di dalam kamar! Lokasi nya jauh dari pusat kota klo mau order online sulit sekali dapat Drive nya Di sekitar hotel tidak ada kulineran sepi di depan juga , kamar nya kurang kedap suara karena suara kendaraan jalan raya terdengar,, Good job breakfast nya! -irisan buah nya aja terasa ga segar dan ga manis di tambah lagi cara motong motong tidak rapi Soal rasa makanan yg lain sangat baik! Tanpa deposit Lift mengunakan akses Bahkan fasilitas toilet di pool pun pakai akses card dan fasilitas gym pun mengunakan akses card , tapi boleh kok minta 2 kunci kartu biar ga ribet klo kita cek in ber 2 atau dengan keluarga

author: Tatang SP
text: Alhamdulillah suip tenan

author: Erik Purnama Putra
text: Sarapan pagi...

author: Henu Jaya
text: Sejuk, indah dan aman

author: Alin Ayani
text: Bagus tapi

author: Vania Hugeng
text: Kamar nya luas, nyaman, dan bersih..pelayanan juga cukup baik..sayangnya gak sempet nyoba breakfastnya..lokasi di jalan besar dan parkir kendaraan mudah..ada gym, kolam renang, dan di lantai atas ada resto nya

author: Mustika Bahanan
text: Tempatnya bagus, kamarnya pun nyaman sekali. Pelayanan resepsionis pas aku check in agak kurang sih ( mungkin karena aku check in kepagian ). Cuma pas check out pelayanannya udah oke. Breakfastnya beraneka ragam seperti hotel bintang pada umumnya. Pelayanan di restaurantnya kukasih nilai sempurna, pada ramah2 bangetttt. Jadi enak suasana breakfast kalo gitu 😁 Untuk kolam renang disini indoor, berasa private pool kalo lagi sepi gda  orang, nyaman bgt ditambah ada ruang locker terpisah laki perempuan. Di rooftopnya ada bar n lounge. Karena ini hotel tertinggi dibanyuwangi, kita bisa lihat kota banyuwangi dari rooftop ini. Tempatnya nyaman.

author: Lucius Dinto Pramudyo
text: Like every detail of the hotel. It is close to the airport too.

author: Ryn Junico
text: Masih Hotel yang termasuk terbaik di Banyuwangi, vibes nya ok banget, kamar luas dan tempat tidur sangat nyaman, menu breakfast beragam dan enak, internet wifi speed nya sangat bagus jadi mendukung buat kerja.

author: wiyuda ari sandi
text: Nyaman

author: ali nurchamid
text: Kamar luas dan nyaman, deket bandara

author: Umi yuniarti
text: The hotel is new at least..The hotel with the tallest building in banyuwangi,I can see the view of sea side from our room window..they have roof top bar...just perfect for short stay in banyuwangi City

author: Prijono Tjakranegara
text: It's a new hotel. Good location, good environment, good staffs, room is very clean, bathroom is excellent. Value for money. Highly recommended

author: Mas Prana
text: Good

author: Yudi Margono
text: The room is quite spacious, the breakfast has many variations, the rooftop can see the mountains.

author: Agustina Iryanti
text: Hotel paling bagus, mau ke bandara Blimbingsari dekat, viewnya bagus, vibesnya keren... 👍👍👍👍

author: Laili R.
text: Kamar standart, kasur bantal empuk, ada kulkas mini. Kamar mandi unik (bisa full terbuka, bisa tidak). Ruang meeting juga bagus, luas. View dari kamar hotel (menghadap jalan raya) sangat bagus, bisa melihat pesisir pantai. Lokasi ruang meeting bersebelahan dengan lobby sehingga sangat mudah menemukan lokasinya. Sepertinya kekurangannya hanya di bidetnya saja yg terlalu lemah :)

author: muhamad ali fauzi
text: Hotelnya nyaman dan pelayanan bagus

author: Jemi Hijaya
text: Tetap menyenangkan👍🏻👍🏻👍🏻

author: erni coandy
text: 5 Oct 22 Hotelnya cakep mewah, fasilitas dan pelayanan ok. Di lantai 2 ada kolam renang dan toilet umum utk bilas, mandi ataupun sauna (ada di masing2 toilet cew/cow). Sebaiknya nyalakan dl sebelum renang, krn tipe sauna portable yg dinyalakan sebelum sauna (ada timernya). Kamarnya antik utk desain toiletnya, cakep 😁 saya suka, lain drpd yg lain. Di lantai atas rooftopnya ada resto dan area bermain game mobil gratis dan beberapa game lainnya. Suasannya kalau malam sexy2 gmn gt 😅 sempet liat menunya, utk 5 pcs sushi 75k. Di hotel ini dapat BF, dan menunya cukup lengkap dan rasanya ok. Pelayanannya mantap (yg melayani Merry). Ada salad bar, dan slice keju dan beef. 3 macam Sereal dan milk. Kue2 kecil, puding. Nasi, mie, ayam, ikan, soto, bubur dll.

author: Mohamad Imron
text: Kokoon hotel..salah satu bintang di bwi yg masih mencari pasar customer.. Tentu masyarakat menengah atas yg akan menjadi customernya.. Sebagai hotel bintang harus selalu evaluasi dan koreksi terkait servis dan fasilitas yg disajikan.. Hari ini saya berknjung di top roof untuk mencoba makan... Sayang makanan kurang pas/ cocok , dan pelayanan terkesan lambat... Semoga KOKOON bisa exis dan maju di bwi...

author: sandra lukardi
text: My 1st experience is fantastic. During the covid season this hotel gave me a very nice experience,the room is clean, cozy, i had pleasant time. My 2nd experience is also ok but the room is smell with cigarettes. Its non smoking room but still.. The breakfast is superb. All the food is tasty, i enjoyed so much. U should try onde², yummy

author: Mr. Shofwan
text: Good lah.. cuma agak pelit sedikit.. tidak ada loyality thp pemandu wisata yg membawa tamu ke hotel ini.. padahal secangkir kopi gratis sdh sangat menyenangkan bagi kami sbg pekerja lapangan saat menunggu tamu cek out.. 😁🙏

author: Irham Wong Jowo
text: Bagi traveler yg mau liburan ke Banyuwangi bolehlah singgah di sini untuk beristirahat, Selain tempatnya bersih, udaranya sejuk juga indah. Pokoknya gk nyesel

author: Marta Sutanto
text: Recommended guys

author: Samantha Bags
text: Hotelnya bagus, makanannya enak2, dan pelayanannya ramah bangett( kami ambil family room, sangat nyaman di kamar nya )hotel yg sangat recommended lah.akan balik kesini lagi selanjutnya, anak2 sangat senang menginap disini

author: fathirarsy
text: Kamar mandinya kurang luas

author: Yolin COOL
text: Hotel nya baru, ruangan sangat nyaman dan bersih, air panas berjalan baik, kasur nya juga lumayan luas dan enak utk tidur, kolam renang ada 2, anak dan dewasa dan indoor jadi tidak kena hujan...pelayanan ramah, pasti balik lagi kalo ke banyuwangi..

author: Aditya Dwi Kurniawan
text: Good place for staycation

author: farid darojad
text: Lokasi nya pinggir kota, kamarnya luas n bersih

author: IKA RAHAYU NUGRAHANI
text: Pelayanan baik, lokasi mudah diakses, kamar cukup baik, namun kurang kedap suara jadi kamar sebelah kanan dan kiri sangat terdengar berisik. Di dalam kamar saya ada sekat pintu utk ke kamar sebelah (meskipun terkunci), namun cukup membuat khawatir. Di setiap lantai di lorong kurang penerangan shg terkesan horor. Makanan terkadang enak terkadang tdk enak. Namun utk breakfast cukup bervariasi makanannya.

author: lukman hakim
text: Pelayanan oke,masakan oke

author: Anis Sugiarti
text: Rooms: Sesuai harapan

author: Muhammad Amir
text: Hotelnya buaagguussss...dan pelayanannya mantaappp

author: Antonwahyu Widodo
text: Tempat menginap bonus Healing 😎

author: Andreas R Sean
text: Keren dan elegan! Lokasi strategis dengan pelayanan yang baik. Ada roof top, fitness center dan pool dengan tempat yang bersih dan menarik. Desain hotel dan kamar yang bagus, dengan kesan berwarna gelap tapi tidak terlihat atau terasa Spooky.

author: devi indah
text: Sangat sangat memuaskan. Kamarnya luas. Tersedia hair dryer juga. Pemandangan dari kamar bagus. Bisa pilih pemandangan sawah dan gunung atau pemandangan jalan raya dan laut. Pegawainya ramah, setiap ketemu selalu menyapa. Makananya enak. Waktu sarapan tersedia roti, jajanan pasar, salad, sereal dan nasi. Jadi yg sarapannya gk sama nasi tenang saja disana banyak pilihan menu sarapan. Tersedia ruang meeting yang nyaman dan luas. Ada beberapa ruang meeting, bisa pilih sesuai keinginan.

author: Alonna Gladicia
text: Pokoknya setiap ke Banyuwangi selalu disini. Hotel ternyaman di Banyuwangi menurut ku❤❤❤

author: Dendi irawan
text: Ternyaman karena bisa lihat pemandangan kota banyuwangi Jika butuh barang electronik silahkan hun kita informa sun east mall genteng.

author: Syahnata Studio
text: Modern + Tradisional architecture. The West view is Mountain

author: yoni wahyudi
text: Hotel yang bagus,kamar yg nyaman,sarapan yg lengkap,terutama jajanan tradisional,onde-ondenya juara,kamar mandi lumayan bagus,handuk perlu diupgrade..terlalu tipis,viewnya lumayan bagus

author: YURA EDY WIJAYA
text: hotel menyenangkan

author: nanda meiji
text: Hotel yang menarik

author: abid n
text: Nasi gorengnya mantap, murah

author: Bundae Syafiq
text: Sangat nyaman

author: arinidwi safitri
text: Hotel yang gagah di jalan utama. Nuansa banyuwanginya dapat. Sarapannya enak - enak ada menu tradisionalnya juga

author: Satria Sejati
text: Mantab .. de Best

author: Asal Gantang
text: Nearby activities: Mantap

author: hujjetul islam
text: sangat memuaskan

author: ahmad fadhoil
text: Tempat kamar dan pelayanan yang sangag bagus

author: Budi Salbut
text: Lengkap, namun perlu di tingkatkan lagi sesuai SOP nya

author: winda
text: Fasilitas dan segala halnya bagus, tapi hall untuk acara, lampunya terlalu redup... sehingga sehingga saat penyampaian materi menjadi ngantuk

author: pucuk harum
text: Tempat yang cozy

author: Nur almira Raissa
text: Semuanya keren

author: Cindera Kusuma
text: rekomend lah buat temen2 yang mau travelling ke BANYUWANGI. Rooftop nya cuakepppp polllllll

author: Wa Ode Amelia
text: Puaaaasssssssssssssssssss ma smua2nya kec balkon yg ga bs dibuka. Ga tau fungsi di kamar dibuat ada balkonnya tu buat apa klo endingnya ga bs dibuka..

author: Sigit
title: Great for Business Overnight
text: Clean, comfortable, great shower, great breakfast, great atmosphere. Just a bit outside of the city.

author: The Eng Loe
title: Surprisingly Excellent Hotel
text:
I stayed twice during a week of period on different rooms 
The Rooms are spacey, clean and with cool aircond. Very comfotable. 
During BF,  The Croissant and Traditional cakes are among the best that I have ever had so far. 
Staffs are very nice, efficient, helpful. 
Only issue is very noisy at 3-4 AM for the room facing road. Very annoying for people what to take a good rest. 
The opposite rooms are very peaceful.

author: Damiana
title: Kokoon Hotel
text: Hotel yg sangat baik fasilitas kamarnya. namun kalau membawa anak kecil..  ruang bermain anaknya terlalu kecil.

author: Michael Vincent
text: Very nice hotel

author: Yudha Wibowo
title: Superb Business Trip
text:
- Spacious & Comfort Room.
- Smells Good.
- You can get a good view between Sea or Mountain.
- Various breakfast menu with a Mountain view restaurant

author: Sriyanto setiabudi
title: Great hotel
text:
Nice place, friendly staff and clean room, just for more pay attention to security staff during rainy 
When I parked in front of the lobby in the rain, security using an umbrella directed my car and  security rushed away and let me get rained on when i get out of the car.

author: Ricky Darmawan
title: Cuman kurang 1 hal jika ini dipenuhi sangat baik untuk kesan pertama
text: Kurang adanya bellboy yang menawarkan diri untuk membawakan barang ke kamar pada saat pengunjung datang untuk check in

author: Rob T
title: A high end hotel - an oasis of luxury
text: I love staying at the Kokoon. Excellent facilities. Excellent staff. I am looking forward to my next stay...

author: Dimas Laksono
title: Excellent
text: Good

author: indah
title: Hotel rekomendasi
text:
1. hotel nya bagus, kayaknya masih tergolong baru ya, tapi oke banget, nyaman, sendal hotel nya lucuk, batik gitu, kamar mandi nya unik pintunya, kamar bersih dan pemandangan oke
2. mungkin karena pas weekday ga terlalu rame, jadi lorong hotel nya ga terlalu jrengg yaa heheee.. untung kami ber2, cewe, dan kamar nya pas banget deket lift,  g perlu susurin lorong, jadi ga terlalu spooky, soalnya lorong hotelnya lampu nya sendu gitu
3. untuk makanan enak semua, ga ada yg tidak enak, hanya enak dan enak tapi kalau bisa variasi nya di tambahin, keseluruhan baik, enak, pilihan menu nya cukup beragam dan staff resto ramah semua.
4. jarak dari dan ke bandara tidak terlalu jauh, jadi tidak perlu buru2 kalau menuju bandara.

author: yoni
title: Hotel tertinggi di banyuwangi
text: Lokasi strategis dekat bandara,kamar bersih,sayang handuknya tipis,sarapannya enak banyak varian,onde-ondenya paling favorit

author: xayn
title: Exceptional
text: Great place with amazing roof top. Good sized rooms and new hotel with great facilities.

author: Cristover
title: Awesome
text:
Setelah berjuang di tengah2 jalanan banjir dari denpasar ke banyuwangi, langsung merasa bahagia lagi begitu masuk ke kawasan hotelnya. Sangat nyaman dan layanannya sangat luar biasa. 
Harusnya pengalaman disana sempurna, hanya ada 1 yg perlu di improve.. keramahan security waktu mau keluar dari hotel... overall memuaskan

author: Rendi
title: Disappointing
text:
It’s not that close to Ketapang, it’s about 15 mins drive.
the corridor was so dark.  Our room was at the end of the corridor and it was very noisy from staff activities from warly morning.  Not considering guess that are still sleeping.

author: Sari Yuladari
title: Nice Experience ^_^
text: I spent 4 days at this hotel for the sake of my work, I spent a lot of time at the hotel all the time to hold meetings with clients. The service from Ijen Resto & Rooftop Lounge is very satisfying, all of them are very friendly and provide the best service. Thank you for all the hospitality, I will definitely come back next time.

author: Siti A. L.
text: Hotel yang bersih dan nyaman, daerahnya juga strategis, dekat kemana-mana.

author: Satia
title: Exceptional
text: Excellent Hotel, clean the room was very spacious, the staff are friendly and help full

author: Aunie
title: kamar yang luas dan bersih
text: kamar luas, bersih, dan makanan pagi yang enak. sayang lokasinya agak jauh ke pelabuhan. tapi jika mau explore banyuwangi, ini merupakan hotel yang sangat di rekomendasikan

author: Eliot Ginting
title: Eliot Ginting
text: Kamar sangat nyaman dan bersih

author: Wahyu Ichsan Firmansyah
title: Best service
text: Thank you for the best service. We feel very comfortable and happy to be in a hotel with all the rooms provided

author: Mégane
title: Super hôtel!
text: Chambre super confortable et moderne.  Deux restaurants dans l’hôtel. Une grande piscine. Sauna dans les vestiaires. Un gym avec tout ce qu’il faut. Nous avons bien apprécié les massages que nous avons réservés. Beaucoup de choix pour le déjeuner.  Nous avons décidé de passer une nuit supplémentaire car nous étions confortables. A environ 1h-1h30 de kawa Ijen.

author: Ajeng W.
text: Kamarnya luas. Tempat tidurnya nyaman banget, petugasnya ramah-ramah semua. Pelayanannya juga bagus.

author: Ika
title: Wonderfull
text: Dengan harga segitu sdh bisa merasakan view yg ok, fasilitas yg memadai… terutama rooftop,, plg suka 🥰🥰

author: Alex
title: Exceptional
text: Great breakfast, the biggest bed I have ever seen.

author: Laurent
title: hôtel moderne idéal pour poser ses bagages et visiter le volcan Ijen
text:
propre et moderne.
rien

author: Umi
title: Wonderful
text:
Amazing view from room window..I can see the sea side and the coconut garden..just beautiful 😍 
The hotel was the tallest building in Banyuwangi City..
The color of the building its look dull and sad (grey and dark red)..the rest are perfect 🙏🙏

title: Very Good
text:
nice and new property
near airport

author: harlin pamungkas
title: AMAZING
text: A very comfortable hotel starting from a large parking lot, a comfortable lobby atmosphere, friendly staff, spacious and very pleasant rooms and a delicious breakfast. But there is a little note that security guards must be ready at the entrance because the highway entrance to the hotel is very crowded

author: Paul
title: Prima luxe hotel in Banyuwangi
text:
Ik had 2 kamers voor mij en mijn gezin. Zeer ruime en zeer schone kamers. Prima bedden. Wifi was goed. Er was koffiezet-apparatuur. Personeel vriendelijk en behulpzaam voor zover nodig. Uitgebreid buffet-ontbijt. Het hotel ligt op plm 20 minuten rijden van de haven Ketapang. Het hotel is nieuw. Aangenaam verblijf gehad.
Ik kan wel heel veel opschrijven hier, maar het is gewoon een uitstekend hotel, dat geen verdere uitleg behoeft.
Er waren geen negatieve zaken.

author: Sani
title: Sapah satu hotel terbaik di banyuwangi
text: Hotel yang bersih, pemandangan indah, sarapan yang enak, cuma satu aja saran staff resepsionis & lobby seperti lebih ramah ke wisatawan asing harusnya jangan membeda²kan terlihat sekali waktu lewat lobby kalo ke wisatawan asing mereka tersenyum ramah & menyambut sekali sementara giliran ke kita biasa aja tapi untuk staff lainnya ramah².

author: Adli Marie Rabbani
title: wonderful
text: I love how the facilities and the hospitality that kokoon provides, and the quality of services is something that I never experienced before. I look forward to having kokoon be my best choice to stay and reside. BRAVO KOKOON!

author: antok w
title: Recommended Hotel
text:
I was stayed at this hotel for bussines reason. Hotel is clean, modern, with all kind of star hotel facilities. Most interesting one is you can find old local javanese food for breakfast, and enjoy your breakfast and coffee with beautiful mountain view. 
Recommended hotel ! and I will always stay at this hotel for my  visit at Banyuwangi.

author: Nils
title: Best views and luxury in Banyuwangi
text:
This is an amazing resort, with all the facilities you need. Also a great view on the vulcanoes, and you can even look over to Bali from the top floors. Different restaurants with good food and coffee (the breakfast is really an experience, a lot of good local delicacies). Spa and massage is also very relaxing.
Nothing actually .. only that the pool is fully covered and not heated, and there are no towels provided.

author: Jihad
title: RECOMMENDED
text: I'd rather choose this hotel instead of another even they come with lower price or higher grade

author: Kieran Rich
title: Great experience - but to get a 10 the check in and check out procedure needs to be faster
text:
I am a regular at Hotel Kokoon and enjoy staying at the hotel, the facilities are always to a high standard and the staff are friendly, and provide great service. I would recommend you improve the check in and check out procedures - they take far too long to do, sometimes ~10mins each? Try and speed this up, especially for regulars who you would already have details on file for.
Kieran

author: Ariswanto Arba
title: Excellent
text: Good service

author: Marie
title: Very Good
text:
Beautiful view, great wellness area, friendly staff.
No supermarket nearby, temple next to the hotel so it was very loud, restaurant prices over average.

author: Assma
title: Exceptional
text:
EVERYTHING!!! AMAZING HOTEL WITH AMAZING STAFF 
SUCCULENT BREAKFAST WITH HUGE CHOICE AND HIGH QUALITY
GREAT ROOM,CONFORTABLE BED, SWIMMING POOLAND SAUNA.
Absolutely nothing!!! Perfect stay

author: Henri Santoso
title: Bagus dan Nyaman
text:
Bagus, nyaman, air panas mengalir dg sangat baik, interior bagus, internet (wifi) kencang & pemandangan dari kamar juga bagus. 

Sedikit masukan untuk area depan lift di kamar tamu sangat panas krn tdk ada AC-nya dan pilihan menu breakfast terlalu sederhana walaupun rasanya enak juga.

author: Mandeep J
title: A delightful stay
text: We had an overall wonderful stay at Kakoon. The staff was friendly, the breakfast was delicious and the room was immaculate. Some points of improvement are that the the containers for the body wash and shampoo were already empty so we needed to buy our own. Also, the rooftop bar lounge area had mosquitos so we couldn't really enjoy that area without getting bitten by the little critters. However, all in all the accommodation was lovely.

author: SRI
title: Hotel Bersih dan Berkualitas
text: Kokoon Banyuwangi merupakan hotel dgn kualitas baik... dan lokasi tidak jauh dari kota

author: Aya
title: Exceptional
text:
Hôtel incroyable, service exceptionnel. En particulier grâce à personnel adorable et très arrangeant et toujours souriant qui nous a couvert de petites attentions tout le long du séjour (viennoiseries offertes pour notre départ au Kawah Ijen, glaces pour nous faire découvrir les spécialités de la maison, late checkout accepté). Le manager était prêt à nous mettre à disposition une chambre gratuitement pour que l'on puisse se reposer quelques heures avant notre départ à minuit au Kawah Ijen, nous avons refusé car c'était beaucoup trop gentil... Les gens à Java sont en général très sympas et serviables mais là c'était au dessus de tout ce qu'on peut espérer. 
Le petit-déjeuner est très bon, gigantesque et varié. 
Massage incroyable et piscine très agréable. 
Les lits sont super confortables, la chambre est spacieuse et très propre. 
La vue est magnifique que ce soit des chambres ou du rooftop. Les plats du restaurant sont très bons. 
Tout était parfait, je ne peux que vous recommander l'expérience !
Rien, tout était fabuleux.

author: Arief A.
text: Pelayanan sangat baik, karyawannya sangat ramah, Hotelnya bersih banget, dan kamar nya luas dan bersih. Next nginep di sana lagi lah.

author: Vanezha Isoni
title: survey for the kokoon hotel
text:
nice hotel and excellent service hotel in banyuwangi
next kalau ke banyuwangi akan menginap di hotel ini lagi.

author: Inge Budiman
title: Happy
text: Clean

author: Rifai Fadli
title: Nyaman
text: Bersih, kamar luas, kasurnya nyaman. Namun ketika saya membuat teh manis, muncul kawanan semut di cangkir

author: Ratih K. D.
text: Sudah 2x saya nginap di hotel Kokoon. Kamarnya luas, bersih, fasilitas lengkap, sarapan standar bintang 4.
Thank you.

author: Audrie
title: Great hotel for stay
text:
Warm welcome to all guest and  costumer from almost all staff. Premium quality of resto with delicious food and friendly staff. 

Clean room and nice place to relax during weekend and busy working days. View to the mountain are great, similar view to the sea from the high floor of the hotel.

author: Audrie
title: Clean and Comfort Hotel in Banyuwangi
text: Nice and friendly hotel staff. Great hotel ever in Banyuwangi.

author: Kinuyo
title: Exceptional
text: この価格でこのグレードは素晴らしいです！部屋は清潔で眺めは最高で言うことなし。なんと言っても朝食のブッフェが毎日違う豊富なメニューでとても美味しかったです。スタッフもたまたま日本語が話せる人がいて、とても丁寧な対応でした。本当におすすめします‼︎

author: Teguh
title: Good Hotel
text:
Kokoon hotel is recommended for your family stay before your trip to Bali.
the hotel was clean and the staff was helpful, with a nice breakfast. The view was quite nice too.
Will come back here if we go back on our road trip to Bali

author: Luhur
title: Untuk pasangan
text: Sangat memuaskan Ahahahah

author: Wahyu
title: clean
text: nice staff, clean

author: Fikarina
title: Splendid
text:
I order 2 rooms for 3 adults, 1 - 8 years old ans twin 2 years old. The receptionist gave me interconnecting room. The rooms were spacious. My children have fun there. I requested for 3 years old bed which they gave for free. It was a sofa bed actually so it has one open side. I put it exactly next to the main bed and put a chair behind it. It fits well for a toddler. All the staffs are friendly. The cleanlisness is superior. Food was great, the croissants were perfect in texture, you should definitly try it! Try the danish at their bakery too, too bad it is not available in breakfast buffet. Coffee was nice for the first 2 days  but on the last day it came out extremely sweet, not sure why. 
Overall I am truly satisfied with my stay

author: Purwanto P.
text: Sangat nyaman hotel ini. Ini ke-2 kalinya saya menginap. Kamar luas, bersih dan nyaman. Staff ramah. Terima kasih.

author: Yandy M. W.
text: Pelayanan ramah, hotel bagus, the best di banyuwangi.

author: Boentaran
title: Good for transit hotel
text:
The view is good but too close with the busy traffic road.
Feel not enough fresh air in the bed room

author: Dara
title: Kokoon
text: Mantap tp sayang diawal ga dijelasin suite junior ada bedanya dg balkon dan tanpa balkon

author: Ricky Zulkifli
title: We wish we could spend more time here.
text: A nice, pleasant hotel with excellent service.

author: sagravay
title: Good, convenient place to stay
text: Nice hotel as still new. The rate we paid was definitely worth it. Breakfast and dinner was good, nice choices. Recommendation to the management: Website should feature either separate categories for twin and king size bed or give an option of the preferred bed choice when making a booking. Also, FO should be aware of the additional benefits when booking directly through the hotel's website and re-confirm these upon arrival. Nobody was aware of anything. But small hick-up. Guest Service Manager we met upon check out was very kind. Thank you, keep up the good work.

author: Riccardo
title: Very Good
text: stanze spaziose. Struttura luxury standard

author: Mauricio Barreto
title: Very Good Hotel
text: Clean and nice hotel the staff is very polite and well trained, best buffet breakfast i had in a java.

author: Mauricio B
title: Very good experience!
text:
Good hotel, the staff is very friendly. The room is clean and in general the hotel looks good. 

Morning buffet the best so far for a medium price hotel, also service is good they have an idea of what they are doing most of the places in java service is bad but here is good.

author: Jessica
title: Exceptional
text: Love the design , cleanliness and location

author: SISILIA
title: Very Recomended
text: Puas sekali

author: Nurul
title: Excellent
text: Nice room. Friendly and helpful staff.

author: Burhan
title: Hotel terbaik di Bnayuwangi
text: Eksteriornya sangat bagus, semua staf secara umum sangat membantu, hanya untuk check out bagi tamu yang sudah sering menginap sebaiknya dipermudah... terimakasih.

author: Suharta
title: Wonderful
text:
clean, parking garage, well maintained, 
fair room rate.
food quality

author: Dwi
title: Next time kembali lagi
text:
Bersih dan nyaman.
Suasana kamar yg enak

author: peter
title: massive king size bed was good
text: massive king size bed was good, they also have a bar upstairs with draught beer!

author: Annisa
title: I got everything I needed and wanted from a hotel at Kokoon. Will definitely stay there again.
text:
Very helpful and hospitable staff. The room was clean and spacious, super comfortable bed, great view (I got one on the 8th floor with the ocean view). They had different main menu for breakfast each day and they were all delicious!
It could be quite noisy when guests going in and out of their rooms neighboring yours, but it's quite common. We also got a little problem with the electricity, but the staff responded promptly to it.

author: Epril Kustamaji
title: Baik
text: Property lengkap dan baik

author: Wiwin
title: Kokoon hotel
text: Staff nya ramah2 sangat membantu sekali menu sarapan nya juga enak bikin betah berlama2 disana

author: Just
title: Recommended
text: Hotel ini belum ada saat terakhir ke banyuwangi sekitar akhir 2019, hotel bagus, bersih, stafnya ramah, variasi makan pagi juga lumayan, harga oke. Semoga bisa dipertahankan dan terus berkembang. Recommended 👍

author: Husriani
title: Nice
text: The room is big, clean, i love the pool very quite. Changing room so safety... separate woman and man ! Nice hotel, i love that lobby, so peacefull

author: Kinuyo
title: Exceptional
text:
部屋は清潔で、設備も充実、朝食も大満足でした。
部屋からの眺め、スタッフの誠実な対応、感激しました。この価格でこのような快適な時間を過ごすことができて、感謝しています。
特にないです

author: Wiwin
title: Kokoon hotel
text: Staff yg ramah banget membuat kita betah setasa dirumah sendiri menu sarapan nya jg komplet recomended banget utk dijadiin tempat menginap...

author: Ignatia Maria Sashiamisha
title: Very Satisfying
text: clean building. complete accomodation such as swimming pool, gym, and spa. the food taste is good. the view from my room was mountain and forest.

author: Kusdianto
title: Amazing
text: Nice and Clean Room , Beautiful View , Good Service , and Delicious Breakfast ..👍👍

author: Lerandy Didier
title: A real pleasure
text:
Everything was on point. The staff was kind and reactive.The cooks were very friendly. the accomodation had everthing needed. The hostel  was gorgeous, clean and comfy. Perhaps serving a meal with meat would have been appreciated in the menu(Ribs; 2) , entrecote; 3) Strip loin etc..) otherwise it was very good.

I hope to come again soon :)
L.Didier

author: Natasya
title: Exceptional
text: Good hotel. Will come back to Kokoon later.

author: Eko Suryadi
text: Good Services

author: Ludovic
title: Un superbe hôtel a conseiller en famille
text:
L'accueil du personnel a notre ecoute, la propreté de l'établissement, un merveilleux roof top des plats succulents, le cadre avec une vue superbe sur les rizières et la mer.Ils.nous ont gardes les bagages une nuit gratuitement.
Seul bémol un peu le bruit de la circulation et de la mosquée

author: Herlien
title: Modern hotel with great view
text: Hotel is the only high rise building in the area. you can see them from far location in quite remote far from anything so if you have no car would be a trouble but I think taxi would be easy to get. Staffs are helpful and hotel are clean. facilities is minimum and not much to offer except the gym quite big and have yoga/ aerobic room too. the roof top is lovely and the view of the mountain and nature around it are fantastic to wake up too. overall was a lovely 2 nights stay with family

author: Ivan
title: Exceptional
text: Bagus tempatnya dan lokasi

author: Wahyu endro
title: Indah
text: Bersih lengkap nyaman

author: Ester
title: Very Good
text:
All are clean since the hotel is quite new. Hope to keep its cleaniness, ameninties are good .  Shower is the best.
Bed and pillow a bit too soft for us

author: Dian

text: Ramah Staff nya dan Roomnya juga perfect untuk di harga Promo Woww , Luas, di bbrp tempat instagramable, spt di rooftop lobby area. Kerennlahhh pokoknya 😍

author: AUGUST
title: New hotel and will come back
text:
Very nice hotel to stay
It's new, comfy, sophisticated and modern hotel with good bfast and facilities compared to other hotels with same price range

author: Anonim
text: Semua bagus. Hanya lokasi kurang dekat dgn pelabuhan ferry.

author: monika
title: staycation di kokoon asik banget
text: makanannya maknyus, terutama sop buntutnya mantap, breakfast juga menunya enak enak. pelayanan sangat ramah.

author: Fadjar Mensana
title: Nice hotel to stay
text: Kokoon hotel is good place to stay as found out clean, quiet and good hotel rooms with big bed and nice pillow and sanitary very well. Reception rooms has to be upgraded to allow the fresh air blowing around the area with permanent air circulation.

author: Nur M.
text: Great location, really pleasant and clean rooms. I would highly recommend it to everyone.

author: Fiona
title: Fiona OFarrell
text:
Amazing stay! I love this hotel… 
Fabulous room!  great room service. 
Outstanding Dinner in the roof top lounge. 
10/10 for fantastic service Thank you Eka - you made our special dinner perfect…

author: Fitria
title: Clean
text: good place to stop and continue our journey 😄

author: Farid
title: Mr.
text: Very neat and clean room, nice food, and the staff really helpful and polite

author: Rita
title: Other than this miscommunication about the breakfast, it was a great stay. Thank you :)
text:
Nice, clean and friendly staff.
The miscommunication between the receptionists about the breakfast which was included in the room rate. The one who did the check-in informed that the breakfast would be delivered to the room with the limited menu from the hotel. The next day, the other receptionist informed that the breakfast was in the restaurant. It created inconvenience especially we’re on a honeymoon trip.

author: Karin
title: Great place to stay
text:
Beautiful hotel, nice rooms, great breakfast, we loved the pool and gym.
Mosque nearby is very loud, rooms not soundproof at all. since it's a bit out od t
own would be smart to rent scooters

author: Ludovic
title: Un super Hôtel très confortable en famille
text:
Une superbe hôtel, un personnel adorable, des chambres spacieuses, un repas le soir au Roof top une merveille avec une superbe vue.Un petit déjeuner complet européen et asiatique.Une super adresse.
Si on peut trouver quelque chose on parlera de l'appel à mosquée non loin et le bruit de la route malgré les fenêtres bien isolées mais nous sommes en Indonésie le scooter est roi.

author: Heriyanto H.
text: Kamar bersih, sejuk, view cukup bagus

author: Teguh W.
text: Bagus dan nyaman banget, next pasti ke sini lagi.

author: Simon
title: Great Service, Very Clean, Great Breakfast
text: We stayed for 25 nights. The service from all staff is excellent. The rooms are very clean. The breakfast has a great spread of local food. They cater for vegetarians. The gym is well equipped. Plenty of parking space.

author: Fransisca
title: Hotel Kokoon
text: Pelayanannya yang sangat baik dan ramah. Respon wa nya pun baik dan cepat. Tempat nya bersih dan kamar tidurnya yg sangat nyaman. Serta breakfastnya sangat enak. Bener² nyaman untuk menginap d sini.

author: Jaka
title: Exceptional
text:
We stayed here for one night, we chose the room with 2 double beds and it was all worth it!
We love this hotel so much, everything was comfortable for us especially the bed! 
Breakfast was nice. Definitely will recommend this hotel to our friends n family

author: AFRIAL
title: Good Hotel
text: Over all Good

author: Stefanus A.
text: 3Rd time staying in their family suite for transit. Always enjoyable, comfy beds, proper breakfast in a superb setting with an amazing view, & great staffs. The only complaint was smelly towels during our last stay, which was agreed by another guest that was queueing to check out behind me.

author: Deddy K.
text: The breakfast meal is below expectation. We can eat nothing. We should book stay without breakfast.

author: Ifrotul E.
text: Enak banget nginep di sini, pelayanannya ramah, kamarnya bersih dan nyaman, sarapannya enak, next kalau ke banyuwangi lagi pasti nginep sini lagi.

author: Herlena
title: Exceptional
text:
One of the newest hotel in town.
+Chic design. 
+ The bedroom, linen and bathroom are clean. 
+ Staff are friendly.
- The noise from the corridor can be heard from the bedroom.

author: agus
title: Exceptional
text: Tempat yang bagus untuk liburan keluarga dan para karyawan yang ramah2 terhadap karyawan

author: Shawr alam

text: This is hands down the best establishment in all of banuwangi and surrounding area, it's new clean and all staff are professional

author: Andreas
title: Andreas
text: Good

author: Cynthia
title: Comfortable
text: The hotel is new, so everything is in good condition. Staffs are very polite. The only cons is the room dining a little bit pricey.

author: IDjaya
title: Very nice hotel in Banyuwangi
text: This was our second stay at Kokoon Banyuwangi. We had a pleasant stay with a nice and comfortable room. Good location, not too far from Ketapang Harbour, and also local eateries.

author: Dwi R
title: Best hotel in Banyuwangi
text: Staying at Kokoon Banyuwangi while having road trip from  Jakarta to Bali. The hotel is conviniently located 30 min from Ketapang harbour. Check in/out were quick. Food (dinner and breakfast) was delicious. We had connecting rooms and they were good in size, very clean and had complete amenities. We will definitely come back when in town.

author: Bambang Cahyo Purnomo
text: Nyaman dan elegan

author: dwir888
title: Best hotel in Banyuwangi
text: Staying at Kokoon Banyuwangi while having road trip from  Jakarta to Bali. The hotel is conveniently located 30 min from Ketapang harbour. Check in/out were quick. Food (dinner and breakfast) was delicious. We had connecting rooms and they were good in size, very clean and had complete amenities. We will definitely come back when in town.

author: alexander
title: Very good
text: Overall is good and nice place

author: Sandie Santoso
title: Excellent service 👍🏻
text: Looking forward to stay again at Kokoon.

author: Febri U.
text: Kamarnya nyaman, staffnya ramah-ramah, makanannya semua enak-enak, apalagi setiap ruangan bisa dbwt spot foto-foto. Instagramable banget. Next time bakal nginep sini lagi kalo dbanyuwangi. Thankyou for the hospitality kokoon hotel ❤.

author: Lydia Christy
title: Mrs
text: Hotel yg sangat bersih tingkat terus kebersihannya walau sudah menjadi hotel lama. Baju saya yg tertinggal sudah sebulan lebih masih tersimpan dengan baik padahal sy tdk berharap bakal kembali iseng sy tanyakan wkt menginap di kokoon lg. Tks kokoon. Hanya sayang buat minta tambahan air mineral skg musti berbayar tadinya free. Di hotel lain kami bebas minta air tambahan. Menu breakfast sebaiknya tiap hari berganti saya bosan selalu itu itu sj krn seringnya kami menginap di kokoon bwi

title: Enjoyable
text: It was an enjoyable experience. You might need to learn more about cooking main dishes so they would taste better than what it was. Also please give a more detailed explanation of how to set up the sauna checked because I couldn't use it the second day because it was under maintenance.

author: Mokhamad
title: Wonderful
text: bersih dan ramah anak

author: Linda
title: good atmosphere
text: parking area. my car hit the plant pot when leave the parking.

author: Andry
title: Hotel nya bagus
text: Hotel tematik yang bersih dan terawat, kolam renang & sauna bisa di akses sampai malam hari. Kamar nya bersih terawat dan nyaman

author: Milin
title: Kamarnya bersih dan baguss
text: Sebenarnya kamar,pelayanan sudah sangat baik. Kamar mandi bersih, ac dingin, pemandangannya oke banget. Cuma satu yang disayangkan breakfast tidak enak, ada cap cay nya basi, jadi itu yg jadi masalah utama dan tolong lain kali makanan basi jangan di kasi ke tamu, jd kmrn saya cm makan cereal, tp untuk kamar dan pelayanan sudah baik. Thankyou Kokoon!

author: Afriliza L. H.
text: Sangat puas menginap di sini. Di awali tempat lobby yang begitu nyaman dan resepsionis yang ramah. Tempat tidur luas dengan pemandangan yang cantik, makanannya juga enak - enak.

author: Aris U.
text: Hotelnya baru, kamar bersih (1212), sprei & handuk bersih & wangi, lobby design modern, rooftop view cantik bisa lihat pantai & gunung, view kamar ke pantai juga istimewa, staffnya ramah, cantik-cantik & respond cepat, parkiran luas dengan lift yang aman, bisa tersambung ke kamar, plus ada charger untuk mobil listrik 32a. Ac, air hangat, internet & tv cable lancar. Paling penting adalah harga cukup terjangkau. Sarapan, pilihan menunya biasa saja (sempat under estimate) tetapi dari segi rasa itu pas & cocok di semua lidah, bisa sedikit diimprove lagi. Croissantnya istimewa gak kaleng-kaleng, mantap. Es jeruknya berbeda, boleh dicoba saat sarapan. Minusnya, adalah: sedikit agak jauh dari pelabuhan Ketapang, kolam renangnya agak kecil, hanya cocok buat anak kecil & ikan mas saja. Kamar agak kurang kedap suara, sering terdengar bunyi ketika kursi di geser/orang berjalan di lorong. Kok ga ada welcome drink ke tamu, come on? Overall, cocok untuk kembali menginap di sini.

author: Adriana
title: Best affordable hotel in Banyuwangi
text: Love the interior and would love to come back again

author: Ryn Junico
title: Hotel Nyaman di Banyuwangi
text:
Hotel tertata apik dan nyaman
Breakfast cukup beragam dan enak
Staff sangat ramah
Proses cek in dan out sangat cepat
Kamar besar dan nyaman

author: Putu
text: Good food, good view. The pool would be good if built outdoor

author: Ryn J
title: Hotel Nyaman di Banyuwangi
text:
Staff ramah dan sigap
Proses cek in dan out cepat
Lobby hotel Nyaman
Kamar luas dan nyaman
Wifi sangat cepat
Breakfast beragam dan enak
Chanel TV cukup beragam dan kualitas bagus sekali
Keseluruhan enak dan nyaman

author: Darrys P.
text: Menyenangkan untuk staycation bersama keluarga. Kamar bersih dan makanan yang beragam.

author: Disnio
title: Wonderful Experience
text:
We occupied the Family on 12th floor.  The room was spacious with 2 true King sized bed and offered a wonderful panoramic view of a flowing river, lush greenery as far as eye can see and mountains as backdrops.  Super clean room with ample of in-room amenities.  Breakfast was adequate and their fried "Onde-Onde" was superb.  We tried the dinner bbq package at hotel rooftop...What we thought initially as a good value for money Dinner set, the dinning experience was a letdown.  Dinner service was extremely slow, food selections for bbq that were served were limited & the seafood served were not fresh.  We ordered bbq steak at additional cost...steak prices were  excluded from the set dinner prices...which is understandable.  Hence, we recommend having dinner in the town rather than at hotel.

Overall, we had a wonderful experience at Kokoon...friendly hotel staff, super clean room & facilities and good value for money.

author: herry
title: staff karywan yg ramah
text: pelayanan staff +krywn nya yg ramah dan melayani. sangat berkesan dengan pelayanan nya

author: herry
title: Exceptional
text: staf karyawan nya good pake jempol ramah2 dan sangat melayani

author: loe
title: Nice hotel
text: Overall bagus.

author: loe
title: Nice hotel
text: Cukup baik

author: Bassma
title: Foncez !!!!
text:
hôtel incroyablement luxueux pour le prix !!! la nourriture et le rooftop nous ont charmé.
si vraiment je dois chipoter, nous n’avons eu pratiquement aucun échange avec le personnel

author: Dis
title: Exceptional
text: My family & I occupied the Family Room.  We traveled with 2 teenagers and the room was spacious with 2 true king size bed.  We were on the 12th floor and the panoramic view from the room of a flowing river, lush vegetations & mountains as a back drop was very mesmerizing.  Rooms was spotless & in-room ammenities were excellent.  We tried their rooftop bbq (all you can eat), and would prefer having dinner out of hotel.  The restaurant staff was super friendly however service was very slow and the seafood bbq was not entirely fresh...selections of food were limited and we ordered steak bbq which required additional cost.  Breakfast was adequate and fairly basic...although their "Onde-Onde" was super yummy.  In house gym was adequate for the hotel size, swimming pool was not exposed to sunlight hence temp of pool water was slightly cold.  Overall, we thoroughly enjoyed our stay at Kokoon and had a wonderful experience there.  Thanks to their team of hotel staff.

author: Iwan Sutanto
title: A nice transit hotel in Banyuwangi from/to Bali
text:
We were surprised to stay in this hotel, room was great, nice bed, nice breakfast, friendly staff and nice ambience overall incl indoor pool. Really enjoy to stay in this hotel. The bbq on saturday night was also good and enough, reasonable for the price.

Will definetely come back again!

author: Meg
title: Great Stay at Banyuwangi
text: It was a nice 3 nights stay at Banyuwangi. The view from our room was great. Breakfast are great and the staff are so friendly and helpful. I love the sound of the river while sitting in front of the lobby area. The view from rooftop was also wonderful.

author: Mega
title: Great Stay at Banyuwangi
text:
It was a nice 3 nights stay at Banyuwangi. The view from our room was great. Breakfast are great and the staff are so friendly and helpful. I love the sound of the river while sitting in front of the lobby area. The view from rooftop was also wonderful.
Hotel location is a bit far from city center or tourism spots

author: Maliki Z.
text: Hotel baru bersih luas ada kamar untuk keluarga.

author: Fania
title: Kebersihan
text:
Saya suka dengan kebersihan dan keramahan dari Kokoon. Perlu ditingkatkan untuk kebersihan dari alas tidur (sprei) dan selimutnya. Untuk sprei dan selimut yang sudah ada bercak kuning minta tolong untuk tidak dipakai lagi. 

Oiya untuk toilet yang ada di gedung pertemuan baiknya selalu dilakukan pengecekan kebersihannya atau setidaknya ada pengecekan kebersihan secara berkala.

author: Yulianto
title: Great experience
text: Hotel room is clean, breakfast is good. A lot of facilities… recomended to stay

author: Dian Indah Asmarani
text: Hotelnya nyaman, bersih dan pelayanan yang diberikan oleh staff-sraffnya juga keren. Lokasinya tidak jauh dari pelabuhan ketapang sehingga hotel ini sangat tepat bagi Anda uang yang ingin meneruskan perjalanan ke Bali

author: Mima
title: The cleanest hotel room
text: It's modern, minimalist, well maintained & extremely clean hotel. The staff are attentive, helpful & friendly

author: Bianda S. E.
text: Hotelnya sangat bagus, bersih, vibes bali, elegant, hospitality nya bagus sekali, makanan breakfast semuanya enak.

author: Nyoman
title: Sunrise dari lantai 16 Kokoon
text:
Dari lantai 16 Kokoon hotel dapat bonus view yang lengkap
Gunung, sawah dan pantai lengkao dengan sunrise

author: Justin
title: Fine place to stay, manage expectations.
text:
Clean rooms. good location if you're taking the ferry. amazing views of the Bali Strait on the upper floors.
Food was extremely expensive for low quality taste. It was just bland, not terrible but not worth the cost. 
Staff will charge you for extra pillows and blankets (we have two very small kids that need to stay in the same room). I asked them to produce their hotel regulations, the terms that authorized what would be charged additional fees but they could not produce any type of T&C documentation. I understand that what is due must be paid, or if they asked us to pay for another bed, that would have been fine, but they did not. They said kids were fine but that pillows and blankets needed to be charged extra. In the end, because they could not produce the hotel regulations, they said we did not have to pay for them. 
There is a "kids club" that is a tiny room without any toys :( kids were sad. Which is weird because they advertise for it and the staff asks, "did you check out the kids club?" "yes... and it's empty."

author: Sravana
title: Awesome new hotel in Banyuwangi! Loved it!!
text:
Absolutely loved it. Brand new hotel with great amenities and facilities. We stayed in the family room with 2 large beds. Very spacious, well lit and had everything we needed. Room and bathroom was clean and aircon was functioning well. 
We used the pool area.. well maintained pool. 
Gym has a few treadmills and weights. It also has a couple of cycling/climbing equipment and a large area for yoga/pilates. It was well maintained.
We also went up to the 16th floor to get the view from the rooftop bar. It’s spectacular.. if you decide to stay here, you should definitely do that too. 
This facility also has a massive parking space, we parked our car here.
Check-in process was very smooth and staff were really friendly and helpful. I would definitely recommend this place and would love to stay here again. 
High speed internet (for ID standards) - best one ever for us.
A bit more variety on breakfast would have been awesome but the current spread is good enough for a hearty breakfast.

Thank you Kokoon Banyuwangi for the best service and the nicest hotel so far we came in banyuwangi... 🙏🏻

title: Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi Wonderful
text:
Excellent for All... Karena Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi memberikan pelayanan yang sangat hangat dan ramah dengan sentuhan pribadi. 

Dilengkapi dengan berbagai fasilitas yang modern, di mana perpaduan antara klasik-modern dengan unsur-unsur tradisional menyatu, menciptakan nuansa yang harmonis, sehingga saat menginap disana, saya dapat menemukan semua kenyamanan dan kebutuhan dalam perjalanan bisnis maupun liburan bersama keluarga. 

Lokasinya juga strategis, karena terletak di Jalan Raya Jember yang hanya berjarak sekitar 15 menit dari Bandar Udara Internasional Banyuwangi, dan 5 menit dari pusat kota.

Terimakasih Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi.

author: Fransisca Amelia
title: Comfortable
text:
1. We are very happy with concierge staff and bell boy staff who always replied our request with "dengan senang hati"
2. On our first day, we requested extra towel for my youngest daughter age 7 years old from the housekeeping and extra towel was delivered immediately.
3. We actually hung all of our towels on the bathroom rack and bathroom door handle - not requesting any change of towels - but apparently the cleaning service did change all of our towels and then we were given 4 new towels. We stayed in family room with two king beds, and I already informed the hotel that we are family of 2 adults and 3 of my children (age 14, 9 and 7 years old). So on the second day when we requested for extra towel from housekeeping, it was front office staff who answered and it was informed that there was extra charge for extra towels. Well this was quite suprising as on the first day we were given the towel without any information that there would be extra charge, and as far as I know, when we stay in hotels all around the world, there was no single charge for extra towel. Maybe this policy should be improved and there should not be extra charge for extra towel - as it is one of the basic amenities in 4 star hotels especially like Kokoon.
4. Overall experience was good - we would stay in Kokoon hotel when we visit Banyuwangi again.
