author: Mikhael
title: Bitter sweet experience due to dissapointing duty manager
text:
This is my second stay at this hotel in last 6 months. Kokoon is one of my favorite hotel in Banyuwangi.
Eveything was nice :
1. Good ambience, very well maintained propoerty.
2. Room is clean, tidy, spacious and bery comfortable. Bed is also clean and comfy.
3. Separated showe chambers and closet, good amenity, good choices of soap and shampoo. 
4. Friendly and helpful staff, check i  process was fast EXCEPT FOR MY LAST STAY. 

Now the bad part of my review. 
I stayed on 2 occassiob this time, during my departure to Bali i stay one night and everything was flawless.
While during my way back home i book 1 suite room for 6th of May. 1 day before arrival i need to modify my stay due to very hectic traffic in Bali, traffic jamm is awful so i ask my wife to call the hotel. I requested not to cancel my reservation but to switch the date to 8th of May to avoid bad traffic jam as i bring 3 kids along with me.
We check on Traveloka and Agoda, room is available on 8th of May so i think there wont be any problem to switch the date.
But when we call reservation they cannot accomodate our request due to black out date, then we are redirected to Yudi their Duty Manager. I assume by talking to their higher level management will able to provide some solutions to our problem. Unfortunately this duty manager did nothing but rejecting our request with exact same reason. For information i book this room at 2.000.000 Idr ($160), while for 8th of May their room rate is below that price. This is very disapointing. 

What a shame, very good propert but not so good duty manager.

author: Akhmad Zaki H
title: Hotel Pilihan di Banyuwangi
text:
Saya menginap semalam di hotel ini, transit dari Bali.
Kesan pertama saya, hotel ini terlihat bagus dan baru. 
Saya memasan 2 kamar Deluxe untuk saya dan keluarga.

Kamar cukup saya rasa walau tidak bisa dikatakan luas...namun cukuplah, sesuai dengan harga yag dibayar. 
Kebersihan bagus...dan tersedia berbagai fasilitas layaknya hotel bintang 4.
Pemandangan dari kamar, sangat menyegarkan...hamparan sawah dan pohon kelapa sepanjang mata memandang.

Untuk makananan, rasanya sesuai dengan lidah saya alias enak.
Baik makan malam maupun sarapan, cukup menggugah selera.
saat saya menginap, ditawari dinner buffet seharga IDR 100,000/pax, saya rasa cukup baik dan sesuai dengan harga yang dibayar.

Jika ingin kudapan dan ngopi, tersedia di lobby.
sayang saya tidak sempat mencobanya, kelihatannya sih enak.
namun apa boleh buat perut sudah kenyang dengan buffet dinner jadi tidak ada ruang untuk kudapan dan secangkir kopi. 

Secara umum hotel ini bagus dan memuaskan.
hanya satu kekurangannya yaitu kurang kedap kamarnya. 
suara berisik dari lantai atas dan samping terdengar jelas.
selain kekedapan ruangan, semuanya O.K.

Anyway, saya menjadikan hotel ini pilihan pertama jika saya berkunjung ke Banyuwangi

author: Debbie
title: Very nice place to stay
text: Semuanya enak dan kue paginya juga enak yang di reception , staffnya semua sangat profesional dan ramah

author: Fia
title: Pleasant
text:
Dari banyak menu sarapan menurut saya onde2 adalah yg terbaik. Nilai terbaik menurut sy bahkan keluarga. 
View dari kamar/balcon/restaurant sangat bagus. Memuaskan utk view.
Rasa dan menu sarpan perlu di perbaiki. Suara bising kendaraan dan tamu yg tidak di berikan standard maximum jam brp boleh melakukan aktifitas yg menggangu sepertinya tidak ada. Karaoke hingga lebih dari jam 11 malam. Org buka dan tutup pintu tengah malah dengan suara keras. Org berjalan dan berbicara di atas jam 11 malam. Sangat mengganggu. Mohon lbh di perhatikan oleh management karena ini bukan pertama saya menginap. Yang pertama sy puas. Utk sekarang saya berfikir kembali utk kembali menginap. 3 malam tiada waktu tanpa suara bising tengah malam

text:
you're looking for a brand-new, well-maintained, and strategically-located hotel.
During my one night stay, I find the staff generally eager to serve, the bed very comfortable, and the room very clean. For less than half a million, this hotel really can't go wrong.

author: Pascal
title: 1 Night Stay in Bali Road Trip
text:
Stayed here for 1 night during our road trip to Bali.
It was a very nice stay. Room is comfy, clean, and great.
Breakfast is good.
We also had a good time at the swimming pool.
It was very nice to hit the water after a very long drive.
Love this hotel and looking forward to be back here someday

author: Pascal Gunawan
title: Nice stay during road trip
text:
Stayed here for 1 night during our road trip to Bali.

It was a very nice stay. Room is comfy, clean, and great.
Breakfast is good.
We also had a good time at the swimming pool.
It was very nice to hit the water after a very long drive.

Love this hotel and looking forward to be back here someday

author: Laura
title: sukaaa
text: suka sih hotelnya bagus kamarnya bagus bersih . airnya panas dan lancar trus ac nya dingin sukaaa banget deh apalagi kita dr bali kan cape bgtu air nya panas bgt suka cape jadi hilang .. cm minta tlg ma staff nya kita sempat telp minta di nyalain dl ac nya .. cm iya doank2 sampai kmr ga nyala .. kecewa sih kalo ga bisa bilang ga bisa jng php

author: Trisna
text: Saya cek in di tanggal 30 May 2022, dimana H - 2 Lebaran, yang memang sedang tinggi tingkat keterisian kamar. Saya datang ke hotel sekitar jam 1 siang, ketika cek in, diberi tahu kalau kamar belum siap, jam 2 siang saya tanyakan lagi, belum siap juga, dan mau dikabari jika kamar sudah siap, pada akhirnya jam 3siang baru bisa masuk kamar. Saya minta ditempatkan dikamar yang Non smoking, tapi koridornya bau asap rokok. Komplain ke Front Offixe, akhirnya diganti kamar yang tidak bau asap rokok. Hotelnya bagus viewnya, kamar lumayan bersih, sarapan enak, hanya kurang bervariasi. Terima kasih

author: Risdo Oktovera
text: The hotel is very clean and the breakfast taste yummy. Recommended hotel🌟

author: Djaidi
title: Exceptional
text: Kami tidur di Family Room dengan 2 Large Beds. Ranjangnya super nyaman, kamarnya bersih, TV nya 40" mantap, Makanan saat Breakfast rata2 enak dan banyak variasinya. Ada Coffee Machine dari Nestle jadi bisa pilih aneka pilihan minuman yang lebih dari yang umumnya hanya disediakan kopi hitam saja. Terima Kasih Kokoon Hotel yang telah menyempurnakan liburan kami sekeluarga kali ini.

author: Dwi
title: Great Facility
text: New Hotel, clean and near to everywhere, great stay in here, our group very satisfy 👍🏼👍🏼

author: muchtar
title: Bagus bersih
text: Meski perlu beberapa menit ke pusat kota. Sebanding dengan keberaihan rapi dan view yang ok

author: Excellent!
text:
I came one week before to the Kokoon Hotel. It was a very comfortable stay before because all of the crew of the Hotel were very friendly and helpful.
The hotel is also very clean and modern, which is exactly my idea of a good hotel.
After I arrived in Banyuwangi with a very early flight, the friendly lady (unfortunately I forgot her name) at check-in made it possible for me to move into my room earlier.
The hotel manager can be proud of his crew!
Should I come to Banyuwangi again, I will definitely stay at the Kokoon Hotel.

author: Joachim
title: Exceptional
text: I came to the Kokoon Hotel one week before my last stay. It was very comfortable and for this reason I came back.

author: Cahya Y.
text: Seharusnya check in jam 14.00, tapi saya datang jam 15.00 kamar masih belum ready. Akhirnya jam 16.16, kamar baru ready. Posisi lagi hamil, capek perjalanan dah dibuat badmood juga. Manajemen hotelnya kurang bagus sih ini, kasian staff nya, pasti kita menanyakan terus ke resepsionis. Manager hotelnya perlu review lagi ini. Saya tanya check out sama apa ada tambahan, dijawab tidak ada dengan enaknya. Kalian mau kami toleransi check in sampe nunggu 2 jam, tapi kami gak dapet tambahan waktu check out karena kesalahan kalian. Dahlah gak bakalan ke sini lagi.

author: Sugeng
title: Exceptional
text:
Semuanya bagus cuma breakfas habis , waktu chek out disuruh nunggu cukup lama padahal 
padahal sudah selesai tidak dikasih tahu jadinya ya nunggu

author: Teguh
title: Nyaman dan room service ok
text: Lokasi terletak di jalan raya besar, hotel cukup nyaman utk istirahat perjalanan dari dan ke pulau bali. Selebih nya standar saja. Proses check in dan out cukup cepat. Nilai plus bisa diberikan ke room service, makanan nya cukup enak.

author: Guido
title: Complaint - worst checking in service
text: Had a dissatisfaction of your service in particular to checking in. We have received the booking confirmation since last Thursday, 28 Apr 2022 for one night stay (03 May-04 May 2022) but the room was not ready when we arrived at almost 07:00 PM. This is so unacceptable service. Our thought this is so embarrassing in servicing a customer and will never again staying here. No recommend to anyone but will put negative comment.

author: Darman
title: Excellent breakfast and overall vibe
text: Best breakfast variations and great vibe, cool hotel

author: nefy
title: Good
text:
Bangunan kokoh… hanya sj sy krang suka dgn kolam renang indoor yg airnya saat sore kotor .. spt sirkulasi air tdk ada shg anak sy tdk mau berenang
Breakfast b aja skelas bintang 4 ya not special

author: Dian
title: Exceptional
text: Buffet breakfastnya enak, lengkap, menu tradisional. Overall ok banget, simple but satisfying

author: Dewi
title: Sangat memuaskan
text: Kamar yg bersih, fasilitas lengkap, sarapan yg enak dg menu yg variatif.

author: Indriani
title: nice
text:
clean and warm.
no many variety of breakfast

author: Talitha
title: Comfy & Family Friendly!
text:
Staying at Kokoon really made my holi-yeay! They give great service & yummy breakfast taste. 
Guest room is so comfy with modern-wood interior. Love it! Great view on the rooftop, must visit to feel the sunshine there.
Will be back again on next visit to Banyuwangi. Thank you!

author: Talitha
title: Comfy & Family Friendly Hotel!
text:
Staying at Kokoon really made my holi-yeay! They give great service & yummy breakfast taste. 
Guest room is so comfy with modern-wood interior. Love it! Great view on the rooftop, must visit to feel the sunshine there.
Will be back again on next visit to Banyuwangi. Thank you!

author: Wahyuni
title: Exceptional
text: A very nice pleasant hotel to stay 👍👍👍

author: Fedora
title: Not amazing but it’s good enough
text: We stayed during the holidays so the price was a kind of expensive, but for the normal price I think it’s a recommended hotel. The plus point of this hotel is their rooftop lounge where they have games to play. Overall it wasn’t amazing or anything but it’s good enough

author: Agus C.
text: Clean hotel for next trip to Bali and best mountain view

author: Citra
title: Value hotel
text: Value for money, clean enough, nice view from up.

author: Joachim Ronald Gehring
text:
We arrived very late, but the late check-in worked smoothly.
The hotel staff is very friendly and helpful.
Unfortunately I couldn't stay that long, but I booked again today because I liked it very much.

author: Joachim
title: Exceptional
text: The Hotel is very nice and modern. Employees are very friendly and helpful.

author: Stephani
title: Good
text:
The view from the bedroom amazing
The atmosphere of the hotel is good, its really comfortable and clean.
When i check in, i need to wait for 15 minutes because the room still not ready

author: Teguh Y.
text: Hotel baru. Lokasi di dalam kota. Makanan cukup enak dengan harga yang wajar untuk ukuran hotel bintang 4. Proses check in dan check out cepat. Kamar family room cukup nyaman dan bersih. Protokol kesehatan diterapkan dengan baik di hotel ini.

author: Citra
title: Nice hotel and price
text: Pricenya okay dan hotelnya comfort

author: Fenny
title: Good Choice , for family trip
text:
Staf nya sangat ramah, kamar yang bersih dan harum..
Sdh 2x kami sekeluarga kembali stay di kokoon banyuwangi. 
Recomend banget deh 😁

author: Yanti Y.
text: Suka banget di sini pelayanannya cepet, Ramah Dan kamarnya bersih. Makanannya juga enak cuma variasinya kurang banyak untuk hotel Bintang 4. Kt pasti akan balik lagi kl ke banyuwangi.

author: IWAN PURNAWAN
title: Mr Iwan Purnawan
text: Almost perfect stay, good hospitality at Koko on as always, keep up clean & tidy room, relax atmosphere. This is my fifth time stay at hotel, which I stay for 2 days. First time I try the pool. Variety of breakfast still need improvement, but the food tastes really good. I will stay again on Middle May. See you again at Kokoon

author: mpkolo
title: Excellent hotel – great find if looking.
text: We (total 8 travelers) stayed for 2 nights on the way to and from Bali here – excellent hotel with great dinner, views, and rooms. The staff are very professional and helpful. Highly recommended to stay here! Thank you to all the staff for taking care of us during our stay.

author: Silvia
title: Very Good
text:
Modern hotel, clean, parking easy, breakfast is good for its class and in the area.
Location far away from Ketapang port. Far from the ocean.

author: Antonius
title: Need friendlier service
text:
Hotel was nice, room was nice.
However i asked for extra towels, i have never been asked to pay for extra towels, ever. And not to mentioned, the towels had a funny smell. 
And i booked 2 rooms. 1 room wasn't supplied with the toohtbursh, ... etc.. 
The breakfast was ok.. but my daughter had a diarrhea the next day , I'm guessing it's from consuming something there. Cause she said the salad tasted funny and it wasn't fresh. 
And then when i wanted to check out. The receptionist asked me to wait, they need to check my room make sure everything is ok, so if there'sanything they can charge me? That's very unprofessional, Dont worry i will not take and i have never taken anything from any hotels. I have never been asked that either. I usually say i want to check out and leave right away. This one is just different experience.  Unbelievably unprofessional and unfriendly.

author: levin
text: terbaikk..

author: Dewi
title: Hotel recomanded
text: Memutuskan utk nginap disini karena letaknya strategis dan recom dari teman .all okay.dpt surprise tiup lilin juga karena ultah 🥳 malam harinya mau ke rooftop tp pas hujan jadi sepi.breakfast nya banyak macam makananx oke dah pokokx 👌

author: Christopher
title: will certainly stay at Kokoon again
text:
perfect view, good location, good food, very clean rooms, very nice and friendly staff.
-

author: Marcia
title: Exceeds Expectations
text: Very good hotel, comfortable, great facilities for traveling with kids and good breakfast 💕

author: Erna
title: Hotel nyaman dan clean banget
text: kebersihan dan kenyamanan hotel

author: Dheon Landos
title: Hotel Recomended
text: Kamar bersih, luas, fasilitas lengkap, ada balkon dengan view Pulau Bali. Pelayanan sangat ramah.

author: Ryn Junico
title: Hotel yang bersih dan nyaman
text: Kamar besar dan bersih, suwasana Dan view bagus, lobby luar yg luas dan lobby dalam cukup bagus, staff ramah, breakfast cukup beragam dan enak

author: Eka erfian
title: the best hotel di banyuwangi
text: Hotel baru yg bersih , hotel yg keren , udara sejuk ,view ke laut dan pohon kelapa yg sangat menarik .rekomended hotel di banyuwangi untuk sahabat yg mau singgah di banyuwangi

author: satyr01
title: Nice hotel on most eastern Java
text:
We "transit" here during our vacation to Bali 

plus
+ room is quite spacious + clean
+ bathroom is also clean
+ AC is really cool.. I like it
+ breakfast is tasty
+ all staff are friendly
+ rooftop lounge is nice & has delicious food
+ relatively cheap, worth paying for

minus:
- breakfast is a bit limited variation
- in room food is a bit pricey
- location is a bit far from ketapang harbour ( 30 minutes normal traffic)

But overall it's a pleasant stay, we certainly will "transit" here again if we do overland trip to Bali someday

author: herry
title: excellent service
text: great food

author: James
title: Fun for whole family!
text:
everything. lobby are stunning, the elevator are fast and less waiting time. room are very nice to stay, aminities are high quality and the view is superb. We are taking family room with twin bed for queen. it’s a pleasant to stay at here. there is panoramic lounge that is the fun for whole family we can enjoy playing game such as retro arcade game and playstation. 
the breakfast are extraordinary. love all the food

author: Josh
title: Not bad
text: An above average hotel in Banyuwangi, but there's still so much room for improvements

author: reynant hadi
title: bagus

author: Ivor
title: Best hotel in Banyuwangi
text:
Everything about this hotel is perfect. Some downpoint is
1.  The hotel is not ready high visitor increase, the day visitor raise up the management at breakfast is a mess. I also experience the situation where my amenities is not refilled because they are out of stock

author: Oskar G.
text: Supeer. 👍 Service yang totalitas, memanjakan banget.

author: Ratih K. D.
text: Kamar menyenangkan, luas, bersih, nyaman. Lokasinya juga enak dekat dengan bandara. Makanan untul sahur enak, dan banyak variasi.

author: Yosep
title: Exceptional
text: Nice Hotel, Clean, the family room is great, view from my room is superb

author: Yosep
title: Exceptional
text: Nice Hotel, Clean, the family room is great, view from my room is superb

author: Lusiana
title: quite comfortable
text:
the room is quite spacious, the bed is comfortable and spacious
the breakfast menu is less varied, mostly spicy. but the restaurant staff are very helpful and offer a menu that children can eat.
there is only one bell boy so it's a bit difficult to unload things because no one is on standby

author: Ray
title: Good one
text: Kinda affordable, but location is not so strategic

author: Peace
title: Spacious n clean
text: Love it. The hotel is big. The room is spacious n clean. The view from the window is beautiful, mountain n paddy field.

author: ANY
title: Best Hotel That I Ever Stay
text: Menginap di Kokoon adalah pengalaman yg menyenangkan, kamar yg luas dan bersih, kamar mandi dan toilet terpisah yg sangat bagus, pemandangan selat bali yg indah, staff yg ramah dan harga yg pas, dan yg terpenting adalah tempat tidur yg sangat nyaman sehingga kami bisa beristirahat dengan baik, terimakasih Kokoon!

author: PHIONG
title: Spacious, clean and good location
text: Mountain and green pastures view from our room! 😍

author: Devi
title: Good Hotel, Good Experience, Excellent Cleanliness and Service
text:
Untuk lokasi sebenarnya cukup enak karena berada di samping jalan raya persis tidak perlu masuk ke dalam gang. Namun memang kalau dari ketapang agak jauh sedikit karena dekat dengan kota.
Untuk kamar sangat baik, tertata rapi dan yang saya sangat suka adalah semuanya sangat bersih, sangat nyaman untuk ditinggali.
Overall sangat baik, sangat puas, dan pastinya akan kembali lagi jika bepergian ke banyuwangi kapan-kapan.
Untuk sarapan menurut saya kurang banyak macam dan pilihannya. Seharusnya ditambahkan beberapa macam pilihan menu seperti di Bali, misalnya masakan western food, japanese food, dsb.
Untuk kolam renang enak indoor, akan tetapi alangkah lebih baiknya jika diberi air hangat jadi tidak kedinginan.

author: nn wind
title: Comfortable Stay
text: Stay di sini semalam saja dan overall bagus. Mulai dari check in sampe check out smooth. Kamar oke, suka view nya yg menghadap ke gunung. Staff ramah dan efficient. Minus nya hanya di breakfast saja. Western food kurang variasi dan pilihan makanan Indonesianya pun terbatas. Mungkin karena pandemi dan menyesuaikan dengan occupancy hotel. Namun semua staff di breakfast ramah dan selalu menawarkan bantuan, terima kasih. Terima kasih juga untuk Meri, trainee yg kami temui saat breakfast yg selalu make sure kita memiliki pengalaman stay yg nyaman.

author: Natasha
title: Very Good
text: It was good and good service too

author: ferry handoko
text: bagus dan nyaman pelayanan sangat oke

author: Lajur Ginting
title: Lovely Stay
text:
Arguably the best hotel in Banyuwangi. I enjoyed every single experience from checked in to check-out. 
The view is unbeatable, food is great. Fitness facility is good as expected. 
A totally relaxing stay. Can't wait to visit Kokoon again. Thank you! 
A bit concerned for your improvement: internet speed is a bit slow and disconnected for a while.
Balcony room is very nice 👍🏽 but less insulation. I keep hearing car/bike noises all the time.

author: San
title: Hospitality yg kurang memuaskan
text:
1. Telfon konfirmasi chkout 30 menit sblum jam 12. Padahal sy chcking jam 11 lewat malam hari, jdi belum 12 jam saya di hotel, sementara yg saya tau kalau hotel biasanya ada late chckout, atau di chrge kalau lewat brpa jam.

2. Saya datang jam 11 malam lewat didepan hanya ada 1 security, dan tidak membantu sama sekali, senyum, sapa salam juga tidak, kami membawa barang kami sendiri ke kamar.

3. Saya pesan dan bayar Kamar King Size, tapi yg saya dapatkan twin yg digabung. Mungkin jika memang king bed tidak tersedia, baiknya konfirmasi kepada konsumen. 

Lebih ditingkatkan lagi komunikasi penyampaian informasi, senyum, sapa salam, keramahan, basa basi kepada tamu tidak cuek dll. Mungkin bisa dicontoh dri beberapa hotel di bali, yg sangat friendly, Helpful dan mungkin responsibility dari kryawannya. Karna best hospitality rapat bersaing jika best service. Terimakasih

author: Yustino A. W.
text: Pengalaman kedua menginap di hotel ini sama seperti sebelumnya menyenangkan dan pelayanannya sangat baik, merasa cukup terpuaskan. Selain view nya bagus, pelayanannya ramah, tapi kemaren lupa untuk menawarkan welcome drink, karena pada saat menginap pertama kali dikasih minuman tradisional. Untuk kamar tidak mengecewakan yaitu bagus, rapi dan bersih. Untuk breakfast rasa makanannya enak namun kurang bervariatif. Menunya hampir sama seperti dulu saat menginap pertama kali.

author: Syahrizal Aprianto
title: Nice stay at kokoon banyuwangi
text:
Food
Cleanliness
Staff
View
Ok

author: nap0511
title: Kokoon
text:
Kamar yang nyaman, bersih, pelayanan ramah.
Selalu menginap di sini saat kunjungan ke Banyuwangi.
Menu sarapan yang lengkap, meja selalu bersih. 
Fasilitas sauna mungkin perlu ditingkatkan/dilengkapi..

author: Maxwell W.
text: Loud music at night. 11 floor. Beer 100k a glass. Not pay that in Australia.

author: Jimmy W.
text: It 's really a nice and good hotel. The vibes and design is attractive. Breakfast also taste good.

author: Wisnu H. N.
text: Kamar bersih dan nyaman, untuk breakfast harus ditingkatkan rasa dan variasi makanannya.

author: Retno
title: Nice place
text: Good, clean, and comfort

author: Daf
title: excellent
text: overall good service - the hotel is pretty clean and good

author: Jesslyn
title: Nice & Comfy Hotel
text: We stay at the family room with beautiful view. it's very comfy and clean Room, The room lighting was nice, not to bright, not to dim. It's nice since we travel with kids. Delicious meal, breakfast and dinner. Friendly and helpful staff. I highly recommend this hotel if you visit Banyuwangi.

author: Sandra
title: Kokoon hotel is nice place to stay
text:
Good environment, clean and comfy room, the breakfast is delicious and many variant of foods. 
And the cost is affordable. Thanks

author: Angela
title: Stylish hotel in Banyuwangi
text: The hotel looked very new. Fresh design. Staffs are nice. Booked a night to rest from trip from bali to surabaya. Erika was very helpful taking notes on my room request for a good night sleep. In the morning i was surprised about the view from the window. Haven't try any food here so no comment about food.

author: Mrs. Faridah
title: Very memorable 6 days stay, very nice and modern hotel with  very good service.....
text:
A magnificient hotel with a good design, has a spacious lobby and a luurious design, easy arrangement of guest accessibility from the basement to the rooftop. The rooms are spacious, clean, the design is modern, and there is no noise from the net room, the hotel staff is also very good, the cleaning room serice is also very good.
A delicious and aried breakfast menu, with views of the mountains and rice fields.
A magnificent hotel and tallest building in the middle of Banyuwangi city with a rooftop that can enjoy sunrise and sunset views.

author: Reza
text: Hotelnya nyaman, bagus & ada panoramic decknya. Staff hotel jg sangat ramah dan jg helpful. Cuma pintu shower kamar mandi tidak bisa tertutup rapat di kamar 1112 yg kadang buat cipratannya keluar ke area wastafel sama listrik yg entah kenapa selalu mati nyala. Selebihnya hotel ini rekomen klo buat jalan2 di banyuwangi lg. Thx kokoon banyuwangi

author: Jesslyn M. C.
text: We stay at the family room with beautiful view. It's very comfy and clean Room, The room lighting was nice, not to bright, not to dim. It's nice since we travel with kids. Delicious meal, breakfast and dinner. Friendly and helpful staff. I highly recommend this hotel if you visit Banyuwangi.

author: Jesslyn C
title: Nice hotel in Banyuwangi
text: We stay at the family room with beautiful view. it's very comfy and clean Room, The room lighting was nice, not to bright, not to dim. It's nice since we travel with kids. Delicious meal, breakfast and dinner. Friendly and helpful staff. I highly recommend this hotel if you visit Banyuwangi.

author: Gede Sentana

text:
plenty of food option
clean rooms and friendly staff

author: Shalvy
title: Wonderful

title: Terpuaskan di Kokoon banyuwangi. Bagamana tdk hampir smua layanan ckp sempurna. Mampir disini di BWI
text:
Staf restoran pada saat breakfast...mereka ramah sekali, sesekali menawarkan menu yg menarik.
Hampir tdk ada

text: Malas nginap di hotel ini lagi.

title: Exceptional
text:
excellent.
none

author: Hanna C. G.
text: Begitu sampai check in prosesnya cepat jadi bisa langsung masuk kamar. Minta room connecting dikasi dong 😁 kamar lantai 10 view pedesaan dan gunung 👍 kolam renang, gym, sauna ok. Menu breakfast enak mungkin bisa ditambah variasinya. Minta tambah handuk dikasih, pelayanan ramah dan hotel bersih. Enjoy banget.

author: Rob
title: I love staying here
text:
I have stayed at the Kokoon 5 or 6 times over the last couple of years. For me, the standout features are as follows:
Food - very delicious
Staff - super helpful, super friendly, and remember me. 
Location - very handy to the airport, good views of Bali to the east, and Mt Ijen to the west.
Hotel - clean, modern, and new
I'm looking forward to my next stay.

author: Mrs Ranti
text: This hotel its very good to visit and do relex in here

author: Alexander
title: Wonderful
text:
Kamarnya ok, fasilitas lengkap.
Tidak ada

author: Heryanto
title: Heryanto setiawan
text: Hotel is very cozy. Breakfast delicious, and the staff is friendly.

author: Bing
title: good
text:
👍.
lift passenger only 1 ... waiting too long

author: Diah
title: Exceptional
text:
kamar bagus untuk harga yang tidak terlalu mahal, fasilitas dikamar juga lengkap (tanpa bath.up ya)
kalau kesini wajib banget pilih kamar dengan breakfast karenaaaaaa semua makanan disini terbaiiikk, luar biasa enak banget, mungkin saya akan kesana lagi karena makanan yang ada disana. makanan yang disajikan fresh from the oven, refillnya gk terlalu banyak memang karena biar segera di refill. 
untuk family mungkin saya tidak merekomendasikan karena untuk kolam renangnya jg tidak terlalu besar. but overall saya tidak menyesal memilih kokoon dari bermacam hotel di bwi

everything is perfect. value for money.
they dont give small/hand towell

author: Desy Piastutiani

author: Sanyu Diandara
title: Sangat Mengejutkan
text: mengalami kelelahan setelah perjalanan panjang dari surbaya menuju ke bali,kami beristirahat di hotel yg menuru kami terbaik di banyuwangi.sangat mengejutkan hotel dengan sekelas ini bisa meninggalkan cotton but kottor di lantai.sayang kami mengetahui hal ini setelah selesai breakfast.krn km kelelahaan pada malam harinya

author: SYAMSUL
title: excellent
text: sangat bagus very recommended

author: Kho Muhammad
title: Pelayanan Tingkat Tinggi setinggi Bangunan Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi
text: Pelayanan ramah-helpfull all staff diatas rata-rata. Akses parkir mudah, waktu check-in yg singkat, prokes berjalan sangat baik, ruang kamar bersih-fasilitas handal-ukuran TV + chanel program sangat baik, view sisi timur laut dan pulau bali-sisi barat landscape pegunungan raung-ijen. Menu breakfast sangat variatif-enak-fresh. Nyaman pokoknya staycation di Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi 😉

author: Kiki A.
text: Nyaman banget di sini. Makanannya enak-enak. Sejauh aq staycation di semua penginapan d banyuwangi, mungkin cuma tempat ini yang bikin aq tidur nyenyak dan nyaman.

author: MULIA
title: great hotel, out of nowhere
text: depends on what you need. if you want to sit around in hotel enjoying hotel facilities, great. if u want to run business in town, not really.

author: dwirizak
title: Best service hotel
text: Best service hotel ever in banyuwangi. Fasilitas kamar komplit, compliment juga berkualitas. View kamar selat bali, sedangkan sisi lainnya gunung..paket komplit laut dan gunung. Di lantai paling atas ada rooftop. Trus juga ada swimming pool indoor, gym, spa, restaurant, ballroom, ect

author: Harryantono S. G.
text: Bersih. ramah, makanan cukup enak.

author: Cynthia yuliastiti

text: Sangat puas dg pelayanan yg diberikan,,utk variasi makanan bisa ditambah lagi,,semoga kedepannya utk pelayanan terus lebih baik

author: Ronald N.
text: Best hotel and best friendly staffs. Awesome experience.

author: Agoes Wiyono
title: A Comfort Hotel to stay at Banyuwangi
text: Keep serving guests well and maintain food quality and cleanliness of environment.

author: Merry
title: Really enjoyed my stay there! High recommended. Gonna go there definitely again :)
text:
The room was super clean and really love the breakfast!
For food the prices were a bit too expensive.

author: Novita A.
text: Pelayanan yang ramah, fasilitas lengkap dan berfungsi dengan baik.

author: Merry
title: The best Hotel in Banyuwangi!!
text:
We really enjoyed our stay at Kokoon. Everything was super clean and super chic.
The service there was excellent! Gonna definitely go there again!

author: yuwono
title: Perfect one!
text: Worth to stay with a reasonable price! Highly recommended, especially with the forest stunning view

author: Sylvain
title: Great Hotel in Banyuwangi
text:
The hotel is located 15 min away from the airport and 5 min away from the city center. Access is easy.
It is a new pleasant new hotel.
Employees are helpful. 
The rooftop lounge has beautiful views to the Ijen mountain and to Bali strait.

author: Masrori Masrori
text: Masrori Masrori

author: @ngambilcuti
title: Wonderful

author: Allen Elwin
title: Humble staff
text: Excellent

author: Puspa Siagian
title: Comfortable
text:
The hotel was wonderful. It was even better than expected. The price was amazing. The staff is helpful and friendly, especially front office staff. 

The spa was good and comfortable, very relaxing and the therapist is super friendly. Really enjoyable experience, Cannot recommend enough

author: Puspa N.
text: Hotel ini cukup memuaskan untuk liburan bersama keluarga, menu breakfast nya cukup beragam.

author: Rofiatul

text:
Sarapanx enak, menunya lengkap. Lokasi lumayan dkt kota.
Pemandangan lautnya agak kejauhan

author: Maulida A.

author: Mukhamat S.

Ke depan ketika mendapatkan kamar, akan kami pastikan dulu seluruh fasilitas kamar dalam kondisi baik. Jika fasilitas kamar dalam kondisi tidak baik, kami akan minta tukar kamar.

p.s. the spa was amazing!

Breakfast enak dengan menu yang beragam.
Proses cek in Dan cek out yang cepat.
Staff sangat ramah, next bussines trip pasti saya kesini lagi.

untuk kamar dengan teras, pintu nya kurang kedap jadj walau sudah tertutup masih terdengar suara kendaraan

author: Johanes L.

author: Fonda N.

title: Very good
text: The food is expensive; better eat outside the hotel... we hope that next time the price of the resto should be more reasonable and should be taste better

author: Nancy Margried
title: Very comfortable short stay
text: Kokoon has exceeded my expectation. The new hotel was very clean, good looking and functional design with plenty of outdoor space to enjoy the fresh air. Breakfast was delicious and we particularly loved the rooftop lounge. The drinks are nice and well priced.

author: Sylvia
title: Excellent
text: Bed is comfy and clean. Room is clean and cozy. Breakfast is great with various menu. Love staying in this hotel.

author: Nancy M.
text: Kokoon Hotel, hotel yang bagus dan masih baru. Kamar sangat bersih, bangunan arsitektur yang modern dan urban namun banyak open space nya sehingga kita bisa menikmati udara segar dan pemandangan pegunungan Banyuwangi. Shower nya kencang dan kamar mandi kamarnya compact, desain keren. Service sangat baik, protokol kesehatan sangat baik, respon dan kelancaran check in check out sangat baik. Kami sangat senang menghabiskan waktu di rooftop lounge untuk minum dan ngobrol. Minuman beragam dan ruangan indoor serta outdoor space nya bagus. Mungkin kalau tambahin lebih banyak taneman lebih oke. Sarapan juga enak dan lengkap.

author: josephine
title: cukup baik, hanya ada kurang sedikit
text: minta air minum untuk di kamar, diminta charge. baru kali ini saya stay di hotel diminta charge untuk air mineral

Fasilitas dan pelayanan baik
kamar bersih
lokasi hotel agak dipinggir kota

Location
Safety

text: Kokoon oke banget buat sekelas Banyuwangi cuma. Memang harga fasilitas dinning maupun laundry litle bit pricy 😁.

text: Makanan juga enak, kamar bersih rapi, pelayanannya sangat baik!!!.,,,

title: new hotel

the hotel pretty brand new , so the room are very clean and looks new
comfy bed n pillows

author: Tan
title: Hotel with good food
text: We stay in here 1 night and breakfast is good.

author: Fonda
title: Puas
text: All staf sangat ramah, mulai dari security sampai receiptionis membantu sekali ketika kami check in malam banget. kamar sangat luas, makanan banyak pilihan. Puas pokoknya. Thank you kokoon hotel banyuwangi.

author: Reiko
title: Sophisticated yet warm place to stay
text:
I chose Kokoon Hotel because of the design and good feedback of the guests.
As expected, the hotel was sophisticated and comfortable to stay for 2nights. I love the design of the room, especially the wooden door which hides the bathroom and balcony.

author: Reiko
title: Sophisticated yet warm place to stay
text:
The design of the hotel, room and facilities, especially wooden sliding doors which hide a bathroom and balcony. 
Friendly restaurant staffs and their service.
Quality of breakfast although not enough varieties.
View from a rooftop bar and the garden in front of the building.
Unfriendly receptionists.
Cleaning was not less good (there're mass of hair in the corner of a bathroom).
Swimming pool was not very attractive.

author: David
title: Hotel yg bagus
text: Hotel yg bagus dan ok di daerah Banyuwangi, hanya letak nya kurang baik jikalau transit ke atau dari bali kalau lewat jalur Situbondo. Agak jauh dari pelabuhan Ketapang. Untuk sarapan menu dan ragam nya kurang banyak. Tetapi dalam pelayanan ada peningkatan untuk kunjungan kami yg kedua ini di restoran sarapan. Mantap!

author: David
title: Lantai toilet yg licin
text: Perlu diperhatikan lantai toilet di setiap kamar agak licin kalau sudah ada air. Bisa beresiko terpeleset. Menu sarapan perlu ditingkatkan lagi. Tetapi dua kali kami singgah di hotel kokoon ada peningkatan dalam servis di dalam restoran pada waktu kami sarapan. Mantap!

author: reihana64
title: Sophisticated yet warm place to stay
text:
I chose this hotel because of the design and good feedback of guests. As expected, the hotel offered us a pleasant atmosphere with a quality service.
I love the wooden sliding doors which hide a bathroom and balcony.
The breakfast is good enough and the staff are all friendly and helpful.
I didn't use a swimming pool and rooftop bar since we spend more time for sightseeing.

author: TJIONG
title: Kamar sesuai dengan gambar yang di tayangkan di Agoda, bagus!
text:
Kami keluarga dengan anak kecil 7 & 9 th. Stay di Family Suite, isi 2 ranjang King Size Bed. Kamar luas dan bersih, nyaman sesuai dengan gambar di Agoda. Hotel keliatannya cukup baru, jadi gedung dan dekornya modern.
Ada rooftop paling atas, pemandangan bagus. View dari kamar juga bagus, saya dapat view ke belakang Hotel,  pemandangan kebun/pohon kelapa, sawah dan gunung, bagus!
Lokasi strategis di jalan utama, tapi agak jauh dari Pelabuhan Gilimanuk (sktr 20-30mnt perjalanan lancar), melewati tengah kota.
Terima kasih Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi!

author: Chusnul C.
text: Tempatnya bersih, bagus dan nyaman. Breakfast enak dan lengkap plus view sawah dan gunung. Room nya oke ngetss beda sama hotel lain. Thanks udah kasih b’day Cake buat aku di 25 Desember 2021 kemarin, bakal ke sini lagi kalau mau liburan.

author: nimas
title: Transit place before going to Bali
text: Its good place and good breakfast

author: Stefanus
title: Transit
text: Great family room. Bathroom too small for a family room. Great dinner quality but breakfast was average, please don't use a generic nescafe dispenser for coffee. Great staffs.

author: Yustino A. W.
text: Untuk pengalaman menginap di hotel ini sangat memuaskan dan tidak mengecewakan, dari pelayanannya yg ramah, kamar bersih, semua fasilitas ada dan berjalan dengan baik, untuk makanan menunya variatif dan enak, mungkin kemaren ada 1 hidangan sayuran yg kuahnya di campur dengan susu full cream dan tidak ada pemberitahuan atau petunjuknya. Sehingga membuat mual. Tapi overall makanannya enak. Untuk ke kurangannya mungkin di pelayanan kolam renang tidak ada petugasnya sehingga mau meminta handuk selesai renang tidak tersedia dan harus telpon ke receptionis hotel serta pada saat mau check out proses check outnya lama, untuk konfirmasi pengecekan kamar

author: ng
title: ruang besar
text: tinggal di family room besar bgt.. dgn 2 ranjang queen.. bikin tidur jg enak.. pas bgt untuk istirahat yg mau transit balik atau pergi ke bali

author: Ivor Hubertus Soegijo
title: Good hotel but lack of experience to handle lot of customer
text:
I'm staying for 3 nights taking 1 junior suite room, 2 family room, and 1 deluxe room
Some pros
1. The Hotel is new, so relatively clean
2. High building, you can get a new scenery and perspective of Banyuwangi area
3. Food quite ok
4. The staff is nice and friendly
5. They provide electric car charging station 

Cons
1. A blood stain in 1 of the room! And looks like they don't change the bed sheet due to low occupancy, my driver said he had problem on his first night because he got rash from the sheets
2. They don't ready for a lot of customer, they don't refill the breakfast. I get in the restaurant at 9 Am and they already run out of some foods (including eggs!)
3. I have a dolce gusto coffee machine in my room, but they run out of capsules in my 2nd day of stay so the cleaner boy are taking it from another room. It completely run out during my last day of stay
4. They don't have dedicated service lift to bring your luggage, so expect to wait longer for the lift when it check out or check in time
5. The area is not well located, so if you don't have a dedicated transportation you will have some problem... No atm or groceries nearby
6. Slow internet speed
7. Lobby is crowded with people parking, while the basement is relatively empty? People even park in the area for disable people by the direction from security

author: Ka Fung
title: Good stay for stopover from/to Bali
text:
Positive: smooth check in process, helpful and friendly service by Front office staff/David, spacious room with nice mountain view, good range of food selection for breakfast.
Room to improve: staff to handle better queque when giving service during breakfast, i was quequing in front of cake/bread counter when another guest cut in front of me and asked to staff and was also directly served by the staff. More clear marking for queque and staff also serve guest on first come first serve basis might avoid this inconvenient situation. Pool on roof top lounge seems not clean. In house tourist service info to share latest update on what to do, see on Banyuwangi and surroundings would be very helpful to visitors to plan longer stay in hotel.

author: Pipit
title: Staf ramah
text: Makanan kane

author: P
title: Very good
text: With this price range, I would expect a better services in terms for wide range of food for breakfast, more friendly service. Awesome rooftop bar with decent food and good service. Good for sunset hang around.

author: Ivor
title: Need more improvement
text:
The hotel need more improvement to handle lot of guest
1. One room I order has a blood stain on the sheet
2. They don't refill the breakfast evenrhough it's still 1 hour to the closing
3. The coffee machine capsule in my room is out of stock so the staff take it from other room to restock my room

author: Henry
title: will definitely stay again
text: awesome service, clean rooms, great value

author: darsono
title: new hotel
text: its new hotel, modern design, they have good restaurant and lounge on top floor, i would say this is value for money hotel. its a 5 mins walk to one of the famous restaurant in Banyuwangi, Bale Saji (which you can find local food such as nasi tempong).

author: Suwandi
title: Good Hotel
text: Proses check out terlalu lama

author: Melvika
title: Short trip at banyuwangi
text: Hotelnya qgak jauh ternyata dari kota, enak kamarnya bs family, besar.. tp bfast kurang, tempat kecil dan terlalu ramai.

author: hatta
title: Excellent
text: The food for breakfast are quiet good and very good taste and yummy

author: Anton Suhud
title: Good
text: Breakfast menu good, tradional menu excited if prepare

author: Lucy Purwosuwito
title: Clean room modern design nice environment
text:
Room and all hotel are clean 
Nice design
Feel at home 
The bed in family room have enough space for 4 adult 
I prefer use white clean  towel instead of grey 
Breakfast just average for 3 star hotel 
Dine in at Rooftop / bar lounge , price bit too high compare to the portion and quality . Its higher than other new 5 star hotel in Banyuwangi

author: Christine Onggowati
title: Nice hotel in Banyuwangi
text:
I have good experience during my stay here. The hotel condition is new and nice interior decorative and many spot to chill. They have rooftop bar on 16th floor but didn't have a chance to enjoy because only short visit but I would love to go back next time.  The breakfast is good, many option for Indonesian food and limited selection for western e.g. cereal, pancake are available.  They made pre cooked omelet and still fresh so no queueing. The staffs are warm and friendly and especially for Gadis, the girl from Ijen Restaurant.  I stayed in family room with two ing bed size. I wish more tea and coffee selection in the room. The cleaness of the elevator need to be improved. I got in on wet floor elevator, it seems bunch of people use the elevator previously after swim but no manner to dry themselve before get in to the elevator.
Anyway I would definitely come back eventhough the distance to Ketapang port is approx 30 minm

author: Lucy
title: Clean room and cozy
text:
Clean room
Big bed for family room
Great ambience of the hotel 

Breakfast just average 
Dine in experience less than expectation
Price too high compare to other similar hotel ,taste just average portion too small

Great place to stay and explore this area more

author: Christine O
title: Nice brand new hotel in Banyuwangi @Kokoon Hotel
text: Overall good experience. Nice hotel with ballroom and rooftop bar. The Ijen resto have many selection for breakfast.  The hote staffs  are kind  by reminding us to have a  breakfast by calling our room at 9.30 am.   The  girl name Gadis from Ijen resto is Superb!  She is welcoming us  and ensure we got everything we need. I strongly recommend this hotel and definitely will come back to stay.  One note for the hotel cleaness to be maintained especially in the elevator. I got in with wet floor because previous person got in wet aftet pool.

author: AGUSTINUS
title: A hotel for transit to and from Bali
text:
New hotel with nice mountain view.
Nice breakfast as well

author: iskandar
title: Exceptional

author: FERA
title: Hotel yg nyaman

title: Good service
text: Halaman parkir cukup memadai. Staf hotel ramah. Kamar bersih dan rapi. Makanan enak.

author: Agustia jenod
text: Good service

author: Dian
text: Secara umum pelayanan di kokoon sangat baik

author: Cha Sandra
title: Family Trip
text: Family Room ukuran luas cukup untuk keluarga anak 2. Lokasi hotel mudah dijangkau karena berada di tengah kota Banyuwangi. Makanan Pagi bervariasi dan rasa enak. Terima kasih Kokoon Hotel...

author: Chrisanny P. S. T.
text: Hotelnya baru dan bersih, kami berangkat ke Bali dan pulang dari Bali selalu transit di hotel ini. Pelayanan baik, breakfast need improvement dari segi rasa nya.

author: Sonny
title: nginepo kene nek nang banyuwangi
text: wes tah lah. penak penak nginep nang kene. regane gak larang, resik, sik anyar soale.

author: Henx
title: poor breakfast, nice brand new hotel
text: Nice brand new hotel, very clean took 30 minutes from the ferry port a bit far compare to others should be 5 star if the hotel put more concern and focus at the breakfast. poor breakfast no beef, the meat only sausages, with mostly tofu and tempe, few option at bread, salad and side dishes. and they charge idr 180.000 for extra person. planning to stay 2 days butwe change to other hotel.

author: CHA
title: Kamar Family Room Besar
text: Untuk penginapan di kota banyuwangi baik karena lokasi di tengah kota. kamar family room besar cocok untuk keluarga dengan maksimal 3 orang anak.

author: Ontamerah
title: Happy

author: Novianto
title: Very Good

Saat breakfast, 2 sampai 3 jenis lauk yg disajikan sempat kehabisan. Tapi it's okay lah

author: HY
title: Great Hotel
text: The hotel overall are excellent. Room and all public areas are clean. The room is comfortable and clean, delicious breakfast with good hygiene protocol. Defenitely will comeback here.

author: Hery
title: Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi
text: Hotel with Good Service

author: Tim
title: Great rooms, great view, great staff
text: Nice new hotel, had a room with a great view of the mountains.  Nice hot water shower, great towels, had everything you could ever need.  Staff at front desk friendly and accommodating.  Just too bad we have to wear masks...be nice to see their smiles!

author: Mario
title: kann man empfehlen.. zum Essen und trinken gibt es alternativen in der Nähe… Roof top Super
text:
sauberes Hotel, ab Etage 6 super Aussicht.
überteuerte Preise für indonesische Hotels bei Getränken und Room Service

author: Unknown
title: Holiday
text: Over all is good, but check in process need over time. The room is not ready yet when we arrived.

author: satrio
title: REVIEW
text:
Pelayanan ramah hotel bersih dan makanan tidak mengecewakan
saya rekomendasikan untuk yang lain semoga dikesempatan lain bisa mampir untuk menginap di hotel kokoon Banyuwangi

author: Satrio A
title: REVIEW
text:
Pelayanan ramah hotel bersih dan makanan tidak mengecewakan
saya rekomendasikan untuk yang lain agar bisa menginap di hotel kokoon Banyuwangi.
semoga dikesempatan lain bisa mampir untuk menginap di hotel kokoon Banyuwangi kembali.

author: Mikhael
title: Nice hote with Mountain and ocean view
text:
Stayed here during my road trip to Bali, 1 one diring departure and another on our way home. Book 2 connecting rooms, we are 5 adults and 3 kids.
Room is very comfortable, its clean, its bright and spacious, bed was comfy too and there are small couch in twin bed rooms which can accomodate baby to sleep on. Bathroom was clean, separated between shower chambers and closet, good waterpressure. 
The only facility we tried was swimming pool, adequate size, it was indoor pool. 
They have rooftop lounge along woth observatory deck, looks nice but havent tried it.
Staff was friendly and helpfull, check in and check out process was efficient. 

The only minus point is lavk soundproofness, this hotel dony use carpets in any area so it bit noisy. 

I love this hotel tho, will choose Kookon if i visiting Banyuwangi.

author: Kevin
title: Need a little improvement
text:
Very excited with the rooms, complete facility, and the modern atmosphere.
But we suggest to improve reception quality so we don't need to take a long time for check in waiting for room readiness.

author: Imalia Asri Mahardiyani
title: Family Trip
text: Kamarnya sangat baik, prokes yg diterapkan telah sesuai dan berjalan dgn baik. Staf ramah dan sangat helpfull. Perlu ditinjau kembali perihal kebersihan rooftop, saya liat ada sampah cukup banyak di kolam. Cukup banyak variasi makanan ketika breakfast, untuk maincourse bisa ditingkatkan lagi rasanya. Overall, kalau berkunjung lagi ke banyuwangi saya mau kembali ke Kokoon. Terima kasih atas hospitalitynya.

author: Yohannes
title: Butuh perbaikan minor
text: Pelayanan di resepsionis harus ditingkatkan agar tamu tidak menunggu lama karena alasan kamar belum siap.

author: Hendra Setiawan
title: Standard
text: Dpt kamar di 1503, malam bnyk suara berisik sepertinya dr atas lntai 16 karna diatas kamar persis sky lounge nya, ada suara2 berisik org mindah kursi dan meja.. lain kali ngga mau lg dkasih kamar dibawah lantai 16 persis

author: Eli
title: Wonderful
text:
Staff are very helpfull and excellent service, Pak Ghofur and Mba Octa, have a little misunderstanding when we have BF, it because room are fully booked so we take BF at the same time and have limited seat. So we need to back to our room and then the staff help us to reservation the table. So sorry for our misunderstanding, keep up your great job.. Recomended hotel to stay when we go to banyuwangi.. See you next tine KoKoon..
-

author: Pascalis Eben M
title: Holiday
text: Good hotel for holiday w/ family

author: Marissa
title: Little bit dissapointed

its a relatively new building, probably more suitable to those having holiday in Banyuwangi. for us transiting before entering Bali, the location is quite far from the Ketapang port. 
breakfast quite ok... they have few options and taste was good. Indoor pool which is nice but I didnt get to try it since only staying for night.
nothing much...I only stay for a transit during my trip back n forth Bali-JKT

author: Hendra
title: Impression
text:
Kesan pertama dikota transit menuju Bali dan tanya informasi2 mengenai hotel dan akhirnya dapat disini. Ya biarlah hny semalam aja yg penting bersih. Ternyata saat tiba sudah disambut oleh staff security yg sangat berpengalaman dan conciarge yg ramah,reception yg super ramah…wah pokoknya berkesan sekali. Saat naik kekamar saja sangat bagus minimalis dan nyaman.
Saat kembali saya akan kembali ke Kokoon lagi that for sure

author: Andreas Subijanto
title: Nice Stay

Hotel Bersih
Kamar luas dan estetik
Proses Check in dan Check Out Cepat 
Breakfast kualitas rasa sudah sangat baik
Varian juga banyak

Hanya disayangkan, ketika butuh compliment air mineral tambahan 1 botol
Dikenakan charge

Dalam perjalanan saya selama ini
Dan stay di aneka hotel berbeda
Baru kali ini di charge 😊

Overall tetap pengalaman yang baik stay di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi

title: nice hotel but..
text:
nice hotel and staff, especially for the staff at breakfast name "Ageng" ( if I m not mistaken,he's from bali ).
if it is not rushing people for check out ( the hotel is not fully booked during this period anyway, and we were packing our luggages when they call ) and never asking if we need a porter during the call at 11:20 am, ( later find out that the hotel has no bellboy, I have to carry my luggages myself ), then I would be given 10.

author: Adeline

author: Adeline
title: Loves it!
text: Family room is just the best fit for those travelling j  groups!!

title: Good hotel because it's new but lousy service
text: At first, we are really excited to try this hotel as our transit hotel. We checked in around 10 pm. We upgraded our room to family room because we traveled with 3 children. As soon as we checked in, I already asked them to provide me a small table and a single chair for kids' online school tomorrow morning. They said yes but nothing came until we checked out. Sadly, one of our kids had to do the online school on the bed and she accidently dropped her tea (very very soft color, nothing compared to pee color) on the bed. The hotel charged us to pay 350,000. In their defense, they said the stain is hard to remove. As for I know, it only needed just a little detergent or even just shampoo/soal to remove it. And all this accident would also not happen if they provide us the chair and table we require. One more thing, they would not spare any free mineral water except what you got in your room, not even 1 bottle. We would not mention this if this is a hostel or a budget hotel. But we are talking about 4-star hotel here. In conclusion, they are just a well-furnished new hotel with a super lousy service. They greed on every cents of your money. Make sure if you bring your children here, you bring enough water because there's no minimarket in neighbor distance. And make sure your kids don't spill anything or even pee on the bed.

text: Amazing, magnificent, and superb hotel with complete & perfect staycation facilities and hospitality... They done really great health protocol that obviously made u feel safe! Amazing pool, gym and sauna! Love the vibe, architectures, design, specially our room with sunrise van java balcony from the Bali Strait view... Food just amazing! Surprise with hommie ps3 racing console with home theater speaker, dingdong (our childhood memories) and observation deck!!! I think this the best luxury hotel & villas in regency not as a city but town or regency in Indonesia! Gonna be comeback as soon as possible!! Keep up the good work to feel those warm, nice and sweetheart hotel crew!

They are so helpful and initiative. Surely will go back again to this hotel everytime we're in Banyuwangi!

author: Diah Ayu Intan Sari
text: Menginap di kamar 1106, seneng banget bisa dapat view pemandangan hijau dan biru bersamaan, lautan Bali terlihat dari sini dan sebagian kecil pengunungan juga terlihat, bisa lihat matahari terbit juga, Secara pelayanan sih nyaman tapi ada beberapa staff hotel yang kurang ramah, selain itu rasa makanannya kurang menurut saya, waktu makan malam cumi masak balinya masih alot, lalu ikan dorrynya kurang seasoning jadi amisnya berasa masihan, Paginya waktu breakfast, makan spaghetti entah bumbu apa soalnya nemu cengkeh dimienya, dan ginger yang dicop kecil gak terlalu kelihatan jadi kemakan dan musti melepeh makanan pas lg enak makan 😂 rasanya gimana gitu, selain itu sekelas hotel bintang 4 saladnya gak ada, cuma buah potong aja, biasanya dihotel bintang serupa ada saladnya sih biarpun dikit, enggak tahu mungkin akan coba hotel di Banyuwangi yang lain untuk padanan apakah mmg disini hotel-hotel umumnya demikian. Updated Pengalaman menginap kedua dapat kamar dilantai 7, di 723 dengan view ke arah barat melihat gunung. Menginap selama 2 malam tapi condimen seperti air mineral teh dllnya tidak diganti dengan yang baru. Lalu ada pengalaman yang tidak mengenakkan sih menurut saya, waktu cek out kamar memang di Kokoon itu kita diminta untuk menunggu untuk di cek kan kamarnya oleh pegawainya katanya "kalau ada barang-barang yg tertinggal" setelah menunggu kurleb 5 menit, kami diberitahu kalau tidak ada yg tertinggal dan kami dipersilahkan pulang, Nah ini yg mengurangi rating dari awalnya saya beri bintang 🌟🌟🌟🌟 menjadi bintang 🌟🌟🌟 saja karena waktu dijalan kami ditelpon apakah kami membawa handuk kecil milik hotel td? Hallo bapak ibu, waktu cekout apa tidak sekalian di cek kelengkapan kamarnya, kenapa kami seakan dituduh mengambil handuk coba? Sampai ditanya detail saya taruh handuknya dimana 😂astaga, saya bilang ya bareng handuk yg lainnya lah, katanya akan kami konfirmasikan lagi ke petugasnya katanya gak ditemukan waktu tadi, lha kenapa baru bilang ketika kami sudah dijalan, gak sekalian waktu kami diminta menunggu disana tadi biar sekalian cek sama-sama kalau perlu, Pegawainya yang gak profesional sekali. Kerja itu yang teliti dicek satu-satu, ini main nuduh ke customer juga tanpa minta maaf lagi si mbanya yg telpon. Jujur saya kecewa sekali. Baru pertama nginep dihotel yg waktu cekout disuruh nunggu, waktu udah dijalan balik masih juga ditanyain bawa handuk hotel yg kecil bu? 😂😂 Hotel bintang empat kok begini.

author: Reyner Gunawan
text: Spend 2 nights here with my room in 10th floor. Has a very narrow balcony overlooking the city. View was quite nice.. check-in was easy, staffs were very friendly and helpful. Room was great, bed was comfy, the room was almost identical with the design in dialoog. Amenity was enough, bathroom was standard. Visit the pool, water was interestingly cold, probably it has something to do with the sauna at the locker but sauna wasnt working during my stay. The gym was rather small and not appealing. Visit the restaurant, really love the chicken satay and beef satay, it was very tender and delicious. Also tried the sosis solo and the cheesecake, its not the best i've tried tho.. They have an observation deck at 16th floor which is the rooftop, where you can have an almost-360⁰-view and also another restaurant there which i didnt try. Not a fast check-out, they asked us to wait for a while, but give a heartwarming chocolate cookies as a goodbye gift.

author: Lasa Rey
text: Персонал очень компетентный! Этот отель заслуживает 5 заезд ! Многие отелям есть чему у них поучиться ! Даже моя просьба найти витамин С в 22:00, что бы не заболеть после вулкана и холода , была исполнена ! Ну или попросив постирать мою одежду стаф уже через 2 мин был около двери ! По отелю , стилю и чистоте... Я перфекционист в вопросе чистоты. Идеальная чистота ! Номера в классическом стиле без излишеств! Отель совсем новый как я понимаю ! Все пахнем парфюмом и деревом ! Прекрасный спа Сауна , тренажёрный зал и вишенка на торте это массаж ! Даже на Бали посетив массу «раскрученных» спа, такого уровня не встречала ! Кухня ... Хорошая , предложений в меню не много, но если уж чего-то сильно хочется вас услышать и попробуют угодить! Я очень советую вам его посетить, особенно если хочется качественного отдыха после долгих путешествий !

author: Leo Gio
text: Ke Banyuwangi? Pastikan Anda menginap di hotel Kokoon ini! Dari awal tiba, hotel ini langsung memberikan pelayanan yg maksimal. Mereka menawarkan bantuan utk kami dapat menyimpan frozen food kami di chiller/ freezer mereka, karena kami kebetulan road trip Bali- Jakarta. Proses check-in yg mudah. Lobby yg nyaman dan aromatherapy yg wangi. Hotel ini punya indoor swimming pool di lantai 2 dan jg fasilitas spa. Jika Anda ke lantai 16 tersedia lounge bar dan pada rooftop, Anda akan dimanjakan dgn pemandangan kota Banyuwangi dan selat Bali. Benar-benar baguss. Anda jg bisa lihat sunrise di sini. Kereennn.. Suasana kamar jg nyaman, bersih, amenitiesnya jg wangi, enak deh pokoknya. Sandal kamarnya, bermotif batik. 😁 Sayangnya kami hanya menginap 1 malam saja karena harus melanjutkan perjalanan. Kami betah di sini lama-lama. ☺️ Breakfast ada di lantai 3, mulai dari pukul 06.00-10.00, Anda akan langsung dilayani oleh staffs yg sangat ramah, cekatan, dan very helpful n thoughtful. Mbak Fingky salah satunya yg membuat kami beberapa kali salute dgn pelayanannya. Top class. 👍 Hospitality service inilah yg membuat kami betah dan nyaman berada di hotel ini. Bahkan hotel bintang 5 sekalipun, banyak yg tidak memberikan layanan seperti ini. Hotel ini give their best service we've ever experienced. 👍 Klo ada yg mungkin bisa diperbaiki, mungkin masalah shower yg airnya kadang dingin, kadang panas, kurang stabil. Jika ada kesempatan, kami jg ingin mencoba menginap di Kokoon Surabaya. Well done management Kokoon! 👍👍

text: Family roomnya bersih dan cukup luas untuk ber 4. View cukup ok, pemandangan sawah dan gunung (kalau ga ketutup kabut). Sayang sabunnya tidak diisi penuh jadi besoknya waktu mandi sempet kehabisan. Untung bawa sabun sendiri. Mgkn karena bukan model tube yg bisa dibawa2, melainkan nempel di tempat sabun (ga bisa dicabut) jd lupa ngisi. Makanan cukup mahal dan rasa standart. Nyobain all you can eat tapi yg enak cm dikit, lainnya biasa aja. Onde2nya enak sih. Kolam renangnya duingin bangett. Dan pas kesana airnya butek kotor, ampun dah. Ruang gantinya sih bagus, bersih dan ada locker2nya. Kids room terlalu kecil, cm isi meja, kertas gambar, tv dan beberapa buku cerita. Fasilitas utk anak kurang sekali, jd mereka cepet bosan nginap sana. Semoga kedepan fasilitas bisa ditambah

text: Karena saya orang Indo, saya review pakai bahasa Indo ya haha.. Ini hotel dari sekian hotel di Banyuwangi yang paling best lah menurut saya.. Semuanya nyaman, apalagi servis nya duhhh, super excellent! Dari Receptionis (saya lupa nama nya, pokoknya mba nya tinggi haha) trus petugas bersih kamar mas Wiwid, you re so kindly, kemudian mba Rachma yang menyambut dengan hangat dan senyum manis setiap pagi sebelum masuk room restaurant, kemudian ada mas Frans dan mba Indah yang selalu tulus hati melayani setiap permintaan customer.. Sangat menyenangkan dan hari ini Sabtu 11 September 2021 adalah ke 4 kali nya saya menginap di sini.. Dan setiap bertugas di Banyuwangi, pasti nya akan menginap disini lagi.. Tolong mba mas di atas jangan di ganti yaa, mereka yang membuat customer betah dan nyaman nginap disini lhoo anw, tentunya mba mas yg alin juga sih, but nginap 4 malam disini rasanya kurang kalau servis nya selalu the best gini.. BRAVO KOKOON BANYUWANGI, YOU THE BEST HOTEL!!

Padahal di hotel malang bintang 5 itu diberi waktu tambahan dgn alasan apapun. Katanya saya di telfon receiptonist jam 15.00 ternyata gak ditelfon makanya saya telfon berkali kali. Sampe jam 15.30 an baru masuk hotel. Tidak berperikemanusiaan maaf :) 2. Tidak ada breakfast dengan menu daging, parah! Bintang 4 kok tidak ada menu daging 3. Pelayan waktu breakfast aku tanyain ini croffle apa waffle dia jawabnya croffle padahal waffle. Ini saya  ng test

So the kids didn’t get bored. There’s indoor pool facilities too. Definitely wiIl be back soon! Highly recommended hotel in banyuwangi !

author: Aryo Wibisono
title: Great
text: Well more than my expectation

author: Rudy Widjaja
title: Not as expected
text:
Banyuwangi is a warm weather city which you need a hotel with good cooling system. Kokoon has weak A/C and can't cool down the room temperature.

Breakfast is insufficient. Omlet egg is cold. Other food is tasteless like the chef has covid and can't taste his meals.

The hall in front of room is very noisy in the morning. You can hear clearly people yell, scream and walking.

Rooftop is like a ghosttown. Nobody was there even waiters.

author: Hery
title: Satisfied
text: I love to stay at Kokoon Hotel. The room is big n nice. Bed n pillows are comfy. Breakfast has lots of varieties. Nice gym n pool. The staff are friendly n helpful. Please put shampoo n soap at pool changing room. Overall , i had a very satisfying experience and definitelly will be back 👍

author: Paul
title: Uitstekend nieuw hotel
text:
Ik was hier 1 nacht. Zeer ruime en zeer schone kamer. Prima bedden. Wifi was goed. Er was koffiezet-apparatuur. Personeel vriendelijk en behulpzaam voor zover nodig. Uitgebreid buffet-ontbijt. Het hotel ligt op plm 20 minuten rijden van de haven Ketapang. Het hotel is nieuw. Aangenaam verblijf gehad.
Geen negatieve zaken.

author: Dianty
title: Good and Nice place for transit and working
text:
Good view if you get the room to see the sea.. however, at night there's always venue from the neighbourhood which stop around 11pm. 

Standard food with good service.

author: Wiwied
title: Fasat Hotel cukup menarik
text: Hotel masih baru, nyaman, makan malam di roof top cukup berkesan dengan biaya yg terjangkau, untuk yg mau explore Banyuwangi bisa menjadi pilihan, tetapi bagi yang akan nyebrang ke Bali memang cukup jauh ke penyebrangan bisa 30 mnt perjalanan.

author: yustina
title: Great hotel
text: All good and thanks to staff for great hospitality (Indah and Awan)

author: Ian
title: Transit hotel for way back home from Bali road trip
text:
Hotel is quite brandnew and all room and facilities are in good condition and all staff very helpful.
Covid health protocol didn't stricly applied when the hotel held bbq dinner event on the roof top, too many visitor at the same time, it need to do time visit arrangement for visitor, it same like do for the breakfast time.

author: Muhamad Arief Adinugraha
title: Mr
text: This hotel is nice, but please put menu and number receptionist restaurant ect in the room, because not any guest not necessarily understand with scan barcode in the tv.

author: kezia t
title: Superb
text: Had a very pleasant stay after a long trip from surabaya. All staff is well-trained and friendly. Very clean property. Foods need improvement but a good one for a new hotel. Hope to visit another day!

author: Pasha Pradana Naim
title: Nice experience
text: This hotel is awesome! It has a great COVID-19 health protocol!

author: Leonardus Kurni... D
title: HOTEL TERDABEST
text:
Karena saya orang Indo, saya review pakai bahasa Indo ya haha..
Ini hotel dari sekian hotel di Banyuwangi yang paling best lah menurut saya.. Semuanya nyaman, apalagi servis nya duhhh, super excellent!
Dari Receptionis (saya lupa nama nya, pokoknya mba nya tinggi haha) trus petugas bersih kamar mas Wiwid, you re so kindly, kemudian mba Rachma yang menyambut dengan hangat dan senyum manis setiap pagi sebelum masuk room restaurant, kemudian ada mas Frans dan mba Indah yang selalu tulus hati melayani setiap permintaan customer.. Sangat menyenangkan dan hari ini Sabtu 11 September 2021 adalah ke 4 kali nya saya menginap di sini.. Dan setiap bertugas di Banyuwangi, pasti nya akan menginap disini lagi.. Tolong mba mas di atas jangan di ganti yaa, mereka yang membuat customer betah dan nyaman nginap disini lhoo anw, tentunya mba mas yg alin juga sih, but nginap 4 malam disini rasanya kurang kalau servis nya selalu the best gini.. BRAVO KOKOON BANYUWANGI, YOU THE BEST HOTEL!!

author: Dhini P. S.
text: Recommended banget buat staycation di kokoon hotel jaman pandemi gini. Prokesnya bagus. Semua yang ada di kokoon hotel bersih rapi dan nyaman banget. Semua petugasnya ramah-ramah.

author: RSurya
title: Lovely Hotel!
text:
We choose to stay in Kokoon on our road-trip back from Bali. Kokoon is a vey nice looking, clean hotel with great facilities and also delicious food, not to mention excellent service. 

Too bad we can only stayed for 1 night, will surely be back to spend more time in this lovely hotel.

author: Emil Wiranegara
title: Great stay at Kokoon Banyuwangi
text: Service excellent. Room great. Health Protocol OK.

author: Egi Kurniawan
title: Simple luxury hotel with unexpected natural view
text: At first sight to this building is very interesting along the national road heading to downtown of Banyuwangi from the airport only 20 minutes. Lovely receptionist, great place with a little romantic ballroom. New building, excellent facility and private room. When you wake up in the morning you can enjoy the sunrise, green view, couple of mountain and also the blue sky if you are lucky one.

title: Cozy hotel
text:
Saya ambil yg 2 kamar connecting room..karna sekarang dah ga cukup kalo 1 kamar aja..anak pertama dah 15 taon..dah big boy..yg kedua masi pake suster.
Dengan adanya connecting room, saya bisa mudah bolak baliknya..dan juga bisa dapat 4 org utk breakfastnya. 

Tiba di hotel udah jam 8 malam dari Jakarta ..capek buanget..kalo stay di daerah pelabuhan bakal lebih Lama lagi.
Di kokoon dah pas buangets. Besok paginya cuma 30mnt jg ke pelabuhan kok.

title: Nice room and services
text:
I needed to check out very early in the morning on the next day, the staffs were very understanding and cooperative by preparing the meal at night so we could bring them when we checked out. Thanks to Mr. Yagin (front office) and Ms. Nova (restaurant).
The room was very comfortable and clean, I have booked the hotel again for my upcoming stay when I return from Bali. Excellent!

author: Sunarto Hasan
title: Hotel yang nyaman
text: Bersih, staff reseptionis ramah & staff restoran sangat ramah dan membantu

author: Budi Ranu
title: Favorite Hotel
text: Before you visited Bali, you can feel the atmosphere in here. Kokoon is one of the luxury hotel in Banyuwangi. The room and bathroom are spacious and bright, the indoor swimming pool (2nd floor) and the rooftop bar (16th floor) very entertaint with minimalis and modern design. There were games station at the bar. Altough we get the ala carte breakfast served in the box (during covid19 pandemic) but the nasi lemak ayam kalio is the best, the chicken is so tender and juicy.

author: FELIX
title: Nice hotel
text: Location is bit far but the hotel is clean and great hospitality

author: Suka Sendiri
title: Liburan
text:
Salah satu rekomendasi hotel saat berlibur di Banyuwangi memiliki ketinggian yang lebih dari hotel lainnya di Banyuwangi menjadikan hotel ini memiliki pemandangan yang bagus ketika kita melihatnya dari atas rooftop.

Selain itu pelayanannya juga ramah terhadap tamu. Akses hotel pun juga mudah, karena di lewati oleh jalan nasional.

title: view dari kamar bagus, kebersihan kamar juga ok
text: overall stay ok, cuman yang perlu diperhatikan adalah waktu kita ke restaurant di lt 3 untuk makan malam, salah satu staff yang melayani kami itu mbaknya suaranya serak, dan memakai masker posisi mlorot, sehingga hidungnya tidak tercover. saat2 yang rawan begini hal2 seperti ini tidak boleh diremehkan. karena penularan varian delta ini cepat sekali.... udah tau kalo ada badan yang tidak enak, sedikit pun harus segera melakukan swab antigen paling tidak.... karena ini sungguh2 hal yang serius.... mungkin angka di banyuwangi tidak tinggi covidnya, tapi tidak boleh dianggap remeh. karena begitu banyak sekali orang2 yang sudah terpapar hanya dengan contact yang singkat dengan orang yang positif....

author: very
title: hotel terbaik di banyuwangi
text: salah satu hotel baru di banyuangi yang sangat bagus dan nyaman, kebetulan ketika keluarga saya melakukan perjalanan ke banyuwangi orangtua saya tertarik dengah hotel ini fasilitas lengkap kamar besih menu sarapan lengkap sangat puas menginap disini, sayangnya saya dan keluarga hanya bisa menginap 1 malam karna harus  balik ke surabaya semua staf ramah  dan membatu terutama mas diaz sangat cekatan dan sabar trimakasih hotel kokoon 😇
