Cobain deh

title: Mrs
text: Great hotel in Banyuwangi, great facilities, okay food

author: Eko P.
text: Hotel baru yang bagus, penataan ruangan hotel yang nyaman, prokes dilakukan dengan baik dan bisa lihat pemandangan gunung dan sawah.

title: one of the best Hotel @ Banyuwangi
text: stayed here only for sleeping transit after long ride. at first it feels like this hotel quite far (from the ferry port) , because i believe these days people stays at banyuwangi for a transit to/from bali, but it all paid after we see and arrived at the hotel, very good service, great staffs, great protocol (for the pandemic era), and quite clean 👍  we regret that we didn't take the breakfast package (because we arrived at 11PM and will take aerly check out for another ride) , their breakfast looks interesting for a 4star hotel, i take a small hotel tour in the morning by myself, and their facilites looks good, great view (no mather what are your room facing, all is green + mountain/sea), overall, we really enjoy the stay, and surely will pick this hotel when we go to banyuwangi again!

author: Gho4
title: Wow....
text:
Excellent service for all staff...
5 thumbs for you guys...

author: McGrady
title: one of the best @ Banyuwangi
text: stayed here only for sleeping transit after long ride. at first it feels like this hotel quite far (from the ferry port) , because i believe these days people stays at banyuwangi for a transit to/from bali, but it all paid after we see and arrived at the hotel, very good service, great staffs, great protocol (for the pandemic era), and quite clean 👍  we regret that we didn't take the breakfast package (because we arrived at 11PM and will take aerly check out for another ride) , their breakfast looks interesting for a 4star hotel, i take a small hotel tour in the morning by myself, and their facilites looks good, great view no mather what are you room facing (all green plus mountain/sea), overall, we really enjoy the stay, and surely will pick this hotel when we go to banyuwangi again!

title: Salah satu hotel tertinggi dan terbagus di Banyuwangi
text: Bangunan masih baru, kamarnya bagus cuman kurang kedap suara (suara kendaraan dari jalan terdengar jelas di kmr lt. 5). Breakfast overall good.

author: Marlene R.
text: We booked this hotel during our trip to bali without any expectations, but once we arrived the hotel surprised us. The hotel is beautiful inside out, interior and exterior. Room was great, bed was comfortable, room service and housekeeping responded well, pool also good even its only indoor pool. The ijen restaurant served us great, the food also delicious although they still have limited menu. The hotel worth a come back we even stayed there again when we came back to java island.

author: agustania
title: very very very recommended hotel di Banyuwangi
text: hotel yang kece banget! stafnya ramaaaah semuanya, helpful banget,, bantuin dari mulai check in, informatif banget ttg tujuan wisata di Banyuwangi. Kamarnya bersih banget, wangi, nyaman banget!! betah banget deh.. oia, protokol kesehatan disini bagus bgt!! dapat care box yg isinya hand sanitizer dan masker. trus fasilitas disini juga oke banget. ada view deck di lantai 16, bisa liat kota banyuwangi dr rooftop, trus bisa dinner beratapkan langit Pokoknya keren banget.. klo nanti ke Banyuwangi, akan nginep sini lagi

author: Harry
title: Comfortable hotel with beautiful view
text:
The room is big, very clean, and have large double beds. the view to Mt Ijen from our room was amazing. The hotel exceeds our expectation.
Breakfast was average taste with not so many choices (especially if you are looking for non-Indonesia food), however the service provided by the restaurant staff was excellent.

author: Harahap
title: Wonderful
text:
Clean, big rooms.
The food did not taste good.

author: Tanto G.
text: Saya menginap di sini bersama keluarga, sekedar jalan-jalan saja. Bangunan, kamar masih baru, bagus, parkir basement luas, restroom baik. Sukanya aroma terapi di lobby harum bau jahe 😁. Untuk view biasa aja kurang menarik, pool nya indoor di lantai 2, kecil. Breakfast overall good, prokes 👍. Minusnya: saya stay di deluxe balcony, kamar kurang kedap suara, suara kendaraan dari luar bisa kedengaran jelas dari kamar.

title: hotel yang bagus dan nyaman dengan servis yang excellent
text: Suka sekali dengan Kokoon hotel Banyuwangi. hotelnya bagus , bersih,wangi, dan ada view deck nya di lantai 16, jadi bisa liat seluruh pemandangan kota banyuwangi!!. Semua stafnya ramah dan helpful banget. Dan yang paling penting, protokol kesehatannya sangat diperhatikan disini. Kolam renang, sauna, makanan.. semuanya oke banget deh. InsyaAllah akan kembali lagi ke Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi.

title: Just Perfect Nice Location
text: New hotels with chic concept perfect for business travelers. Very recommended stay at high floor if the skies  bright you might see the ocean and Bali Islands

author: Miftakul Huda
title: Just Perfect Nice Location
text:
New hotels with chic concept perfect for business travelers. Very recommended stay at high floor if the skies  bright you might see the ocean and Bali Islands. 

and also the mountain if you got the room overlooking to Ijen Crater

author: sugiarto
title: Kokoon Hotel
text: Hotel yg bagus, staff dan service yg luar biasa.. ada sedikit masalah.. tapi management memberikan service yg sangat memuaskan... saya akan kembali stay di sini apabila kunjungan ke Banyuwangi

title: Very good
text:
Sayangnya tentang kolam renang. 
Bwt dewasa terlalu dalam. Request bisa dijadikan 1.2M
dan pinggirnya dikasih tangga permanen bkn besi. Tq

title: Professional and Friendly beyond expectations
text:
We booked previously another hotel for our 5 day stay in Banyuwangi, but when we arrived, the facility was far below acceptable so we checked out immediately and began looking for another hotel. We remembered seeing the Kokoon Hotel further back and decided to give it a try. Obviously we didn't have a reservation when we greeted by the hotel receptionist. We booked for two nights, but after checking into our room and looking at the amenities, we quickly decided to extend the stay for the entire 5 days.

We are glad that we did! The hospitality was beyond expectations. The entire staff from receptionist, security, concierge, wait staff, and cleaning crew were professional and friendly - always greeting us with a warm smile. In addition, we were greeted by the manager of the hotel during our first morning breakfast.

We will definitely stay at the Kokoon again whenever we visit Banyuwangi. Thanks for the morning exercise, cookies, and family ambiance.

author: Daydream827626
title: Professional and Friendly beyond expectations
text:
We booked previously another hotel for our 5 day stay in Banyuwangi, but when we arrived, the facility was far below acceptable so we checked out immediately and began looking for another hotel. We remembered seeing the Kokoon Hotel further back and decided to give it a try. Obviously we didn't have a reservation when we greeted by the hotel receptionist. We booked for two nights, but after checking into our room and looking at the amenities, we quickly decided to extend the stay for the entire 5 days.

We are glad that we did! The hospitality was beyond expectations. The entire staff from receptionist, security, concierge, wait staff, and cleaning crew were professional and friendly - always greeting us with a warm smile. In addition, we were greeted by the manager of the hotel during our first morning breakfast.

We will definitely stay at the Kokoon again whenever we visit Banyuwangi. Thanks for the morning exercise, cookies, and family ambiance.

author: Edy H.
text: Maaf, yang bikin kurang nyaman listrik sering turun voltagenya bikin tv dan lampu mati. Walau hanya sekejap.

title: Hotel Dengan View Terbaik
text: Selain pelayanannya baik, view dari Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi ini sangat kece. Di sebelah barat view pegunungan Ijen, di sebelah timur view Selat Bali.

title: Nyaman
text: Hotelnya cukup nyaman dan tenang, dapat kamar dengan view yang bagus. Perfect

author: Yenny
title: Amazing short stay
text: Thank you Kokon Hotel for the great and friendly service to us during our stay last year.

It was the first time I visited Banyuwangi and I chose Kokoon Hotel.
The hospitality is outstanding, all the staff are so friendly and helpful.
The last day I stayed there was a flood all over the basement and lobby so there was no breakfast in the morning, but they showed the apology by giving us free dinner.
The room is clean and cozy, the wifi is fast, the gym and pool also good.
Overall staying in Kokoon Hotel one of the best experience I’ve ever had while staying in Banyuwangi. Thanks!

author: Nyu24
title: Beautiful View from the Rooftop and Room
text: The view is wonderful, the staffs are helpful and friendly, the foods are amazing, nasi goreng Ijen and Iga Bakar are my fav. Definitely will come back and stay at the Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi again!  Thanks Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi

author: Brian
title: Excellent place
text: Comfortable, clean, stylish, excellent staff, good food, nice views.

author: Zibivi
title: Gak nyangka ada hotel seperti ini di Banyuwangi
text:
Saya menginqp di Kamar Keluarga 2 king size bedroom dalam satu kamar. Desain lobi, bale bengong sebelum masuk lobi, perpaduan modern dan alam di lobi dan sekitarmya bagus. Kamar bafus sekali dengan kayu2 MoF del modern. Harmonis sekali perpaduan2nya. Pintu kamar mandinya unik. Air kamar mandi segar bersih, air panasnya bekerja dengan baik. TV nya lengkap teelihat sekali HD nya. Sarapan nya bervariasi. Kamar kami menghadap ke gunung, indah sekali. Parkiran cukup luas. Ini hotel bagus.
Kettika check out, kami diminta menunggu agak lama untuk stafnya memeriksa kamar kami.

title: Bad Experience and Bad Respon
text:
Bad Service
Bad Responsive 
Bad Information when any accident

author: Fika
title: It was unpleasant
text: The room was clean and spacious. If there hadn’t been the flooding incident that forced the hotel to turn off the electricity, it would have been a nice stay. I didn’t blame the hotel for the incident, but their slow action to make us feel comfortable and cared for in the most inconvenient condition was unfortunate. Earlier in the morning we have no way of communicating with the hotel staff to get an update and they didn’t update us either, the lobby phone was not active and the WhatsApp message was not delivered. What was promised to be a 30 minutes black out turned out way longer than that. We were practically stranded. I booked a room with no breakfast as we planned to leave early in the morning but with the incident we couldn’t leave the room and they didn’t offer us any breakfast as compensation and didn’t suggest to have breakfast in our room (I was the one who initiated to have the breakfast sent up with a feeling of irritation as they suggested us to go down to level 3 while I was at level 15), did they expect us to go down to level 3 for breakfast and go up to level 15 again? They definitely didn’t think this through which means they are not trained for immediate actions in emergency situations. Forced to go down 15 level to lobby for check out was definitely not a good experience for me who has a pre existing leg condition. I still suffer from pain and swelling after that.

title: Prank lampu mati🙂
text: Banjir di lantai bawah mengakibatkan lampu mati total dan lif juga mati dimana lantai sy berada di lt8 kalau melalui tangga darurat lumayan cape sampai sampai saya ketinggalan pesawat untuk pulang ke jakarta.

author: Wawan

author: FikaMaya
title: Hotel room was good but with unfortunate experience
text: The room was clean and spacious, the hotel was actually quite nice. If there hadn’t been the an incident that forced the hotel to turn off the electricity, it would have been a nice stay. I didn’t blame the hotel for the incident, but their slow action to make us feel comfortable and cared for in the most inconvenient condition was unfortunate. Earlier in the morning we have no way of communicating with the hotel staff to get an update and they didn’t update us either, the lobby phone was not active and the WhatsApp messages were not delivered. What was promised to be a 30 minutes black out turned out way longer than that (black out occured at around 3pm, they announced it via speaker, woke us all up and I should note that they didn’t apologize for having to turn off the power). We were practically stranded. I booked a room with no breakfast as we planned to leave early in the morning but with the incident we couldn’t leave the room and they didn’t offer us any breakfast as compensation and didn’t suggest to have breakfast in our room (I was the one who initiated to have the breakfast sent up with a feeling of irritation as they suggested us to go down to level 3 while I was at level 15), did they expect us to go down the stairs to level 3 for breakfast and go up to level 15 again? They definitely didn’t think this through which means they are not trained for emergency situations. Forced to go down 15 level to lobby for check out was definitely not a good experience for me who has a pre existing leg condition. I still suffer from pain and swelling after that. Hotel management need to think about where they should put their power centre away from the river. Smh.

author: Indira
title: Wonderful
text:
The beds were large. We love the Family Room option, it's really a draw card. Not many hotels have this option. We are family of 4 kids so this option really suit us well. With 4 pax free breakfast, and only our 7 year old paid for half of the price, it was really fair.
The breakfast was splendid. The options were varied and all tasted wonderful (although they gave me margarine instead of butter to company my croissant :), maybe next time they need to understand the difference between butter and margarine), the covid protocols were taken seriously, the staff served what we chose. The seat position were well managed. The staff at the breakfast restaurant were all 5 stars!
At our check out, the reception gave us a pack of chocolate chip cookies which my son love, and she managed to have a chat about the hotel and what needed to be improved.
We love Kokoon and will stay there again InshaaAllah if we come to Banyuwangi again. Hopefully with the same friendly rate!
The parking lot on the basement can only be reached by stairs and off the lobby. Not an easy access

title: Staycation
text:
Staycation di Banyuwangi cek. Salah satu hotel terbaik di banyuwangi dengan Julukan Hotel tertinggi di Banyuwangi. Dengan Pemandangan sunrise dan sunset yang bagus banget ketika cuaca bagus. Spot favorit melihat pemandangan disini adalah di rooftop.

Pelayanan sangat baik, Staf sangat ramah, kamar sangat bersih, menu di restaurant sangat enak, pelayan penyajian restaurant sangat baik. Bagi kalian yang ke Banyuwangi, tempat ini bisa menjadi referensi ketika liburan atau sedang perjalanan ke banyuwangi untuk staycatian dan menginap disini.

author: Willy
title: Nice new modern hotel
text: Hotelnya bagus, kamar modern , bersih, kasur nya sangat amat nyaman, breakfast enak, memang lokasi agak jauh 5-10 menit dr kota tapi cukup bagus, view kamar ganjil sangat cantik ke gn ijen. Kamar cukup luas,  harga sangat masuk akal dengan kualitas seperti ini, service memuaskan, ramah dan sangat membantu, pertahankan kinerja nya

Very nice hotel since it was the newest hotel in town. Room was spacious, amenities are nice, staff are very friendly and attentive. Looking great on the rooftop bar, nice "semi indoor" pool although its not big. The food was delicious and the restaurant have a very calm ambience. Will recommend this hotel to anyone looking to visit Banyuwangi. Some tip: since its not really in the middle of the city (can't really walk for food/shopping), if you bring your own car it would be the best (to cruise around).

title: Hotel baru yang luar biasa

Pertama kali ke hotel ini sebenarnya bulan agustus 2020..dan berlanjut ke bulan bulan berikutnya.. Hotelnya luar biasa untuk sekelas daerah banyuwangi.. View belakang dan depan hotelnya bagus banget.. Kamarnya cukup luas dan nyaman banget, hampir setiap kesana dapat kamar yang ada balkonnya dan ini sangat menyenangkan buat saya.. Duduk di balkon sambil menikmati pemandangan
 dan angin adalah hal yang selalu saya lakukan.. Fasilitas hotel ini juga yang jadi pertimbangan untuk selalu balik kesini.. Gym, sauna dan pool nya..  Membuat saya ga cuma bengong ketika ada waktu kosong tapi ga ada kegiatan.. Yang terakhir rooftop cafenya.. Kita bs santai nongkrong atau ketemu rekanan bisnis disini.. Tempatnya cozy dan asyik

Will stay for my next staycation.. please give us your update news especially for your room rate promotion.

Keep success and maintain your quality!

author: Agus H
title: Enjoy every corner
text:
After another hotel stay, we moved to this hotel. The highest hotel in Banyuwangi, Kokoon hotel is one of favorite place for stay. They have rooftop with 360° views, and the room can choose ocean or mountain view.

I love to stay at high floors. In the morning that you can enjoy the sunrise coming up from behind the island of GOD, Bali.

They have sauna that is the first time experienced in Banyuwangi area. Really enjoyed it. The swimming pool at 2nd floor is indoor pool that lil bit cold for me, so just for a while and continue to sauna, uhhhh how is a good life then. Warmest staff at Ijen Restaurant make us really enjoy like a second home, the chef very friendly, chef Bagus, chef Jhon say hi to our table and delivery directly to us, that amazing things! Very rare have it. Waiter and waitress very warm to us. But I forgot the name. Franc the waiter his still remember me as repeater guest in Ijen Restaurant, very appreciated! And also adi at housekeeping team, very friendly.

Easy booking by call to Ms.Ayu the sales team make me easy to booking. And also to Ms. Resti at the Reception she's very warm welcome when we checked in. Feels like this hotel as home, very comfortable.

Of course will coming back!

title: Sauna
text:
The facilities, especially for sauna was great.
The room, was smoke smelling

author: Imelda
title: Wonderful
text:
Bersih.
Cukup jauh dari tempat wisata. Kolam renang indoor dan kecil

author: Imam T.
text: Good place to stay tapi segi kebersihan agak kurang ya.

author: CHE
title: Salah satu hotel terbaik
text: agak jauh dari penyeberangan ketapang gilimanuk , hotel sangat baik dan bersih .

author: Erwin
title: Breakfast
text: Helped by Resto Manager Mr Gofar that We all Vegetarian and served with a best western Vegetarian.

author: Scot
title: Wonderful
text: Great views.

author: Jason
title: Got bed bugs bite after staying there
text:
Me and my partner got bed bugs after staying there, and we notice there are small blood spots on the bed, after we do some research it is one of the signs of bed bugs
And what disappoint me more is that the covid protocol is not enforced correctly in breakfast and when some people entered the hotel
I hope to see it get better

author: sudjan
title: Fresh one in the area
text: This newly operated hotel is a good choice for our family as we felt secure during this trouble period.  All staff are well trained and made us feel very welcome. Keep up the gold standard

author: Silvia
title: Lovely stay for families
text:
Location was okay, a little bit far from the port but since we travelled by car it was still okay. Hotel looked brand new, comfortable and clean. The Family Room beds were great, perfect for family of 4, even for big kids. Pandemic-wise, they had sanitizers everywhere in lobby area and just outside the lifts. All staff wore masks and face shields. The kids got free giant cookies on check-out day so they were very happy.
The bathroom and toilet were a bit small. It would be great if they can have more amenities in the room, such as more tissues and bigger rubbish bins. Otherwise, perfect.

author: Julius Larisman
title: This place is safe and heaven
text:
The covid 19 safety protocol was impressing, rooms are sanitized before we arrive. Foods are delicious, even the buffet breakfast is served, so the food really fresh.
I will come back here again in 2021 !!!
Thanks to all kind staff !!!

author: Diana
text:
Transit dari Bali mau ke Surabaya, 1 malam di Family Room Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi. Nyaman dan bersih kamarnya, viewnya ok. 
Breakfastnya cukup bervariasi dan enak, serta diambilkan oleh petugas.
Untuk fasilitas lain tidak sempat coba.
Lain kali pasti kembali lagi ke Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi...

author: Diah S. W.
text: Keren dong, dua kali menginap disini dua kali dikasih bday cake, not upon request loh ya, karena menginap memang untuk ngerayain ulang tahun. Customer carenya memang keren. Berasa sultan tiap ketemu disapa, selamat ulang tahun ibu, kapan lagi yekan.

author: Maggie
title: Best service and best hotel
text: Setelah perjalanan jauh dan super melelahkan, begitu sampai di hotel, langsung merasa refreshed. Service nya best banget. Stay for a while di rooftop cafe, so nice and beautiful. Absolutely will come back here again!

author: andriyanto
title: Pegawai nya sangat kaku dalam hal kenyamanan
text:
Aqua aja request lg bayar 8 rb per botol
Ganti ranjang mau dicek diteliti mau dikenakan cas apa nda jaga2 kalau kotor
Ini hotel apa rumah sakit
Rumah sakit kaku gpp biar sembuh
Hotel kok kaku

author: Ika
title: Good hotel & facilities
text: Roof top bar is spectacular with mountain & ocean just perfect view. Cocktail /alcohol selection is good lil bit pricey regarding where you are now :) Pool & Gym are awe. Spa is cutey good enough for you to have treatment you need. Hotel should put little more essential amenities such as lotion , cream  & kit. It is not easy for stranger like me to walk outside and buy things Cuz most are local residential area also far from supermarket ( maybe hotel will consider to have small shop inside hotel provide essential things ) . Overall this hotel are great in package .

author: Dwi N
title: "Hotel yang nyaman dengan SDM yang super ramah"
text: Semalam merasakan hotel yang nyaman di family room. Kamar menghadap sebelah barat sehingga bisa melihat pemandangan gunung raung dan ijen. Pesan tiket di salah satu website penjualan tiket tanpa breakfast, pas di hotel dapat free breakfast untuk 4 orang "Alhamdulillah", dan masakannya enak. Kolam renang dan gym cukup memuaskan kami,hampir  2 jam anak anak menghabiskan waktu sambil berenang. Kalau ke banyuwangi lagi, kokoon menjadi pilihan yang pertama...terima kasih kokoon.

author: Taufik C.
text: This hotel was awesome, clean and nice to stay, the room was excelent, is cozy for me and my wife. Thank you

author: Fernand
title: Clean and spacious
text: They have a good building (so artistic) , the bed are comfy, the bathroom clean, all perfect

author: Marissa
title: Best one in Banyuwangi
text: The artistic interior, the super friendliness of the staff, the cleanliness and their awareness for safe procedures during pandemic are the best qualities we found in Kokoon. We love the breakfast though I think they can still add more Western food in their menu. But overall it's a very nice stay and we will be back there for sure!

author: Hendri N. H.
text: Kamar oke, pelayanan oke, makanan oke, senang sekali meskipun hanya stay di hotel, tapi betah. pemandangan luar biasa.

author: Pamadi
title: Enjoyable one night stay
text: Sarapan dengan variasi pilihan yang baik  dan rasa yang memuaskan. Lokasi dengan pemandangan yang luar biasa.

author: Rendi R.
text: Pengalaman menginap yang sangat mengesankan 😊

author: Tanudiredja
title: Modern Luxury at affordable price in Banyuwangi
text: Modern room, comfortable king koil bed, wide twin beds, very nice room view, great bathroom, but location a bit far from Ketapang Ferry Port located at southern part of Banyuwangi. Maybe the best hotel room to stay in Banyuwangi.

author: Ahmad M.
text: Kalau ke Bawi nginepnya di kokoon hotel. layanan baik banget. Breakfastnya lengkap. Rasa enak semua. anak-anak suka, sudah beberapa kali menginap sni. Recommended?

author: Lita
title: Lovely and cozy hotel
text:
Clean room, comfort bed, good food, very very helpfull staff  Will recomend this hotel and definitely will stay again. You should appreciate your staff, they are very proffesional and have good attitude.
Western menu at breakfast is so so, not so special, but indonesian menu is very good. 
We ordered room service and it took forever.

author: Stephanus W.
text: Nice hotel, clean, large parking in basement, near with Ketapang Harbour

author: Jalankaki
title: Mr
text:
Stayed for one night and realize that we need a couple more nights to cover great experience of Banyuwangi. The hotel staffs are very nice, very polite and they always greet us by name. 
Hotel is clean, room is beautiful, very well designed and food are delicious. You must try their grilled rib. Thank you mas Gufron for your impecable assistance in restaurant.
Definitely will come back in the future.

author: Mecha Putu
title: Hotel Kokoon Banyuwangi, hotel tertinggi dengan koneksi internet yang "tinggi"
text:
Sempatkan waktu Anda untuk menginap di hotel Kokoon apabila singgah di Banyuwangi. Lokasinya yang strategis, Rooftop Lounge nya yang kece, serta panoramic deck-nya yang menawarkan pemandangan Selat Bali dan Gunung Ijen pastinya membuat pengalaman menginap Anda tidak terlupakan ...

Untuk menu hidangannya, saya merekomendasikan nasi goreng Ijen serta Omelette-nya. Otentik dan pastinya enak~

Last but not least, disini koneksi internetnya super kenceng lho. 
Bintang ***** ga ada obatnya!!!

author: Adetiya
title: So impressive
text:
When I first come to Kokoon Banyuwangi, I saw that this Hotel was ready for Covid 19 protocol. I feel safe because I went to this hotel with my wife and my 4 years old son.

The restaurant staff was very helpful and friendy. I think you can imagine how take a breakfast with an superactive boys. Fortunately, the waitress can help us. Thanks god.

I can't explain how I feel when stay at Kokoon for 6 days. I will take a note from The Eagle's Song (Hotel California).

You can check out anytime you like but you can never leave

author: Tyas
title: Kokoon Hotel
text:
Kokoon hotel merupakan hotel baru di Banyuwangi. Namun, memiliki SDM yg profesional.. harga kamar terjangkau, menu makannya enak apalagi bbq di rooftopnya..
Pantas dengan harganya..

Informasi disampaikan dengan jelas, maklum krn baru jadi masih belum pernah blusak blusuk ke hotelnya

author: Muhamad G.
text: Great service, great hospitality, and good breakfast. Come back again next time

author: bernardbali72
title: very good but improvements needed
text:
nice place,nice views both sides.
staff pleasant, property clean.
however, junior suite is too expensive.
to be improved:
no doorman at arrival (day off!)
no welcome drink
menu only in indonesian
little choice dishes and on top some not available
some staff not wearing mask

conclusion: good but not ready for foreign tourists. breakfast good with large choice and efficient service.

author: Putri F.
text: Perjalanan bisnis kali ini sangat menyenangkan ketika saya menginap di hotel kokoon banyuwangi. Fasilitas hotel yang lengkap, Kamar yang bersih dan cozy dengan harga yang bagus untuk hotel bintang 4 pelayanan yang super duper great banget breakfast yang oke karyawan hotel yang ramah dan sih. Tidak menyesal menginap di kokoon Banyuwangi selama 3 malam. Recommended hotel dengan pelayanan dan fasilitas prima.

author: Pamela A. P. K. S.
text: liburan era pandemi akhirnya milih staycation di kokoon, nyaman banget ! makanan enak dan staffnya baik + ramah, kalo ke bwi bakalan nginep sini lagi 😍

author: Rahmat
title: Very Good
text:
Kamar bagus.
Swimming pool kecil

author: Muriyanto
title: A perfect choice
text: What a place to stay in Banyuwangi, especially the unique and the cozy one. Complete with cultural touch and modern atmosphere that make us want to go back one day. There is also a 360 panoramic view on top of the hotel that is accessable for all the guests to enjoy between a mountain view or sea view

author: Sangka A.
text: Hotelnya bagus, suka sama interior dan taman di sekitar lobby.

author: Era F. H.
text: Staf ramah dan suasana hotel menyenangkan, terima kasih.

author: Prihadi W
title: Awesome Hotel
text: I was stay from August 31st - Sept 4th 2020. Thanks a lots for the front line people, from security, reception,restaurant and housekeeping. Excellence service, very clean hotel, delicious food and drink, and very very nice view booth sea view and mountain view. See U again in the next business trip.

author: Eka W.
text: Staycation kali ini seru sekali,perjalanan menggunakan kereta api,dan dilanjut dengan ojek online menambah pengalaman perjalanan yang luar biasa,menjatuhkan pilihan di hotel ini adalah pilihan tepat,pelayanan yang begitu ramah di fo nya sampe diantar ke kamar oleh karyawannya (maaf bu,gak sempet nanya nama,tapi anda terbaik,salam kenal dari saya),poolnya berasa milik sendiri(ya iyalah,berenang jam 7 malam!😅),kamar yang luar biasa,tempat tidur yang nyaman(bisa mengatasi low back pain saya😅),rooftrop yang keren,dan saat itu lagi ada promo all u can eat seafood(maafkan saya tidak bisa review dikarenakan tidak mencoba),well,terbaik untuk staycation dengan pasangan ataupun dengan anak2,someday i'll be back😍,oh iya,pas cek out,saya juga dapet gift snack untuk menemani perjalanan saya didalam kereta,thanks kokoon hotel banyuwangi😎

author: Eka wardani
title: Staycation 1 night @kokoon hotel banyuwangi
text: staycation kali ini seru sekali,perjalanan menggunakan kereta api,dan dilanjut dengan ojek online menambah pengalaman perjalanan yang luar biasa,menjatuhkan pilihan di hotel ini adalah pilihan tepat,pelayanan yang begitu ramah di FO nya sampe diantar ke kamar oleh karyawannya (maaf bu,gak sempet nanya nama,tapi anda terbaik,salam kenal dari saya),poolnya berasa milik sendiri(ya iyalah,berenang jam 7 malam!😅),kamar yang luar biasa,tempat tidur yang nyaman(bisa mengatasi low back pain saya😅),rooftrop yang keren,dan saat itu lagi ada promo all u can eat seafood(maafkan saya tidak bisa review dikarenakan tidak mencoba),well,terbaik untuk staycation dengan pasangan ataupun dengan anak2,someday i'll be back😍😍,oh iya,pas cek out,saya juga dapet gift snack untuk menemani perjalanan saya didalam kereta,thanks Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi😎😎

author: raiho
title: 시골에 있는 최고의 호텔
text: 발리가는 중에 묵은 항구근처의 호텔인 데, 지은 지 얼마 안되어 정말 깨끗하고 안락함. 조식도 훌륭하였으며, 주변 경관도 상당함. 강추합니다.

author: Andrew
title: Nice Place
text: Fasilitas lengkap, rooftop oke, bisa liat pegunungan dan laut. Kolam renang disukai anak anak. Free Sauna. Makanan enak. Staf ramah. Pengalaman baru menginap di tempat baru. Banyuwangi memang tiada duanya. Kita pasti akan kembali.

author: Apperila V. H.
text: Kamarnya cukup besar, bersih dan nyaman. Pemandangan dari balkon kamar maupun roof top juga bagus. Fasilitas gym dan sauna nya juga bagus. Makanannya enak.. Pertama kali menginap selama 5 malam.. Luar biasa

author: Imam S.
text: Akomodasi sesuai yang tertera, tempat nyaman luas bersih serta menyenangkan senang sekali menginap di sini.

author: Diah S. W.
text: We had one night stay last weekend for my husband's birthday. Smooth check in process, nice staffs, big clean room though it's just their standard type. It's in 11th floor, came with great landscape. And surprisingly they knocked on the door, handed us slice cake for the birthday day boy😜, fyi, we didn't ask for the cake, nice huh? We had coffee with awesome night city view, didn't try the pool so not much to tell we're just too lazy 😃😃 Don't forget to bring the slippers home, they're cutie Oh the front lady even gave us cookie as a goodbye present It is worth the money

author: Fajri H.
text: Sangat menyenangkan dengan pelayanan yang baik, makan yang enak dan tempat yang bagus, rasanya pengen menginap terus disana. Mau check-out masih di beri souvenir lagi, terima kasih kokoon hotel.

author: Tri
title: Nice
text: Kebersihannya sangat bersih , krywn yg ramah , proses c in cepat

author: Auditya Sari
title: Thank you for paying attention on details!
text:
I was staying 10-14 august 2020 for a business trip. First of all, you won't say NO to their food! We had have happy tummy for the coffee snacks, and lunch. Hotel that serves sushi during a workshop coffee break is the best!

Secondly, during those times, I had my time to try their facilities from the extensive gym, pool, and sauna. The gym is good except they don't have person who clean the facilities after it's being used. I need to clean it by myself once I want to use it the other day. Especially during this pandemic, I think this servise is necessary. Also, I need to operate sauna by my own once, because it wasn't ON when I wanted to use, and there was no people except a spa lady who cannot operate it either. Lucky I had my phone and thanks to their internet: google always help.

Third and the most important, I love the way Kokoon team treats their guest personally. I used to drink lots of water everyday. Day one on a breakfast, I asked them to bring me a bottle of water instead of glass, as I don't want to go back and forth to the water container for my breakfast. Thing I do really appreciate was they brought me a bottle of water, everyday, for the rest of my breakfast during my stay, even without being asked.
Bravo!

The team of F&B definitely my favorite.
If I'm not mistaken about the name: Gofur. He was asking our opinion everytime after the food was prepared. Unless sugar is the way they show their sweetness, I prefer my food salty and spicy.

Thanks, Kokoon.
You are on my recommendation list! 🖤

author: Samsul
title: Very Good
text:
Sarapan bervariasi
Bubur ayamnya enak
Secara keseluruhan suka,
stafnya ramah2
Souvenir cookisnya enak anak2 suka

title: Nyaman dan menyenangkan
text:
Maanstaabss.
G ada

author: Nick Tan
title: Hotel yang keren di banyuwangi
text:
Hotel yg bersih
Staff ramah
AC dingin + air hangat shower bagus + pemandangan gunung + ada restaurant rooftop di lantai 16 
Sarapan lumayan tp persiapan nya kurang karena saat kami mau sarapan semua habis dan harus menunggu lama padahal baru jam 8.30 pagi...
Ya moga bisa lbh baik lagi...

author: Vindy Handika Putra
title: Very Special Service
text:
I was stayed yesterday in room 1126, for held my bestfriend birthday, i feel the comfort of that big place and nice ambience from my arrival and good check in Experience, Thanks to Mrs.Siska at the front desk who served me better and the best, and Good Room and nice room is prepare for me, 
And dont forget so very very thankfull for Mrs.Ayu Dewi that give my special treatment and that room for me,and thank you for the Cake too @Mrs Ayu Dewi,and im very recommend this place to other because of the good service and the big , comfort and nice place to visit :))

author: zanzan
title: hotel terbaik
text: sehari mencoba menginap dihotel ini memberi pengalaman baru dibanyuwangi, bisa memilih view kamar menghadap pegunungan atau laut, kamar yang sangat nyaman dan bagus, para karyawan hotel yang sangat ramah dan murah senyum. ada fasilitas rooftop jadi bisa memandang banyuwangi di ketinggian plus sunset di sore hari..lokasi hotel yang cukup strategis mudah dijangkau dengan kendaraan umum dan pribadi..adapun sedikit kekurangan untuk fasilitas kolam renang airnya kurang mengalir dan sebaiknya diberikan lampu2, tanaman agar lebih hidup dan perbanyak fasilitas hand sanitizer terutama di lift

author: Novia Afiantari
title: staycation bareng keluarga di Kokoon Hotel Banyuwangi
text:
Hotel baru yang bersih, staff ramah, hotel tertinggi di banyuwangi dan ada fasilitas rooftop yg bisa lihat banyuwangi dari ketinggian. pesan kamar conecting room, sayang belum ada yang sea view, jadi dapet yg mountain view aja.
ada fasilitas gym, sauna, dan indoor swimpool..
nongkrong di lobby hotel / rooftop jadi pilihan tepat,
sedikit yang kurang adalah pilihan menu breakfast nya kurang, next bisa ditambah yaaa.. 

overall nyaman staycation disini :-)

author: Juli P. S.
text: new hotel, the view from rooftop is so nice have kids facilities clean great hospitality

author: hotel yang nyaman
title: hotel sangat nyaman dan bagus
text:
hotel tertinggi di banyuwangi 
bagus bersih nyaman 
makanan enak enak 
kolam indoor  TEMPAT nongkrong diatas sangat menyebrangan bisa liat laut perbatasan dibali
pokoknya TOP banget hotelnya next tiap ada kunjungan kerja maunya stay di kokoon terus
